Mark6:56 Eye afisi wòyina ɖo le kɔƒewo alo duwo me alo agbletawo la, wotsɔa dɔlélawo va dana ɖe ablɔwo me, eye woɖea kuku ne bena, yewoade asi eƒe awuto ɖeɖeko ŋu; eye ame alesi nu de asi eŋu ko la, ƒe lãme sẽna." 
Mark7:1 Eye farisitɔwo kple agbalẽfialaa ɖewo, siwo tso Yerusalem va la, ƒo ƒu ɖe egbɔ." 
Mark7:2 Eye wokpɔ bena, eƒe nusrɔ̃laa ɖewo le abolo ɖum kple asi ƒoɖi, egɔme nye asi maklɔmaklɔe la;" 
Mark7:3 elabena farisitɔwo kple Yudatɔwo katã la, ne womeklɔ asi nyuie o la, womeɖua nu o; ale wonɔa ŋku lém ɖe amegãwo ƒe ko la ŋuti vevie;" 
Mark7:4 eye ne wotso asi me gbɔ la, ne womele tsi o la, womeɖua nu o, eye nu bubu geɖewo li, siwo ŋuti woléa ŋku ɖo le tsikpluwo kple zewo kple ganuwo kɔklɔ la me. —" 
Mark7:5 Eye farisitɔwo kple agbalẽfialawo biae bena: Nukaŋuti wò nusrɔ̃lawo mezɔna le amegãwo ƒe koa nu o, ke boŋ woɖua abolo asi maklɔmaklɔe mahã?" 
Mark7:6 Eɖo ŋu na wo bena: Yesaya gblɔe ɖi nyuie le mi alakpatɔwo ŋuti, abe alesi woŋlɔe ɖi ene bena: „Dukɔ sia le buyem kple nuyiwo; gake woƒe dzi te ɖa xaa tso gbɔnye." 
Mark7:7 Ke dzodzroe wole subɔyem, hele nufiafia, siwo nye amewo ƒe sededewo la fiãm.“" 
Mark7:8 Miegblẽ Mawu ƒe se la ɖi, eye mielé amewo ƒe kɔnyinyi me ɖe asi le zewo kple kplu wo kɔklɔ me; eye nu bubu geɖe, siwo le abe esiawo ene la, miewɔna." 
Mark7:9 Eye wògblɔ na wo bena: Mieɖe Mawu ƒe se la ɖa nyuie, bena mianyi mia ŋutɔwo ƒe kɔ." 
Mark7:10 Elabena Mose gblɔ bena: „Bu fofowò kple dawo; eye amesi ke gblɔa nya vɔ̃ ɖe fofoa kple dadaa ŋuti la, ku ke woaku;“" 
Mark7:11 ke miawo la miegblɔ be: Ne amea ɖe lagblɔ na fofoa alo dadaa bena: Nusi ke nate ŋu akpɔ tso gbɔnye la, nanye korban (esi gome enye nunana na Mawu)," 
Mark7:12 miena mee be, wòagawɔ naneke na fofoa alo dadaa o;" 
Mark7:13 eye miena Mawu ƒe nya la tsi mabumabu le miaƒe ka, si mieɖo anyi la ŋuti; eye nusiawo tugbe geɖe miewɔna." 
Mark7:14 Eye wògayɔ ameha la va egbɔ, gblɔ na wo bena: Mi katã miɖo tom, ne miase nu gome." 
Mark7:15 Naneke meli, si atso gota ayi ɖe ame me, si ate ŋu aƒo ɖii o; ke boŋ nusiwo le go dom tso ame me la, woawoe nye nusiwo ƒoa ɖi ame." 
Mark7:16 Ne amea ɖe to senu ti nɛ la, nesee!" 
Mark7:17 Eye esi wòdzo le ameha la gbɔ yi ɖe aƒe me la, eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo bia lo la gɔmee." 
Mark7:18 Eye wògblɔ na wo bena: Ale miawo hã mienye ame masenugɔmewoe nye esi mahã? Alo miedze sii kpɔ bena, nusianu, si tsoa gota yina ɖe ame me la, mate ŋu aƒo ɖii o;" 
Mark7:19 elabena menye eƒe dzi me wòyina ɖo o, hafi boŋ eƒe dɔ me wòyina ɖo, eye wòɖadena ɖe kpɔxa, le esia me nuɖuɖuawo katã ŋuti kɔna lena o mahã?" 
Mark7:20 Eye wògblɔ bena: Nusi ke doa go tsoa ame me la, eya ƒoa ɖi ame." 
Mark7:21 Elabena tso ame ƒe dzi me ke nu vɔ̃ɖi susuwo doa go tsona, matrewɔwɔwo, fififiwo, amewuwuwo," 
Mark7:22 ahasiwɔwɔwo, ŋubiabiãwo, nu vɔ̃ɖi wɔwɔwo, beble, ahiãdzedze, ŋku vɔ̃ɖi, busubɔbɔ, dàda, movidzɔdzɔ;" 
Mark7:23 nu vɔ̃ɖi siawo katã doa go tsoa eme ke, eye woƒoa ɖi ame." 
Mark7:24 Eye wòdzo le afima heyi ɖe Tiro-nutoawo me. Eye wòyi ɖe aƒea ɖe me, eye melɔ̃ be, amea ɖeke nanyae o, ke mete ŋu ɣla eɖokui o." 
Mark7:25 Elabena nyɔnua ɖe, si gbɔgbɔ makɔmakɔ le vianyɔnuvi me la, se eŋkɔ, eye wòva dze klo ɖe eƒe afɔ nu." 
Mark7:26 Ke nyɔnu la nye Helatɔ, si wodzi le Sirofoinike; eye wòɖe kuku nɛ bena, wòanya gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃ la aɖo goe tso vianyɔnuvi la me." 
Mark7:27 Eye wògblɔ nɛ bena; Na ɖeviwo naɖi ƒo gbɔ; elabena menyo bena, woatsɔ ɖeviwo ƒe abolo aƒu gbe na avũviwo o." 
Mark7:28 Ke eya xɔ edzi gblɔ ne bena: Yoo, Aƒetɔ! Gake avũvi, siwo le kplɔ̃ te la, ɖua ɖeviwo ƒe abolo wuwluiwo tso." 
Mark7:29 Eye wògblɔ nɛ bena: Le nya sia ŋuti la heyi; gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃ la do go tso viwònyɔnuvi la me. 
Mark7:30 Eye esi wòdzo va eƒe me la, ekpɔ ɖevi la mlɔ aba dzi, eye gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃ la do go." 
Mark7:31 Esi wògado go tso Tiro-nutoawo me la, etso Sidon heto Galilea-ƒu la nu heva Dekapoli-nutoawo me ke." 
Mark7:32 Eye wotsɔ amea ɖe, si nye tokunɔ kple aɖetututɔ la, va egbɔ, eye woɖe kuku nɛ bena, wòatsɔ eƒe asi ada ɖe edzi." 
Mark7:33 Eye wotsɔ eyama heƒo asae tso ameha la gbɔ, eye wotsɔ eƒe asibidewo ƒo ɖe eƒe to me, eye wòɖe ta ɖo eƒe aɖe nu;" 
Mark7:34 eye esi wòle dziƒo kpɔm la, eɖe hũ, eye wògblɔ ne bena. „Hefata“, si gɔme enye: Ʋua!" 
Mark7:35 Tete eƒe to la ʋu, eye enumake eƒe aɖeka hã ɖɔ ɖo, eye wòƒo nu nyuie." 
Mark7:36 Eye wòde se na wo bena, woagatoe na amea ɖeke o; ke geɖe alesi wòde se na wòe la, geɖe wu woyi ɖakakae." 
Mark7:37 Eye kuvia ɖo wo ŋutɔ, eye wole gbɔgblɔm bena: Ewɔ nuwo katã nyuie, ena tokunɔwo sea nu, eye aɖetututɔwo hã ƒoa nu." 
Mark8:1 Le ŋkeke ma wo me, esi ameha gãa ɖe gava, eye naneke mele wo si, be woaɖu o la, Yesu yɔ eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo va egbɔ gblɔ na wo bena:" 
Mark8:2 Nye dɔme trɔ ɖe ameha la ŋuti; elabena egbee nye ŋkeke etɔ̃agbe wole ŋutinye, eye womekpɔ naneke, be woaɖu o;" 
Mark8:3 eye ne medo mɔ wo dɔme ɣeɣi, be woayi aƒe la, aƒetrɔ latsɔ wo le mɔ dzi, eye wo dome amea ɖewo hã tso didiƒe." 
Mark8:4 Eye eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo xɔ edzi nɛ bena: Afika amea ɖe late ŋu akpɔ abolo atsoe le gbedzi afii, be amesiawo naɖi ƒo mahã?" 
Mark8:5 Eye wòbia wo bena: Abolo nenie le mia si mahã? Ke wogblɔ bena: Wo ame adre. 
Mark8:6 Eye wòɖo bena, ameha la nabɔbɔ nɔ anyigba; eye wotsɔ abolo adre la, eye esi wòda akpe ɖe wo dzi la, èŋe me, eye wòtsɔe na eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo, bena woatsɔe na wo, eye wotsɔe ɖo ameha la kɔ me." 
Mark8:7 Eye lãvi ʋeea ɖewo hã le wo si, eye esi wòyra ɖe wo dzi la, ena wotsɔ woawo hã ɖo wo kɔ me." 
Mark8:8 Eye woɖu nu, eye woɖi ƒo, eye wòfɔ kakɛ, siwo susɔ la, wòde kevi adre." 
Mark8:9 Ke wo nu anɔ ame akpe ene, eye wòdo mɔ wo." 
Mark8:10 Eye enumake wòɖo ʋu kple eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo, eye wova Dalmanuta-nutoawo me." 
Mark8:11 Eye farisitɔwo do go va, eye wode asi nusese me kplii hele dzesi biamii tso dziƒo hele etem kpo." 
Mark8:12 Eye wòɖe hũ le eƒe gbɔgbɔ la me gblɔ bena: Nukaŋuti dzidzime sia le dzesi dim mahã? Vavã mele egblɔm na mi bena: Womele dzesia ɖeke na ge dzidzime sia o. 
Mark8:13 Eye wògblẽ wo ɖi gaɖo ʋu heyi go keme dzi. 
Mark8:14 Eye woŋlɔ abolotsɔtsɔ ɖe asi be, eye ɖeke mele wo si le ʋua me o, negbe abolo ɖeka ko." 
Mark8:15 Eye wòde se na wo bena: Mikpɔ nyuie, eye milé be na mia ɖokui le farisitɔwo ƒe amiwo ʋaʋã kple Herodes ƒe amewo ʋaʋã la ŋuti." 
Mark8:16 Eye wòke ɖi le wo nɔewo dome gblɔ bena: Le esi míetsɔ abolo de asi o la ŋutie. 
Mark8:17 Eye esi wòdze sii la, egblɔ na wo bena: Nuka miele di kem be, mietsɔ abolo de asi o mahã? Ɖe miedze si nu kpo haɖe alo se nu gome hã oa, alo miaƒe dzime ɖe wògasẽ mahã?" 
Mark8:18 Ŋku li na mi, miekpɔa nu o! Eye to li na mi, miesea nu o! Eye mieɖoa ŋku nu dzi o," 
Mark8:19 bena meŋe abolo atɔ̃ me hemã ɖe ame akpe atɔ̃ dome, eye abolo kakɛawo la kevi nenie miefɔ mahã? Wogblɔ nɛ be: Wo ame wuieve." 
Mark8:20 Eye wo ame adre ɖe ame akpe ene dome la, kakɛawo la kevi nenie fũ miefɔ mahã? Eye wobena: Wo ame adre." 
Mark8:21 Eye wògblɔ na wo bena: Ɖe miese nu gome haɖe ke o mahã? 
Mark8:22 Eye wòva Betsaida. Eye wokplɔ ŋkuagbãtɔa ɖe va egbɔ, eye woɖe kuku nɛ bena, wòaɖe asi eŋu." 
Mark8:23 Eye esi wòlé ŋkuagbãtɔ la ƒe alɔnu la, ekplɔe do go tso du la me, eye esi wòɖe ta ɖe ŋku dzi nɛ, eye wòtsɔ eƒe asiwo ɖo edzi la, ebiae bena: Ele nane kpɔma?" 
Mark8:24 Esi wòwu ŋku dzi la, egblɔ bena: Mekpɔ amewo; mekpɔ wo wole abe atiwo ene hele azɔli zɔm." 
Mark8:25 Tete wògatsɔ eƒe asiwo ɖo eƒe ŋkuwo dzi, eye wòklẽ ŋku sesĩe; eye wòɖɔe do, eye wòkpɔ nusianu nyuie." 
Mark8:26 Eye wòdɔe ɖo ɖe eƒe me gblɔ bena: Megayi ɖe ɖu la me o. 
Mark8:27 Eye Yesu do go kple eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo heyi ɖe Kaisarea Filipi ƒe kɔƒewo me; eye le mo dzi la ebia eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo gblɔ na wo bena: Ameka amewo gblɔna bena, menye mahã?" 
Mark8:28 Ke wogblɔ nɛ bena: Yohanes mawutsidetanamelae, eye bubuwo bena: Eliya ye; ke bubuwo bena: Nyagblɔɖilawo dometɔ ɖekae." 
Mark8:29 Eye wòbia wo bena: Ke miawo la, ameka miegblɔna bena, menye mahã? Eye Petro ɖo ŋu gblɔ nɛ bena: Wòe nye Kristo la." 
Mark8:30 Eye wogbe nya na wo bena, woagagblɔ nya le ye ŋuti na amea ɖeke o." 
Mark8:31 Eye wòde asi wo fiafia me bena: Ele na Amegbetɔvi la bena, woakpe fu geɖe, eye amegãwo kple nunɔlagãwo kple agbalẽfialawo woado vloe, eye woawui, eye wòatsi tre le ŋkeke etɔ̃agbe." 
Mark8:32 Eye wòto nya sia na wo faa. Tete Petro de kpoe, eye wòde asi nyagbegbe me nɛ." 
Mark8:33 Ke etrɔ kpɔ eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo, eye wogbe nya na Petro gblɔ bena: Te ɖokuiwò ɖa yi megbenye, Satana! Elabena menye Mawu tɔ nèsusu o, negbe nusi nye amegbetɔwo tɔ la ko." 
Mark8:34 Eye wòyɔ ameha la kple eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo va egbɔ gblɔ na wo bena: Amesi ke le lɔlɔ̃m bena, yeadze yonyeme la, negbe nu le ye ŋutɔ dokui gbɔ, eye wòatsɔ eƒe atitsoga, eye wòadze yonyeme." 
Mark8:35 Elabena amesi ke di be, yeade yeƒe agbe la, atsrɔ̃e; ke amesi atsrɔ̃ eƒe agbe le nye kple nyanyuie la ŋuti la, aɖee." 
Mark8:36 Elabena viɖe ka wòanye na ame, ne xexeme blibo la katã zu etɔ, ke wòabu eƒe luʋɔ mahã?" 
Mark8:37 Alo nuka amegbetɔ atsɔ ana agaxɔ eƒe luʋɔ mahã? 
Mark8:38 Elabena amesi ke kpe ŋu nye kple nye nyawo le dzidzime wɔahasi kple dzidzime wonuvɔ̃ sia dome la, Amegbetɔvi la hã akpe ŋui, ne ava le Fofoa ƒe ŋutikɔkɔe me kple mawudɔla kɔkɔeawo." 
Mark9:1 Eye wògblɔ na wo bena: Vavã mele egblɔm na mi bena: Amea ɖewo le amesiwo le tsitre le afisia la dome, siwo mele ku ɖɔ ge akpɔ o, vaseɖe esime woakpɔ Mawu ƒe fiaɖuƒe la wògbɔna kple ŋusẽ." 
Mark9:2 Ŋkeke ade megbe la Yesu ɖe Petro, Yakobo kple Yohanes kpe ɖe eɖokui ŋuti, eye wòkplɔ wo yi to kɔkɔa ɖe dzi, woawo ɖeɖe; eye eƒe nɔnɔme trɔ le woƒe ŋku me," 
Mark9:3 eye eƒe awuwo trɔ le dzo dam hefu tititi, eye nunyãlaa ɖeke mele anyigba dzi ate ŋu awɔ wo woafu alea o." 
Mark9:4 Eye Eliya kple Mose woɖe wo ɖokui fia wo, eye wole nu ƒom kple Yesu." 
Mark9:5 Eye Petro xa edzi gblɔ na Yesu bena: Rabi, enyo na mi bena, miano afisia, eye miawo agbadɔ etɔ̃, tɔwò ɖeka, Mose to ɖeka kple Eliya to ɖeka." 
Mark9:6 Elabena menya nusi wòagblɔ o, elabena wovɔ̃ ŋutɔ." 
Mark9:7 Eye alilikpo va do vɔvɔli ɖe wo dzi, eye gbe tso alilikpo la me gblɔ bena: „Amesia enye vinye, si nyemelɔ̃a nu egbɔ o, miɖo to eyama!“" 
Mark9:8 Eye enumake, esi wole ŋku tsam godoo la, womegakpɔ amea ɖeke o, negbe Yesu ɖeka koe le wo gbɔ." 
Mark9:9 Eye esi wole ɖiɖim tso to la dzi la, Yesu de se na wo bena, woagagblɔ nusiwo wokpɔ la, na amea ɖeke o, negbe ne Amegbetɔvi la tsi tre tso ame kukuwo dome ko." 
Mark9:10 Eye wodzra nya la ɖo, eye wobia le wo nɔewo dome bena: Nukae nye tsitretsitsi tso ame kukuwo dome la mahã?" 
Mark9:11 Eye wobiae gblɔ bena: Aleke wòle be, farisitɔwo kple agbalẽfialawo gblɔ bena: Ele na Eliya be, wòava gbãgbiagbã mahã?" 
Mark9:12 Ke egblɔ na wo bena: Eliya gbɔna gbãgbiagbã, eye wòaɖo nuwo katã ɖo; eye aleke woŋlɔ ɖi le Amegbetɔvi la ŋuti bena, akpe fu geɖe, eye woado vloe mahã?" 
Mark9:13 Gake mele egblɔm na mi bena: Eliya va xoxo, eye wowɔ nusi wolɔ̃ la, ɖe eŋuti, abe alesi woŋlɔ ɖi le eŋuti ene." 
Mark9:14 Eye esi wòva nusrɔ̃lawo gbɔ la, ekpɔ ameha gãa ɖe ƒo xlã wo, eye agbalẽfialawo le nu sẽm kpli wo." 
Mark9:15 Eye enumake, esi ameha la katã kpɔe la, dzidzi ƒo wo ŋuta, eye wosi du yi egbɔ hedo gbe nɛ." 
Mark9:16 Eye wòbia wo bena: Nuka miele nu sẽm kpli wo? 
Mark9:17 Eye lãme ɖeka tso ameha la dome ɖo eŋu nɛ bena: Nufiala, mekplɔ vinyeŋutsuvi, si me gbɔgbɔ maƒonu le la, va gbɔwò;" 
Mark9:18 eye afisi ke wòlée le la, enyamanɛ, eye futukpɔ dona le enu, eye woɖua aɖukli, eye wòɖia ku; megblɔ na wò nusrɔ̃lawo bena, woanyãe ado goe, eye womete ŋui o." 
Mark9:19 Eye wòdo eŋu na wo gblɔ bena: O, dzidzime maxɔse! Ɣekaɣi mana anyi kpli mi ase ɖo? Eye ɣekaɣi mado dzi ahe mi ase do mahã? Mikplɔe va gbɔnye!" 
Mark9:20 Eye wokplɔe va egbɔ; esi wòkpɔe la, enumake gbɔgbɔ la nyamae, eye wòtsyɔ kplo hele dablibɛ ƒom le futukpɔ ɖem." 
Mark9:21 Eye wòbia fofoa bena: Ɣekaɣi nusia va edzi mahã? Eye wòbena: Tso keke eƒe ɖevime kee. 
Mark9:22 Eye enuenu wòtsɔnɛ ƒua dzo me kple to me, bena yeawui; ke ne ate ŋu awɔ nane la, kpɔ miaƒe nublanui, ne naxa na mi." 
Mark9:23 Eye Yesu gblɔ nɛ bena: Ne ate ŋui! Amesi xɔe se la, ate ŋu awɔ nusianu." 
Mark9:24 Enumake ɖevia fofo do ɣli gblɔ bena: Mexɔe se, xɔ na nye maxɔse la!" 
Mark9:25 Ke esi Yesu kpɔ bena, ameha la le ɖu ƒum gbɔna la, ewo ɖe gbɔgbɔ makɔmakɔ la ta gblɔ bena: Wò gbɔgbɔ maƒonu kple tokunɔ, mede se na wò, do go le eme, eye tso esia dzi la megayi ɖe eme o!" 
Mark9:26 Eye wòdo go kple ɣlidodo hele enyamam ŋutɔ, eye wòzu abe ɖe woku ene; ale bena ame geɖewo gblɔ bena: Eku." 
Mark9:27 Ke Yesu lé eƒe alɔnu hekɔe ɖe dzi, eye wòtsi tre." 
Mark9:28 Eye esi wòva aƒea me la, eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo ɖeɖe va egbɔ biae bena: Aleke wɔ míawo miete ŋu nyae do go o mahã?" 
Mark9:29 Eye wògblɔ na wo bena: Esia ƒomevi la mate ŋu ado go to naneke me o, negbe to gbedodoɖa kple nutsitsidɔ me ko." 
Mark9:30 Eye esi wodze le afima la, wotso Galilea me yi, eye melɔ̃ bena, amea ɖeke nanya ye o." 
Mark9:31 Elabena efia nu eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo, eye wògblɔ na wo bena: Woade Amegbetɔvi la asi na amewo, eye woawui, eye ne wowui la, agatsi tre le ŋkeke etɔ̃agbe." 
Mark9:32 Ke woawo la womese nya sia gɔme o, eye wova le ebiabia ŋuti." 
Mark9:33 Eye wòva Kapernaum. Esi wòva aƒe me la, ebia wo bena: Nuka miele ɖi kem le mia nɔewo dome le mɔ dzi mahã?" 
Mark9:34 Ke wozi kpi; elabena wole nya ʋlim le wo nɔewo dome le mɔ dzi bena: Amekae nye gãtɔ mahã? 
Mark9:35 Eye esi wòbɔbɔ na anyi la, eya ame wuieveawo, eye wògblɔ na wo bena: Ne amea ɖe ɖi bena, yeanye gbãtɔ la, nanye wo katã ƒe mlɔetɔ kple wo katã ƒe subɔla." 
Mark9:36 Eye wotsa ɖevi suea ɖe ɖo wo titina, eye wòlée ɖe eƒe akɔnu gblɔ na wo bena:" 
Mark9:37 Amesi ke laxɔ ɖevi siawo dometɔ ɖeka le nye ŋkɔ dzi la, nyee wòxɔ, eye amesi ke laxɔm la, menye nye wòxɔ o, ke boŋ amesi dom lae." 
Mark9:38 Yohanes gblɔ ne bena: Nufiala, miekpɔ amea ɖe, si le gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃wo nyãm le go dom le wò ŋkɔ la dzi, eye miegbe nɛ, elabena mele mía yome o." 
Mark9:39 Eye Yesu gblɔ bena: Migagbe ne o! Elabena amea ɖeke meli, si awɔ ŋusẽdɔ le nye ŋkɔ la dzi, eye wòate ŋu agble nya vɔ̃ enumake ɖe ŋunye o." 
Mark9:40 Elabena amesi ke meto vo ɖe mia ŋuti o la, eya le mía dzi." 
Mark9:41 Elabena amesi ke ana tsi kplu ɖeka mi be, miano le nye ŋkɔ me, esi wònye Kristo tɔ míenye ŋuti la, vava mele egblɔm na mi bena: Eƒe fetu la mele eŋu tsi ge o." 
Mark9:42 Ke amesi ke laɖia ɖevi sue, siwo xɔa dzinye sena, dometɔ ɖeka nu la, enyo nɛ wu bena, woatso té atsi ɖe ka ne, eye woatsɔe aƒu gbe ɖe ƒu me." 
Mark9:43 Eye ne wò asi ɖia nu wò la, lae ɖa; enyo na wò bena, nayi ɖe agbe la me kple asikpo, wu esi asi eve nanɔe na wò, eye nayi ɖe dzomavɔʋe la me," 
Mark9:44 afisi woƒe nyẽ mekuna le o, eye dzo la hã metsina le o." 
Mark9:45 Ke ne wò afɔ ɖia nu wò la, lae ɖa; enyo na wò be, nayi ɖe agbe la me kple afɔkpo, wu esi afa eve nanɔe na wò, eye woatsɔ wò aƒu gbe ɖe dzomavɔʋe la me," 
Mark9:46 afisi woƒe nyẽ mekuna le o, eye dzo la hã metsina le o." 
Mark9:47 Eye ne wò ŋku ɖia nu wò la, hoe le eme; enyo na wò bena, nayi ɖe mawufiaɖuƒe la me kple ŋku ɖeka, wu esi ŋku eve nanɔe na wò, eye woatsɔ wò aƒu gbe ɖe dzomavɔʋe la me," 
Mark9:48 afisi woƒe nyẽ mekuna le o, eye dzo la hã metsina le o." 
Mark9:49 Elabena amesiame la woatso dzo ade dzee, eye vɔsasa sia vɔsasa la woatso dze adee." 
Mark9:50 Dze la nu nyui wònye; ke ne dze bu eƒe vivi la, nuka tsɔ ge míala ado vivii mahã? Mina dze naɖo mi, eye ŋutifafa nanɔ mia dome." 
Mark10:1 Eye esi wòdzo le afima la, eva Yudea-nutoawo me kple Yordan godo, eye amehawo gava ƒo ƒu ɖe egbɔ, eye abe alesi wònɔa wɔwɔm ene la, egafia nuwo." 
Mark10:2 Eye farisitɔwo va egbɔ, eye wobiae hele etem kpɔ bena: Alo woɖe ma na ŋutsu bena, wòaɖe asi le srɔ̃a ŋu mahã?" 
Mark10:3 Eye wòɖo ŋu na wo bena: Aleke Mose de see na mi mahã? 
Mark10:4 Ke wogblɔ bena: Mose ɖe mɔ bena, woaŋlɔ srɔ̃gbegbalẽ, eye woaɖe asi le eŋu." 
Mark10:5 Eye Yesu gblɔ na wo bena: Le miaƒe dzimesesẽ ŋuti woŋlɔ se sia ɖi na mi ɖo. 
Mark10:6 Tso nuwɔwɔ ƒe gɔmedzedzea me ke la atsu kple asi wòwɔ wòe. 
Mark10:7 Le esia ta ame agblẽ fofoa kple dadaa ɖi, eye wòalé ɖe srɔ̃nyɔnua ŋuti," 
Mark10:8 eye wo kpakple eve woanye ŋutilã ɖeka, ale bena tso esia dzi yina la womeganye ame eve o, negbe ŋutilã ɖeka ko." 
Mark10:9 Azɔ nusi ke Mawu bla ɖekae la, ame nagamã me o." 
Mark10:10 Eye le aƒea me la nusrɔ̃lawo gabia le nya sia ŋuti. 
Mark10:11 Eye wògblɔ na wo bena: Amesi ke aɖe asi le srɔ̃a ŋuti, eye wòaɖe bubu la, ewo ahasi ɖe eyama ŋuti;" 
Mark10:12 eye ne nyanu agbe srɔ̃a, eye wòaɖe bubu la, ewo ahasi." 
Mark10:13 Eye wotsɔ ɖevi suewo va egbɔ be, woada asi ɖe wo dzi; ke nusrɔ̃lawo blu ɖe amesiwo tso wo ve la ta." 
Mark10:14 Ke esi Yesu kpɔe la, menyo eŋu o, eye wògblɔ na wo bena: Mina ɖeviwo nava gbɔnye, eye migaxe mɔ na wo o; elabena nenem mewo tɔ enye mawufiaɖuƒe la." 
Mark10:15 Vavã mele egblɔm na mi bena: Amesi ke mexɔ mawufiaɖuƒe la abe ɖevi ene o la, mele eme yi ge o." 
Mark10:16 Eye esi wòlé wo ɖe eƒe akɔnu la, eyra wo, le esime wòda asi ɖe wo dzi." 
Mark10:17 Eye esi wòdze mɔ dzi la, amea ɖe si du va dze klo ɖe eƒe akɔ me, eye wòbiae bena: Nufiala nyui, nuka mawɔ, bena manyi agbe mava la dome mahã?" 
Mark10:18 Eye Yesu gblɔ nɛ bena: Nuka nèle yɔyem bena nyui mahã? Amea ɖeke mele nyui o, negbe Mawu ɖeka ko." 
Mark10:19 Enya seawo bena: „Megawɔ ahasi o. Megawu ame o. Megafi fi o. Megaɖi aʋatsoɖase o. Megaba ame o. Bu fofowò kple dawò. 
Mark10:20 Ke egblɔ nɛ bena: Nufiala, mewo nusiawo katã dzi tso nye ɖevime ke." 
Mark10:21 Ke Yesu kpɔe du, eye wòlɔ̃e, gblɔ ne bena: Nu ɖeka susɔ na wò; heyi ɖadzra nusiwo le asiwò, eye natsɔ wo ana ame dahewo; ekema kesinɔnu anɔ dziƒo na wò, eye nava anɔ yonyeme, eye natsɔ atitsoga la." 
Mark10:22 Ke eto mo le nya sia ŋuti hedzo kple nuxaxa; elabena nu geɖewo le esi. 
Mark10:23 Eye Yesu tsa ŋku godoo gblɔ na eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo bena: Aleke gbegbe wosẽ na amesiwo si kesinɔnuwo le la, bena wòayi ɖe mawufiaɖuƒe la mee!" 
Mark10:24 Ke nusrɔ̃lawo tsi yaa le eƒe nyawo ŋuti. Eye Yesu gaxɔ edzi gblɔ na wo bena: Viwo, esẽ bena, amesiwo ɖoa dzi ɖe kesinɔnuwo ŋuti la, nayi ɖe mawufiaɖuƒe la me!" 
Mark10:25 Ele bɔbɔe na kposɔ be, wòato abi ƒe vo me, wu alesi kesinɔtɔwo nayi ɖe mawufiaɖuƒe la mee." 
Mark10:26 Eye kuvia ɖo wo ŋuta, eye wogblɔ na wo nɔewo bena: Ekema ameka gɔ̃e ate ŋu akpɔ ɖeɖe mahã?" 
Mark10:27 Eye Yesu kpɔ wo du gblɔ bena: Amegbetɔwo gbɔ la womate ŋu awɔ esia o; gake Mawu gbɔ la woate ŋui; elabena woate ŋu awɔ nusianu le Mawu gbɔ. 
Mark10:28 Petro de asi gbɔgblɔ me nɛ bena: Kpɔ ɖa, miawo la miegblẽ nuwo katã ɖi, eye miedze yowòme." 
Mark10:29 Yesu gblɔ bena: Vavã mele egblɔm na mi bena: Amea ɖeke meli, si gblẽ xɔ alo nɔviŋutsuwo alo nɔvinyɔnuwo alo fofo alo dada alo srɔ̃ alo viwo alo agblewo ɖi le nye kple nyanyuie la ŋuti," 
Mark10:30 ne menye bena, ɖe wòaxɔ teƒeɖoɖo alafa le ɣeyiɣi sia me o: Xɔwo kple nɔviŋutsuwo kple nɔvinyɔnuwo kple dadawo kple viwo kple agblewo hekpe ɖe yometitiwo ŋuti, kple agbe mavɔ le xexe, si gbɔna la me." 
Mark10:31 Ke ame geɖe, siwo nye mlɔetɔwo, lazu gbãtɔwo, eye gbãtɔwo lazu mlɔetɔwo." 
Mark10:32 Eye esi wole mo dzi yina Yerusalem la, Yesu dze wo ŋgɔ, eye woƒe mo wɔ yaa, ke amesiwo dze eyome la, wovɔ̃. Eye esi wògayɔ ame wuieveawo va egbɔe la, ede asi nusiwo le edzi va ge la, gbɔgblɔ me na wo bena:" 
Mark10:33 Kpɔ ɖa, mieyina Yerusalem, eye woade Amegbetɔvi la asi na nunɔlagãwo kple agbalẽfialawo, eye woatso kufia nɛ, eye woatsɔe ade asi na trɔ̃subɔlawo;" 
Mark10:34 eye woaɖu fewu le eŋuti, eye woaɖe ta ɖe eŋu, eye woaƒoe kple atam, eye woawui, eye ŋkeke etɔ̃agbe la atsi tre." 
Mark10:35 Eye Yakobo kple Yohanes, siwo nye Zebedeo viwo la, va egbɔ gblɔ nɛ bena: Nufiala, miele didim bena, nusi ke míabia wò la, nawɔe na mí." 
Mark10:36 Eye wògblɔ na wo bena: Nuka dim miele be, mawo na mi mahã?" 
Mark10:37 Ke wogblɔ nɛ bena: Na bena, mia dome ame ɖeka nabɔbɔ nɔ anyi ɖe wò nuɖusi me, eye ɖeka hã nanɔ wò mia me le wò ŋutikɔkɔe la me." 
Mark10:38 Ke Yesu gblɔ na wo bena: Mienya nusi biam miele o. Alo miate ŋu ano kplu, si no ge nye ŋutɔ malaa? Alo woade mawutsi ta na mi kple mawutsi, si woatsɔ ade ta na nye ŋuta mahã?" 
Mark10:39 Eye wogblɔ nɛ bena: Miate ŋui. Ke Yesu gblɔ na wo bena: Kplu, si ke nye ŋutɔ miano la, mianoe, eye mawutsi, si woatsɔ aɖe ta na nye ŋuta la, woatsɔ ade ta na mi;" 
Mark10:40 ke anyinɔnɔ ɖe nye nuɖusi kple mia me la, menye tɔnye be, mana o, negbe amesiwo wodzrɛ ɖo ɖi na la ko." 
Mark10:41 Eye esi ame ewo la see la, ede asi dɔmeveve me na wo le Yakobo kple Yohanes ŋuti." 
Mark10:42 Eye Yesu ya wo va egbɔ gblɔ na wo bena; Mienyae bena, amesiwo ŋu bubu le bena, woaɖu dukɔwo dzi la, woawoe ɖua aƒetɔ ɖe wo dzi, eye woƒe amegãwo kpɔa ŋusẽ ɖe wo dzi." 
Mark10:43 Ke neganɔ nenema le mia dome o; ke boŋ amesi di bena, yeazu gã le mia dome la, nanye miaƒe subɔla;" 
Mark10:44 eye amesi ke di bena, yeanye gbãtɔ le mia dome la, nanye amewo katã ƒe dɔla." 
Mark10:45 Elabena Amegbetɔvi la hã menye ɖe wòva bena, woasubɔ ye o; ke boŋ bena, yeasubɔ, eye bena, yeatsɔ yeƒe agbe la ana le ame geɖewo ƒe xɔxɔ ta." 
Mark10:46 Eye wova Yerixo; eye esi wòdo go tso Yerixo kple eƒe nusiawo kple ameha gã la, Bartimeo, Timeo vi, si nye nubiala ŋkuagbãtɔ la, bɔbɔ nɔ anyi ɖe mɔ to." 
Mark10:47 Eye esi wose bena, Yesu, Nazaretetɔ lae la, eɖe asi ɣlidodo me le gbɔgblɔm bena: Yesu, Dawid vi la, kpɔ ye nublanui!" 
Mark10:48 Eye ame geɖewo blu ɖe eta, bena wòazi ɖoɖoe; ke egado ɣli geɖe wu tsãtɔ bena: Dawid vi la, kpɔ ye nublanui!" 
Mark10:49 Tete Yesu tɔ ɖe tsitre gblɔ bena: Miyɔe ɖa. Eye esi woyɔ ŋkuagbãtɔ la la, wogblɔ nɛ bena: Na wò dzi nadze eme! Tsi tre, ele yɔwòm." 
Mark10:50 Ke esi wòɖe eƒe awu ƒu gbe la, etso hiã va Yesu gbɔ." 
Mark10:51 Eye Yesu xɔ dzi gblɔ nɛ bena: Nuka dim nèle be, mawɔ na wòa? Eye ŋkuagbãtɔ la gblɔ nɛ bena: Rabuni, bena makpɔ nu." 
Mark10:52 Eye Yesu gblɔ nɛ bena: Heyi, wò xɔse la ɖe wò! Eye enumake la wòkpɔ nu, eye wòdze eyome le mɔ la dzi." 
Mark11:1 Eye esi wogogo Yerusalem te ɖe Betfage kple Betania ŋu le Amito la ŋuti la, edo eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo dome ame eve;" 
Mark11:2 eye wògblɔ na wo bena: Miyi ɖe kɔƒe, si le mia ŋgɔ la me, eye enumake, ne míage ɖe eme la, míakpɔ tedzivi, si wode kae, esi dzi amea ɖeke menɔ kpɔ o; mitui, eye mikplɔe vɛ." 
Mark11:3 Eye ne amea ɖe lagblɔ na mi bena: Nukaŋuti miele esia wɔm mahã la, migblɔ be: Aƒetɔ la le ehiãm, eye enumake aɖoe ɖe afisia." 
Mark11:4 Tete wodzo yi, eye wokpɔ tedzivi la, wode kae ɖe agbo la nu le xexe le mɔ to, eye wotui." 
Mark11:5 Eye amesiwo le tsitre ɖe afima la, dometɔa ɖewo bia wo bena: Nuka wɔ, eye miele tedzivi la tum mahã?" 
Mark11:6 Eye wogblɔ na wo, abe alesi Yesu gblɔ la ene; eye woɖe mɔ le eŋu na wo." 
Mark11:7 Tete wokplɔ tedzivi la va Yesu gbɔ, eye wotsɔ woƒe avɔwo ɖo edzi; eye wòbɔbɔ nɔ edzi." 
Mark11:8 Eye ame geɖewo keke woƒe avɔwo ɖe mɔ la dzi, ke bubuwo ya gbewo tso agblewo me." 
Mark11:9 Eye amesiwo le eŋgɔ kple esiwo le eyome la, do ɣli gblɔ bena: Hosana! Woayra amesi gbɔna le Aƒetɔ la ƒe ŋkɔa me." 
Mark11:10 Woayra mía fofo Dawid ƒe fiaɖuƒe, si gbɔna la! Hosana le dziƒo ʋĩ!" 
Mark11:11 Eye wòyi Yerusalem ɖe mawuƒe la me, eye esi wòtsa ŋku nuwo katã godoo, eye fiẽsi le ɖoɖom la, eyi ɖe Betania kple ame wuieve la." 
Mark11:12 Eye esi ŋu ke wodo go tso Betania la, dɔ wui." 
Mark11:13 Eye esi wòkpɔ gbotia ɖe le adzɔge, si dzi aŋgbawo le la, eyi bena ɖewohĩ yeakpɔ nane le edzi; eye esi wote ɖe eŋu la, mekpɔ naneke o, negbe aŋgbawo ko, elabena gbotiwo tseɣi meɖo haɖe o." 
Mark11:14 Eye wòde asi gbɔgblɔ me nɛ bena; Tso esia dzi yina la amea ɖeke maɖu wò kutsetsea ɖeke o halase tegbetegbe. Eye eƒe nusiawo see. 
Mark11:15 Eye wova Yerusalem; eye esi wòyi ɖe mawuƒe la me la, ede asi amesiwo le nu dzram kple amesiwo le nu ƒlem le mawuƒe la me la, nyanyã me do goe, eye wòmũ gaɖuɖɔlawo ƒe kplɔ̃wo kple amesiwo le ahɔ̃newo dzram la, ƒe zikpuiwo ƒu anyi." 
Mark11:16 Eye meɖe mɔ bena, amea ɖeke netso goe ato mawuƒe la me o." 
Mark11:17 Eye wòfia nu gblɔ na wo bena: Alo womeŋlɔ ɖi bena: Woayɔ nye aƒe la be gbedoxɔ na dukɔwo katã oa? Ke miawo la mietsɔe wɔ adzodalawo ƒe ɖoe. 
Mark11:18 Eye nunɔlagãwo kple agbalẽfialawo see, eye wodi, alesi woawɔ awui, elabena wovɔ̃e; elabena kuvia ɖo ameha blibo la katã le eƒe nufiafia la ŋuti." 
Mark11:19 Eye ne fiẽsi ɖo la, edoa go le dua me." 
Mark11:20 Eye esi wòva yina le ŋdi me la, wokpɔ gboti la yrɔ su tso keke eƒe ke te." 
Mark11:21 Eye Petro ɖo ŋku edzi gblɔ nɛ bena: Rabi, kpɔ ɖa, gboti, si neƒo fi ɖee la yrɔ." 
Mark11:22 Eye Yesu xa dzi gblɔ na wo bena: Mawu dzi xɔse nenɔ mia si! 
Mark11:23 Vavã mele egblɔm na mi bena: Amesi ke lagblɔ na to sia bena: Ho, ne nayi aɖadze ƒu me, eye mekea ɖi le eƒe dzi me o, hafi boŋ wòxɔnɛ sena bena, nusi gblɔm yele, le eme va ge la, ava ve me ne." 
Mark11:24 Eyaŋuti mele egblɔm na mí bena: Nusianu, si ke ta míado gbe ɖa le, eye míabia la, mixɔe se bena, asu mia si, eye ava ve me na mi." 
Mark11:25 Eye ne miele tsitre le gbe ɖom ɖa, eye nyaa ɖe le miaƒe dzi me ɖe amea ɖe ŋu la, mitsɔe kee, bena mia Fofo, si le dziƒowo la, natsɔ miaƒe vodadawo hã ake mi." 
Mark11:26 Ke ne mietsɔe ke o la, ekema mia Fofo, si le dziƒowo la, matsɔ miaƒe vodadawo hã ake mi o." 
Mark11:27 Eye wogava Yerusalem; eye esi wòle tsatsam le mawuƒe la me la, nunɔlagãwo kple agbalẽfialawo kple dumegãwo va egbɔ;" 
Mark11:28 eye wogblɔ nɛ bena: Ŋusẽ ka nètso wɔ esiawoe; alo ameka tsɔ ŋusẽ sia na wò be, nawɔ esiawoe mahã?" 
Mark11:29 Eye Yesu gblɔ na wo bena: Nye hã mabia nya ɖeka mi, ne mieɖo eŋu nam la, nye hã magblɔ ŋusẽ, si metsɔ wɔ esiawoe la, na mi." 
Mark11:30 Yohanes ƒe mawutsidedetaname la ɖe, dziƒo wòtso loo, alo amewo gbɔ wòtso mahã? Miɖo eŋu nam!" 
Mark11:31 Eye wòke ɖi le wo nɔewo dome bena: Ne míegblɔ bena: Dziƒo wòtso la, agble bena: Nukaŋuti miexɔ edzi se o mahã?" 
Mark11:32 Alo ɖe miagblɔ bena: Amewo gbɔ wotsoa? — Woyɔ dukɔ la; elabena ameawo katã bua Yohanes bena, nyagblɔɖila ŋutɔŋutɔ wònye." 
Mark11:33 Eye woxɔ edzi gblɔ na Yesu bena: Míenyae o. Eye Yesu gblɔ na wo bena: Ekema nye hã nyemagblɔ ŋusẽ, si metsɔ wɔ esiawoe la, na mi o." 
Mark12:1 Eye wòde asi nuƒoƒo me na wole lododowo me bena: Amea ɖe de weingble, eye wòtɔ kpɔ ɖe eŋu godoo, eye wòwɔ weinfiãnu ɖe eme, eye wòtu mɔ̃ ɖe eme, eye wòtsɔe ɖe asi na agbledelawo heyi nugbe." 
Mark12:2 Eye esi ɣeyiɣia ɖo la, edo dɔla ɖo ɖe agbleŋlɔlawo gbɔ bena, yeaxɔ agble la me kutsetsea ɖewo tso eŋlɔlawo si me." 
Mark12:3 Eye wòlée, eye woƒoe, eye woɖoe ɖa asi ƒuƒlu." 
Mark12:4 Eye wògadɔ dɔla bubu ɖo ɖe wo gbɔ; eye wode abi eya ƒe ta ŋu, eye wodo ŋukpee." 
Mark12:5 Eye wògadɔ bubu ɖa; eye wowu eya kple ame bubu geɖewo, eye woƒo ɖewo, eye wowu ɖewo." 
Mark12:6 Azɔ esi vi ɖeka, si melɔ̃a nu egbɔ o la, gale esi la, mlɔeba la edɔ eya hã ɖo ɖe wo gbɔ gblɔ bena: Wòasi vinyeŋutsuvi la ɖa." 
Mark12:7 Tete agbledela mawo gblɔ na wo nɔewo bena: Esiae nye domenyila la, miva, ne miawui, eye domenyinyi la nazu mia to." 
Mark12:8 Eye esi wòlée la, wowui, eye wokɔe ƒu gbe ɖe weingble la xa." 
Mark12:9 Azã nuka weingble la ƒe aƒetɔ awɔ mahã? Ava, eye woatsrɔ̃ agbledelawo, eye wòatsɔ weingble la aɖe asi na ame bubuwo." 
Mark12:10 Ɖe miexlẽ ŋɔŋlɔ sia hã kpɔ bena: „Kpe, si xɔtulawo gbe la, eya ke trɔ zu dzogoekpe;" 
Mark12:11 Aƒetɔ la gbɔ esia tso, eye wònye nukunu le míaƒe ŋkuwo me“ o mahã?" 
Mark12:12 Eye wodi bena, yewoalée, ke wovɔ̃ ameha la; elabena wonyae bena, yewo ŋu wòdo lo sia ɖo; eye wogblẽe ɖi hedzo." 
Mark12:13 Eye woɖo farisitɔwo kple Herodiatɔwo dome amea ɖewo ɖo ɖe egbɔ, bena ne woalée le nya me." 
Mark12:14 Eye esi wova la, wobiae bena: Nufiala, míenyae bena, nyateƒetɔ nènye, eye amea ɖeke ƒe nya meɖia wò o; elabena mèkpɔa ame ŋku me o; hafi boŋ nèle Mawu ƒe mɔ fiãm le nyateƒe nu. Woɖe mɔ bena, woana nudzodzo kaisaro loo, alo womeɖe mɔ oa? Ɖe miana loo, alo miana o mahã?" 
Mark12:15 Ke esi wòdze si woƒe alakpadada la, egblɔ na wo bena: Nuka miele teyem kpɔ mahã? Mitsɔ denario la vɛ, ne makpɔ!" 
Mark12:16 Eye wotsɔe vɛ. Eye wògblɔ na wo bena: Ameka ƒe tata kple ŋɔŋlɔ enye sia mahã? Eye wogblɔ nɛ bena: Kaisaro tɔe. 
Mark12:17 Eye Yesu gblɔ na wo bena: Nusi nye kaisaro ta la, mitsɔe na kaisaro, eye nusi nye Mawu tɔ la, na Mawu. Eye woƒe mo wɔ yaa ŋutɔ le eŋuti." 
Mark12:18 Eye zadukitɔwo, amesiwo gblɔna bena, tsitretsitsi meli o la, hã va egbɔ, eye wobiae bena:" 
Mark12:19 Nufiala, Mose ŋlɔ ɖi na mi bena: Ne amea ɖe nɔviŋutsu ku, eye wògblẽ srɔ̃a ɖi, eye viwo mele esi o la, nɔvia naɖe srɔ̃a, eye wòado ƒome ɖi na nɔvia." 
Mark12:20 Azɔ nɔviŋutsu adre nɔ anyi; gbãtɔ ɖe srɔ̃, eye woku, megblẽ viwo ɖi o." 
Mark12:21 Eye evelia ɖee, eye woku, megblẽ viwo ɖi o, eye etɔ̃lia hã nenema ke;" 
Mark12:22 eye wo ame adreawo katã megblẽ viwo ɖi o. Le wo katã megbe la nyɔnu la hã ku. 
Mark12:23 Le tsitresitsi la me la, wo dometɔ ka tɔ nyɔnu la azu mahã? Elabena wo ame adreawo katã ɖee kpɔ." 
Mark12:24 Yesu gblɔ na wo bena: Alo ɖe menye esia ta míeɖa ƒu, elabena mienyã ŋɔŋlɔawo kple Mawu ƒe ŋusẽ la o mahã?" 
Mark12:25 Elabena ne woatsi tre atso ame kukuwo dome la, womaɖe srɔ̃ alo woana bena, woaɖe wo o; hafi boŋ wole abe mawudɔla, siwo le dziƒowo la ene." 
Mark12:26 Ke le ame kukuwo gome, bena woatsi tre la, ɖe miexlẽ le Mose ƒe agbalẽ la me, alesi Mawu ƒo nu nɛ le ŋuve la me bena: „Nyee nye Abraham ƒe Mawu kple Isak ƒe Mawu kpakple Yakob ƒe Mawu“ la o mahã?" 
Mark12:27 Mawu menye ame kukuwo ƒe Mawu wònye o; ke boŋ ame gbagbewo tae; mietra ŋutɔ! 
Mark12:28 Eye agbalẽfialawo dometɔ ɖeka va, amesi se woƒe nusesẽwɔwɔ la; esi wonyae bena, eɖo ŋu na wo nyuie la, ebiae bena: Seawo katã dome la kae nye gbãtɔ mahã?" 
Mark12:29 Yesu ɖo eŋu bena: Gbãtɔ enye: Israel, ɖo to, Aƒetɔ, miaƒe Mawu la, Aƒetɔ ɖeka wònye." 
Mark12:30 Eye nalɔ̃ Aƒetɔ, wò Mawu la, kple wò dzi blibo kple wò luʋɔ blibo kple wò tamesusu blibo kpakple wò ŋusẽ blibo, esia nye se gbãtɔ." 
Mark12:31 Evelia nye esia bena: Nalɔ̃ hawòvi abe ɖokuiwò ene. Se bubua ɖeke meli, si lolo wu esiawo o." 
Mark12:32 Eye agbalẽfiala la gblɔ nɛ bena: Nufiala, ègblɔe nyuie le nyateƒe nu bena: Ɖeka eli, eye bubua ɖeke meli o, negbe eya ko;" 
Mark12:33 eye be woalɔ̃e kple dzi blibo kple gɔmesese blibo kple luʋɔ blibo kple ŋusẽ blibo, eye be woalɔ̃ ame havi abe ame ŋutɔ ɖokui ene la, le wu numemewo kple vɔsasawo katã." 
Mark12:34 Esi Yesu kpɔ bena, eɖo ŋu na ye nunyatɔe la, egblɔ nɛ bena: Wò la mèle adzɔge tso mawufiaɖuƒe la gbɔ o. Tso esia dzi la amea ɖeke medo dzi bia nyaa ɖekee o." 
Mark12:35 Eye esi Yesu le nu fiãm le mawuƒe la me la, exɔ dzi gblɔ bena: Aleke wɔ, eye agbalẽfialawo le gbɔgblɔm bena, Kristo la nye Dawid vi mahã?" 
Mark12:36 Dawid ŋutɔ gblɔ le Gbɔgbɔ kɔkɔe la me bena: Aƒetɔ la gblɔ na nye Aƒetɔ bena: Bɔbɔ nɔ anyi ɖe nye nuɖusi me, vaseɖe esime matso wò ketɔwo awɔ wò afɔɖodzinui." 
Mark12:37 Dawid ŋuta yɔe be Aƒetɔ, eye afika gɔ̃ wòtso wònye via mahã? Eye ameha gã la ɖo toe dzidzɔtɔe." 
Mark12:38 Eye le eƒe nufiafia me la egblɔ bena: Mikpɔ mia ɖokui dzi le agbalẽfialawo ŋuti, amesiwo lɔ̃a tsaɖiɖi le awu ʋlayawo me kple gbedoname le ablɔawo me" 
Mark12:39 kple nɔƒe gbãlɔwo nɔnɔ le ƒuƒoƒewo kple kplɔ̃tanɔnɔ le nuɖuƒewo; 
Mark12:40 amesiwo mia ahosiwo ƒe aƒewo, eye wodaa alakpa nɔa gbe didiwo dom ɖa; amesiawo ƒe ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ le sesẽ ge awu." 
Mark12:41 Eye esi wòbɔbɔ nɔ anyi hedze ŋgɔ nudzɔɖaka la, ekpa alesi amewo le ga dam ɖe nudzɔɖaka la me; eye kesinɔtɔ geɖewo tsɔ geɖe da ɖe eme." 
Mark12:42 Eye ahosi dahea ɖe va tsɔ lepta eve da ɖe eme, siwo ƒe home enye hoka eve." 
Mark12:43 Eye wòyɔ eƒe nusiawo va egbɔ gblɔ na wo bena: Vavã mele egblɔm na mi bena; Ahosi dahe sia ƒe nusi wòtsɔ da ɖe eme la, wu nusi ame siawo tsɔ da ɖe nudzɔɖaka la me;" 
Mark12:44 elabena wo katã wotsɔ woƒe agbɔsɔsɔ vivivo la ƒe ɖe da ɖe eme; ke eya la tso eƒe ahedada la me wòtsɔ nusiwo katã le esi na eƒe agbenɔnɔ la, da ɖe eme." 
Mark13:1 Eye esi wòdo go tso mawuƒe la me la, eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo dometɔ ɖeka gblɔ nɛ bena: Nuxala, kpɔ ale kpe siawo kple ale xɔtutu siawo ɖa!" 
Mark13:2 Eye Yesu gblɔ nɛ bena: Ele xɔtutu gã siawo kpɔm mahã? Womele kpe gblẽ ge ɖe kpe dzi, si womatu asii aƒu anyi o." 
Mark13:3 Eye esi wòbɔbɔ nɔ anyi ɖe Amito la dzi hedze ŋgɔ mawuƒea la, Petro kple Yakobo kple Yohanes kpakple Andrea, woawo ɖeɖe biae bena:" 
Mark13:4 Gblɔ ɣeyiɣi, si dzi nusiawo lava la, na mí, eye nuka lanye dzesi na ɣeyiɣi, si me nusiawo katã lawu nu mahã?" 
Mark13:5 Eye Yesu de asi gbɔgbɔ me na wo bena: Mikpɔ nyuie, bena amea ɖeke nagaflu mi o." 
Mark13:6 Ame geɖewo ava le nye ŋkɔa dzi agblɔ bena: Nyee nye si! Eye woaflu ame geɖewo. 
Mark13:7 Ke ne miase aʋawo kple aʋaŋutiɣliwo la, migaɖi vo o, ele be, esia nava me tsã; gake nuwuwu la meɖo haɖe o." 
Mark13:8 Elabena dukɔ latsi tre ɖe dukɔ ŋuti, eye fiaɖuƒe ɖe fiaɖuƒe ŋuti, eye anyigbaʋuʋuwo lava teƒeteƒewo, eye dɔwuame lava; nusiawo nye fuɖuame ƒe gɔmedzedze." 
Mark13:9 Ke miawo la mikpɔ mia ɖokui dzi nyuie; elabena woade mi asi na ʋɔnudrɔ̃lawo, eye woaƒo mi le ƒuƒoƒewo; eye míatsi tre ɖe mɔ̃mefiawo kple fiawo ŋku me le tanye, be wòanye ɖaseɖiɖi na wo." 
Mark13:10 Eye ele be, woaɖe gbe ƒã nyanyuie la afia dukɔwo katã gbãgbiagbã." 
Mark13:11 Eye ne wokplɔ mi de asi la, migatsi dzimaɖi da ɖi ɖe nusi gblɔ ge miala ŋuti o; ke boŋ nusi woana mi le gaƒoƒo ma dzi la, eya miagblɔ; elabena menye miawoe nye amesiwo le nu ƒom o; ke boŋ Gbɔgbɔ kɔkɔe lae." 
Mark13:12 Eye nɔvi lade nɔvi ku me, eye fofo lade via asi, eye ɖeviwo latsi tre ɖe dzilawo ŋuti, eye woatsɔ wo ana woawui." 
Mark13:13 Eye amewo katã wòalé fu mi le nye ŋkɔ la ŋuti; ke amesi ado dzi vaseɖe nuwuwu la, eya lakpɔ ɖeɖe." 
Mark13:14 Ke gbesigbe miakpɔ aƒedo ƒe ŋunyɔnu, si nyagblɔɖila Daniel gblɔ ɖi la, wòanɔ tsitre ɖe afisi mele nɛ be, wòatsi tre ɖo o la — amesi le exlẽm la, nèse egɔme — ekema amesiwo le Yudea la, nasi ayi towo dzi;" 
Mark13:15 ke amesi le xɔta la, nagaɖi va anyi alo wòayi aɖatsɔ nane atso eƒe xɔ me o;" 
Mark13:16 eye amesi le abɔ me la, nagatrɔ ava tsɔ eƒe avɔ ayii o." 
Mark13:17 Ke baba na amesiwo fu le wo ƒo kple amesiwo le notsi nam le ŋkeke mawo me! 
Mark13:18 Ke mido gbe ɖa bena, miaƒe sisi nagadze vuvɔŋɔli dzi o." 
Mark13:19 Elabena ŋkeke mawo lanye xaxa, si tɔgbe meva kpɔ tso nuwɔwɔ, si Mawu wɔ la, ƒe gɔmedzedze vaseɖe egbegbe o, eye megale vava ge akpɔ o." 
Mark13:20 Eye ne menye bena, ɖe Aƒetɔ la ɖe ŋkekeawo dzi o la, ŋutilãa ɖeke makpɔ ɖeɖe o; gake le ame tiatia, siwo wotia ŋuti la, eɖe ŋkekeawo dzi." 
Mark13:21 Eye le ɣemaɣi me, ne amea ɖe lagblɔ na mi bena: Kpɔ ɖa, Kristo la le afii alo kpɔ da, ele afime la, migaxɔe se oa." 
Mark13:22 Ke aʋatsokristowo kple aʋatsonyagblɔɖilawo latsi tre, eye woawɔ dzesi wo kple nukunuwo bena, ne woate ŋui la, ne woaflu ame tiatiawo hã." 
Mark13:23 Ke miawo la mikpɔ nyuie! Kpɔ ɖa, megblɔ nuwo katã ɖi na mi!" 
Mark13:24 Ke le ŋkeke mawo ƒe xaxa megbe la ɣe la ado viviti, eye ɣleti megale ɖiɖi ge o;" 
Mark13:25 ɣletiviwo lage tso dziƒo, eye dziƒowo ƒe ŋusẽwo aʋuʋu." 
Mark13:26 Eye ekema woakpɔ Amegbetɔvi la le alilikpowo me gbɔna kple ŋusẽ kpakple ŋutikɔkɔe geɖe. 
Mark13:27 Tete wòadɔ eƒe dɔlawo ɖa, eye woaƒo ame tiatiawo nu ƒu tso ya eneawo dzi, tso anyigba seƒe vaseɖe dziƒo seƒe." 
Mark13:28 Ke misrɔ̃ lododo la le gboti la ŋuti: Ne tsi ɖo eƒe alɔwo me, eye wòto aŋgbawo la, ekema midze sii bena, dzomeŋɔli le ɖoɖo ge;" 
Mark13:29 nenema ke miawo hã, ne miekpɔ nusiawo le eme vam la, midze sii bena, egogo agbo la nu." 
Mark13:30 Vavã mele egblɔm na mi bena: Dzidzime sia nu mele yiyi ge, vaseɖe esime nusiawo katã, nava ve me o." 
Mark13:31 Dzi kple anyigba nu lava yi, ke nye nyawo nu mele yiyi ge akpɔ o." 
Mark13:32 Ke le ŋkeke ma alo gaƒoƒo ma ŋuti la amea ɖeke menyae o, mawudɔla, siwo le dziƒo, hã menyae o, Vi la ŋutɔ hã menyae o, negbe Fofo la ko." 
Mark13:33 Mikpɔ nyuie, eye minɔ ŋudzɔ; elabena mienya ɣekaɣi azãgbe la le edzi su ge o." 
Mark13:34 Ele abe amea ɖe, si yi nugbe, egblẽ eƒe aƒe eɖi, eye wòna ŋusẽ eƒe dɔlawo, amesiame xɔ eƒe dɔwɔwɔ, eye wòde se na xɔnuvi la bena, wòanɔ ŋudzɔ la ene." 
Mark13:35 Azɔ la minɔ ŋudzɔ. Elabena mienya ɣekaɣi dzi Aƒetɔ la le vava ge o, eɖanye fiẽ alo zã titina alo koklo kuatɔ alo ŋdi o," 
Mark13:36 bena ne eƒe vava ɖi ɖe mi la, ne megakpɔ mi le alɔ̃ me o." 
Mark13:37 Ke nusi gblɔm mele na mi la, mele egblɔm na amewo katã bena: Minɔ ŋudzɔ!" 
Mark14:1 Eye wòsusɔ ŋkeke eve, ne ŋutitoto kple abolo maʋamaʋã ƒe ŋkekenyuie la naɖo; eye nunɔlagãwo kple agbalẽfialawo ɖi alesi woawɔ alée le aɖaŋu me, ne woawui;" 
Mark14:2 elabena wogblɔ bena: Menye ŋkekenyuie la dzi o, bena zi nagatɔ le dukɔ la dome o." 
Mark14:3 Eye esi wòle Betania le Simon, dzɔbutɔ la, ƒe me le nuɖuƒe la, nyɔnua ɖe va kple alabastrogoe, si me nardomi nyuitɔ, si ƒe asi sẽ ŋutɔ la le, eye wogbã goe la hetrɔe kɔ ɖe eƒe ta me." 
Mark14:4 Ke eve dɔme na wo dometɔa ɖewo, eye wogblɔ bena: Amigbegblẽ sia gɔme ɖe?" 
Mark14:5 Elabena ɖe wònye be, wodzra ami sia la, ne axɔ asi awu denario alafa etɔ̃, si woatsɔ ana ame dahewo. Eye woblu ɖe eta li liʋiliʋi le eŋuti." 
Mark14:6 Ke Yesu gblɔ bena: Mina mɔe; nuka ƒe fu ɖem miele nɛ mahã? Dɔ nyui wòwɔ nam. 
Mark14:7 Elabena ame dahewo le mia gbɔ ɖaasi, eye ɣesiaɣi, si mielɔ̃ la, miate ŋu awɔ nyuie na wo; ke nye la nyemeli kpli mi ɖaa o." 
Mark14:8 Ewo nusi wòate ŋui; edze ŋgɔgbe va si ami na nye ŋutilã la hena ɖiɖi. 
Mark14:9 Vavã mele egblɔm na mi bena: Afisi ke woaɖe gbe ƒã nyanyuie la afia le, le xexe blibo la katã la, woaƒo nu le nusi nyanu sia wo la hã ŋuti hena ŋkuɖoɖo edzi." 
Mark14:10 Eye Yuda Iskariot, ame wuieveawo dometɔ ɖeka la, tɔ edzi yi ɖe nunɔlagãwo gbɔ, bena yeade eyama asi na wo." 
Mark14:11 Ke esi wosee la, dzi dza wo, eye wodo ga ŋugbe nɛ be, yewoanae. Eye wòle asinu nyuia ɖe dim be, yeadee asi." 
Mark14:12 Eye abolo maʋamaʋã ƒe ŋkeke gbãtɔ, si dzi wowua ŋutitotolẽvi la le la, eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo gblɔ nɛ bena: Afika dim nèle be, miayi aɖadzra do, ne naɖu ŋutitotolẽvi la le mahã?" 
Mark14:13 Eye wòdo eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo dome ame eve gblɔ na wo bena: Miyi ɖe dua me, eye amea ɖe, si tsɔ tsize la, akpe mi, midze eyome;" 
Mark14:14 eye afisi ke wòayi ɖe eme le la, migblɔ na aƒeatɔ bena: Nufiala be: Afika dzenyeƒe le, afisi mia kple nye nusrɔ̃lawo miaɖu ŋutitotolẽvi la le mahã?" 
Mark14:15 Eye eya ŋutɔ afia xɔ gãa ɖe mi le dziƒoxɔ me, si me woɖo nuwo ɖo, eye midzra afima do na mi." 
Mark14:16 Eye nusrɔ̃lawo dzo heyi, eye wova dua me, eye wokpɔe, abe alesi wògblɔ na wo la ene; eye wodzra ŋutitotolẽvi la ɖo." 
Mark14:17 Eye esi fiẽsi ɖo la, eya kple ame wuieveawo wova." 
Mark14:18 Eye esi Wobɔbɔ nɔ anyi le nua ɖum la, Yesu gblɔ bena: Vavã mele egblɔm na mi bena: Mia dome ame ɖeka, si le nua ɖum kplim la, ladem asi." 
Mark14:19 Eye wode asi nuxaxa me le ebiam ɖekaɖeka bena: Nyee loo? 
Mark14:20 Ke egblɔ na wo bena: Enye ame wuieveawo dometɔ ɖeka, amesi ƒe asi le agba me dem kplim." 
Mark14:21 Ke Amegbetɔvi la le yiyim, abe alesi woŋlɔ di le eŋuti ene; gake baba na ame ma, si dzi woato ade Amegbetɔvi la asi! Enyo na ame ma bena, womegaxae dzi o." 
Mark14:22 Ke esi wole nua dum la, etsɔ abolo ɖe asi, eye esi wògblɔ akpedanya la, eŋe me, eye wòtsɔe na wo gblɔ bena: Mixɔe ɖu, esia nye nye ŋutilã." 
Mark14:23 Eye wòtso kplu ɖe asi, eye esi wòda akpe le eta la, etsɔe na wo, eye wo katã wono le enu." 
Mark14:24 Eye wògblɔ na wo bena; Esia nye nye nubabla yeye ƒe ʋu, si wokɔ ɖe anyi le ame geɖewo ta." 
Mark14:25 Vavã, vavã mele egblom na mi bena: Tso esia dzi la nyemegale weintsetsea ɖeke me tsi no ge o vaseɖe ŋkeke ma dzi, esime mano yeye le mawufiaɖuƒe la me." 
Mark14:26 Eye esi wodzi akpedaha vɔ la, woɖo go yi ɖe Amito la ŋu." 
Mark14:27 Eye Yesu gblɔ na wo bena: Mi katã miele nuɖiaɖia kpɔ ge le ŋutinye le zã sia me; elabena woŋlɔ ɖi bena: „Mele alẽkplɔla ƒo ge, eye alẽawo laka ahlẽ.“" 
Mark14:28 Gake ne metsi tre megbe la, madze mia ŋgɔ ayi Galilea." 
Mark14:29 Ke Petro gblɔ nɛ bena: Ne wo katã woakpe nuɖiaɖia hã la, menye nye o." 
Mark14:30 Eye Yesu gblɔ nɛ bena: Mele egblom na wò bena: Egbe ƒe zã sia me ke, hafi koklo naku atɔ zi eve la, agbe nu zi etɔ̃ le gbɔnye." 
Mark14:31 Eye wòƒo nu kple kakaɖedzi wu bena: Ne anɔ nam be, maku kpli wò hã la, nyemele nu gbe ge le gbewo akpɔ o. Nenema ke wo katã hã wogblɔ." 
Mark14:32 Eye wova ɖo teƒea ɖe, si ŋkɔ enye Getsemane; eye wògblɔ na eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo bena: Mibɔbɔ nɔ afisia, vaseɖe esime mado gbe ɖa." 
Mark14:33 Eye wòɖe Petro, Yakobo kple Yohanes kpe ɖe eɖokui ŋuti, eye dzidzi ƒoe, eye wòde asi dzodzo me nyanyanya." 
Mark14:34 Eye wògblɔ na wo bena: Nye luʋɔ le nu xam kakaka vaseɖe ku me; minɔ afisia, eye minɔ ŋudzɔ!" 
Mark14:35 Eve wote yi ŋgɔ ʋee, eye wòdze klo tsyɔ mo anyi, eye wòdo gbe ɖa bena, ne ate ŋu ava me la, ne gaƒoƒo sia nato ye ŋu ayi." 
Mark14:36 Eye wòbena: Aba, Fofo! Etea ŋu wɔa nuwo katã; tsɔ kplu sia yii le gbɔnye; gake menye nusi nye ŋutɔ melɔ̃ o, negbe nusi wò nèlɔ̃ ko." 
Mark14:37 Eye wòva kpɔ wo wole alɔ̃ me, eye wògblɔ na Petro bena: Simon, alɔ̃ dɔm nèlea? Màte ŋu anɔ ŋudzɔ gaƒoƒo ɖeka oa?" 
Mark14:38 Minɔ ŋudzɔ, eye mido gbe ɖa, bena miagadze tetekpɔ me o! Gbɔgbɔ la le lɔlɔ̃m, gake ŋutilã la gbɔdzɔ." 
Mark14:39 Eye wògadzo yi ɖaɖo gbe ɖa, eye wògblɔ nya ma ke." 
Mark14:40 Eye esi wògatrɔ va la, egakpɔ wo le alɔ̃ me; elabena woƒe ŋkuwo dzi wɔ dɔ̃, eye womenya nya, si woaɖo eŋu nɛ o." 
Mark14:41 Eye wòva zi etɔ̃lia gblɔ na wo bena: Miyi alɔ̃dɔdɔ dzi azɔ, eye migbɔ ɖe eme! Esɔ gbɔ, gaƒoƒo la ɖo vɔ! Kpɔ ɖa, woatsɔ Amegbetɔvi la ade nuvɔ̃wɔlawo si me." 
Mark14:42 Mitsi tre, mina midzo! Kpɔ ɖa, amesi le yonyeme mɔ fiãm la, egogo!" 
Mark14:43 Eye enumake esi wògale nuƒoƒoa dzi ko la, Yuda, ame wuieveawo dometɔ ɖeka la, va do, eye ame geɖewo le eyome kple yiwo kpakple kpowo tso nunɔlagãwo kple agbalẽfialawo kple amegãwo gbɔ." 
Mark14:44 Ke eyomemɔfiala ɖo dzesi ɖi na wo gblɔ bena: Amesi ke ƒe nu gbugbɔ ge mala la, eyae; milée, eye mikplɔe yi kɔ." 
Mark14:45 Eye esi wova la, enumake wote ɖe eŋu gblɔ bena: Rabi! eye wògbugbɔ nu nɛ." 
Mark14:46 Ke woawo la wotsɔ woƒe asiwò ɖo edzi, eye wòlée." 
Mark14:47 Ke amesiwo le tsitre de egbɔ la, dometɔ ɖeka ɖi yi heda nunɔlagã la ƒe dɔla, eye wòkpa to nɛ." 
Mark14:48 Eye Yesu xɔ edzi gblɔ na wo bena: Alesi wotsona de adzodala ŋuti la, nenema mieva lé ye ge kple yiwo kpakple kpowo." 
Mark14:49 Gbawotsyogbe menɔa mawuƒe la me kpli mi nɔa nu fiãm, ke mielém o; gake wowɔ esia, bena woawu ŋɔŋlɔawo nu." 
Mark14:50 Eye wo katã wogblẽe di hesi. 
Mark14:51 Eye ɖekakpuia de, si ta aklala ko la, kplɔe do, eye wòlée;" 
Mark14:52 ke egblẽ aklala la ɖi hesi dzo amama le wo gbɔ. 
Mark14:53 Eye wokplɔ Yesu yi ɖe nunɔlagã la gbɔ, eye nunɔlagãwo kple amegãwo kpakple agbalẽfialawo katã ƒo ƒu ɖe eŋuti." 
Mark14:54 Eye Petro le eyome ʋĩ gbɔna vaseɖe nunɔlagã la ƒe mɔ̃ me, eye wòbɔbɔ nɔ dɔlawo gbɔ le dzo ƒum." 
Mark14:55 Ke nunɔlagãwo kple ʋɔnudrɔ̃lawo katã di ɖaseɖiɖi de Yesu ŋuti, bena yewoawui, eye womekpɔ ɖeke o." 
Mark14:56 Elabena ame geɖewo va ɖi aʋatsoɖase ɖe eŋuti, eye woƒe ɖaseɖiɖia ɖeke mesɔ o." 
Mark14:57 Eye amea ɖewo tsi tre, eye woɖi aʋatsoɖase ɖe eŋuti bena:" 
Mark14:58 Míese wògblɔ bena: Magbã mawuxɔ sia, si wotsɔ asi wɔe la, eye ŋkeke etɔ̃agbe la magatu bubu, si wometsɔ asi wɔe o." 
Mark14:59 Eye ale woƒe ɖaseɖiɖi la hã mesɔ o. 
Mark14:60 Eye nunɔlagã la tsi tre ɖe wo titina, eye wòbia Yesu bena: Mèle nyaa ɖeke tso ge aɖo nya, si gblɔm amesiawo le ɖe ŋuwò la ŋu o mahã?" 
Mark14:61 Ke ezi kpi, eye meɖo nyaa ɖeke ŋu nɛ o. Nunɔlagã la gabiae gblɔ nɛ bena: Alo wòe nye Kristo, Mawu, si wokafuna la, ƒe Vi mahã?" 
Mark14:62 Eye Yesu gblɔ bena: Nyee! Eye miakpɔ Amegbetɔvi la wòanɔ anyi ɖe ŋusẽ ƒe nuɖusi me gbɔna kple dziƒo ƒe alilikpowo. 
Mark14:63 Tete nunɔlagã la dze eƒe awu ʋlaya la gblɔ bena: Ɖaseɖila kawoe gahiã mi mahã? 
Mark14:64 Miese eƒe busunya la, nuka susum miele mahã? Ke wo katã wobu fɔe be: Edze ku." 
Mark14:65 Eye amea ɖewo de asi taɖeɖe me ɖe eŋu, eye wotsyɔ nu mo nɛ, eye wotu kɔe, eye wogblɔ nɛ bena Fia amesi ƒo wò; eye dɔlawo ƒo tome nɛ." 
Mark14:66 Eye esi Petro le mɔ̃ la me le anyigba la, nunɔlagã la ƒe nyɔnudɔlawo dometɔ ɖeka gbɔna," 
Mark14:67 eye esi wòkpɔ Petro le dzo ƒum la, ekpɔe dũ hebena: Wò hã ena Yesu Nazaretetɔ la gbɔ kpɔ." 
Mark14:68 Ke esẽ nu gblɔ bena; Nyemenya alo se nya, si gblɔm nèle la gome o; eye wòdo go yi ɖe akpala la nu; tete koklo ku atɔ." 
Mark14:69 Eye esi dɔlanyɔnu la gakpɔe la, egade asi gbɔgblɔ me na amesiwo le tsitre le afima la, bena: Amesia enye wo dometɔ ɖeka. Ke egasẽ nu." 
Mark14:70 Eye emegbe ʋee la amesiwo le tsitre le afima la gagblɔ na Petro bena: Vavã wo dometɔ ɖeka nènye elabena Galileatɔ hã nènye. 
Mark14:71 Ke ede asi fiƒoƒode kple atamkaka me bena: Nyemenya amesia, si ŋuti miele nu ƒom le la o." 
Mark14:72 Eye enumake la koklo ku atɔ zi evelia. Eye Petro ɖo ŋku nya la dzi, alesi Yesu gblɔ nɛ bena: Hafi koklo naku atɔ zi eve la, agbe nu le gbɔnye zi etɔ̃. Eye wòƒu du do go, eye wòfa avi." 
Mark15:1 Eye enumake le ŋdikanya, esi nunɔlagãwo kple dumegãwo kple agbalẽfialawo kpakple ʋɔnudrɔ̃lawo katã de adaŋu la, wòbia Yesu, eye wokplɔe yi ɖade asi na Pilato." 
Mark15:2 Eye Pilato biae bena: Wòe nye Yudatɔwo ƒe fia la mahã? Eye wòɖo eŋu nɛ gblɔ bena: Wòe gblɔe. 
Mark15:3 Eye nunɔlagãwo tso enu le nu geɖe ŋuti. 
Mark15:4 Eye Pilato gabiae bena Mèle nyaa ɖeke ŋu ɖo ge o mahã? Kpɔ alesi wole nuwò tsom le nu geɖewo ŋuti ɖa! 
Mark15:5 Ke Yesu megaɖo nyaa ɖeke ŋu o, ale bena Pilato ƒe mo wɔ yaa." 
Mark15:6 Eye le ŋkekenyuie dzi la eɖea asi le gatɔ ɖeka ŋu na wo godoo, amesi ke wobiae." 
Mark15:7 Ke gatɔ ɖeka li, si woyɔna be Baraba, hekpe ɖe amesiwo na zi to la ŋuti: amesiwo do hlɔ̃ le zitɔtɔ la me." 
Mark15:8 Eye ameha la yi dzi de asi biabia me bena, newɔ na yewo, abe alesi wònɔa wɔwɔm tsã la ene." 
Mark15:9 Ke Pilato ɖo eŋu na wo gblɔ bena: Ɖe miele didim bena, maɖe asi le Yudatɔwo ƒe fia la ŋuti na mi mahã?" 
Mark15:10 Elabena edze sii bena, ŋuʋaʋã ŋutie nunɔlagãwo tsɔe de asi ɖo." 
Mark15:11 Ke nunɔlagãwo ƒoe ɖe ameha la nu bena, wòaɖe asi le Baraba boŋ ŋuti na wo." 
Mark15:12 Eye Pilato gaxɔ edzi gblɔ na wo bena: Ekema nuka gɔ̃ miele ɖiɖim bena, mawo amesi mieyɔna be Yudatɔwo ƒe fia la mahã?" 
Mark15:13 Ke woawo gado ɣli bena: Klãe ɖe ati ŋuti! 
Mark15:14 Eye Pilato gblɔ na wo bena: Nuvɔ̃ ka gɔ̃ wòwɔ mahã? Ke wogado ɣli sesĩe wu bena: Klãe ɖe ati ŋuti! 
Mark15:15 Eye esi Pilato lɔ̃ bena, yeawu ameha la ƒe lɔlɔ̃nu la, eɖe asi le Baraba ŋuti na wo, eye Yesu la, esi wòna woƒoe kple atam la, etsɔe de asi, bena woaklãe ɖe ati ŋuti." 
Mark15:16 Ke asrafoawo kplɔe yi ɖe xɔ gã, si nye ʋɔnuɖrɔ̃ƒe la me, eye woyɔ asrafoha blibo la katã ƒo ƒu." 
Mark15:17 Eye wotsɔ awu dzi ʋlaya hedo nɛ, eye wotsɔ ŋu he tsihe ɖɔ nɛ;" 
Mark15:18 eye wode asi gbedodo me nɛ bena: Eme nefa na wò loo, Yudatɔwo ƒe fia!" 
Mark15:19 Eye woƒo tame nɛ kple ayeti, eye woɖe ta ɖe eŋuti, eye wodze klo nɛ hede ta agu nɛ." 
Mark15:20 Eye esi woɖu fewu le eŋuti vɔ la, woɖe awu dzi la le eŋu, eye wogatsɔ ye ŋutɔ ƒe awuwo do nɛ, eye wokplɔe do goe, bena woaklãe ɖe ati ŋuti." 
Mark15:21 Eye wozi Simon, Kirenetɔ, Aleksandro kple Rufo fofo, amesi tso agbleta va to wo ŋuti yina la dzi bena, wòatsɔ eƒe atitsoga la." 
Mark15:22 Eye wokplɔe yi ɖe teƒe, si woyɔna be Golgata, si gome nye ametakoliƒe." 
Mark15:23 Eye wotsɔ aha tsitsi kple mire tɔtɔ hekpe nɛ, gake mexɔe o." 
Mark15:24 Eye woklãe ɖe ati ŋuti, eye wòmã eƒe awuwo, esi wodzidze nu ɖe wo dzi, bene woakpɔ nusi ke ɖesiaɖe laxɔ." 
Mark15:25 Eye le gaƒoƒo etɔ̃lia dzi woklãe ɖe ati ŋuti. 
Mark15:26 Eye woŋlɔ eƒe nutsotso heɖo eƒe tagba bena: Yudatɔwo ƒe fia la. 
Mark15:27 Eye woklã adzodala eve hã kpe ɖe eŋuti, ɖeka le eƒe nuɖusi me, eye ɖeka le eƒe mia me." 
Mark15:28 Eye wowu ŋɔŋlɔ, si woŋlɔ ɖi la nu bena: „Wobui kpe ɖe vodalawo ŋuti.“" 
Mark15:29 Eye amesiwo le eŋuti tom le yiyim la, do ɖiŋu nɛ hele ta ʋuʋum, eye wole gbɔgblɔm bena: Hoo na wò, wò amesi le mawuxɔ la gbãm, eye nègale etum le ŋkeke etɔ̃agbe la;" 
Mark15:30 ɖe ɖokuiwò, eye naɖi le atitsoga la ŋuti!" 
Mark15:31 Nenema ke nunɔlagãwo kple agbalẽfialawo hã le fewu ɖum le wo nɔewo dome bena: Ame bubuwo la, eɖea wo, eye mate ŋu aɖe eɖokui o." 
Mark15:32 Kristo, Israel ƒe fia la, azɔ ɖi le atitsoga la ŋuti, bena míakpɔe, eye miaxɔ ase! Eye amesiwo woklã ɖe ati ŋuti kpe ɖe eŋuti la, woawo hã dzui." 
Mark15:33 Eye esi gaƒoƒo adelia ɖo edzi la, zãdokeli do ɖe anyigba blibo la katã dzi vaseɖe gaƒoƒo asiekelia dzi." 
Mark15:34 Eye le gaƒoƒo asiekelia dzi Yesu do ɣli kple gbe sesĩe bena: Eli, eli, lama sabaxtani? Esi, ne woɖe egɔme la, enye: Nye Mawu, nye Mawu, nukaŋuti nègblẽm ɖi mahã?" 
Mark15:35 Eye amesiwo le tsitre ɖe egbe la, dometɔa ɖewo, esi wosee la, wogblɔ bena: Kpɔ ɖa, ele Eliya yɔm." 
Mark15:36 Eye ame ɖeka ƒu du, eye wòkɔ aha tsitsi ɖe ƒumekutsa me, eye wòtsɔe ɖo ayeti nu hekpe ne gblɔ bena: Miɖe asi le eŋu; mina míakpɔ be, Eliya ava ɖee ɖe anyi hã." 
Mark15:37 Ke Yesu gado ɣli kple gbe sesĩe, eye wòtsɔ eƒe gbɔgbɔ la hena." 
Mark15:38 Eye mawuxɔmetsovɔ la dze ɖe eve tso tagbɔ vaseɖe egɔme. 
Mark15:39 Ke esi aʋafia, si le tsitre dze ŋgɔe la, kpɔ bena, etsɔ eƒe gbɔgbɔ la na ale la, egblɔ bena: Nyateƒe, nenem me sia enye Mawuvi." 
Mark15:40 Eye nyɔnuwo hã le tsitre, le nu kpɔm le adzɔge; amesiawo dome Maria, Magdalatɔ, kple Maria, Yakobo suetɔ kple Yose dada, kpakple Salome wole;" 
Mark15:41 amesiawo hã dze eyome, le esime wònɔ Galilea, eye wosubɔe kpe ɖe nyɔnu bubu geɖe, siwo va Yerusalem kpakplii la ŋuti." 
Mark15:42 Eye esi fiẽsi ɖo la, elabena enye dzadzraɖoŋkeke, si dze Sabat ŋgɔ," 
Mark15:43 Yosef tso Arimatia, si nye adaŋudela ŋkutatɔ, amesi ŋutɔ hã le mɔ kpɔm na Mawu ƒe fiaɖuƒe la va, eye wòdo dzi yi ɖe Pilato gbɔ ɖabia Yesu ƒe kukua." 
Mark15:44 Ke Pilato ƒe mo wo yaa be, eku xoxo; eye esi wòyɔ aʋafia la vɛ la, ebiae be, ɖe woku xoxo mahã?" 
Mark15:45 Eye esi wosee tso aʋafia la nu la, etso ame kuku la na Yosef." 
Mark15:46 Eye wòƒle aklala, eye esi woɖee ɖe anyi la, exatsa aklala ɖe eŋuti, eye wòtsɔe mlɔ yɔdo, si woɖe ɖe kpe gbadza me la me; eye wòmli kpe ɖo yɔdoa nu." 
Mark15:47 Eye Maria, Magdalatɔ kple Maria, Yose dada, wokpɔ afisi wotsɔe mlɔ." 
Mark16:1 Eye esi Sabat la nu yi vɔ la, Mana, Magdalatɔ, kple Maria, Yakobo dada, kple Salome woƒle atike ʋeʋẽe lilili, bena yewoasi nɛ." 
Mark16:2 Eye le kwasiɖa ƒe ŋkeke gbãtɔ ƒe ŋdikanya, esi agu dze la, wova yɔdo la gbɔ." 
Mark16:3 Eye wogblɔ le wo nɔewo dome bena: Ameka amii kpe la ɖa le yɔdo la nu na mí mahã? 
Mark16:4 Eye esi wowu mo dzi la, wokpe bena, wòmũ kpe la ɖe megbe xoxo; elabena elolo akpa." 
Mark16:5 Eye esi woyi ɖe yɔdo la me la, wokpe ɖekakpuia ɖe le nuɖusi gome le anyinɔƒe, eye wòdo awu ɣi ʋlaya, eye dzidzi ƒo wo." 
Mark16:6 Eye wògblɔ na wo bena: Dzidzi megaƒo mi o! Yesu, Nazaretetɔ, amesi woklã ɖe ati ŋuti la, dim miele; etsi tre, mele afisia o, mikpɔ afisi wotsɔe mlɔ la ɖa!" 
Mark16:7 Ke miheyi ɖagblɔe na eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo kple Petro hã bena: Edze mia ŋgɔ yina Galilea, afima miakpɔe le, abe alesi wogblɔ ɖi na mi la ene." 
Mark16:8 Eye esi wodo go la, wòsi tso yɔdo la gbɔ; elabena dzodzo nyanyanya kple ŋɔdzi lé wo, eye womegblɔ nyaa ɖeke na amea ɖeke o; elabena wovɔ̃." 
Mark16:9 Ke esi Yesu tsi tre le kwasiɖa gbãtɔ ƒe ŋdikanya la, eɖe eɖokui fia Maria, Magdalatɔ gbã, amesi me wonyã gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃ adre do go le." 
Mark16:10 Eya la yi ɖaka eta na amesiwo li kpakplii tsã la, siwo le konyi fam, eye wole avi fam la!" 
Mark16:11 Eye woawo la, esi wose bena, ele agbe, eye wokpɔe la, womexɔe se o." 
Mark16:12 Ke nusiawo megbe la eɖe eɖokui fia wo dome ame eve, siwo le tsa ɖim yina agbleta la, le nɔnɔme bubu me." 
Mark16:13 Eye woawo hã wodzo yi ɖaka eta na ame mamlewo; gake womexɔ woawo hã dzi se o. 
Mark16:14 Eya megbe la eɖe eɖokui fia ame wuiɖekɛawo ŋuta, esi wole nuɖuƒe; eye wòhe nya ɖe wo ŋu le woƒe dzimaxɔse kple dzimesesẽ la ŋuti bena, womexɔ amesiwo kpoe wòtsi tre la, dzi se o." 
Mark16:15 Eye wògblɔ na wo bena: Miheyi ɖe xexe la me katã, eye miɖe gbe ƒã nyanyuie la na amewo katã." 
Mark16:16 Amesi ke xɔe se, eye wode mawutsi ta nɛ la, woaxɔe ɖe agbe; ke amesi ke mexɔe se o la, wòabu fɔe." 
Mark16:17 Ke dzesi siawo lakplɔ amesiwo xɔe se la ɖo: Le nye ŋkɔ la me wòanyã gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃wo ado goe, eye woaƒo nu kple aɖe yeyewo." 
Mark16:18 Woalé dawo, eye ne wono nu wuame hã la, mele wo si ge o; woatsɔ woƒe asiwo aɖo dɔlélawo dzi, eye woƒe lãme lasẽ." 
Mark16:19 Esi Aƒetɔ la ƒo nu na wo vɔ megbe la, wokɔe tẽ yi dziƒo, eye wòbɔbɔ nɔ anyi ɖe Mawu ƒe nuɖusi me." 
Mark16:20 Ke woamawo yi ɖaɖe gbe ƒã nya la fia le afisiafi, eye Aƒetɔ la le dɔ wɔm kpli wo, le ŋusẽ dom nya la to dzesi, siwo kpe ɖe wo ŋu la me." 
Luke1:1 Esi ame geɖewo tso asi de nyatotoa ɖoɖo me le nyadzɔdzɔ, siwo nu wowu le mía dome la ŋuti," 
Luke1:2 abe alesi amesiwo kpɔ eteƒe kple ŋku tso gɔmedzedzea me ke, eye wonye nya la ƒe dɔlawo, tsɔe de asi na mí ene la, ta la," 
Luke1:3 enyo nye hã ŋu, esi medzro wo katã me kpɔ tsitotsito vaseɖe egɔme ke bena, maŋlɔe na wò ɖekaɖeka, amegã Teofil," 
Luke1:4 bena nadze si nya, siwo wofia wò la, ƒe nyateƒenyenye." 
Luke1:5 Le Herodes, si nye Yudea-fia, ƒe ŋkekewo me la mawununɔlaa ɖe li, eŋkɔ enye Zaxarya, si tso Abiya ƒe ŋkekeɖoɖo me, eye srɔ̃a tso Aron ƒe vinyɔnuviwo dome, eye eƒe ŋkɔ enye Elisabet." 
Luke1:6 Eye woa kple eve la katã wonye ame dzɔdzɔewo le Mawu ƒe ŋku me, eye wozɔna le Aƒetɔ la ƒe seawo kple eƒe ɖoɖoa wo katã nu mo makamakae." 
Luke1:7 Ke vi mele wo si o, elabena Elisabet tsi ko, eye woa kple eve la siaa woxɔ ƒe geɖe." 
Luke1:8 Ke eva me bena, esime wòle nunɔnɔdɔ wɔm le edzidzedze ƒe ŋkekeɖoɖo la nu le Mawu ƒe ŋku me" 
Luke1:9 le nunɔnɔdɔ ƒe kɔa nu la, nudzidze dze edzi bena, wòayi ɖe Aƒetɔ la ƒe xɔa me, eye wòamè nu." 
Luke1:10 Eye ameha blibo la katã le gbe dom ɖa le gota le numeɣi la. 
Luke1:11 Ke Aƒetɔ ƒe dɔla ɖe eɖokui fiae, le tsitre ɖe numemlekpui la ƒe nuɖusi me." 
Luke1:12 Eye esi Zaxarya kpɔe la, eɖi vo, eye vɔvɔ̃ dze edzi." 
Luke1:13 Ke dɔla la gblɔ nɛ bena: Megavɔ̃ o, Zaxarya; elabena wose wò kukuɖeɖe la, eye srɔ̃wò Elisabet adzi ŋutsuvi na wò, eye nayɔ eƒe ŋkɔ be Yohanes." 
Luke1:14 Eye wòanye dzidzɔ kple aseyetsotso na wò, eye ame geɖewo adzo dzi le eƒe dzidzi ŋuti." 
Luke1:15 Elabena anye gã le Aƒetɔ la ŋku me, eye mele wein alo aha sesẽ no ge o, eye Gbɔgbɔ kɔkɔe ayɔe fũ tso keke dadaa ƒe dɔ me ke." 
Luke1:16 Eye wòatrɔ Israel-viwo dome ame geɖewo ava Aƒetɔ, woƒe Mawu la gbɔ." 
Luke1:17 Eye wòanɔ eŋgɔ le Eliya ƒe gbɔgbɔ kple ŋusẽ me be, wòatrɔ fofowo ƒe dziwo ava ɖeviwo gbɔ kple tosẽlawo ɖe ame dzɔdzɔewo ƒe nunya me, ne wòadzra dukɔ la ɖo ɖi woasu te na Aƒetɔ la." 
Luke1:18 Eye Zaxarya gblɔ na dɔla la bena: Nuka me madze si nusia le mahã? Elabena nye la amegã ɖeɖi menye, eye srɔ̃nye hã xɔ ƒe geɖe." 
Luke1:19 Eye dɔla la ɖo eŋu nɛ bena: Nyee nye Gabriel, si nɔa tsitre ɖe Mawu ŋku me, eye wòdɔm ɖa, be maƒo nu na wò, eye magblɔ nya nyui sia fia wò" 
Luke1:20 Eye kpɔ ɖa, wò aɖe latu, eye mele ŋute ge aƒo nu o, halase ŋkeke, si dzi nusiawo ava ve me, le esi mèxɔ nye nya, siwo nu woawu le woƒe ɣeyiɣi me la, dzi se o la ŋuti." 
Luke1:21 Eye dukɔ la le Zaxarya lalam, eye woƒe mo wɔ yaa le eƒe mawuxɔ me tsitsi la ŋuti." 
Luke1:22 Ke esi wòɖo go la, mete ŋu ƒo nu na wo o, eye wodze sii bena, ekpe nu le mawuxɔ la me, eye wòmia asi wo, eye wòtsi nu maƒomaƒo." 
Luke1:23 Eye wòva me bena, esime wowu eƒe subɔsubɔ ŋkekeawo nu la, edzo yi eƒe me." 
Luke1:24 Eye le ŋkeke siawo megbe la srɔ̃a Elisabet fɔ fu, eye wòɣla eɖokui ɣleti atɔ̃ hegblɔ bena:" 
Luke1:25 Elabena ale Aƒetɔ la wɔ nam le ŋkeke, siwo me wòkpɔm ɖa, be wòaɖe nye ŋukpe ɖa le amewo dome." 
Luke1:26 Eye le ɣleti adelia me la Mawu dɔ dɔla Gabriel ɖo ɖe Galilea-dua ɖe, si ŋkɔ enye Nazaret la me," 
Luke1:27 ɖe ɖetugbi, si ŋugbe wodo na ŋutsua ɖe, si ŋkɔ nye Yosef, tso Dawid ƒe me la gbɔ, eye ɖetugbi la ŋkɔe nye Maria." 
Luke1:28 Eye esi mawudɔla va me le egbɔ la, egblɔ nɛ bena: Medo gbe na wò, wò amesi nu wòve! Aƒetɔ la li kpli wò." 
Luke1:29 Ke eƒe dzi lã kpo le nya la ŋuti, eye wòde ŋugble sẽ bena: Nuka gbedoname gɔ̃ enye esi!" 
Luke1:30 Eye dɔla la gblɔ nɛ bena: Megavɔ̃ o, Mana! Elabena èkpɔ amenuveve le Mawu gbɔ." 
Luke1:31 Eye kpɔ ɖa, èle fu fɔ ge, eye nadzi ŋutsuvi, eye nayɔ eƒe ŋkɔ be Yesu." 
Luke1:32 Eya la anye gã, eye woayɔe be dziƒoxɔ la ƒe Vi, eye Aƒetɔ Mawu la atsɔ fofoa Dawid ƒe fiazikpui la anae;" 
Luke1:33 eye wòaɖu fia le Yakob ƒe aƒe dzi tegbetegbe, eye nuwuwu manɔe na eƒe fiaɖuƒe la o." 
Luke1:34 Eye Maria gblɔ na dɔla la bena: Aleke nusia lava mee, esi nyemenya ŋutsu o mahã?" 
Luke1:35 Eye dɔla la ɖo eŋu gblɔ nɛ bena: Gbɔgbɔ kɔkɔe ava dziwò, eye dziƒoʋitɔ ƒe ŋusẽ ado vɔvɔli ɖe dziwò, eyaŋuti nusi dzi ge nala la, woayɔe be kɔkɔe, Mawu viŋutsuvi." 
Luke1:36 Eye kpɔ ɖa, Elisabet, wò ƒometɔ la, fɔ fu le ŋutsuvi dzi ge le eƒe nyagãkuku me, eye ɣleti sia enye adelia na eya, amesi woyɔna be konɔ." 
Luke1:37 Elabena naneke mese na Mawu o. 
Luke1:38 Eye Maria gblɔ bena: Kpɔ ɖa, Aƒetɔ la ƒe dɔlanyɔnu menye, ava me nam le wò nya la nu. Eye mawudɔla dzo le egbɔ." 
Luke1:39 Eye Maria tsi tre le ŋkeke siawo me, eye wòɖe abla yi to la dzi, ɖe Yuda-dua ɖe me;" 
Luke1:40 eye woge ɖe Zaxarya ƒe me, eye wòdo gbe na Elisabet." 
Luke1:41 Eye wòva me bena, esi Elisabet se Mana ƒe gbedoname ko la, via ho le eƒe dɔ me; eye Gbɔgbɔ kɔkɔe yɔ Elisabet fũ," 
Luke1:42 eye wòdo ɣli kple gbe sesẽ gblɔ bena: Woayra wò le nyɔnuwo dome, eye woayra wò dɔmevi la!" 
Luke1:43 Eye afika gɔ̃ nusia tso bena, nye Aƒetɔ la dada va gbɔnye mahã?" 
Luke1:44 Elabena kpɔ ɖa, esi wò gbedoname ɖi ɖe nye to me la, ɖevi la ho le nye dɔ me le dzidzɔ ŋuti." 
Luke1:45 Eye Woayra wò, amesi xɔe se, elabena woawu nusiwo wogblɔ na wò tso Aƒetɔ gbɔ la nu." 
Luke1:46 Eye Maria gblɔ bena: Nye luʋɔ do Aƒetɔ la ɖe dzi," 
Luke1:47 eye nye gbɔgbɔ tso aseye le Mawu, nye xɔla ŋuti," 
Luke1:48 bena ekpɔ eƒe dɔlanyɔnu ƒe bɔbɔnyenye ɖa; elabena kpɔ ɖa, tso esia dzi la ƒomewo katã woayɔm be yayrame," 
Luke1:49 bena ŋusẽtɔ la wɔ nu dzɔtsuwo nam, eye kɔkɔe nye eƒe ŋkɔ." 
Luke1:50 Eye eƒe nublanuikpɔkpɔ li tso dzidzime vaseɖe dzidzime na amesiwo vɔ̃nɛ. 
Luke1:51 Ewɔ nu sesẽ kple eƒe abɔ; ekaka amesiwo ɖo wo ɖokui ɖe dzi le woƒe dzimesusuwo me la me. 
Luke1:52 Etu asi ŋusẽtɔwo ƒu anyi tso fiazikpuiwo dzi, eye wòdo ame bɔbɔɖanyiwo ɖe dzi." 
Luke1:53 Eya dɔwuitɔwo kple nu nyuiwo, eye kesinɔtɔwo la eɖo wo ɖa ƒuƒlu." 
Luke1:54 Ede eƒe dɔla Israel dzi hena ŋkuɖoɖo nublanuikpɔkpɔ dzi; 
Luke1:55 ate alesi wòƒo nu na mía fofowo ene, na Abraham kple eƒe ƒome vaseɖe mavɔ me." 
Luke1:56 Eye Maria nɔ egbɔ anɔ ɣleti etɔ̃; eye wògbugbɔ yi ye ŋutɔ ƒe me. 
Luke1:57 Azɔ la Elisabet ƒe vidziɣi ɖo, eye wòdzi ŋutsuvi." 
Luke1:58 Eye esi eƒe aƒelikawo kple eƒe ƒometɔwo se bena, Aƒetɔ kpɔ nublanui geɖe nɛ la, wokpɔ dzidzɔ kpakplii." 
Luke1:59 Eye wòva ve me le ŋkeke enyilia dzi bena, wova aʋa tso ge na ɖevi la, eye wotsɔ fofoa ŋkɔ Zaxarya nɛ." 
Luke1:60 Eye dadaa xa edzi gblɔ bena: O! Ɖeko woayɔe be Yohanes. 
Luke1:61 Eye wogblɔ nɛ bena: Amea ɖeke mele wò ƒome, si wotsɔ ŋkɔ sia na o." 
Luke1:62 Eye wòmia asi fofoa, alesi wòdi be, woayɔ nɛ." 
Luke1:63 Eye wòbia nuŋlɔkpe suea ɖe, eye wòŋlɔ bena: Yohanes enye eƒe ŋkɔ. Tete wo katã ƒe mo wo yaa." 
Luke1:64 Eye eƒe nu ke enumake, eye eƒe ade trɔ, eye wòƒo nu le Mawu kafum." 
Luke1:65 Eye vɔvɔ̃ va amesiwo katã ɖe aƒelika kpli wo la dzi, eye woƒo nu le nyadzɔdzɔ siawo katã ŋuti le Yudea-tonyigba blibo la katã dzi." 
Luke1:66 Eye amesiwo katã see la, wòlée ɖe ta me le gbɔgblɔm bena: Nuka gɔ̃ ɖevi sia ava zu mahã? Elabena Aƒetɔ la ƒe asi hã li kplii." 
Luke1:67 Eye fofoa Zaxarya yɔ fũ kple Gbɔgbɔ kɔkɔe, eye wògblɔ ɖe anyi bena:" 
Luke1:68 Woakafu Aƒetɔ, Israel ƒe Mawu la, elabena eva kpɔ eƒe dukɔ ɖa, eye wòwɔ ɖeɖe nɛ," 
Luke1:69 eye wòna xɔxɔ ƒe dzo do na mí le Dawid, eƒe dɔla, ƒe me;" 
Luke1:70 abe alesi wòƒo nu to eƒe nyagblɔɖila kɔkɔe, siwo li tso blema ke la, ƒe nu me ene:" 
Luke1:71 Ɖeɖe tso miaƒe futɔwo kple amesiwo katã léa fu mi la, ƒe asi me;" 
Luke1:72 be yeakpɔ nublanui na mía fofowo, eye yeaɖo ŋku yeƒe nubabla kɔkɔe," 
Luke1:73 atamkaka, si wòka na mia fofo Abraham la dzi?" 
Luke1:74 be esi wòɖe mi tso miaƒe futɔwo si me la, wòana miasubɔe kple mavɔ̃mavɔ̃" 
Luke1:75 le kɔkɔenyenye kple dzɔdzɔenyenye me, miaƒe ŋkekewo katã le eƒe ŋku me." 
Luke1:76 Ke wò, ɖevi la, woayɔ wò be dziƒoʋitɔ ƒe nyagblɔɖila; elabena àdze Aƒetɔ la ŋgɔ, be nadzra eƒe mowo ɖo," 
Luke1:77 be nana xɔxɔ ƒe nyanya le woƒe nuvɔ̃tsɔtsɔke me 
Luke1:78 le míaƒe Mawu ƒe dɔmetɔtrɔ kple nublanuikpɔkpɔ ŋuti, esime kekeli dze tso dziƒo ʋĩ va kpɔ mí ɖa," 
Luke1:79 be wòaklẽ na amesiwo bɔbɔ nɔ viviti kple ku ƒe vɔvɔli me, be wòaɖo míaƒe afɔwo ŋutifafa ƒe mɔ dzi." 
Luke1:80 Eye ɖevi la tsi, eye wòva sẽ ŋu le gbɔgbɔ la me; eye wòle gbedzi vaseɖe eɖeɖefia Israel ŋkeke dzi." 
Luke2:1 Eye wòva ve me le ŋkeke mawo me be, sedede tso kaisaro Augusto gbɔ bena, woaxlẽ xexeame katã aŋlɔ." 
Luke2:2 Ŋɔŋlɔ gbãtɔ sia va me, esime Kirenio le mɔ̃mefia ɖum le Siria." 
Luke2:3 Eye amewo katã dze mo heyi be, wòaŋlɔ woƒe ŋkɔwo, amesiame yi ɖe ye ŋuta ƒe du me." 
Luke2:4 Eye Yosef hã dzo le Galilea, tso Nazaret-du la me heyi Yudea ɖe Dawid du, si woyɔna be Betlexem la me, elabena etso Dawid ƒe me kple eƒome la me," 
Luke2:5 be woaŋlɔ eya kple Mana, amesi ŋugbe wodo nɛ, si nye funɔ la, ƒe ŋkɔ." 
Luke2:6 Eye esi wole afima la, eva ve me be, eƒe ŋkeke la de be, wòadzi vi." 
Luke2:7 Eye wòdzi ŋutsuvi, si nye eƒe ŋgɔgbevi, eye wòxatsa avɔ ɖe eŋu, eye wòtsɔe mlɔ lãnuɖunu me; elabena womekpɔ teƒe le amedzrodzeƒe o." 
Luke2:8 Eye alẽnyilawo le nuto ma ke me le gbedzi, eye wole woƒe alẽha ŋuti dzɔm le zã me." 
Luke2:9 Eye Aƒetɔ ƒe dɔlaa ɖe tsi tre ɖe wo gbɔ, eye Aƒetɔ ƒe ŋutikɔkɔe klẽ ƒo xlã wo, eye wovɔ̃ ŋutɔŋutɔ." 
Luke2:10 Eye dɔla la gblɔ na wo bena: Migavɔ̃ o! Elabena kpɔ ɖa, meva dzidzɔ gã ŋutinya gblɔ ge fia mi, esi lanye na dukɔ blibo la katã;" 
Luke2:11 elabena wodzi xɔla, si nye Kristo, Aƒetɔ la, na mi egbe le Dawid dua me." 
Luke2:12 Eye esia anye dzesi na mi: Míakpɔ vidzĩe, si woxatsa avɔ ɖe eŋu, eye wòmia lãnuɖunu me." 
Luke2:13 Eye kasia dziƒoʋakɔha gãa ɖe kpe ɖe mawudɔla la ŋuti, wole Mawu kafum le gbɔgblɔm bena:" 
Luke2:14 Ŋutikɔkɔe woana Mawu le dziƒo boo, eye ŋutifafa ava anyigba dzi; amegbetɔwo ŋu woakpɔ ŋudzedze nyui le." 
Luke2:15 Eye wòva me, esime mawudɔlawo dzo le wo gbɔ heyi dziƒo la, alẽnyilawo gblɔ na wo nɔewo bena: Mina ne miayi Betlexem, aɖakpɔ nusia, si va dzɔ, esi Aƒetɔ la na mienya." 
Luke2:16 Eye woɖe abla va, eye wokpɔ Mana kple Yosef kpakple vidzĩe, si le anyimlɔƒe le lãnuɖunu me." 
Luke2:17 Esi wokpɔe la, wokaka nya, si wogblɔ na wo le ɖevi sia ŋuti." 
Luke2:18 Eye amesiwo katã see la, woƒe mo wɔ yaa le nya, siwo alẽnyilawo gblɔ na wo la ŋuti." 
Luke2:19 Ke Mana lé nya siawo katã ɖe ta me, eye wobu wo ŋuti le eƒe dzi me." 
Luke2:20 Eye alẽnyilawo gbugbɔ, eye wole ŋutikɔkɔe kple kafukafu tsɔm na Mawu le nusiwo katã wose, eye wokpɔ la ŋuti, abe alesi wogblɔ na wo la ene." 
Luke2:21 Eye esi wotso aʋa nɛ le ŋkeke enyilia dzi la, wotsɔ ŋkɔ nɛ be Yesu, abe alesi mawudɔla yɔe ɖi, hafi wòfɔ eƒe fu ene." 
Luke2:22 Eye esi wowu woƒe ŋutikɔklɔŋkekeawo nu le Mose ƒe se la nu la, wotsɔe yi Yerusalem, be woatsɔe aɖo Aƒetɔ ŋku me," 
Luke2:23 abe alesi woŋlɔ ɖi le Aƒetɔ ƒe se la me ene bena: „Atsu sia atsu, si ʋu dɔnu la, woayɔ eya kɔkɔe na Aƒetɔ la“;" 
Luke2:24 eye be woana numeme, abe alesi wogblɔ le Aƒetɔ ƒe se la me ene bena: „Akpakpa eve alo ahɔ̃nevi eve.“" 
Luke2:25 Eye kpɔ ɖa, amea ɖe le Yerusalem, si ŋkɔ enye Simeon: amesia enye ame dzɔdzɔe kple mawumeme, si le Israel aƒe akɔfafa lalam, eye Gbɔgbɔ kɔkɔe le eyama dzi." 
Luke2:26 Eye Gbɔgbɔ kɔkɔe la ɖee fiae bena, mele kuku ge, hafi akpɔ Aƒetɔ la ƒe Kristo o." 
Luke2:27 Eye wòle Gbɔgbɔ la me va mawuxɔa me; eye esi dzilawo yi ɖe eme kple ɖevi Yesu, bena woawɔ nɛ le se la ƒe kɔa nu la," 
Luke2:28 eya hã xɔe ɖe eƒe abɔwo dome, eye wòkafu Mawu hegblɔ bena:" 
Luke2:29 Aƒetɔ, azɔ èɖo mɔ wò dɔla le ŋutifafa me le wò nya la nu;" 
Luke2:30 elabena nye ŋkuwo kpɔ wò xɔxɔ," 
Luke2:31 si nèdzra ɖo ɖe dukɔwo katã ƒe ŋku me; 
Luke2:32 kekeli ƒe nyaɖeɖefia na trɔ̃subɔlawo kple wò dukɔ Israel ƒe ŋutikɔkɔe. 
Luke2:33 Eye fofoa kple dadaa ƒe mo wɔ yaa le nya, siwo wògblɔ le eyama ŋuti la ta." 
Luke2:34 Eye Simeon yra wo, eye wògblɔ na dadaa Mana bena: Kpɔ ɖa, woɖo amesia anyi na ame geɖewo ƒe anyidzedze kple tsitretsitsi le Israel, kple dzesi, si woagblɔ nya ɖe eŋuti;" 
Luke2:35 ke wò la, yi ato wò ŋutɔ wò luʋɔ me, bena woaɖe ame geɖewo ƒe dzimesusuwo afia." 
Luke2:36 Eye Hana, nyɔnu nyagblɔɖilaa ɖe li, enye Fanuel ƒe nyɔnuvi tso Aser-ƒome me, si xɔ ƒe geɖe ŋutɔ, eye wònɔ anyi kple srɔ̃a ƒe adre tso eƒe ɖetugbi me;" 
Luke2:37 eye wònye ahosi, si xɔ ƒe blaenyi vɔ ene, eye medzona le mawuƒe la me o hele Mawu subɔm kple nutsitsiɖɔ kpakple kukuɖeɖe zã kple keli." 
Luke2:38 Eya hã va tsi tre le gaƒoƒo ma ke dzi, le Aƒetɔ kafum, eye wòƒo nu le eŋuti na amesiwo katã le Yerusalem ƒe ɖeɖe lalam." 
Luke2:39 Eye esi wowu nuwo katã nu le Aƒetɔ ƒe sea nu la, wògatrɔ yi Galilea ɖe woawo ŋutɔ ƒe du Nazaret la me." 
Luke2:40 Eye ɖevi la tsi, eye wòva sẽ ŋu, eye nunya yɔe fũ, eye Mawu ƒe amenuveve le edzi?" 
Luke2:41 Eye eƒe dzilawo yia Yerusalem ƒe sia ƒe ɖe ŋutitotoŋkekenyuieɖuƒe. 
Luke2:42 Eye esi wòxɔ ƒe wuieve la, woyi Yerusalem le ŋkekenyuie ƒe koa nu." 
Luke2:43 Eye esi wowu ŋkekeawo nu la, Yesu ɖevi la tsi megbe le Yerusalem le woƒe tɔtrɔgbɔ me, eye eƒe dzilawo menye o." 
Luke2:44 Ke esi wobu xa bena, ana mɔzɔha la dome la, wozɔ ŋkeke ɖeka ƒe mɔ, eye woɖii le woƒe ƒomeawo kple ame nyanyɛawo dome," 
Luke2:45 eye esi womekpɔe o la, wògatrɔ yi Yerusalem le edim." 
Luke2:46 Eye le ŋkeke etɔ̃ megbe la eva ve me bena, wokpɔe le mawuƒe la me le anyinɔƒe le nusiawo dome, hele to ɖom wo, eye wòle nya biam wo;" 
Luke2:47 eye amesiwo katã see la, woƒe mo wɔ yaa le eƒe nugɔmesese kple eƒe ŋuɖoɖowo ŋuti." 
Luke2:48 Eye esi wokpɔe la, kuvia ɖo wo, eye dadaa gblɔ nɛ bena: Vinye, nukaŋuti newɔ ɖe mia ŋu ale? Kpɔ ɖa, mia kple fofowò miedi wò kple nuxaxa." 
Luke2:49 Eye wògblɔ na wo bena: Nuka wɔ miedim ma? Ɖe mienya bena, ele nam be, manɔ nusiwo nye fofonye tɔ me o mahã?" 
Luke2:50 Eye womese nya, si wògblɔ na wo la gɔme o." 
Luke2:51 Eye wòyi kpli wo, eye wòva Nazaret, eye wòbɔbɔ eɖokui na wo, eye dadaa tsɔ nya siawo katã dzra ɖo ɖe eƒe dzi me." 
Luke2:52 Eye Yesu tsi ɖe dzi le nunya kple tsitsi kple amenuveve le Mawu kple amewo gbɔ la me. 
Luke3:1 Eye le kaisaro Tiberio ƒe fiaɖuɖu ƒe ƒe wuiatɔ̃lia me, esi Pontio Pilato le mɔ̃mefia ɖum le Yudea, eye Herodes enye dziɖula le Galilea, eye nɔvia Filipo enye dziɖula le Iturea kple Traxoniti-nyigbawo dzi, eye Lisania enye dziɖula le Abilene," 
Luke3:2 eye Hana kple Kayafa wonye nunɔlagãwo la, Mawu ƒe nya va Yohanes, Zaxarya vi la gbɔ le gbedzi." 
Luke3:3 Eye wòva Yordan-nutowo katã me godoo hele gbe ƒã ɖem dzimetɔtrɔ ƒe mawutsidedetaname hena nuvɔ̃wo ƒe keke; 
Luke3:4 alesi woŋlɔ ɖi le nyagblɔɖila Yesaya ƒe nyagblɔɖigbalẽ me bena: „Amesi le ɣli dom le gbeadzi ƒe gbe enye esi: Midzra Aƒetɔ ƒe mɔ la ɖo, miwɔ eƒe mɔtatawo dzɔdzɔe." 
Luke3:5 Woaxe ʋe sia ʋe, eye woabɔbɔ to sia to kple togbɛ sia togbɛ ɖe anyi, eye mɔ gɔglɔ̃wo lazu dzɔdzɔe, eye mɔ tsakliwo lazu zɔzrɔ̃e!" 
Luke3:6 Eye ŋutilã katã akpɔ Mawu ƒe xɔxɔ la. 
Luke3:7 Azɔ egblɔ na ameha, siwo do go, bena wòaɖe mawutsi ta na yewo la bena: Dawo ƒe dzidzimewo! Amekae gblɔe fia mi bena, miasi atso dɔmedzoe, si gbɔna la nu mahã?" 
Luke3:8 Azɔ mitse ku, siwo dze dzimetɔtrɔ, eye migade asi gbɔgblɔ me le mia ɖokui me bena: Abraham ye nye mía fofo o; elabena mele egblɔm na mi bena: Mawu ate ŋu anyɔ viwo atso kpe siawo me ke na Abraham." 
Luke3:9 Ke wotsɔ fia ɖo atiwo ƒe ke dzi gɔ̃ hã xoxo; azɔ ati sia ati, si metsea ku nyui o la, wolãnɛ, eye wotsɔnɛ ɖea dzo me." 
Luke3:10 Eye amehawo biae bena: Ekema nuka wɔ ge míala? 
Luke3:11 Eye wòɖo ŋu gblɔ na wo bena: Amesi awu eve le esi la, nena amesi ɖeke mele esi o, eye amesi nunyiame le esi la, newɔ nenema ke." 
Luke3:12 Eye nudzɔlawo hã va be, wòade mawutsi ta na yewo, eye wogblɔ nɛ bena: Nufiala, nuka wɔ ge míala?" 
Luke3:13 Eye wògblɔ na wo bena: Nusi ke woɖo na mi la, migaxɔ xɔɖedzi o.“" 
Luke3:14 Eye asrafowo hã biae gblɔ bena: Miawo hã nuka wo ge míala? Eye wògblɔ na wo bena: Migado ŋɔdzi na amea ɖeke xɔ nu le esi o, eye migatso amea ɖeke nu hã dzro o, eye miaƒe fetu nadze mia ŋu!" 
Luke3:15 Ke esi dukɔ la le nukpɔkpɔ me, eye wo katã wole ɖi kem le woƒe dzi me le Yohanes ŋuti be, ɖewo mahĩ eyae nye Kristo la la," 
Luke3:16 Yohanes ɖo ŋu gblɔ na wo bena: Nye la metsɔ tsi de mawutsi ta na mi; ke amesi tri akɔ wum, amesi ƒe atokotawo nu ka medzem be, matui o la, eya ŋutɔ gbɔna be, wòatsɔ Gbɔgbɔ kɔkɔe kple dzo ade mawutsi ta na mi;" 
Luke3:17 amesi si lugbɔnu le, be wòakplɔ eƒe lugbɔƒe keŋkeŋ, eye wòaƒo lu la ƒu alɔ ɖe eƒe ava me; ke tsroa la, wòatsɔ dzo matsimatsi atɔe." 
Luke3:18 Eye wògblɔ nyanyuie fia dukɔ la hele nu xlɔ̃m wo le nu bubu ƒomevi geɖewo hã ŋuti; 
Luke3:19 ke dziɖula Herodes, si wogbe nya na le Herodia, nɔvia srɔ̃ kple nu vɔ̃ɖi, siwo katã Herodes wɔ la ŋuti la," 
Luke3:20 etsɔ Yohanes de gaxɔ me hekpe ɖe nusiawo katã ŋuti. 
Luke3:21 Eye esi wòde mawutsi ta na dukɔ la katã, eye woɖee na Yesu hã la, edo gbe ɖa, eye wòva ve me bena, dziƒo ʋu," 
Luke3:22 eye Gbɔgbɔ kɔkɔe la ɖi le nɔnɔmekpɔkpɔ me abe akpakpa ene ɖe, eyama dzi, eye gbe ɖi tso dziƒo gblɔ bena: Wòe nye vinye, si gbɔ nyemelɔ̃a nu le o, wò me mekpɔa ŋudzedze lena." 
Luke3:23 Eye Yesu ŋutɔ, esi wòdze ɖɔ gɔme la, exɔ ƒe anɔ ƒe blaetɔ̃, eye wònye — le amewo ƒe susu nu — Yosef vi, amesi nye Eli vi," 
Luke3:24 amesi nye Mata vi, amesi nye Lewi vi, amesi nye Melxi vi, amesi nye Yona vi, amesi nye Yosef vi," 
Luke3:25 amesi nye Matatia vi, amesi nye Amos vi, amesi nye Nahum vi, amesi nye Esli vi, amesi nye Nagae vi," 
Luke3:26 amesi nye Mahat vi, amesi nye Matatia vi, amesi nye Semei vi, amesi nye Yosef vi, amesi nye Yuda vi," 
Luke3:27 amesi nye Yohanan vi, amesi nye Resa vi, amesi nye Zerubabel vi, amesi nye Salatiel vi, amesi nye Neri vi," 
Luke3:28 amesi nye Melxi vi, amesi nye Adi vi, amesi nye Kosam vi, amesi nye Elmadam vi, amesi nye Er vi," 
Luke3:29 amesi nye Yose vi, amesi nye Eliezer vi, amesi nye Yorim vi, amesi nye Matat vi, amesi nye Lewi vi," 
Luke3:30 amesi nye Simeon vi, amesi nye Yuda vi, amesi nye Yosef vi, amesi nye Yonan vi, amesi nye Eliakim vi," 
Luke3:31 amesi nye Melea vi, amesi nye Mena vi, amesi nye Matata vi, amesi nye Natan vi, amesi nye Dawid vi," 
Luke3:32 amesi nye Isai vi, amesi nye Obed vi, amesi nye Boaz vi, amesi nye Salmon vi, amesi nye Nahason vi," 
Luke3:33 amesi nye Aminadab vi, amesi nye Aram vi, amesi nye Esron vi, amesi nye Fares vi, amesi nye Yada vi," 
Luke3:34 amesi nye Yakob vi, amesi nye Isak vi, amesi nye Abraham vi, amesi nye Tara vi, amesi nye Nahor vi," 
Luke3:35 amesi nye Seruk vi, amesi nye Regu vi, amesi nye Peleg vi, amesi nye Eber vi, amesi nye Sala vi," 
Luke3:36 amesi nye Kainan vi, amesi nye Arfaksad vi, amesi nye Sem vi, amesi nye Noa vi, amesi nye Lamex vi," 
Luke3:37 amesi nye Metusala vi, amesi nye Enox vi, amesi nye Yared vi, amesi nye Mahalaleel vi, amesi nye Kainan vi," 
Luke3:38 amesi nye Enos vi, amesi nye Set vi, amesi nye Adam vi, amesi nye Mawu tɔ." 
Luke4:1 Eye Yesu, esi wòyɔ fũ kple Gbɔgbɔ kɔkɔe la, egbugbɔ tso Yordan nu, eye Gbɔgbɔ la kplɔe yi gbedzi," 
Luke4:2 eye Abosam le etem kpɔ ŋkeke blane sɔŋ. Eye meɖu naneke le ŋkeke mawo me o, eye esi ŋkekeawo wu nu la, dɔ wui." 
Luke4:3 Eye Abosam gblɔ nɛ bena: Nenye Mawuvi nènye la, ekema gblɔ na kpe sia, ne wòatrɔ zu abolo." 
Luke4:4 Eye Yesu xɔ edzi gblɔ nɛ bena: Woŋlɔ ɖi bena: „Menye abolo ɖeɖeko ŋuti ame lanɔ agbe ɖo o, negbe le Mawu ƒe nya sia nya ŋuti.“" 
Luke4:5 Eye esi wòkplɔe yi to kɔkɔa ɖe dzi la, eɖe xexeme fiaɖuƒewo katã fiae le aɖabaƒoƒo ɖeka me." 
Luke4:6 Eye Abosam gblɔ ne bena: Wòe matsɔ ŋusẽ sia katã kple woƒe ŋutikɔkɔe ana; elabena nyee wotsɔe de asi na, eye matsɔe ana amesi ke melɔ̃." 
Luke4:7 Azɔ wò ta, ne ède ta agu nam la, wo katã lazu tɔwo." 
Luke4:8 Eye Yesu xɔ edzi gblɔ nɛ bena: Woŋlɔ ɖi bena: „Aƒetɔ, wò Mawu la, naɖe la agu na, eye eya ɖeka ko nasubɔ.“" 
Luke4:9 Tete wòkplɔe yi Yerusalem, eye wòtsɔe ɖo mawuxɔ ƒe tsutsuẽƒe, eye wògblɔ nɛ bena: Nenye Mawuvi nènye la, ekema tsɔ ɖokuiwò xlã ɖe anyi tso afisia:" 
Luke4:10 elabena woŋlɔ ɖi bena: „Ade se na eƒe dɔlawo le ŋutiwò bena, woakpɔ tawò nyuie," 
Luke4:11 eye woƒe asiwò me woatsɔ wò aɖo, bena nagatsɔ wò afɔ axlã de kpea ɖeke o.“" 
Luke4:12 Eye Yesu xɔ edzi nɛ bena: Wogblɔ ɖi bena: „Megate Aƒetɔ, wò Mawu la, kpɔ o!“" 
Luke4:13 Eye esi Abosam wu tetekpɔwo katã nu la, ete ɖa le egbɔ gbɔ." 
Luke4:14 Eye Yesu gbugbɔ yi Galilea le Gbɔgbɔ la ƒe ŋusẽ me; eye eƒe ŋkɔ ɖi hoo le afima nutoawo katã me godoo. 
Luke4:15 Eye wòfiã nu le woƒe ƒuƒoƒewo, eye wo katã wokafui." 
Luke4:16 Eye wòva Nazaret, afisi wonyii le, eye le eƒe kɔa nu la eyi ɖe ƒuƒoƒe la le Sabat-ŋkeke dzi, eye wòtsi tre be, yeaxlẽ agbalẽ." 
Luke4:17 Eye wotso nyagblɔɖila Yesaya ƒe agbalẽ nɛ, eye esi wòdu agbalẽa la, ekpɔ teƒe, afisi woŋlɔ ɖo bena:" 
Luke4:18 Aƒetɔ ƒe Gbɔgbɔ le dzinye, le esi ta wosi ami nam ɖo, bena magblɔ Nyanyuie afia ame dahewo, edɔm, bena mayɔ dɔ amesiwo ƒe dzi gbã," 
Luke4:19 eye be maɖe gbe ƒã ɖokuisinɔnɔ na aboyomewo kple nukpekpe na ŋkuagbãtɔwo, be mana amesiwo wole funyafunya wɔmi la, nanɔ wo ɖokui si, eye be maɖe gbe ƒã Aƒetɔ ƒe ƒe nyui la.“" 
Luke4:20 Eye esi wòtu agbalẽa la, etsɔe na dɔla la, eye wòbɔbɔ nɔ anyi, eye amesiwo katã le ƒuƒoƒea la, fɔ ŋku ɖe edzi dzoɣlii." 
Luke4:21 Eye wòde asi gbɔgblɔ me na wo bena: Egbe wowu ŋɔŋlɔ sia nu le miaƒe towo me. 
Luke4:22 Eye ameawo katã ɖi ɖase nɛ, eye woƒe mo wo yaa le amenuvevenya, siwo do go tso eƒe nu me lã ŋuti, eye wogblɔ bena: Alo amesia la menye Yosef vie o ɖe?" 
Luke4:23 Eye wògblɔ na wo bena: Míado lo sia nam tsã be: „Gbedala, da gbe ɖokuiwò ŋu!“ Nusiwo miese bena, nèwɔ le Kapernaum la, wɔe le mía ɖe afisia hã." 
Luke4:24 Eye wògblɔ bena: Vavã mele egblɔm na mi bena: Nyagblɔɖilaa ɖeke medzea ye ŋutɔ detɔwo ŋu o. 
Luke4:25 Ke nyateƒe gblɔm mele na mi bena: Ahosi geɖewo le Israel le Eliya ƒe ŋkekewo me, esime wotu dziƒo nu ƒe etɔ̃ kple ɣleti ade, eye dɔwuame gãa ɖe va anyigba la katã dzi;" 
Luke4:26 eye womeɖo Eliya ɖe wo dometɔa ɖeke gbɔ o, negbe ɖe Sarepta le Zidon-nyigba dzi de nyanu ahosia ɖe gbɔ ko." 
Luke4:27 Eye anyidzela geɖewo le Israel le nyagblɔɖila Elisa gali, eye womeklɔ wo dometɔa ɖeke ŋuti o, negbe Naeman, Siriatɔ la ko." 
Luke4:28 Eye esi amesiwo katã le ƒuƒoƒe la, se nusiawo la, dome ve wo ŋutɔ;" 
Luke4:29 eye wotsi tre, eye wotu asi ʋume nɛ do go le dua me, eye wokplɔe vaseɖe to, si dzi wotso woƒe dua ɖo la, ƒe abunu, bena woatrɔ gboe aƒu abu me." 
Luke4:30 Ke eto wo titina ke heyi kɔ̃. 
Luke4:31 Eye wòɖi va Kapernaum, si nye Galilea-du la me. Eye wòle nu fiam wo le Sabat-ŋkeke dzi;" 
Luke4:32 eye kuvia ɖo wo le eƒe nufiafia la ŋuti, elabena egblɔ nya ŋusẽtɔe." 
Luke4:33 Eye ŋutsua ɖe le ƒuƒoƒe la, amesi me Abosam ƒe gbɔgbɔ bliba le, eye wòdo ɣli kple gbe sesĩe bena:" 
Luke4:34 Ago gbɔ, nya kae le mía kpli wò dome, wò Yesu, Nazaretetɔ? Ɖe nèva mía tsrɔ̃ gea? Menya wò amesi nènye: Mawu ƒe kɔkɔetɔ la nènye." 
Luke4:35 Eye Yesu wo ɖe eta gblɔ bena: Mia wò nu, eye naɖo go le eme! Eye esi Abosam la tsoe xlã ɖe titina la, eɖo go le eme, eye mewo nu ve-via ɖekee o." 
Luke4:36 Eye kuvia ɖo wo katã, eye wogblɔ le wo nɔewo dome bena: Nuka nyae nye esi ma? Elabena ekpɔ mɔ kple ŋusẽ hedea se na gbɔgbɔ blibawo, eye woɖoa go." 
Luke4:37 Eye eƒe ŋkɔ ɖi hoo le afima nutowo katã me godoo. 
Luke4:38 Ke esi wòtsi tre la, edo go le ƒuƒoƒe la heyi ɖe Simon ƒe me. Eye Simon lɔ̃xo le ŋudza sesẽa ɖe lém, eye woɖe kuku nɛ ɖe eta." 
Luke4:39 Eye esi wòtsi tre bi ɖe edzi la, ewo ɖe ŋudza la ta, eye wòdzo le edzi; ke etsi tre enumake, eye wòsubɔ wo." 
Luke4:40 Eye esime ɣe le to ɖom la, amesiwo katã si dɔléla bubu ƒomeviwo le la, wotsɔ wo va egbɔ, eye wòda asiwo ɖe wo dome ɖesiaɖe dzi ɖekaɖeka heda gbe wo ŋu." 
Luke4:41 Eye gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃wo hã do go le ame geɖewo me, eye wole ɣli dom le gbɔgblɔm bena: Wòe nye Mawu ƒe Vi la. Eye wòwona ɖe wo ta, eye mena mo wo be, woaƒo nu o, elabena wonyae bena, eyae nye Kristo la." 
Luke4:42 Eye esi ŋu eke la, edo go heyi gbedzi, eye amehawo dii, eye wova egbɔ, eye wosikae ɖi, bena megadzo le yewo gbɔ o." 
Luke4:43 Ke egblɔ na wo bena: Ele nam be, magblɔ mawufiaɖuƒe la ŋu nyanyuie afia du bubuawo hã; elabena eyata wodɔm ɖo." 
Luke4:44 Eye wòle nya gblɔm le Galilea ƒuƒoƒeawo. 
Luke5:1 Eye wòva ve me, esi ameha la mimii ɖo, be wòase mawunya la bena, ye ŋutɔ le tsitre ɖe Genezaret-ta la nu;" 
Luke5:2 eye wòkpɔ ʋu eve le ta la nu; ke ɖɔkplɔlawo do go tso wo me, eye wole woƒe dɔwo kpalam." 
Luke5:3 Eye esi woge ɖe ʋu ɖeka, si enye Simon tɔ me la, eɖe kuku nɛ be, wòatee ayii atso go ŋu ʋee. Eye esi wòbɔbɔ nɔ ʋua me la, efiã nu ɖo ɖe amehawo." 
Luke5:4 Eye esi wòdzudzɔ nuƒoƒo la, egblɔ na Simon bena: Mite yi tɔ ƒo, eye miɖi miaƒe ɖɔwo, ne miaɖe lã." 
Luke5:5 Eye Simon xɔ edzi gblɔ nɛ bena: Amegã, míedze agbagba zã blibo la katã, eye miekpɔ naneke o, gake le wò nya nu la maɖi ɖɔwo." 
Luke5:6 Eye esi wowɔ esia la, woɖe lã geɖe ŋutɔ, eye woƒe ɖɔwo le dzedzem;" 
Luke5:7 eye wòmia asi wo tɔ, siwo le ʋu bubu me la bena, woava ade asi eme na yewo. Eye wova, eye woyɔ ʋuawo kple eve fũ, ale be woɖe asi toyiyi me." 
Luke5:8 Eye esi Simon Petro kpɔe la, edze klo ɖe Yesu ƒe afɔ nu gblɔ bena: Aƒetɔ, do go le gbɔnye, elabena ame wɔnuvɔ̃ menye." 
Luke5:9 Elabena kuvia ɖoe kple amesiwo katã kpe ɖe eŋuti, le ɖɔɖiɖi zi ɖeka ƒe lã, si woɖe la ŋuti;" 
Luke5:10 nenema ke hãe nye Yakobo kple Yohanes, Zebedeo ƒe viwo, amesiwo nye Simon ƒe hadɔwɔlawo. Eye Yesu gblɔ na Simon bena: Megavɔ̃ o! Tso esia dzi yina la èle amewo ɖe ge." 
Luke5:11 Eye esi woku ʋuawo va ƒo ɖe go la, wogblẽ nuwo katã ɖi, eye wodze eyome." 
Luke5:12 Eye wòva ve me bena, esime wòle duawo dometɔ ɖeka me la, kpɔ ɖa, ŋutsua ɖe li, si ŋu yɔ fũ kple anyi, ke esi wòkpɔ Yesu la, edze klo tsyɔ mo anyi, eye wòɖe kuku nɛ bena: Aƒetɔ, ne èlɔ̃ ko, àte ŋu aklɔ ŋutinye." 
Luke5:13 Eye wòdo abɔ da hede asi eŋu gblɔ bena: Melɔ̃, ŋutiwò nakɔ! Eye enumake anyi la vɔ nɛ." 
Luke5:14 Eye wòde se nɛ be: Megagblɔe na amea ɖeke o, ke boŋ heyi ɖatsɔ ɖokuiwò fia nunɔla, eye namè nu le wò ŋutikɔklɔ la ŋuti, ɖe alesi Mose de se la nu, wòanye ɖaseɖiɖi na wo." 
Luke5:15 Ke geɖe wu nya la de dzi le eŋuti, eye ameha geɖewo va ƒo ƒu be, yewoase nya, eye be wòada gbe yewo ŋu le yewoƒe dɔlélewo me." 
Luke5:16 Ke ete eɖokui heyi gbedzi, eye wòdo gbe ɖa." 
Luke5:17 Eye gbe ɖeka la eva ve me bena, esi wòle nu fiãm, eye farisitɔwo kple sefiala, siwo tso Galilea kple Yudea-duwo katã me kpakple Yerusalem va la, wobɔbɔ nɔ afima, eye Aƒetɔ ƒe ŋusẽ ti be, wòada gbe le wo ŋu." 
Luke5:18 Eye kpɔ ɖa, ŋutsua ɖewo tsɔ amea ɖe, si nye lãmetututɔ la, ɖe aba dzi ve, eye wodi alesi woawɔ atsɔe ayi ɖe eme, eye be woatsɔe aɖo eƒe ŋku me." 
Luke5:19 Eye esi womekpɔ alesi woawɔ atsɔe vɛ le ameha la ŋuti o la, woyi ɖe xɔta, eye woɖiɖii ɖe anyi to mɔ, si woɖe la me kple eƒe aba la ɖe titina ɖe Yesu ŋku me." 
Luke5:20 Eye esi wòkpɔ woƒe xɔse la, egblɔ bena: Ame, wotsɔ wò nuvɔ̃wo ke wò!" 
Luke5:21 Eye agbalẽfialawo kple farisitɔwo de asi ɖikeke me gblɔ bena: Ameka enye esia, si gblɔ busunyawo? Ameka ate ŋu atsɔ nuvɔ̃wo ake, ne menye Mawu ɖeka ko oa?" 
Luke5:22 Eye esi Yesu dze si woƒe ɖikekewo la, exɔ dzi gblɔ na wo bena: Nuka ɖi kem miele le miaƒe dzi me mahã?" 
Luke5:23 Kae bɔbɔ wu, be woagblɔ: wotsɔ wò nuvɔ̃wo ke wò loo, alo woagblɔ bena: Tsi tre, eye nazɔ azɔli mahã?" 
Luke5:24 Ke ne mianyɛ bena, ŋusẽ le Amegbetɔvi la si be, wòatsɔ nuvɔ̃wo ake le anyigba dzi, — egblɔ na lãmetututɔ la bena: Mele egblɔm na wò bena: Tsi tre, eye nakɔ wò aba dzi, eye nayi aƒewò me." 
Luke5:25 Eye enumake wòtsi tre le woƒe ŋku me, eye esi wòkɔ nusi dzi wòmlɔ la, edzo yi eƒe me hele Mawu kafum." 
Luke5:26 Eye kuvia ɖo wo katã, eye wokafu Mawu, eye woyɔ fũ kple vɔvɔ̃ hegblɔ bena: Miekpɔ nu makpɔgbeɖewo egbe." 
Luke5:27 Eye nusiawo megbe la edo go, eye wòkpɔ nudzɔlaa ɖe, eŋkɔ enye Lewi, le anyinɔƒe le nudzɔƒe, eye wògblɔ nɛ bena: Dze yonyeme." 
Luke5:28 Eye wògblẽ nuwo katã ɖi, eye wòtsi tre dze eyome." 
Luke5:29 Eye Lewi ɖo kplɔ̃ gãa ɖe ne le eƒe me: eye nudzɔlawo kple ame bubuwo ƒe ha gãa ɖe bɔbɔ nɔ anyi ɖe nuaɖuƒe kpli wo. 
Luke5:30 Eye farisitɔwo kple woƒe agbalẽfialawo li liʋiliʋi ɖe eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo ŋuti gblɔ bena. Nukaŋuti mieɖua nu, eye mienoa nu kple nudzɔlawo kpakple nuvɔ̃wɔlawo mahã?" 
Luke5:31 Eye Yesu ɖo eŋu gblɔ na wo bena: Menye lãmesesẽtɔwoe hiãa gbedala o, negbe dɔlélawo ko." 
Luke5:32 Nyemeva ame dzɔdzɔewo yɔ ge o, negbe nuvɔ̃wɔlawo ko hena dzimetɔtrɔ." 
Luke5:33 Ke woawo la wogblɔ nɛ bena: Yohanes ƒe nusrɔ̃lawo tsia nu dɔna atraɖi, eye wonɔa gbe ɖom ɖa, nenema ke farisitɔwo tɔwo hã wɔna; ke tɔwòwo ɖua nu, eye wonoa nu." 
Luke5:34 Eye Yesu gblɔ na wo bena: Alo ɖe ŋugbetɔsrɔ̃ la ƒe xɔlɔ̃wo ate ŋu atsi nu adɔ, esime ŋugbetɔsrɔ̃ la li kpli wo mahã?" 
Luke5:35 Ke ŋkekewo gbɔna, esime woatsɔ ŋugbetɔsrɔ̃ la ayii le wo gbɔ; ekema woatsi nu adɔ le ŋkeke mawo me." 
Luke5:36 Eye wòdo lo hã na wo gblɔ bena: Amea ɖeke metsɔa avɔnuɖeɖi yeye kaa avɔ xoxo o; ke ne menye nenem o la, yeye la hã adze, eye yeye la ƒe nuɖeɖi mawɔ ɖeka kple xoxo la o."
