2Corinthians8:16 Ke woada akpe na Mawu, amesi tsɔ nenem veviedodo le mia ŋuti sia de Tito ƒe dzi me;" 
2Corinthians8:17 elabena exɔ nuxɔxlɔ̃ sia; ke esi wòdo vevie wu ŋuti la, edzo yi mia gbɔ le ye ŋutɔ ƒe lɔlɔ̃nu nu." 
2Corinthians8:18 Ke míedɔ eya kple nɔvi, si ŋu kafukafu le le nyanyuie ŋuti le hamewo katã me la, ɖo ɖa." 
2Corinthians8:19 Ke menye esia ɖeɖeko o, hafi hamewo tiae hã, bene wòanye mía hamɔzɔla le amenuveve sia, tsi miewɔna hena Aƒetɔ la ƒe kafukafu kple míaƒe lɔlɔ̃ ƒe ɖeɖefia la me." 
2Corinthians8:20 Nenem míele mo xem na esia, bena amea ɖeke nagaka mo na mí le nudzɔdzɔ gã sia, si miena wodzo la ŋuti o." 
2Corinthians8:21 Elabena míaƒe tamesusuwo le nu nyui yome, menye le Aƒetɔ la ŋku me ɖeɖeko o, ke le amewo ŋku me hã." 
2Corinthians8:22 Ke miedɔ wo kpakple mía nayi, si miedo kpɔ le nu geɖe me enuenu, eye miekpɔ bena, edoa vevie; ke azɔ la ele vevie dom geɖe wu tsãtɔ le dziɖoɖoɖeameŋu gã, si wòɖo ɖe mia ŋu la ta." 
2Corinthians8:23 Le Tito gome la, nye zɔhɛ wònye, eye hadɔwɔla wònye le mia gbɔ; le nɔvi, siwo tso mía gbɔ gome la, hame ƒe ame dɔdɔwo wonye kple bubu na Kristo." 
2Corinthians8:24 Azɔ ne míeɖe miaƒe lɔlɔ̃ kple miaƒe adegbe, si míeƒona le mia ŋuti la, ƒe dzesi fia woamawo la, ekema mieɖee fia le hameawo ŋku me." 
2Corinthians9:1 Mele vevie nam bena, maŋlɔ nya na mi le subɔsubɔdɔ, si wotso subɔ ame kɔkɔewo la ŋuti hafi o." 
2Corinthians9:2 Elabena menya bena, miele edzi lɔ̃m, eye metsɔ esia ƒo adegbe le mia ŋuti le Makedoniatɔwo gbɔ, bena Axaya dzra eɖokui ɖo xoxo anɔ ƒe ɖeka enye si, eye veviedodo, si tso mia gbɔ la, de dzo ame geɖeawo me." 
2Corinthians9:3 Ke meda nɔviawo ɖa, bene míaƒe adegbe, si míeƒona le mia ŋuti la, nagazu dzodzro le nya sia me o, bena abe alesi megblɔe ene la, míadzra mia ɖokui ɖo ɖi," 
2Corinthians9:4 bena nenye ɖe Makedoniatɔwo ava kpakplim, eye woakpɔ bena, miedzra mia ɖokui ɖo ɖi o la, ŋu nagakpe mí — míele didim be, miagblɔ be miawo ke la — le dziɖoɖo ɖe mia ŋu sia ŋuti o." 
2Corinthians9:5 Ke mebui nu vevi bena, mexlɔ̃ nu nɔviawo, bena woadze ŋgɔ ava mia gea, bene woadzra yayra, si ŋugbe mieɖo xoxo la, ɖo ɖi, bene wòasɔ gbe abe yayra ene, eye menye abe ŋukeklẽ ene o." 
2Corinthians9:6 Ke esia gblɔm mele bena, amesi ƒã nu le nuveve me la, axa nu hã le nuveve me, eye amesi ƒã nu le yayra me la, axa nu hã le yayra me." 
2Corinthians9:7 Amesiame abe alesi wòɖo ɖi le eƒe dzi me ene, menye kple veve alo dzizizi o; elabena amesi na nu kple dzidzo la, eyae Mawu lɔ̃na." 
2Corinthians9:8 Ke ŋusẽ le Mawu si bena, amenuveve katã nagbã go na mi, bene miakpɔ agbɔsɔsɔ blibo la katã le nusianu me ɖaasi, eye miagba go awɔ ɖɔ nyui sia dɔ nyui." 
2Corinthians9:9 Abe alesi woŋlɔ ɖi ene bena: „Ehlẽ nu hena ame dahewo; eƒe dzodzoenyenye noa anyi tegbetegbe. 
2Corinthians9:10 Ke amesi tsoa nuku kple abolo hã kea nuƒãla, bene wòakpɔ nuɖuɖu la, ana nuku mi, eye wòana miaƒe dzɔdzɔenyenye ƒe kutsetse natsi nyuie," 
2Corinthians9:11 bena miazu kesinɔtɔwo le nusianu me ahaɖe miaƒe dɔmenyonyo katã, si wɔ be, woada akpe na Mawu to mia dzi la afia." 
2Corinthians9:12 Elabena nunana sia ƒe subɔsubɔdɔ la menye ɖe wòde ame kɔkɔeawo ƒe hiãtutu nu ɖeɖe o, ke boŋ egba go le akpedada geɖe me hena Mawu hã;" 
2Corinthians9:13 elabena subɔsubɔdɔ sia ƒe kpɔɖeŋu nyui la ana woakafu Mawu le miaƒe toɖoɖo Kristo ƒe nyanyuie me ʋuʋu la kple miaƒe hadede kple woawo kpakple amewo katã tso dzimekɔkɔ me la ŋuti; 
2Corinthians9:14 eye woawo hã le kuku ɖem ɖe mia ta, eye miele wo dzrom le Mawu ƒe amenuveve, si sɔ gbɔ ŋutɔ na mi la ŋuti." 
2Corinthians9:15 Woada akpe na Mawu le eƒe nunana manyagblɔ la ŋuti! 
2Corinthians10:1 Ke nye Paulo ŋutɔ mele nu xlɔ̃m mi to Kristo ƒe dɔmefafa kple tufafa me, nye amesi nye ame bɔbɔɖokui le miaƒe ŋku me le mia dome; ke esime nyemele mia gbɔ o la, dzi le ƒonye ɖe mia ŋu." 
2Corinthians10:2 Ke mele kuku ɖem na mi bena, ne mele mia gbɔ la, nyemaɖe dzi ƒo na ɖokuinye kple ŋuɖoɖoɖeŋu, si mele susum be, matsɔ awɔ kalẽ ɖe amea ɖewo, siwo bua mí abe amesiwo zɔna le ŋutilã nu ene ta ŋuti o." 
2Corinthians10:3 Elabena esi wònye ŋutilã me zɔm míele hã la, miewɔa aʋa le ŋutilã nu o. —" 
2Corinthians10:4 Elabena míaƒe aʋawɔnuwo menye ŋutilãtɔ o, ke boŋ ŋusẽnu, siwo wotsɔna gbaa mɔ̃wo ƒua anyi la, wonye le Mawu ƒe ŋku me —" 
2Corinthians10:5 esi míegbaa tamebubuwo kple nu kɔkɔ sia nu kɔkɔ, si kɔa eɖokui ɖe dzi ɖe sidzedze Mawu ŋuti la, eye mieɖea nyasãwo katã aboyo hena toɖoɖo Kristo;" 
2Corinthians10:6 eye mienɔa dzadzraɖoɖi hã, bena ne miaƒe toɖoɖo ade blibo la, míatu fe vɔ̃ le tosesẽ sia tosesẽ ŋuti." 
2Corinthians10:7 Ɖe miekpɔa nusiwo le ŋku me la ɖa? Ne amea ɖe ɖoa ŋu ɖe eɖokui ŋu bena, Kristo to yenye la, ekema eyama nagasusu esia hã le eɖokui me bena, alesi ke ye ŋutɔ nye Kristo tɔ la, nenema ke míawo hã míenye eto." 
2Corinthians10:8 Elabena nenye be, maƒo adegbe via ɖe wu le míaƒe ŋusẽ, si Aƒetɔ la tso na mi, bene míado mi ɖe ŋgɔ, eye menye be, miagblẽ mi o la ŋuti la, ŋu mele kpe ye ge o," 
2Corinthians10:9 bene nyemagawɔ abe ɖe metso agbalẽwo do vɔvɔ̃ na mi ene o. 
2Corinthians10:10 Elabena wogblɔ be: Agbalẽawo kpena, eye wosẽna; ke eya ŋuta nye ame beli, eye eƒe nyawo mele ɖeke me o." 
2Corinthians10:11 Ke nenem me sia nasusu le esia ŋuti bena, amesi ƒomeviwo míenye le nya me le agbalẽwo me, esi miele mia gbɔ o la, nenem me mawo tɔgbe ke mianye le dɔwɔwɔ me, ne míele mia gbɔ hã." 
2Corinthians10:12 Elabena mieɖo dzi bena, míabu mia ɖokui akpe ɖe amea ɖewo ŋu, alo miatso mía ɖokui aɖo amea ɖewo, siwo kafua wo ɖokui la ŋu o; ke ame mawo la, esi wotso woa ŋutɔwo ɖokui dzidze wo ɖokui, eye wotsɔ wo ɖokui ɖo woa ŋutɔwo ɖokui ŋu ŋuti la, womenya nu o." 
2Corinthians10:13 Ke míawo la, míaƒo adegbe wòagbɔ me o, ke boŋ le dzidzeka ƒe dzidzedzidze, si Mawu ma na mí la nu, bene miade keke mia gbɔ hã." 
2Corinthians10:14 Elabena míele mía ɖokui dem akpa, abe ɖe míate ŋu ade mia gbɔ o ene o; elabena míetsɔ Kristo ƒe nyanyuie la de mia gbɔ ke hã." 
2Corinthians10:15 Mieƒoa adegbe wògbɔa eme le ame bubuwo ƒe dɔwɔƒewo ŋu o; ke mɔkpɔkpɔ le mía si bena, ne miaƒe xɔse le tsitsim la, míatsi azu gã le mia dome le míaƒe dzidzeka la nu," 
2Corinthians10:16 bene míagblɔ nyanyuie la afia le anyigba, siwo le mia godo la hã dzi, bene míagaƒo adegbe le ame bubuwo ƒe dɔwɔƒe le nusi wowɔ vɔ xoxo la ŋuti o." 
2Corinthians10:17 Ke amesi ƒoa adegbe la, naƒo adegbe le Aƒetɔ la me!" 
2Corinthians10:18 Elabena menye amesi tsia eɖokui la, nye ame nyui o, ke boŋ amesi Aƒetɔ la kafuna lae." 
2Corinthians11:1 Ɖe miado dzi atsa nye bometsitsi via ɖe; miado dzi atsɔe nam tso! 
2Corinthians11:2 Elabena metsɔ Mawu ŋuʋaʋã le ŋu ʋãm le mia ŋu, elabena medo mia ŋugbe na ŋutsu ɖeka, bena matso ɖetugbi dzadzɛ atu tsitre na Kristo." 
2Corinthians11:3 Ke mele vɔvɔ̃m bena, amea ɖe menya nu o, alesi da la tsɔ eƒe adaŋu vɔ̃ ble Xawa la, nenema ke woagblẽ miaƒe tamesusuwo tso dzimekɔkɔ, si miekɔ na Kristo la me mahĩ?" 
2Corinthians11:4 Elabena ne amesi gbɔna la, le gbe ƒã ɖem Yesu bubu, si míeɖe gbe ƒãe o la, alo ne miexɔ gbɔgbɔ bubu, si miexɔ tsã o la, alo miexɔ nyanyuie bubu, si miexɔ tsã o la, ekema mieɖoa dzi xɔnɛ nyuie!" 
2Corinthians11:5 Elabena mebuna be, nyemetsi megbe le naneke me le apostolo, siwo ko akpa la ŋu o." 
2Corinthians11:6 Ke me menye ame manyanu le nuƒoƒo me hã la, nyemenyae le sidzedze me o, ke le nusianu me miedze ƒã le amewo katã dome le mia gome." 
2Corinthians11:7 Alo ɖe esi mebɔbɔ ɖokuinye ɖe anyi, bene woado miawo ɖe dzi la, ɖe mewɔ nuvɔ̃ bena, megblɔ Mawu ƒe nyanyuie la fia mi fetu maxɔmaxɔe mahã?" 
2Corinthians11:8 Meha hame bubuwo, esi mexɔ fetu le wo si hena miaƒe subɔsubɔdɔ, eye esime menɔ mia gbɔ, eye hiã tum la, nyemeɖe fu na amea ɖeke o;" 
2Corinthians11:9 elabena nɔvi, siwo tso Makedonia va la, na nusiwo hiãm la, wòsɔ gbɔ de nunye, eye mekpɔ ɖokuinye dzi le nusianu me, bene nyemaganye agba na mi o, eye magakpɔ ɖokuinye dzi." 
2Corinthians11:10 Ne menye Kristo ƒe nyateƒe la le menye o fĩ, womagatsi adegbeƒoƒo sia nu nam le Axaya ƒe nutoawo me o." 
2Corinthians11:11 Nukaŋutie? Esi nyemelɔ̃a mi o taea? Mawue nyae! 
2Corinthians11:12 Ke nusi mewɔna la, mawɔe hã, bene mana mɔnukpɔkpɔ nu natso na amesiwo dia mɔnu, bene woakpɔ wo le nusi me woƒo adegbe le la me abe míawo hã ene." 
2Corinthians11:13 Elabena nenem me siawo nye aʋatso-apostolowo, dɔwɔla, siwo blea ame, amesiwo trɔa wo ɖokui woa Kristo ƒe apostolowo." 
2Corinthians11:14 Eye esia menye nukunu o; elabena Abosam ŋutɔ trɔa eɖokui wɔa kekeli ƒe dɔla. 
2Corinthians11:15 Eyata ne eƒe dɔlawo trɔa wo ɖokui abe dzɔdzɔenyenye ƒe dɔlawo ene la, menye nu gã o; amesiawo ƒe nuwuwu ana ɖe woƒe dɔwɔwɔwo nu." 
2Corinthians11:16 Megale egblɔm bena, amea ɖeke nagabum bometsila o; ke ne miebum nenema la, ekema mixɔm abe bometsila ene, bene nye hã maƒo adegbe le ɖokuinye ŋuti vie." 
2Corinthians11:17 Nusi gblɔm mele la, nyemele egblɔm ɖe Aƒetɔ la nu o, ke abe bometsila ene boŋ, le adegbeƒoƒo ƒe dziɖoɖoɖeŋu sia me." 
2Corinthians11:18 Esi ame geɖe ƒoa adegbe le ŋutilã nu ŋuti la, nye hã maƒo adegbe." 
2Corinthians11:19 Elabena esi míenye aɖaŋudzelawo ŋuti la, mielɔ̃na doa dzi tsoa bometsilawo ƒe nyawo." 
2Corinthians11:20 Elabena ne amea ɖe wɔ mi kluviwo, ne amea ɖe ɖu mi keŋ, ne amea ɖe lé mi, ne amea ɖe do eɖokui ɖe dzi, ne amea ɖe ƒo mo na mi la, miedoa dzi tsɔnɛ." 
2Corinthians11:21 Ŋukpedodo ta megblɔe ɖo, abe ɖe miawo la míegbɔdzɔ ene, ke nenye nusi me amea ɖe wo kalẽ le wònye la, — mele egblɔm le bometsitsi me — anye ne nye hã mawɔ kalẽ le eme." 
2Corinthians11:22 Hebritɔwo wonyea? Nye hãe! Israeltɔwo wònyea? Nye hãe! Abraham-ƒomeawo wonyea? Nye hãe! 
2Corinthians11:23 Kristo ƒe subɔlawo wònyea? — Mele nu ƒom abe amesi ƒe tame ɖa la ene — Nyee wu: Le agbagbadzedze geɖe wu me, le ƒoƒo geɖe akpa me, le gaxɔmedede geɖe wu me, le ku me agbadre." 
2Corinthians11:24 Yudatɔwo si mexɔ ƒoƒo ɖeka ɖi go blane me le zi alɔ," 
2Corinthians11:25 zi etɔ̃ woƒom kple atiwo, zi ɖeka woƒu kpem; menɔ ʋu me wògba zi etɔ̃, zã kple keli menɔ ƒutsotsoewo nu." 
2Corinthians11:26 Mezɔ mɔ enuenu; meɖo ŋɔdzi me le tɔsisiwo dzi, meɖo ŋɔdzi me le adzodalawo dome, meɖo ŋɔdzi me le nye dukɔmeviwo gbɔ, meɖo ŋɔdzi me le trɔ̃subɔlawo gbɔ, meɖo ŋɔdzi me le du me, meɖo ŋɔdzi me le gbedzi, meɖo ŋɔdzi me le atsiaƒu dzi, meɖo ŋɔdzi me le aʋatsonɔviawo dome;" 
2Corinthians11:27 le agbagbadzedze kple kutrikuku me; le ŋudɔdɔwo me agbadre, le dɔwuame kple tsikɔwuame me, le nutsitsidɔwo me agbadre, le vuvɔ kple amamanɔnɔ me." 
2Corinthians11:28 Nu bubu, siwo gadzo la, wonye: Amewo ƒe ziƒoƒo ɖe ŋunye gbesiagbe, kple beléte na hamewo katã." 
2Corinthians11:29 Ameka gbɔdzɔ, eye nyemagbɔdzɔ oa? Ameka nu woɖia, eye nyemefiã oa?" 
2Corinthians11:30 Ne ele nam be, maƒo adegbe la, maƒo adegbe le nusiwo le nye gbɔdzɔgbɔdzɔ gome la ŋuti." 
2Corinthians11:31 Mawu, mía Aƒetɔ Yesu Kristo Fofo, amesi wokafuna yi ɖe mavɔmavɔ me la, nyae bena, nyemeka aʋatso o." 
2Corinthians11:32 Le Damasko la fia Areta ƒe du me dziɖula dzo Damaskotɔwo ƒe du la ŋuti, bena yealém," 
2Corinthians11:33 eye wotsɔm de golo me to ʋɔtruvi nu heto gli dzi ɖiɖi ɖe anyi, eye mesi dzo tso eƒe asiwò mè." 
2Corinthians12:1 Ele be, maƒo adegbe; gake menye viɖe nam o; elabena mele Aƒetɔ la ƒe ŋutegawo kple nyaɖeɖefiawo gbɔ va ge." 
2Corinthians12:2 Menya amea ɖe le Kristo me, ano ƒe wuiene enye esi — eɖanɔ ŋutilã me o, nyemenyae o, alo menɔ ŋutilã me o, nyemenyae o; Mawue nyae — wotsɔ nenem me sia dzoe yi ɖe dziƒo etɔ̃lia me ke." 
2Corinthians12:3 Eye menya nenem me sia — eɖanɔ ŋutilã me o, meɖanɔ ŋutilã me o, nyemenyae o; Mawue nyae, —" 
2Corinthians12:4 bena wotsɔe dzoe yi ɖe Paradiso la me, eye wòse nya, siwo mele ne woagblɔ o, siwo womeɖe mɔ na ame, bene wòagblɔ o la." 
2Corinthians12:5 Nenem me sia ŋuti maƒo adegbe le; ke le ɖokuinye ŋuti la nyemaƒo adegbe o, negbe le nye gbɔdzɔgbɔdzɔwo ŋuti ko." 
2Corinthians12:6 Ke nenye ɖe maɖi be, maƒo adegbe la, nyemazu bometsila o; elabena magblɔ nyateƒe; ke nyemele ewɔ ge o, bene amea ɖeke nagabu ŋutinye wu alesi wòkpɔam alo alesi wòsea nya le nunye" 
2Corinthians12:7 hekpe ɖe nyaɖeɖefia, siwo ƒo wo katã ta ŋuti la o. Eyata bena nyemagado ɖokuinye ɖe dzi o la, wode ŋu nye ŋutilã me, si nye Satana ƒe dɔla, bene wòaƒom kple ko, bene nyemagado ɖokuinye ɖe dzi o." 
2Corinthians12:8 Esia ŋuti meyɔ Aƒetɔ la zi etɔ̃, bene wòadzo le ŋunye." 
2Corinthians12:9 Eye wògblɔ nam bena: Nye amenuveve so gbɔ na wò; elabena nye ŋusẽ zu blibo le gbɔdzɔgbɔdzɔ me. Eyata mele lalam wu bena, maƒo adegbe le nye gbɔdzɔgbɔdzɔ ŋuti boŋ, bene Kristo ƒe ŋusẽ nana dzinye." 
2Corinthians12:10 Eyata mekpɔa ŋudzedze nyui le gbɔdzɔgbɔdzɔwo me, le ŋutasesẽwo me, le hiãkamewo me, le yometitiwo me, le xaxawo me le Kristo ŋuti; elabena ne megbɔdzɔ la, ekema mesẽa ŋu." 
2Corinthians12:11 Mezu bometsila; gake miawoe zi dzinye. Elabena nye la miawoe lakafum hafi; elabena nyemetsi megbe le naneke me le apostolo, siwo ko akpa la ŋu o, wònye nyemenye naneke hafi o." 
2Corinthians12:12 Ke mewo apostolo ƒe dzesiwo le mia dome le dzidodo katã me, le dzesiwo kple nukunuwo kple ŋusẽdɔwɔwɔwo me." 
2Corinthians12:13 Alo nuka me gɔ̃ mietsi megbe le le hame susɔeawo ŋu, negbe le esia me ko bena, nye ŋutɔ nyemenye agba na mi oa? Mitsɔ nu madzɔmadzɔ sia kem!" 
2Corinthians12:14 Mikpɔ ɖa, esiae nye zi etɔ̃lia medzra ɖokuinye ɖo bena, mava mia gbɔ, eye nyemanye agba na mi o; elabena nyemele miaƒe nuwo dim o, ke mia ŋutɔwo dim mele boŋ. Elabena medze bena, viwo natu nuwo ɖo na wo dzilawo o, hafi dzilawo natu nuwo ɖo na viwo boŋ." 
2Corinthians12:15 Ke nye la melɔ̃na ŋutɔ bena, magblẽ nu, eye mana woagblẽ nye ŋutɔ le míaƒe luʋɔwo ta, geɖe alesi melɔ̃a mi la, ʋee wu miawo la mielɔ̃am." 
2Corinthians12:16 Ke anɔ nenem, nyemenye agba na mi o; ke esi menya aɖaŋu ŋutie, melé mi le aɖaŋu me." 
2Corinthians12:17 Alo ɖe meto amesiwo medɔ ɖo ɖe mia gbɔ la dome amea ɖe dzi ba mia? 
2Corinthians12:18 Mexlɔ̃ nu Tito, eye medɔ eya kple nɔvi la ɖo ɖa. Alo ɖe Tito ba mia? Menye gbɔgbɔ ma ke me miezɔ le oa? Menye afɔɖoƒe ma ke me miezɔ le oa?" 
2Corinthians12:19 Fifia katã miele susum bena, míele mía ɖokui ta ʋlim le mia gbɔ. Míele nu ƒom le Mawu ƒe ŋku me le Kristo me; ke, lɔlɔ̃tɔwo, míele wo katã wɔm le miaƒe ŋgɔgbedede ta." 
2Corinthians12:20 Elabena mele vɔvɔ̃m bena, ne meva mia gbɔ la, nyemakpɔ mi abe alesi mele didim ene o, eye miawo la míakpɔ nye hã, abe alesi miele didim o ene; bena dzrewɔwɔwo, ŋuʋaʋãwo, dɔmedzoedodowo, dzrehehewo, ameŋuzɔzɔwo, sakplisasawo, ɖokuidodoɖedziwo, nyamanyamawɔwɔwo anɔ anyi," 
2Corinthians12:21 bena ne megava la, Mawu abɔbɔm ɖe anyi le mia gbɔ, eye mala konyi le ame geɖe, siwo wɔ nuvɔ̃ tsã, eye wometrɔ le woƒe dzi me le makɔmakɔnyenye kple ahasiwɔwɔ kple hadzedze, siwo wowɔ ŋuti o la ta." 
2Corinthians13:1 Zi etɔ̃lia enye si megbɔna mia gbɔ; ɖaseɖila eve alo etɔ̃ nu woaƒo nya sia nya ta le. 
2Corinthians13:2 Megblɔe xoxo, eye megale egblɔm ɖi, alesi menɔ mia gbɔ zi eveliae la, nenema kee nye fifia hã, esi nyemele mia gbɔ o la, mele egblɔm na amesiwo wɔ nuvɔ̃ tsã kple ame susɔeawo katã bena, ne magava la, nyemakpɔ nublanui o." 
2Corinthians13:3 Elabena miele dzesi dim le Kristo, si le nu ƒom le menye la si, amesi megbɔdzɔ le mia gbɔ o, ke enu sẽ le mia dome la boŋ." 
2Corinthians13:4 Wònye gbɔdzɔgbɔdzɔ me wòtso woklãe ɖe atitsoga ŋu hafi, gake la Mawu ƒe ŋusẽ me wòtso wòle agbe. Elabena míawo hã míegbɔdzɔ le eyama me; gake mía kplii míanɔ agbe le Mawu ƒe ŋusẽ me le mia gome." 
2Corinthians13:5 Mite mia ɖokui kpɔ, abe ɖe miele xɔse me ene; mido mia ɖokui kpɔ! Alo ɖe miedze si mia ɖokui bena, Yesu Kristo le mia me oa? Negbe ɖeko mieli ke o." 
2Corinthians13:6 Ke mele mɔ kpɔm bena, miedze sii bena, míawo la míenye ame malike o." 
2Corinthians13:7 Ke mele kuku ɖem na Mawu bena, miagawɔ nuvɔ̃a ɖeke o, menye bena míawo miedze ƒã abe ame likewo ene o; ke boŋ bene miawo miawɔ nu nyui la, ke míawo la míanɔ abe ame malikewo ene." 
2Corinthians13:8 Elabena míate ŋu awɔ naneke ɖe nyateƒe la ŋuti o; ke nyateƒe la boŋ ye míate ŋu awɔ nane na. 
2Corinthians13:9 Elabena ne míawo míegbɔdzɔ, eye miawo miesẽ ŋu la, miekpɔa dzidzɔ, eye esia ŋuti míele kuku ɖem ɖo le miaƒe blibodede ŋuti." 
2Corinthians13:10 Eyata esi nyemele mia gbɔ o ŋuti la, meŋlɔ esiawo bena, ne mele mia gbɔ la, nyemagahe nya sesẽ le ŋusẽ, si Aƒetɔ la nam hena ame ƒe ŋgɔgbedede, eye menye eƒe gbegblẽ o la nu o." 
2Corinthians13:11 Mlɔeba la, nɔviwo, dzi nadzɔ mi, mizu blibo, mina woafa akɔ na mi, miaƒe tamesusu nanɔ ɖeka, mina anyi le ŋutifafa me, eye lolo kple ŋutifafa Mawu anɔ anyi kpli mi!" 
2Corinthians13:12 Mitso nugbugbɔ kɔkɔe gbugbɔ nu na mia nɔewo! Ame kɔkɔewo katã ɖuɖɔ mi ƒã! 
2Corinthians13:13 Mía Aƒetɔ Yesu Kristo ƒe amenuveve kple Mawu ƒe lɔlɔ̃ kple Gbɔgbɔ kɔkɔe ƒe hamenɔnɔ nanɔ anyi kpli mi katã! 
Galatians1:1 Paulo, si nye apostolo — menye amewo gbɔ wòtso, eye meto amea ɖeke hã dzi o, ke boŋ eto Yesu Kristo kple Mawu Fofo, si fɔe ɖe tsitre tso ame kukuwo dome la dzi la —" 
Galatians1:2 kple nɔvi, siwo katã li kplim la, ŋlɔe ɖo ɖe Galatia-hamewo:" 
Galatians1:3 Amenuveve kple ŋutifafa woana mi tso Mawu Fofo la kple mía Aƒetɔ Yesu Kristo gbɔ," 
Galatians1:4 amesi tsa eɖokui hena le mia nuvɔ̃ ŋuti, bene yeaɖe mí atso xexeme vɔ̃ɖi, si li fifia me le Mawu, mía Fofo, ƒe lɔlɔ̃nu la nu," 
Galatians1:5 amesi to anye kafukafu tso mavɔ me yi ɖe mavɔ me! Amen. 
Galatians1:6 Mewo yaa bena, miena wote mi ɖa tso amesi yɔ mi le Kristo ƒe amenuveve me la gbɔ kaba ŋutɔ ale heyina nyanyuie bubua ɖe me," 
Galatians1:7 wònye nyanyuie bubua ɖeke meli o, negbe bena amea ɖewo li, siwo blu miaƒe tame, eye wole didim be, yewoadze ŋe Kristo ƒe nyanyuie la." 
Galatians1:8 Ke nenye míawo alo mawudɔla, si tso dziƒo gɔ̃ hã, agblɔ nyanyuie la bubui afia mi, ɖe esi míegblɔ na mi teƒe la, nezu busu!" 
Galatians1:9 Abe alesi míegblɔ tsã la, magagblɔe fifi hã bena, ne amea ɖe gblɔ nyanyuie la bubui fia mi ɖe esi miexɔ teƒe la, nezu busu!" 
Galatians1:10 Ke azɔ la, ɖe megale nu ƒom, bena wòanyo amewo ŋu loo, alo Mawu ŋua? Alo ɖe mele didim bena, madze amewo ŋua? Ɖe megale amewo ŋu dzem la, anye ne nyemeganye Kristo ƒe dɔla o." 
Galatians1:11 Ke mana mianyae, nɔviwo, bena nyanyuie, si megblɔ fia mi ta, menye amewo to wonye o." 
Galatians1:12 Elabena nye hã nyemexɔe tso ame si me, eye nyemesrɔ̃e hã o, ke boŋ mexɔe to Yesu Kristo ƒe nyaɖeɖefia me." 
Galatians1:13 Elabena miese nye tsãnyinɔnɔ le Yudatɔnyenye me bena, meɖikpi ti Mawu ƒe hame la yome akpa, eye megblɔe." 
Galatians1:14 Eye mede ŋgɔgbe le Yudatɔnyenye me wu nye hati geɖewo le nye dukɔ la dome, eye meɖikpi ʋã ŋu akpa le mía fofowo ƒe nuɖoanyiwo ŋuti." 
Galatians1:15 Ke esime wòdze Mawu, si tiam le danye ƒe dome ke, eye wòto eƒe amenuveve me yɔm la ŋu," 
Galatians1:16 bena wòɖe ye ŋuta Via ɖe go fia le menye, bene magblɔ eŋuti nyanyuie la afia le trɔ̃subɔlawo dome la, enumake mía kple ŋutilã kple ʋu míetia nya me o," 
Galatians1:17 eye nyemeyi Yerusalem ɖe amesiwo tre apostolonyenye nam la gbɔ o, ke boŋ metɔ dzi heyi ɖe Arabia, eye megagbugbɔ va Damasko." 
Galatians1:18 Ƒe etɔ̃ megbe la meyi ɖe Yerusalem, Petro nya ge, eye menɔ egbɔ ŋkeke wuiatɔ̃." 
Galatians1:19 Ke nyemekpɔ apostolowo dome ame bubua ɖeke o, negbe Yakobo. Aƒetɔ la nɔvi ko." 
Galatians1:20 Ke nusi meŋlɔ na mi la, kpo ɖa, Mawu ƒe ŋku mee bena, nyemeka aʋatso o." 
Galatians1:21 Emegbe la meva Siria kple Kilikia nutoawo me. 
Galatians1:22 Ke Yudea-hame, siwo le Kristo me la, menyam le ŋku me o." 
Galatians1:23 Ke ɖeko wose bena, amesi ti mía yome tsã la, gblɔa xɔse ƒe nyanyuie, si wògblẽ tsã la, fiana azɔ." 
Galatians1:24 Eye wokafu Mawu le tanye. 
Galatians2:1 Emegbe la, anɔ ƒe wuiene, megayi Yerusalem, mia kple Barnaba, eye metso Tito hã kpe ɖe mía ŋu." 
Galatians2:2 Ke meyi le nyaɖeɖefiaa ɖe nu, eye metsɔ nyanyuie, si meɖea gbe ƒã le trɔ̃subɔlawo dome la, ɖo wo ŋku me, ke vevietɔ amesiwo wohuna be, wonye nane la ŋku me, bena nyemele du sim dzodzro alo mesi du dzodzro o." 
Galatians2:3 Ke Tito, si li kplim gɔ̃ hã la, Helatɔ wònye hafi; gake womezi edzi bene, wòana woatso aʋa nɛ o." 
Galatians2:4 Ke wowɔe le aʋatsonɔvia ɖewo, siwo be va tra ɖe eme, bene woatsa ŋku miaƒe ablɔɖenyenye, si le mía si le Kristo Yesu me la me, bene yewoawɔ mí kluviwo ƒã la ŋuti," 
Galatians2:5 amesiwo miena mɔ ɖo to wo gaƒoƒo ɖeka hɔ̃ o, bene nyanyuie la ƒe nyateƒe nanɔ te la mia gbɔ ɖaasi." 
Galatians2:6 Ke amesiwo wobuna bena, wonye nane la — ameka ke wonye o, nyemetsɔ ɖeke le eme o; Mawu mekpɔa ame ŋku me o — elabena nye la amesiwo wobuna be, wonye nane la, womegblɔ nyaa ɖeke fiam o;" 
Galatians2:7 ke boŋ la esi wokpɔ bena, wotsɔ nyanyuie de asi nam na aʋamatsomatsotɔwo, abe alesi wotsɔe de asi na Petro hena aʋatsotsotɔwo ene la —" 
Galatians2:8 elabena amesi wɔ dɔ ŋusẽtɔe na Petro le aʋatsotso ƒe apostolonyenye me la, eya kee wɔ dɔ ŋusẽtɔe na nye hã le trɔ̃subɔlawo dome —" 
Galatians2:9 eye esi wodze si amenuveve, si wotsɔ nam la, tete Yakobo kple Kefa kpakple Yohanes, amesiwo wobuna bena, wonye sɔtiwo la, wona habɔbɔ ƒe asi mía kple Barnaba, bene míawo míayi trɔ̃subɔlawo gbɔ, ke woawo woayi aʋatsotsotɔwo gbɔ;" 
Galatians2:10 negbe ɖeko bena miaƒe ŋkuwo nanɔ ame dahewo dzi; nusi kekeake nye hã medoa vevie wɔna. 
Galatians2:11 Ke esi Petro va Antioxia la, metsi tre ɖe eŋu le eya ŋutɔ ŋku me; elabena wotso enu." 
Galatians2:12 Elabena hafi amea ɖewo tso Yakobo gbɔ va la, eya kple trɔ̃subɔlawo dua nu; ke esi wova la, èhe eɖokui ɖe megbe, eye wòɖe eɖokui ɖa, elabena evɔ amesiwo tso aʋatsotsoa me la." 
Galatians2:13 Eye Yudatɔ susɔeawo hã da alakpa kpakplii, ale gbegbe bena, wohe Barnaba hã ɖe woƒe alakpadada la me." 
Galatians2:14 Ke esime mekpe bena, womele zɔzɔm dzɔdzɔe le nyanyuie la ƒe nyateƒe la nu o lã, megblɔ na Petro le wo katã ŋku me bena: Ne wò amesi nye Yudatɔ la, nènɔ agbe abe trɔ̃subɔla ene, eye menye abe Yudatɔ ene o la, aleke wo nèzi trɔ̃subɔlawo dzi, bena woanɔ agbe abe Yudatɔwo ene mahã?" 
Galatians2:15 Míawo la Yudatɔwo míenye tso dzɔdzɔme, eye míenye nuvɔ̃wɔlawo tso trɔ̃subɔlawo dome o;" 
Galatians2:16 ke esi míenyae bena, wometsoa afia na ame tso se la ƒe dɔwɔwɔwo me o, ke boŋ to Yesu Kristo dzixɔxɔse me ɖeɖeko ŋuti la, eyata míawo hã míexa Yesu Kristo dzi se, bene woatso afia na mí to Kristo dzixɔxɔse me, eye menye tso se la ƒe dɔwɔwɔwo me o; elabena wometsoa afia na ŋutilãa ɖeke tso se la ƒe dɔwɔwɔwo me o." 
Galatians2:17 Ke ne wokpɔ mí amesiwo le didim bena, woatso afia na mí le Kristo me la, bena mía ŋutɔwo hã nuvɔ̃wɔlawo míenye la, ekema Kristo le nuvɔ̃ ƒe subɔla nyem! Gbeɖe!" 
Galatians2:18 Elabena ne megatu nusiwo memu la, ekema mèfia ɖokuinye vodala." 
Galatians2:19 Ke nye la meto se la me ku na se la, bene manɔ agbe na Mawu. Mía kple Kristo woklã ɖe atitsoga ŋu." 
Galatians2:20 Mele agbe, gake meganye nyee le agbe o, ke boŋ Kristo ye le agbe le menye; ke nusi ƒe agbe mele le ŋutilã me azɔ la, mele agbe le Mawuvi, si lɔ̃m, eye wòtsɔ ye ŋutɔ ɖokui na ɖe tanye la, ƒe dzixɔxɔse me." 
Galatians2:21 Nyemedoa vlo Mawu ƒe amenuveve la o; elabena ne dzɔdzɔenyenye to se la me va la, ekema Kristo ku dzodzro." 
Galatians3:1 O, mi Galatiatɔ manyanuwo! Amekae trɔ tame na mi bena, mieɖo to nyateƒe la o: Mi amesiwo ŋku me woŋlɔ Yesu Kristo ɖo pete, abe amesi woklã ɖe atitsoga ŋu le mia dome la enea?" 
Galatians3:2 Esia ɖeɖeko dim mele be, nasrɔ̃ tso mia gbɔ: Se la ƒe dɔwɔwɔwo mee miexɔ Gbɔgbɔ la tso loo, alo xɔse ƒe nyagbɔgblɔfia la mee miexɔe tsoe mahã?" 
Galatians3:3 Ale ame manyanu siawo tɔgbe míenye mahã? Esi mietso Gbɔgbɔ la dze gome la, azɔ miatsɔ ŋutilã awu enua?" 
Galatians3:4 Ɖe míekpe fu geɖe siawo dzodzroa? Neganye dzodzroe hã. 
Galatians3:5 Azɔ la, amesi tso Gbɔgbɔ la kea mi, eye wòwɔa ŋusẽdɔwɔwɔwo le mia me la: Se la ƒe dɔwɔwɔwo mee wòto loo, alo xɔse ƒe nyagbɔgblɔfia la me wòtoa?" 
Galatians3:6 Abe alesi Abraham xa Mawu dzi se, eye wobui dzodzoenyenye nɛ ene." 
Galatians3:7 Eyata midze sii bena, amesiwo tso xɔse me la, woawo koe nye Abraham-viwo." 
Galatians3:8 Ke esi ŋɔŋlɔ la kpɔ ɖi bena, Mawu tso afia na trɔ̃subɔlawo tso xɔse me la, eyaŋuti wògblɔ nyanyuie la ɖi na Abraham bena: „Wò me woayra trɔ̃subɔlawo katã le.“" 
Galatians3:9 Eyaŋuti woyra amesiwo katã tso xɔse me la kple xɔsetɔ Abraham. 
Galatians3:10 Elabena ame alesi nu tso se la ƒe dɔwɔwɔwo me la, wole fiƒode la te; elabena woŋlɔ ɖi bena: „Woaƒo fi ade amesiame, si mena nusianu, si woŋlɔ ɖe anyi le sea ƒe agbalẽ me la dzi, bene wòawɔ edzi o la.“" 
Galatians3:11 Ke edze ƒã bena, wometsoa afia na amea ɖeke to se la me le Mawu ŋku me o; elabena „ame dzɔdzɔe la anɔ agbe tso xɔse me.“" 
Galatians3:12 Ke se la metso xɔse me o, hafi boŋ amesi ke wɔ nusiawo dzi la, anɔ agbe le wo me." 
Galatians3:13 Kristo xe fe ɖe mia ta heɖe mí tso se la ƒe fiƒode la me, esi wòva zu fiƒode le mía ta; elabena woŋlɔ ɖi bena: „Woƒo fi de amesiame, si wohe ɖe ati ŋu la,“" 
Galatians3:14 bene Abraham ƒe yayra la nava trɔ̃subɔlawo dzi le Kristo Yesu me, bene miaxa Gbɔgbɔ kɔkɔe ƒe ŋugbedodo la to xɔse me." 
Galatians3:15 Nɔviwo, mele nu ƒom abe ame ene; ame ƒe nubabla, si dzi woɖo kpee la, amea ɖeke metunɛ alo tsɔa nane kpena ɖe eŋuti o." 
Galatians3:16 Ke Abraham la wogblɔ ŋugbedodowo na eya kple eƒe ƒome; womegblɔ be: „Kple ƒomeawo“ abe ame geɖe ene o, ke abe ame ɖeka ene boŋ: „Kple wò ƒome,“ si nye Kristo." 
Galatians3:17 Ke esia gblɔm mele: Nubabla, si dzi Mawu ɖo kpee ɖi hena Kristo la, se, si wode ƒe alafa ene kple blaetɔ̃ megbe la, mele ŋu tui, bene woaɖe ŋugbedodo la ɖa o." 
Galatians3:18 Elabena nenye se la mee domenyinyi la tso la, ekema metso ŋugbedodo la me o; ke Mawu to ŋugbedodo la me tsoe ke Abraham." 
Galatians3:19 Azɔ la, nuka ta se la li ɖo? Vodadawo ŋuti wotsɔe kpe ɖe eŋuti, vaseɖe ɣeyiɣi, si dzi ƒome, si ŋugbe wodo ɖi la ava, eye woto mawudɔlawo dzi ɖoe anyi to avuléla si me." 
Galatians3:20 Ke avuléla menye ame ɖeka to o, ke Mawu la eya ɖekae." 
Galatians3:21 Azɔ la, ɖe se la tsi tre ɖe Mawu ƒe ŋugbedodo la ŋuti mahã? Gbeɖe! Elabena ɖe wona sea ɖe, si ate ŋu ana agbe la, anye ne se la me ke dzodzoenyenye la tso vavã." 
Galatians3:22 Ke ŋɔŋlɔ la tu nuwo katã nu ɖe nuvɔ̃ te, bene woatsɔ ŋugbedodo la tso Kristo dzixɔxɔse me na amesiwo xɔna sena la." 
Galatians3:23 Ke hafi xɔse la va la, wodzra mí ɖo ɖe se la te, eye wotu ʋɔ ɖe mia nu hena xɔse, si wole ɖeɖe ge ɖe go afia emegbe la." 
Galatians3:24 Ale se la zu mia nufiala, si kplɔa mí yia Kristo gbɔe, bene woatso afiã na mí to xɔse me." 
Galatians3:25 Ke esi xɔse va la, miegale nufiala te o." 
Galatians3:26 Elabena mi katã míenye mawuviwo to Kristo Yesu dzixɔxɔse me. 
Galatians3:27 Elabena mi ame alesi nu wode mawutsi ta na ɖe Kristo me la, miedo Kristo." 
Galatians3:28 Azɔ la Yudatɔ kple Helatɔ megali o; kluvi alo ablɔɖevi megali o; atsu alo asi megali o; elabena mi katã ɖeka miele le Kristo Yesu me. 
Galatians3:29 Ke ne míenye Kristo ta la, ekema Abraham ƒe ƒome kple domenyilawo míenye le ŋugbedodo la nu." 
Galatians4:1 Ke mele gbɔgblɔm be: Ŋkeke alesi domenyila enye ɖevi la, vovoa ɖeke mele eya kple kluvi dome o, wònye eyae nye nuwo katã ƒe aƒetɔ hafi;" 
Galatians4:2 ke boŋ ele amenyilawo kple aƒedzikpɔlawo te halase ɣeyiɣi, si fofoa ɖo ɖi la dzi." 
Galatians4:3 Nenema ke nye miawo hã: Esi míenye ɖeviwo la, mieno xexe sia me gɔmedzenuwo ƒe kluvinyenye te." 
Galatians4:4 Ke esi azãgbe la ɖo vo la, Mawu dɔ ye ŋuta Via ɖo ɖa, eye nyɔnua ɖe dzii, eye wodzii ɖe se la te," 
Galatians4:5 bene wòaxe fe ɖe amesiwo le sea te la ta, bene vinyenye la nasu mía si." 
Galatians4:6 Ke esi míenye viwo ŋuti la, Mawu dɔ Via ƒe Gbɔgbɔ, si le ɣli ɖom be; Aba, Fofo la, ɖo ɖe míaƒe dziwo me." 
Galatians4:7 Eyata meganye kluvi o, ke boŋ vi nènye; ke ne ènye vi la, ekema Mawu ƒe domenyila hã nenye le Kristo me." 
Galatians4:8 Ke ɣemaɣi, esime mienya Mawu o la, mienye nusiwo menye mawuwo tso dzɔdzɔ me o la ƒe kluviwo." 
Galatians4:9 Ke azɔ la, esi mienya Mawu alo Mawu boŋ nya mi la, aleke wɔ, eye miegatrɔ yi ɖe gɔmedzenu gbɔdzɔ daheawo gbɔ, eye miegale didim be, miagasubɔ wo tso gɔmedzedzea me mahã?" 
Galatians4:10 Mieléa ŋku ɖe ŋkekewo kple dzinuwo kple azãgbewo kpakple ƒewo ŋuti. 
Galatians4:11 Mele vɔvɔ̃m ɖe mia nu bena, misela medze agbagba dzodzro ɖe mia ta mahĩ?" 
Galatians4:12 Mizu abe nye ene; elabena nye hã mezu abe miawo ene! Nɔviwo, mele kuku ɖem na mi; miewɔ vɔ̃a ɖeke ɖe ŋunye o." 
Galatians4:13 Ke mienyae bena, le ŋutilã ƒe gbɔdzɔgbɔdzɔ ŋuti megblɔ nyanyuie fia mi zi gbãtɔ." 
Galatians4:14 Eye tetekpɔ, si le nye ŋutilã me na mi la, miedo vloe o, eye mienyɔ ŋui o, hafi boŋ miexam abe mawudɔla alo abe Kristo Yesu ene." 
Galatians4:15 Azɔ miaƒe dzidzo ƒe kafukafu la, afika wòle mahã? Elabena mele ɖase ɖim le mia ŋuti bena, ɖe miete ŋui la, ne mieho miaƒe ŋkuwo le to me tso nam." 
Galatians4:16 Esi megblɔ nyateƒe na mi la, eyata mezu miaƒe futɔ mahã?" 
Galatians4:17 Alesi wole ŋu ʋãm le mia ŋuti la, menyo o; ke boŋ wole didim be, yewoasa mi ɖe aga, bene miaʋã ŋu le yewo ŋuti." 
Galatians4:18 Ke ŋuʋaʋã le nu nyui ŋuti nyo ɖaasi, eye menye ne mele mia gbɔ ɖeɖeko o." 
Galatians4:19 Vinyewo, amesiwo ƒe fu gale ɖuyem, halase esime woamè Kristo ƒe nɔnɔme ade nua me!" 
Galatians4:20 Ke medi bena, manɔ mia gbɔ fifi, ne matrɔ nye gbe; elabena nye tame blu le mia ta." 
Galatians4:21 Migblɔe nam, mi amesiwo le didim be, yewoanɔ sea te la, miese se la oa?" 
Galatians4:22 Elabena woŋlɔ ɖi bena, vi eve nɔ Abraham si Ame ɖeka tso kosi me, eye ame ɖeka tso ablɔɖenyɔnu me!" 
Galatians4:23 Ke amesi tso kosi me la, wodzii le ŋutilã la nu, eye amesi tso ablɔɖenyɔnu me la, wodzii to ŋugbedodo la me." 
Galatians4:24 Nusiawo nye lododo; elabena esiawo nye nubabla eveawo. Ɖeka tso Sinai-to la dzi, si dzia vi hena kluvinyenye, esia nye Hagar;" 
Galatians4:25 elabena Hagar enye Sinai-to la le Arabia, ke esɔ kple egbegbe Yerusalem; elabena eya kple viawo le kluvinyenye me." 
Galatians4:26 Ke dziƒo Yerusalem enye ablɔɖe, eyae nye mí katã dada." 
Galatians4:27 Elabena woŋlɔ ɖi bena: „Dzi nadzo wò konɔ, si medzi vi o; tso aseye, eye nado ɣli, wò, amesi melé ku kpɔ o la; elabena amesi tsi akogo la, vi geɖe anɔ esi awu srɔ̃tɔ.“" 
Galatians4:28 Ke miawo la, nɔviwo, le Isak nu míenye ŋugbedodo la ƒe viwo." 
Galatians4:29 Ke alesi amesi wodzi le ŋutilã nu la, ti amesi wodzi le Gbɔgbɔ nu la yome tsã la, nenema ke wogale fifia hã." 
Galatians4:30 Ke nuka ŋɔŋlɔ la gblɔ ɖia? „Nyã kosi la kple via; elabena kosi la ƒe vi la maganyi dome kple ablɔɖenyɔnu la ƒe vi la o.“ 
Galatians4:31 Eyata, noviwò, míenye kosi la ƒe viwo o, hafi boŋ ablɔɖenyɔnu la to míenye." 
Galatians5:1 Ablɔɖenyenye ŋuti Kristo wɔ mí ablɔɖeviwo ɖo. Eyaŋuti minɔ tsitre sesĩe, eye migana woade kluvinyenye ƒe kɔkuti ko na mi o!" 
Galatians5:2 Kpɔ ɖa, nye Paulo mele egblɔm na mi bena, nenye be, miena wotso aʋa na mi la, Kristo maganye viɖea ɖeke na mi o." 
Galatians5:3 Ke megale ɖase ɖim na amesiame, si na wotso aʋa nɛ la be, ele ne wòawɔ se blibo la katã dzi." 
Galatians5:4 Mi amesiwo ɖi be, woatso afia na mi to sea me la, woklã mi ɖa tso Kristo gbɔ: amenuveve la sie miege le." 
Galatians5:5 Elabena míawo la Gbɔgbɔ me míele dzɔdzɔenyenye ƒe mɔkpɔkpɔ la lalam le tso xɔse me. 
Galatians5:6 Elabena le Kristo Yesu me la aʋatsotso mate ŋu awɔ naneke o, eye aʋamatsomatso hã nenema ke, hafi boŋ xɔse, si sẽa ŋu le bla me lae." 
Galatians5:7 Mieƒu du nyuie! Ameka xe mo na mi be, miagaɖo to nyateƒe la oa?" 
Galatians5:8 Nyaƒoɖeamenu sia metso amesi yɔ mi la gbɔ o. 
Galatians5:9 Amɔwɔ ʋaʋã via ɖe nana amɔwɔ blibo la katã ʋãna. 
Galatians5:10 Nye la meɖo ŋu ɖe mia ŋu le Aƒetɔ la me bena, miele nu bubua ɖeke susu ge o; ke amesi ke blu miaƒe tame la, eƒe ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ anɔ edzi, ameka ke wòɖanye o!" 
Galatians5:11 Ke nye la, nɔviwo, ne megale gbe ƒã ɖem aʋatsotso la, nukaŋuti wogale yonyeme tima? Ekema woɖe atitsoga ƒe nuɖiaɖia ɖa tso." 
Galatians5:12 Oo, ɖe wòala amesiwo de dzi mia me la ɖa!" 
Galatians5:13 Elabena, nɔviwo, woyɔ mi va ablɔɖenyenye gbɔ; ɖekoe ablɔɖenyenye la naganye mɔnunana ŋutilã o, ke boŋ misubɔ mia nɔewo le lɔlɔ̃ me!" 
Galatians5:14 Elabena wowu se blibo la katã nu le nya ɖeka me, le esia me be: „Lɔ̃ hawòvi abe wò ŋutɔ ɖokuiwò ene.“" 
Galatians5:15 Ke ne mieɖu, eye miemi mia nɔewo la, mikpɔ nyuie, be míagatsrɔ̃ mia nɔewo o!" 
Galatians5:16 Ke mele egblɔm be: Miza le Gbɔgbɔ me, eye miele ŋutilã ƒe nudzodzro dzi wo ge o." 
Galatians5:17 Elabena ŋutilã la dzroa nu ɖe Gbɔgbɔ la ŋuti, eye Gbɔgbɔ la ɖe ŋutilã la ŋuti; elabena esiawo tsi tre ɖe wo nɔewo ŋuti, bene miagawɔ nusiwo mielɔ̃na o." 
Galatians5:18 Ke ne Gbɔgbɔ la le mia kplɔm la, miegale sea te o." 
Galatians5:19 Ke ŋutilã ƒe dɔwɔwɔwo dze ƒã keŋ, esiwo nye: Matrewɔwɔ, ahasiwɔwɔ, makɔmakɔnyenye, hadzedze," 
Galatians5:20 trɔ̃subɔsubɔ, afakaka, kewɔwɔ, dzrewɔwɔ, ŋuʋaʋã, dɔmedzoedodowo, dzrehehewo, mamãwo, komamãwo," 
Galatians5:21 dɔmevevi, hlɔ̃dodowo, ahamumuwo, aglotutuwo kple esia tɔgbewo; nusiwo gblɔm mele ɖi na mi, abe alesi megblɔ ɖi na mi xoxo la ene, bena amesiwo wo ale nusiawo la, manyi mawufiaɖuƒe la ƒe dome o." 
Galatians5:22 Ke Gbɔgbɔ ƒe kutsetse enye: Lɔlɔ̃, dzidzɔ, ŋutifafa, dzigbɔgbɔ blewu, dɔmekɔkɔ, dɔmenyonyo, anukwaretɔnyenye," 
Galatians5:23 dɔmefafa, ɖokuidzidudu; nenem nusiawo la se la metsi tre de wo ŋu o." 
Galatians5:24 Ke amesiwo nye Kristo tɔ la, woklã woƒe ŋutilã kple woƒe nudzodzro wuamenu wo kpakple ŋubiabiãwo de atitsoga ŋu." 
Galatians5:25 Ke ne mienɔ agbe le Gbɔgbɔ me la, minɛ míazɔ le Gbɔgbɔ me hã." 
Galatians5:26 Miganɛ míaƒe ŋkuwo nabia le bubu dzodzro ŋuti o, ne míagadi ge le mia nɔewo ŋu, eye miaƒe nu nagave dɔme na mía nɔewo o." 
Galatians6:1 Nɔviwo, ne vodadaa ɖe ɖi ɖe amea ɖe hã la, mi amesiwo nye gbɔgbɔmemewo la, miɖɔ nenem me sia ɖo le dɔmefafa ƒe gbɔgbɔ la me; eye na ɖokuiwò dzi kpɔm nyuie, bene woagate wò hã akpɔ o." 
Galatians6:2 Mitso mia nɔewo ƒe agbawo, eye ale míawu Kristo ƒe se la nu keŋ." 
Galatians6:3 Elabena ne amea de bu bena, yenye nane, evɔ menye naneke o la, ye ŋutɔ ɖokui blem wòle." 
Galatians6:4 Ke amesiame nado ye ŋutɔ ƒe dɔwɔwɔ akpɔ, ekema akpɔ nu aƒo adegbe le ye ŋuta ɖokui ɖeɖeko me, eye menye le ame bubu me o." 
Galatians6:5 Elabena amesiame atsa ye ŋutɔ ƒe agba. 
Galatians6:6 Ke amesi wofiã nui le nya me la, nade ha kple amesi le nu fiam la, le nu nyuiwo katã me." 
Galatians6:7 Migable mia dokui o; Mawu menana wòdoa hehe de eta o! Elabena nusi ke ame ƒãna la, esia ke wòaŋe." 
Galatians6:8 Elabena amesi ƒã nu ɖe eƒe ŋutilã me la, aŋe gbegblẽ atso eƒe ŋutilã me; ke amesi ƒã nu ɖe Gbɔgbɔ me la, aŋe agbe mavɔ atso Gbɔgbɔ me." 
Galatians6:9 Migana ɖeɖi nate mía ŋu le nu nyui wɔwɔ me o; elabena ne míegbɔdzɔ le nu nyui wɔwɔ me o la, míaŋe nu le ye ŋutɔ ƒe azãgbe la dzi!" 
Galatians6:10 Eyaŋuti esi asinukpɔkpɔ le mía si la, mina míawɔ nu nyui na amesiame, ke vevietɔ na haxɔsetɔwo." 
Galatians6:11 Mikpɔ ŋɔŋlɔdzesi gãgã, siwo metsɔ nye ŋutɔ nye asi ŋlɔ ɖo ɖe mi la da!" 
Galatians6:12 Ame alesi nu le didim be, yewoadze nyuie le ŋutilã me la, woawoe zi mia dzi, bena miana woatso aʋa na mi, le esia ta ko, bene woagatsɔ Kristo ƒe atitsoga la ati wo yome o." 
Galatians6:13 Elabena amesiwo wotso aʋa na ŋutɔ hã, melé se la me ɖe asi o, ke boŋ wole didim be, miana yewoatso aʋa na mi, bene yewoaƒo adegbe le miaƒe ŋutilã me." 
Galatians6:14 Ke nye la megava me nam bena, maƒo adegbe o, negbe le mía Aƒetɔ Yesu Kristo ƒe atitsoga la ŋuti ko, amesi me woto klã xexeame ɖe atitsoga ŋu nam, eye nye hã woklãm ɖe atitsoga ŋu na xexeame." 
Galatians6:15 Elabena le Kristo Yesu me la aʋatsotso kple aʋamatsomatso siaa menye naneke o, ke nuwɔwɔ yeye boŋ." 
Galatians6:16 Eye ame alesinu zɔna ɖe mɔ sia nu teƒeteƒe la: Ŋutifafa kple nublanuikpɔkpɔ ava wo amesiwo nye Mawu ƒe Israel la dzi! 
Galatians6:17 Tso esia dzi la amea ɖeke megaɖe tu nam o; elabena nye la Yesu ƒe abidzesiwo le nye ŋutilã ŋu. 
Galatians6:18 Mia Aƒetɔ Yesu Kristo ƒe amenuveve nanɔ anyi kple miaƒe gbɔgbɔ la, nɔviwo! Amen." 
Ephesians1:1 Paulo, Yesu Kristo ƒe apostolo to Mawu ƒe lɔlɔ̃nu me, ŋlɔ ɖo ɖe ame kɔkɔewo kple xɔsetɔwo le Kristo Yesu me le Efeso:" 
Ephesians1:2 Amenuveve kple ŋutifafa, si tso Mawu, mia Fofo, kple Aƒetɔ Yesu Kristo gbɔ la, woana mi." 
Ephesians1:3 Woakafu Mawu, si nye mia Aƒetɔ Yesu Kristo Fofo, amesi tsɔ gbɔgbɔ me yayrawo katã le dziƒonutowo me yra ɖe mia dzi le Kristo me," 
Ephesians1:4 abe alesi ke wòtia mí le eyama me, hafi wòɖo xexeame gɔme anyi ene, bene mianye kɔkɔeawo kple mokaka manɔŋutɔwo le eƒe ŋku me," 
Ephesians1:5 esi wotsɔ lɔlɔ̃ ɖo mí ɖi hena vinyenye to Yesu Kristo dzi na eɖokui le eƒe lɔlɔ̃nu ƒe ŋudzedze la nu," 
Ephesians1:6 bene woakafu eƒe amenuveve ƒe ŋutikɔkɔe, esi wotsɔ ve mia nu le lɔlɔ̃vi la me," 
Ephesians1:7 amesi me míekpɔ fexexeɖeta la le to eƒe ʋu la me, si nye vodadawo ƒe tsɔtsɔke le eƒe amenuveve ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ geɖe la nu," 
Ephesians1:8 esi wòna wògba go na mí le nunya katã kple aɖaŋudzedze katã me," 
Ephesians1:9 esi wòna míenya eƒe lɔlɔ̃nu ƒe nya ɣaɣla la le eƒe ŋudzedze, si wòɖo ɖi le eɖokui me la nu" 
Ephesians1:10 hena azãgbewo ƒe ɖoɖo ƒe nuɖoanyi, bene woaƒo nuwo katã nu ƒu ade ta ɖeka te le Kristo me, nusiwo le dziƒo kple nusiwo le anyigba dzi la;" 
Ephesians1:11 eya, amesi me míexɔ domenyinyi la hã le, esime woɖo mí ɖi le amesi wɔa nuwo katã le eƒe lɔlɔ̃nu ƒe adaŋudede nu la, ƒe tameɖoɖoɖi la nu," 
Ephesians1:12 bene mianɔ anyi na eƒe ŋutikɔkɔe le kafukafu, mí amesiwo kpɔ mɔ na Kristo gbã la," 
Ephesians1:13 amesi me miawo hã miele, esime miese nyateƒe la ƒe nya, si nye miaƒe xɔxɔ ƒe nyanyuie la, amesi me hã, esime miexɔ se la, wotre mia nu kple ŋugbedodo ƒe Gbɔgbɔ kɔkɔe la le," 
Ephesians1:14 amesi nye miaƒe domenyinyi ƒe awɔbanu hena ye ŋutɔ tɔwo ƒe ɖeɖe hena eƒe ŋutikɔkɔe ƒe kafukafu. 
Ephesians1:15 Esiaŋuti nye hã, esime mese xɔse, si le mia si le Aƒetɔ Yesu me la, kple miaƒe lɔlɔ̃, si mietsɔ lɔ̃ ame kɔkɔeawo katã ŋutinya la," 
Ephesians1:16 nyemedzudzɔ akpedada le mia ŋuti o, esime meɖoa ŋku mia dzi le nye kukuɖeɖewo me," 
Ephesians1:17 bena mia Aƒetɔ Yesu Kristo ƒe Mawu, si nye ŋutikɔkɔe Fofo la, nana nunya kple nyaɖeɖefia ƒe Gbɔgbɔ la mi le eƒe sidzedze la me," 
Ephesians1:18 eye bene miaƒe dzi me ŋkuwo dzi nakɔ, bene miadze si nusi nye eƒe ameyɔyɔ la ƒe mɔkpɔkpɔ, kple nusi nye domenyinyi ƒe ŋutikɔkɔe ƒe kesinɔnu la le ame kɔkɔewo me," 
Ephesians1:19 kple nusi nye eƒe ŋusẽ ƒe gãnyenye, si ƒo wo katã ta la, na mí amesiwo xɔna sena le eƒe ŋusẽ gbɔgbɔ la ƒe dɔwɔwɔ la nu," 
Ephesians1:20 esi wòwɔ le Kristo me, esime wòfɔe ɖe tsitre tso ame kukuwo dome, eye wòtsɔe ɖo ye ŋutɔ ƒe nuɖusi me le dziƒonutowo me" 
Ephesians1:21 ɖe dziɖulanyenye kple ŋusẽ kple ŋutete kple aƒetɔnyenye katã kpakple ŋkɔ sia ŋkɔ, si woyɔna la dzi, menye le ɣeyiɣi sia me ɖeɖeko o, hafi le ɣeyiɣi, si le vava ge la me hã," 
Ephesians1:22 eye wòtsɔ nuwo katã de eƒe alo te, eye wòtsɔ eya ke ɖo nuwo katã ƒe ta hena hame," 
Ephesians1:23 si nye eƒe ŋutilã; eya amesi yɔ nuwo katã fũ le wo katã me la ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ la. 
Ephesians2:1 Eye wògba agbe miawo hã, amesiwo nye ame kukuwo le dzidadawo kple nuvɔ̃wo me," 
Ephesians2:2 esiwo me miezɔna le tsã le xexe sia me ƒe ŋɔli le nu, le yameŋusẽ ƒe fia, si nye gbɔgbɔ, si le ŋu sẽm azɔ le vi sẽtowo me la nu —" 
Ephesians2:3 amesiwo dome mí katã hã miezɔna le tsã le miaƒe ŋutilã ƒe nudzodzrowo me, esime miewɔ ŋutilã kple tame ƒe lɔlɔ̃nuwo la, eye míenye dziku ƒe viwo tso dzɔdzɔ me abe ame mlɔeawo hã ene. —" 
Ephesians2:4 Ke Mawu, amesi nye kesinɔtɔ le nublanuikpɔkpɔ me la, le eƒe lɔlɔ̃ geɖe, si wòtso lɔ̃ mí la ŋuti," 
Ephesians2:5 egba agbe mi amesiwo nye ame kukuwo le dzidadawo me la, kple Kristo — amenuveve wòtso ɖe mi —" 
Ephesians2:6 eye wòfɔ mi ɖe tsitre kplii, eye wòtsɔ mía kplii ɖo dziƒonutowo me le Kristo Yesu me," 
Ephesians2:7 bene le ɣeyiɣi, siwo gbɔna me la, wòaɖe ye ŋutɔ ƒe amenuveve ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ geɖe, si ƒo wo katã ta la, ɖe go afia le dɔmekɔkɔ, si wòka ɖe mía ŋu la me le Kristo Yesu me." 
Ephesians2:8 (Elabena amenuveve wotsɔ ɖe mi to xɔse me, eye esia la metso mia ŋutɔwo mia me o, Mawu ƒe nunanae;" 
Ephesians2:9 menye dɔwɔwɔ me wòtso o, bene amea ɖeke nagaƒo adegbe o.)" 
Ephesians2:10 Elabena eyama ƒe nuwɔwɔ míenye, wowɔ mí le Kristo Yesu me hena dɔ nyui wɔwɔ, siwo Mawu dzra ɖo ɖi, bene miazɔ le wo me la." 
Ephesians2:11 Eyaŋuti la miɖo ŋku edzi bena, tsã la mi amesiwo nye trɔ̃subɔlawo le ŋutilã me, amesiwo woyɔna be aʋamatsomatso le amesiwo woyɔna be aʋatsotso, si wotsɔ asi wɔ le ŋutilã me la gbɔ la," 
Ephesians2:12 bena mienɔ anyi le ɣemaɣi me Kristo menɔ mia si o, eye míenye ame tutɔwo na Israel ƒe dumetɔnyenye la kple amedzrowo na ŋugbedodo la ƒe nubablawo, eye mɔkpɔkpɔa ɖeke menɔ mia si o, eye Mawu hã menɔ mia si le xexeame o." 
Ephesians2:13 Ke azɔ la miele Kristo Yesu me, mi amesiwo le adzɔge ʋĩ tsã la, miete va le Kristo ƒe ʋu la me." 
Ephesians2:14 Elabena eya kee nye míaƒe ŋutifafa, amesi tsɔ mí kpakple eve la katã wɔ ɖeka, eye wòmu mamã ƒe gli, si nye adikã la," 
Ephesians2:15 esi wòɖe se la ƒe sededewo le nyaɖoɖowo me la ɖa le eƒe ŋutilã me, bene wòatsɔ wo ame eve la katã awɔ ame yeye ɖeka le ye ŋutɔ ɖokui me, eye wòwɔ ŋutifafa," 
Ephesians2:16 eye wòlé avu le wo ame eve la siaa kple Mawu dome le ŋutilã ɖeka me to atitsoga me, esi wòwu adikã la le eɖokui me." 
Ephesians2:17 Eye wòva gblɔ ŋutifafa ƒe nyanyuie la fia mi amesiwo le adzɔge kple amesiwo le kpuiƒe la. 
Ephesians2:18 Elabena eyama ke me mi kpakple eve la katã míekpɔ mɔnu le Gbɔgbɔ ɖeka me la heyina Fofo la gbɔ. 
Ephesians2:19 Eyata azɔ míeganye ame tutɔwo kple amedzrowo o, ke boŋ míenye ame kɔkɔewo ƒe hadumeviwo kple Mawu ƒe aƒemetɔwo," 
Ephesians2:20 amesiwo wotu ɖe apostolowo kple nyagblɔɖilawo ƒe gɔmeɖoɖo la dzi, afisi Yesu Kristo ŋutɔ nye dzogoedzikpe le," 
Ephesians2:21 amesi me wokpe xɔtutu blibo la katã ɖo, eye wòtsi zu mawuxɔ kɔkɔe le Aƒetɔ la me," 
Ephesians2:22 amesi me wotu miawo hã kpe ɖe eŋuti le, bene mianye Mawu ƒe nɔƒe le Gbɔgbɔ la me." 
Ephesians3:1 Esiaŋuti la nye Paulo, Yesu Kristo ƒe gatɔ le mi trɔ̃subɔlawo ŋuti la," 
Ephesians3:2 nenye ɖe miese Mawu ƒe amenuveve, si wonam le mia ta la ƒe nuɖoanyi," 
Ephesians3:3 bena le nyaɖeɖefia nu wòna menya nya ɣaɣla la, abe alesi meŋlɔ na mi kpuie va yi la ene," 
Ephesians3:4 le eya me, ne miele exlẽm la, míate ŋu adze si nye Kristo ƒe nya ɣaɣla la gɔmesese," 
Ephesians3:5 si womèna amegbetɔviwo nya le ŋɔli bubuwo me o, abe alesi woɖee fia eƒe apostolowo kple nyagblɔɖila kɔkɔewo le Gbɔgbɔ la me azɔ la ene o," 
Ephesians3:6 bena trɔ̃subɔlawo zu ŋugbedodo ƒe domenyilawo kple hadelawo kple gomekpɔlawo le Kristo Yesu me to nyanyuie la me," 
Ephesians3:7 esi ƒe subɔla mezu le Mawu ƒe amenuvevenunana, si wòtsɔ nam la nu, le eƒe ŋusẽ ƒe dɔwɔwɔ, si nu sẽ la nu;" 
Ephesians3:8 nye amesi nye ame kɔkɔewo katã dome suetɔ la, wotsɔ amenuveve sia na, bene magblɔ Kristo ƒe kesinɔnu, si mele nyanya tsitsotsito o da afia le trɔ̃subɔlawo dome," 
Ephesians3:9 eye bene mana keklẽ naklẽ na wo katã, bene woanya nusi nye nya ɣaɣla, si woɣla ɖe Mawu, si wɔ nuwo katã la me tso ŋɔli mavɔwo me la, ƒe nuɖoanyi la," 
Ephesians3:10 bene azɔ la woato hame dzi ana dziɖulawo kple ŋusẽtɔ, siwo le dziƒonutowo me la nanye Mawu ƒe nunya bubu ƒomevi geɖe la" 
Ephesians3:11 le tameɖoɖo, si woɖo ɖi le ŋɔli mavɔwo me, esi nu wowu le Kristo Yesu, mía Aƒetɔ me la nu," 
Ephesians3:12 amesi me miekpɔ dzideƒo kple mɔnu le dziɖoɖo ɖe eŋu me to eyama dzixɔxɔse me. 
Ephesians3:13 Eyaŋuti la mele kuku ɖem na mi bena, ɖeɖi nagate mia ŋu le nye xaxa, siwo mekpɔ le mia ta, esiwo nye bubu na mi la ŋuti o." 
Ephesians3:14 Eyata medzea nye klo na mía Aƒetɔ Yesu Kristo Fofo," 
Ephesians3:15 amesi gbɔ ƒome sia ƒome, si le dziƒo kple anyigba dzi la, kpɔa eƒe ŋkɔ tsonɛ," 
Ephesians3:16 bene wòaɖi na mi le eƒe ŋutikɔkɔe ƒe kesinɔ la nu, bena wòado ŋusẽ mi to eƒe Gbɔgbɔ me le ememe la gome," 
Ephesians3:17 bene Kristo nanɔ anyi le miaƒe dziwo me to xɔse me," 
Ephesians3:18 eye wòali ke mi, eye wòaɖo mia gɔme anyi le lɔlɔ̃ me, bene mi kpakple ame kɔkɔewo katã míate ŋu adze si nusi nye kekeme kple didime kple goglome kple kɔkɔme," 
Ephesians3:19 eye bene miadze si Kristo ƒe lɔlɔ̃, si ƒo sidzedze la ta sa la, bene woayɔ mi taŋ, ne miade Mawu ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ blibo la katã nu." 
Ephesians3:20 Ke amesi tea ŋu wɔna wua nusianu geɖe wua nusiwo katã míebiana alo míedzea si le ŋusẽ, si le dɔ wɔm ŋusẽtɔe le mía me nu la," 
Ephesians3:21 eya tɔ nanye ŋutikɔkɔe la le ha me le Kristo Yesu me yiɖase dzidzimewo katã dzi, tso mavɔ me yi ɖe mavɔ me! Amen." 
Ephesians4:1 Azɔ la nye amesi nye gatɔ le Aƒetɔ la me la, mele nu xlɔ̃m mi bena, miazɔ alesi dze mia yɔyɔ, si wotsɔ yɔ mi la" 
Ephesians4:2 le tamebɔbɔɖeanyi kple dɔmefafa katã me, le dzigbɔgbɔ blewu me, eye mihe adodo kple mia nɔewo le lɔlɔ̃ me," 
Ephesians4:3 eye mido vevie, bene míadzra gbɔgbɔ ƒe ɖekanyenye la ɖo le ŋutifafa ƒe nublanu la me!" 
Ephesians4:4 Ŋutilã ɖeka kple Gbɔgbɔ ɖeka, abe alesi ke woyɔ mi hã le mia yɔyɔ ƒe mɔkpɔkpɔ ɖeka la me ene." 
Ephesians4:5 Aƒetɔ ɖeka, xɔse ɖeka, mawutsidedeta ɖeka," 
Ephesians4:6 Mawu ɖeka, si nye wo katã Fofo, amesi le wo katã dzi, eye wòto wo katã me, eye wòle wo katã me." 
Ephesians4:7 Ke mia dome amesiamee wona amenuveve le Kristo ƒe nunana ƒe dzidzenu la nu. 
Ephesians4:8 Eyata wogblɔ be: „Eyi dzi me ʋĩ,“ eye woɖe aboyo aboyomewo yii, eye wòna nunanawo amewo." 
Ephesians4:9 Ke esi wòyi dzi la, nukae, negbe ɖeko bena wòyi anyi me ɖe anyigba ƒe nutowo me hã hafi?" 
Ephesians4:10 Amesi va anyi la, eya ke ganye amesi yi dziƒowo katã ƒe dziƒo hã, bene wòayɔ nuwo katã taŋ." 
Ephesians4:11 Eye eya ke ɖo amea ɖewo wonye apostolowo, eye amea ɖewo hã nye nyagblɔɖilawo, eye amea ɖewo hã nye nyanyuiegblɔlawo, eye amea ɖewo hã nye kplɔlawo kple nufialawo," 
Ephesians4:12 bene woadzra ame kɔkɔewo do hena subɔsubɔ ƒe dɔwɔwɔ hena Kristo ƒe ŋutilã tutu," 
Ephesians4:13 halase esime mí katã miade Mawuvi la dzixɔse kple sidzedze ƒe ɖekanyenye la gbɔ, azu ŋutsu blibo, eye míade Kristo ƒe tsitsime blibo la ƒe dzidzenu la gbɔ," 
Ephesians4:14 bene míaganye ɖevi, siwo nufiafia ƒe ya sia ya ƒona yina gaƒona gbɔna, eye wònyama wo to amewo ƒe beble la me to aɖaŋu vɔ, si nu sẽ la me, le nudadafiafia ƒe amebeblemɔ la nu o," 
Ephesians4:15 ke boŋ la mianye anukwaretɔwo le lɔlɔ̃ me, eye le nusianu me míatsi ali ke ɖe Kristo, si nye ta la me," 
Ephesians4:16 amesi gbɔ wòtso wokpe ŋutilã blibo la katã, eye wobiae ɖekae, eye woto ƒunuɖeƒewo katã ƒe kpekpe ɖe wo nɔewo ŋu me, le ŋutinu sia ŋutinu ƒe dɔwɔwɔ, si womã nɛ la nu, hewu ŋutilã ƒe tsitsi la nu hena tutu le lɔlɔ̃ me." 
Ephesians4:17 Azɔ la mele esia gblɔm, eye mele ɖase ɖim le Aƒetɔ la me bena, azɔ la miagazɔ abe alesi trɔ̃subɔlawo hã zɔna le woƒe tamesusu ƒe yakanyenye me la ene o," 
Ephesians4:18 amesiwo ƒe nyasã do viviti, eye wonye amedzrowo le Mawu ƒe agbe la gome le numanyamanya, si le wo me la ŋuti, le woƒe dzimesesẽ la ŋuti," 
Ephesians4:19 amesiwo, esi woƒe dzitsinya ku atri la, wotsɔ wo ɖokui na hadzedze, bene woano makɔmakɔnyenye katã dzi le ŋukeklẽ me." 
Ephesians4:20 Ke miawo la menye nenem miesrɔ̃ Kristo o," 
Ephesians4:21 nenye ɖe miese eŋkɔ, eye wofia nu mi le eme, alesi nyateƒe la le Yesu me;" 
Ephesians4:22 bena miaɖe ame xoxo, si nɔ anyi le agbenɔnɔ tsãtɔ la nu, si gblẽa eɖokui le amebeble ƒe nudzodzrowo me la ɖa;" 
Ephesians4:23 ke boŋ mina woawɔ mi yeye le miaƒe tamesusu ƒe gbɔgbɔ la me," 
Ephesians4:24 eye mido ame yeye, si wowɔ le Mawu ƒe nɔnɔme nu la, le nyateƒe la ƒe dzɔdzɔenyenye kple kɔkɔenyenye la me." 
Ephesians4:25 Eyaŋuti miɖe aʋatsokaka ɖi, eye amesiame nagblɔ nyateƒe na ehavi; elabena ŋutinuwo míenye na mía nɔewo." 
Ephesians4:26 Mibi dzi, eye migawɔ nuvɔ̃ o; ɣe la nagaɖo to ɖe miaƒe dzibibi o;" 
Ephesians4:27 eye migana mɔ Abosam hã o! 
Ephesians4:28 Fiafitɔ la nagafi fi o, ke boŋ nedze agbagba, ne woatso eƒe asiwo awɔ dɔ nyui, bene wòakpɔ nane aɖana hiãtɔwo." 
Ephesians4:29 Migana nya vloa ɖeke nado go tso miaƒe nu me gbeɖegbeɖe o, ke boŋ nya, si nyo na ŋgɔgbedede, ne ehiã la, bene wòana amenuveve amesiwo senɛ la." 
Ephesians4:30 Eye migawɔ nusi ave Mawu ƒe Gbɔgbɔ kɔkɔe la o, amesi me wotre mia nu le hena xɔxɔ ƒe ŋkeke la." 
Ephesians4:31 Mina woaɖe veve helĩhelĩ kple dɔmedzoe kple dziku kple ɣlidodo kple busubɔbɔ katã kpakple nu tovo wɔwɔ katã hã ɖa le mia dome. 
Ephesians4:32 Ke mikɔ dome ɖe mia nɔewo ŋu, eye miaƒe dɔme natrɔ ɖe mia nɔewo ŋu, eye mitso ke mia nɔewo, abe alesi Mawu tso ke mi le Kristo me la ene." 
Ephesians5:1 Azɔ la mizu mawusrɔ̃lawo abe lɔlɔ̃viwo ene," 
Ephesians5:2 eye mizɔ le lɔlɔ̃ me, abe alesi Kristo hã lɔ̃ mi, eye wòtso eɖokui hena ɖe mia ta, bene wòanye nunana kple vɔsa na Mawu, bene wòanye ʋeʋẽ lilili nyui la ene." 
Ephesians5:3 Ke ahasiwɔwɔ kple makɔmakɔnyenye katã alo ŋukeklẽ la womagayɔ eŋkɔ gɔ̃ hã le mia dome o, abe alesi wòdze ame kɔkɔewo ene," 
Ephesians5:4 kple ŋukpeanu kple yakanyagbɔgblɔwo kple atsaƒoƒo, siwo medze o, negbe akpedada boŋ." 
Ephesians5:5 Elabena mi amesiwo nye sidzelawo, mienyae bena, ahasiwɔla alo ame makɔmakɔ alo ŋuklẽla, si so kple trɔ̃subɔla la, domenyinyia ɖeke meli na wo dometɔa ɖeke le Kristo kple Mawu ƒe fiaɖuƒe la me o." 
Ephesians5:6 Migana amea ɖeke natsɔ nya ƒuƒlu able mi o; elabena nusia ŋuti Mawu ƒe dziku la va vi sẽtowo dzi ɖo. 
Ephesians5:7 Eyata migazu woƒe hadelawo o; 
Ephesians5:8 elabena tsã la mienye viviti, ke azɔ la míezu kekeli le Aƒetɔ la me." 
Ephesians5:9 Mizɔ abe kekeliviwo ene! Elabena kekeli ƒe kutsetse la le dɔmenyonyo kple dzɔdzɔenyenye kple nyateƒe katã me. 
Ephesians5:10 Mido nusi nyoa Aƒetɔ la ŋu la kpɔ," 
Ephesians5:11 eye migade ha kple viviti me dɔwɔwɔ, siwo metsea ku o la o, ke mihe nya ɖe wo ŋu boŋ." 
Ephesians5:12 Elabena nusiwo wowɔ le ɣaɣlaƒe la, enye ŋukpe be woaƒo nu le wo ŋuti gɔ̃ hã." 
Ephesians5:13 Ke nusiwo katã ŋu kekeli hea nya ɖo la, woɖe wo ɖe go keŋ; elabena nusianu, si woɖe ɖe go la, enye kekeli." 
Ephesians5:14 Eyaŋuti la wogblɔ be: Nyɔ, wò amesi le alɔ̃ dɔm la, ne natsi tre tso ame kukuwo dome, eye Kristo ahlẽ ɖe dziwò!" 
Ephesians5:15 Eyaŋuti la mikpɔ nyuie be, miazɔ pɛpɛpɛ; menye abe numanyamanyatɔwo ene o, ke boŋ abe nunyalawo ene," 
Ephesians5:16 amesiwo wɔa ɣeyiɣi la ŋuti da blibo, elabena ŋkekeawo nye vɔ̃." 
Ephesians5:17 Eyaŋuti la migazu bometsilawo o, ke boŋ midze si nusi nye Aƒetɔ la ƒe lɔlɔ̃nu." 
Ephesians5:18 Eye migamu aha, esi me nu baɖabaɖa wɔwɔ le la o; ke boŋ Gbɔgbɔ la nayɔ mi fũ," 
Ephesians5:19 eye mitso Psalmowo kple kafukafuhawo kpakple gbɔgbɔ me hawo ƒo nu kple mia nɔewo: Midzi ha, eye miƒo ha na Aƒetɔ la le miaƒe dzi me," 
Ephesians5:20 eye mida akpe na Mawu, Fofo la, ɖaahe le nuwo katã ŋuti le mía Aƒetɔ Yesu Kristo ƒe ŋkɔ la me," 
Ephesians5:21 eye mibɔbɔ mia ɖokui na mia nɔewo le Kristo vovɔ̃ me. 
Ephesians5:22 Mi nyɔnuwo la, mibɔbɔ mia ɖokui na mia ŋutɔwo mia srɔ̃wo abe Aƒetɔ la ene;" 
Ephesians5:23 elabena ŋutsue nye ta na nyɔnu, abe alesi Kristo hã nye ta na hame la ene, eye eyae nye ŋutilã la ƒe xɔla." 
Ephesians5:24 Gake la alesi hame la bɔbɔa eɖokui na Kristo la, nenema ke nyɔnuwo hã nawɔ na woawo ŋutɔ wo srɔ̃wo le nuwo katã me." 
Ephesians5:25 Mi ŋutsuwo la, milɔ̃ mia ŋutɔwo mia srɔ̃wo, abe alesi Kristo hã lɔ̃ hame la, eye wòtso ye ŋutɔ ɖokui hena ɖe eta la ene," 
Ephesians5:26 bene yeakɔ eŋu, esime wòklɔ eŋuti to tsilele me le nya la me megbe la," 
Ephesians5:27 bene ye ŋuta natsɔe aɖo tsitre na eɖokui wòanye ŋutikɔkɔehame, si ŋuti ɖiƒoƒoa ɖeke alo ayilélea ɖeke alo nusiawo ƒe ɖeke naganɔ o, ke boŋ la, bene wòana kokoe, eye mokakaa ɖeke naganɔ eŋuti o;" 
Ephesians5:28 Nenema ke wòle na ŋutsuwo be, woalɔ̃ woa ŋutɔwo wo srɔ̃wo abe woa ŋutɔwo ƒe ŋutilãwo ene. Amesi lɔ̃a ye ŋutɔ srɔ̃ la, elɔ̃a eɖokui;" 
Ephesians5:29 elabena amea ɖeke melé fu ye ŋutɔ ƒe ŋutilã kpɔ o, ke boŋ enyinɛ, eye wòkpɔa edzi, abe alesi Aƒetɔ la wona na hame la ene;" 
Ephesians5:30 elabena eƒe ŋutilã ƒe ŋutinuwo míenye, fefe ŋutilã kple eƒe ƒuawo me mietso." 
Ephesians5:31 „Eyata ŋutsu agblẽ fofoa kple dadaa ɖi, eye wòalé ɖe srɔ̃a ŋuti, eye wo kpakple eve la katã woanye ŋutilã ɖeka." 
Ephesians5:32 Nya ɣaɣla sia lolo, ke nye la mele egblɔm le Kristo kple hame la ŋuti." 
Ephesians5:33 Ke miawo hã mia dome ɖesiaɖe nalɔ̃ ye ŋutɔ srɔ̃anyɔnu nenema ke, abe ye ŋutɔ ɖokui ene; ke nyanu la nasi srɔ̃a ɖa." 
Ephesians6:1 Mi ɖeviwo la, miɖo to mia dzilawo le Aƒetɔ la me, elabena esia le eteƒe." 
Ephesians6:2 „Bu fofowò kple dawo,“ — esia nye sedede gbãtɔ, si me ŋugbedodo le la —" 
Ephesians6:3 „bene wòanyo na wò, eye nana agbe didie le anyigba dzi!“" 
Ephesians6:4 Eye mi fofowo la, migado dziku na mia viwo o, ke miayi wo le Aƒetɔ la ƒe hehe kple nuxɔxlɔ̃ la me." 
Ephesians6:5 Mi dɔlawo la, miɖo to mia aƒetɔwo le ŋutilã nu kple vavã kpakple dzodzo nyanyanya le miaƒe dzimekɔkɔ me abe Kristo ene," 
Ephesians6:6 menye le ŋku me nuwɔwɔ me abe ameŋudzelawo ene o, ke boŋ abe Kristo ƒe dɔla, siwo woa Mawu ƒe lɔlɔ̃nu tso dzi me la ene:" 
Ephesians6:7 mitsɔ lɔlɔ̃nu nyui hesubɔ, abe Aƒetɔ lae miesubɔna ene, eye menye amewo o," 
Ephesians6:8 esi mienyae bena, nu nyui, si ke amesiame wɔna la, eya ke wòaxɔ tso Aƒetɔ la gbɔ, nenye dɔla alo ablɔɖevi." 
Ephesians6:9 Eye mi aƒetɔwo, miwo nusiawo tɔgbe ke na wo; midzudzɔ ŋɔdzidodo, esi miawo hã mienyae be, mia kpli wo siaa ƒe Aƒetɔ la le dziƒo, eye ŋkumekpɔkpɔa ɖeke mele egbɔ o la ŋuti." 
Ephesians6:10 Mlɔeba la, nɔvinyewo, mise ŋu le Aƒetɔ kple eƒe ŋusẽ ƒe ŋutete la me!" 
Ephesians6:11 Mido Mawu ƒe aʋawɔnu blibo la katã, bene míate ŋu ano te ɖe Abosam ƒe aɖaŋu vɔ̃wo nu;" 
Ephesians6:12 elabena míele kame tem kple ʋu kpakple ŋutilã o, ke boŋ mía kple dziɖulanyenye kple ŋusẽ kple xexe sia me fia, siwo le fifi viviti sia me kpakple vɔɖinyenye ƒe gbɔgbɔ, siwo le dziƒonutowo me lae le kame tem." 
Ephesians6:13 Eyata mikpla Mawu ƒe aʋawɔnu blibo la katã, bene míate ŋu anɔ te le ŋkeke vɔ̃ la dzi, eye ne miewu wo katã nu vɔ la, miakpɔ tsitrenɔnɔ." 
Ephesians6:14 Azɔ la mitsi tre, eye mitsɔ nyateƒe bla miaƒe aliwo dzi, eye mido dzɔdzɔenyenye ƒe akɔtakpoxɔnu," 
Ephesians6:15 eye mitso dzadzraɖoɖi na ŋutifafa nyanyuie la bla miaƒe afɔ gɔme. 
Ephesians6:16 Hekpe ɖe nusiawo katã ŋuti la milé xɔse ƒe akpoxɔnu, si miate ŋu atsɔ atsi vɔ̃ɖitɔ la ƒe atsurɔ bibiawo la me ɖe asi." 
Ephesians6:17 Eye miɖo xoxo ƒe gakuku la, eye mihe Gbɔgbɔ ƒe yi, si nye mawunya la, ɖe asi." 
Ephesians6:18 Mitsɔ gbedodoɖa kple kukuɖeɖewo katã do gbe ɖa le ɣeawokatãɣi me le Gbɔgbɔ me, eye eyaŋuti minɔ ŋudzɔ, ne mianɔ kukuɖeɖewo dzi ɖaahe ɖe ame kɔkɔewo katã ta" 
Ephesians6:19 kple nye hã lanye, bena ne meke nu la, woatsɔ nya nam, bene makpe dzideƒo ana woanya nyanyuie la ƒe nya ɣaɣla," 
Ephesians6:20 esi ŋuti menye ame dɔdɔ le kɔsɔkɔsɔ me, bene dzi nado ƒonye le eme, abe alesi wòdzem be, maƒo nu ene." 
Ephesians6:21 Ke bene miawo hã mianya alesi mele kple nusi wɔm mele la, mia nuvi lɔlɔ̃tɔ Tixiko, amesi nye subɔla nuteƒewɔla le Aƒetɔ me la, ana mianya nuwo katã;" 
Ephesians6:22 medɔ amesia ɖo ɖe mia gbɔ le esia ŋuti, bene mianya alesi míele, eye ne wòafa akɔ na mia dziwo." 
Ephesians6:23 Ŋutifafa kple lɔlɔ̃ kple xɔse, si tso Mawu, Fofo la kple Aƒetɔ Yesu Kristo gbɔ la, woana nɔviawo." 
Ephesians6:24 Amenuveve nanɔ anyi kple amesiwo katã lɔ̃a mía Aƒetɔ Yesu Kristo ɖikaɖika la. 
Philippians1:1 Paulo kple Timoteo, Yesu Kristo ƒe dolawo, ŋlɔ ɖo ɖe ame kɔkɔe, siwo katã le Kristo Yesu me le Filipi la, kple dzikpɔlawo kple subɔlawo hã:" 
Philippians1:2 Amenuveve kple ŋutifafa, si tso Mawu, mía Fofo, kple Aƒetɔ Yesu Kristo gbɔ la, woana mi!" 
Philippians1:3 Meda akpe na Mawunye le nye ŋkuɖoɖo, siwo katã meɖoa mia dzi la me —" 
Philippians1:4 ɖaasi le nye kukuɖeɖe, siwo katã meɖena le mi katã mia ta la me, eye metso dzidzo ɖea kuku —" 
Philippians1:5 le miaƒe hadede, si le nyanyuie la me tso ŋkeke gbãtɔ dzi vaseɖe fifi la ŋuti," 
Philippians1:6 esia ke ŋuti meɖoa ŋu ɖo bena, amesi dze do nyui wɔwɔ gɔme le mia me la, eya ke awu enu vaseɖe Yesu Kristo ƒe ŋkeke la dzi," 
Philippians1:7 abe alesi wòdzo nam bena, masusu esia le mi katã mia ŋuti ene; elabena miele nye dzi me le nye kɔsɔkɔsɔwo kple nyanyuie la taʋiʋli kpakple kakaɖedzi la me; elabena mi katã míenye nye hagomekpɔlawo le amenuveve la me." 
Philippians1:8 Elabena Mawue nye nye ɖaseɖila, alesi mi katã miele dzroyem vevie le Yesu Kristo ƒe dɔmetɔtrɔ la me." 
Philippians1:9 Eye esia ŋuti medoa gbe ɖa ɖo, bena miaƒe lɔlɔ̃ la nana agbɔ sɔm ɖe dzi wu le sidzedze kple dzimenusese katã me," 
Philippians1:10 bena miate ŋu ade vovo nyui kple vɔ̃ dome, ne mianye ame dzadzɛwo kple nuɖiaɖia manɔŋuitɔwo ɖe Kristo ƒe ŋkeke la ŋu," 
Philippians1:11 bene dzɔdzɔenyenye ƒe ku, si wotsena to Yesu Kristo dzi la, nayɔ mi fũ hena Mawu ƒe ŋutikɔkɔe kple kafukafu." 
Philippians1:12 Ke mele didim bena, mianyae, nɔviwo, bena nusiwo va dzo ɖe dzinye la, tra zu nyanyuie la ƒe dziyiyi nyui la boŋ," 
Philippians1:13 ale bena nye bablawo dze ƒã le Kristo me ɖe asrafomɔ̃ blibo la katã me kple ame mamleawo katã gbɔ," 
Philippians1:14 eye nɔviwo dome ame geɖeawo ɖo ŋu ɖe nye bablawo ŋu le Aƒetɔ la me, eye wowɔa kalẽ geɖe wu tsã le mawunyagbɔgblɔ me mavɔ̃mavɔ̃e." 
Philippians1:15 Hafi amea ɖewo ɖea gbe ƒã Kristo le ŋuʋaʋã kple dzrewɔwɔ ŋuti; ke amea ɖewo hã ɖea gbe ƒãe le tameɖoɖo nyui ŋuti: 
Philippians1:16 Amesiawo gblɔnɛ tso lɔlɔ̃ me; elabena wonyae be, nyanyuie la taʋiʋli ŋuti mele afisia ɖo." 
Philippians1:17 Ame kemeawo gblɔa Kristo fiana tso dzrewɔwɔ me, menye tso dzadzɛnyenye me o; elabena wosusuna be, yewoatsɔ xaxa akpe ɖe nye bablawo ŋuti." 
Philippians1:18 Ekema nukae ma? Ne wowɔe le mo sia mɔ dzi, eɖanye le alakpa alo nyateƒe me o, nenye Kristo koe wogblɔna fiana la, dzi le dzɔyem le esia ŋuti. Ẽ, dzi agadzɔm hã;" 
Philippians1:19 elabena menyae bena, esia atrɔ zu agbexɔxɔ nam to miaƒe kukuɖeɖe kple Yesu Kristo ƒe Gbɔgbɔ la ƒe kpekpeɖeŋu me," 
Philippians1:20 le nye lala vevie kple mɔkpɔkpɔ la nu be, ŋu nagakpem le naneke me o, hafi boŋ metsɔa dzideƒo blibo la katã bena, alesi wònɔna ɖaa la, nenema ke wòano fifia hã, be woawɔ Kristo gã ɖe nye ŋutilã ŋuti, eɖanye agbe me alo ku me o." 
Philippians1:21 Elabena nye la Kristo enye agbe nam, eye ku enye viɖe nam." 
Philippians1:22 Ke ne nye agbenɔnɔ le ŋutilã me na nye dɔwɔwɔ tsea ku la, nyemenya nusi matia le eme o." 
Philippians1:23 Elabena mexaxa ɖe nusiawo kpakple eve dome: Ele dzroyem be, madzo ayi aɖana Kristo gbɔ, elabena esia nyo wu sã;" 
Philippians1:24 gake la anyinɔnɔ le ŋutilã me la ele vevie wu le mia ta. 
Philippians1:25 Eye esia ke ŋuti meɖoa ŋu ɖo, eye menyae bena, manɔ anyi, eye mía kpli mi katã míanɔ anyi hena miaƒe xɔse ƒe ŋgɔgbedede nyui kple dzidzɔ," 
Philippians1:26 bena miaƒe adegbeƒoƒo la nasɔ gbɔ ɖe dzi le Kristo Yesu me le tanye to esia me, bena magava mia gbɔ." 
Philippians1:27 Ɖeko mizɔ, abe alesi wòdze na Kristo ƒe nyanyuie la ene, bena ne mava, eye makpɔ mi ɖa, alo ne nyemele mia gbɔ o, eye mase mia ŋkɔ la, bena miano tsitre le gbɔgbɔ ɖeka me, eye miatso luʋɔ ɖeka aʋli nyanyuie ƒe xɔse la ta hekpe ɖe mia nɔewo ŋuti;" 
Philippians1:28 eye migaɖi vo le naneke me le miaƒe adikãtɔwo ŋuti o, esi nye gbegblẽ ƒe dzesi na wo, ke miawo la agbexɔxɔ ƒe dzesi wònye na mi, eye esia tso Mawu gbɔ;" 
Philippians1:29 elabena eɖi na mi le Kristo ta bena, menye ɖe miexɔ Kristo dzi se ɖeɖeko o, ke boŋ miekpea fu le eta hã;" 
Philippians1:30 elabena ʋiʋli ma ke, si miekpɔ le ŋunye, eye azɔ miesenɛ le ŋutinye la, le miawo hã mia si." 
Philippians2:1 Azɔ la ne nuxɔxlɔ̃a ɖe li le Kristo me, ne lolo ƒe dziɖeƒonyaa ɖe li, ne gbɔgbɔ ƒe hadedea ɖe li, ne dɔmetɔtrɔa ɖe kple nublanuikpɔkpɔa ɖe li la," 
Philippians2:2 ekema miyɔ nye dzidzɔ la fũ, bene miaƒe tamesusu nana ɖeka, le esi lɔlɔ̃ ɖeka ma ke le mia si, eye mietsɔa gbɔgbɔ ɖeka susua nu ɖeka la ŋuti," 
Philippians2:3 migawɔ naneke le dzrewɔwɔ alo bubu dzodzro ta o, ke boŋ mia dome amesiame natso ɖokuibɔbɔ abu nɔvia gã wu ye ŋutɔ ɖokui;" 
Philippians2:4 amesiame nagakpɔ nusi nye ye ŋutɔ to dzi o, ke boŋ nekpɔ nusi nye ame bubu to la hã dzi!" 
Philippians2:5 Mina susu ma ke, si nɔ Kristo Yesu hã me la, nanɔ miawo hã mia me," 
Philippians2:6 amesi esi wònye Mawu ƒe nɔnɔmee wòna hã la, mebui nuhahae bena, eye kple Mawu so o," 
Philippians2:7 ke boŋ eɖi gbɔlo eɖokui, esime wòtsɔ dɔla ƒe nɔnɔme ɖo eɖokui dzi, hedzɔ ɖe amewo ƒe nɔnɔme, eye wokpɔ nuwɔna le eŋuti abe ame to ene." 
Philippians2:8 Ebɔbɔ eɖokui ɖe anyi, eye wòɖo to yiɖase ku me, yiɖase atitsoga ŋuti ku la me ke." 
Philippians2:9 Esia ke ŋuti hã Mawu do eyama ɖe dzi kakaka, eye wòtsɔ ŋkɔ, si ƒo ŋkɔ sia ŋkɔ ta la kee," 
Philippians2:10 bene amesiwo le dziƒo kple amesiwo le anyigba dzi kple amesiwo le anyigba te la, katã nadze klo le Yesu ƒe ŋkɔ la me," 
Philippians2:11 eye aɖe sia aɖe naʋu me bena, Yesu Kristo enye Aƒetɔ la hena Mawu Fofoa ƒe kafukafu." 
Philippians2:12 Eyaŋuti, nye lɔlɔ̃tɔwo, abe alesi mieɖoa to ɖaasi ene la, mitsɔ vɔvɔ̃ kple dzodzo nyanyanya wo mia ŋutɔwo miaƒe xɔxɔdɔ la; menye abe esime menɔ mia gbɔ ene la ɖeɖeko o, ke boŋ azɔ, esi nyemele mia gbɔ o la, miwɔe geɖe wu!" 
Philippians2:13 Elabena Mawu enye amesi wɔa didi kple nuwɔwɔ siaa le mia me le eƒe ŋudzedze la ŋuti. 
Philippians2:14 Miwo nuwo katã liʋiliʋilili kple ɖikeke manɔmee," 
Philippians2:15 bena miazu mokaka manɔŋutɔwo kple ame dzadzɛwo, mawuvi, siwo nye ame maɖifɔwo le dzidzime gɔglɔ̃ totro kpaɖikpaɖi titina, amesiwo dome mieklẽna le abe akaɖiwo ene le xexeame," 
Philippians2:16 esi me mieléa agbenya la ɖe asi le hena nye adegbeƒoƒo le Kristo ƒe ŋkeke la dzi, bena nyemeƒu du dzodzro, eye nyemedze agbagba dzodzro hã o." 
Philippians2:17 Ke ne wotsɔm mè le miaƒe xɔse ƒe vɔsasa kple subɔsubɔdɔ ta hã la, dzi le dzɔyem, eye mía kpli mi katã míele dzidzo kpɔm." 
Philippians2:18 Ke nenema ke miawo hã dzi nedzɔ mi, eye mikpɔ dzidzo kpakplim!" 
Philippians2:19 Ke mele mɔ kpam le Aƒetɔ Yesu me bena, madɔ Timoteo aɖo ɖe mia gbɔ kpuie, bena ne menya miaƒe anyinɔnɔme la, nye hã nye dzi nadze eme." 
Philippians2:20 Elabena amea ɖeke mele asinye, si ƒe tamesusu sɔ kple etɔ, amesi alé be na mi le nyateƒe me la o;" 
Philippians2:21 elabena wo kalẽ la woa ŋutɔwo tɔ dim wole, eye menye nusi nye Yesu Kristo tɔ o." 
Philippians2:22 Ke mienya eƒe kelili bena, abe vi kple tɔ ene la, nenema wòsubɔ kplim le nyanyuie la me." 
Philippians2:23 Azɔ la mele mɔ kpɔm bena, madɔ eya ke aɖo ɖa enumake, esi manya alesi nye nya la lanɔ;" 
Philippians2:24 ke meɖo dzi ɖe Aƒetɔ la ŋu bena, nye ŋutɔ hã mava kpuie." 
Philippians2:25 Gake la mebu bena, ele vevie be, madɔ nɔvinye Epafrodito, si nye hanyedɔwɔla kple hanyeʋawɔla kple miaƒe apostolo kpakple nye nuhiahiã ƒe dɔla la, aɖo ɖe mi;" 
Philippians2:26 elabena edzroe vevie be, yeakpɔ mi katã, eye wòxa nu ŋutɔ bena, miese eŋkɔ be, dɔ dze edzi." 
Philippians2:27 Eye elé dɔ vavã de kuku ge kloe; gake la Mawu kpɔ nublanui nɛ, ke menye na eya ŋutɔ ɖeɖekoe o, hafi na nye hã, bene nyemagakpɔ nuxaxa ɖe nuxaxa dzi o." 
Philippians2:28 Eyaŋuti meɖoe ɖa kaba wu bena, ne miegakpɔe la, míakpɔ dzidzɔ, eye nye hã nye nuxaxa dzi nagaka aɖe." 
Philippians2:29 Eyaŋuti la mixɔe le Aƒetɔ la me kple dzidzɔ katã, eye mibu amesiawo tɔgbe." 
Philippians2:30 Elabena Kristo ƒe dɔwɔwɔ ŋuti wòde kuku ge ɖo kloe, eye wòtsɔ eƒe agbe ke, bene wòawɔ subɔsubɔdɔ, si susɔ ɖe mia ŋu la, nam ɖe mia teƒe." 
Philippians3:1 Mlɔeba la, nɔvinyewo, dzi nadzɔ mi le Aƒetɔ la me! Nye la metim bena, maŋlɔ nu mawo ke aɖo ɖe mi o; ke miawo la ena kakaɖedzi mi." 
Philippians3:2 Mikpɔ nyuie le avũawo ŋuti, mikpɔ nyuie le dɔwɔla vɔ̃wo ŋuti, mikpɔ nyuie le aʋatsotso vlo ŋuti!" 
Philippians3:3 Elabena mi amesiwo subɔa Mawu le gbɔgbɔ me la, miawoe nye aʋatsotso vavãtɔ la, eye míeƒoa adegbe le Kristo Yesu me, eye míeɖoa dzi ɖe ŋutilã ŋuti o." 
Philippians3:4 Wònye nye la ŋuɖoɖo ɖe ŋutilã ŋu gɔ̃ hã anɔ asinye hafi, ne ame bubua ɖe bu bena, yeate ŋu aɖo dzi ɖe ŋutilã ŋuti la, nye la mewui;" 
Philippians3:5 Ŋkeke enviagbe wotso aʋa nam, metso Israel dukɔ la me, tso Benyamin ƒe to la me, Hebritɔ tso Hebritɔwo me; le sea nu la farisitɔ menye;" 
Philippians3:6 le ŋuʋaʋã nu la hame yometila menye; le dzɔdzɔenyenye, si le sea me nu la mokaka manɔŋutɔ menye." 
Philippians3:7 Gake nusiwo nye viɖe nam la, nu mawo ke mebu nu bubu le Kristo ŋuti." 
Philippians3:8 Ẽ, fifi gɔ̃ mebu wo katã nu bubu le Kristo Yesu, nye Aƒetɔ nyanya, si ƒo wo katã ta la ŋuti, amesi ta meɖe asi le nusiawo katã ŋuti ɖo, eye mebu wo aɖukpo dzi nuwoe, bena nye asi nasu Kristo dzi," 
Philippians3:9 eye woakpɔm le eyama me, bena nye ŋutɔ nye dzɔdzɔenyenye, si tso sea me la, naganɔ asinye o, ke boŋ esi to Kristo dzixɔse me, dzɔdzɔenyenye, si tso Mawu gbɔ le dzixɔse ta la nana asinye," 
Philippians3:10 bene madze si eyama kple eƒe tsitretsitsi ƒe ŋusẽ kple eƒe fukpekpewo ƒe hadede, eye masɔ kplii le eƒe ku me," 
Philippians3:11 negbe godo la made ame kukuwo ƒe tsitretsitsi la gbɔ. 
Philippians3:12 Menye ɖe nye asi su edzi xoxo, alo mezu blibo xoxo o; ke eyome tim mele, bena negbe ɖeko nye asi lasu nusi ke ŋuti Kristo hã ƒe asi su dzinye ɖo la dzi." 
Philippians3:13 Nɔvinyewo, nye ŋuta nyemebu ɖokuinye bena, nye asi su edzi haɖe o." 
Philippians3:14 Ke nu ɖeka ko menya: Nusiwo le megbenye la, meŋlɔ wo be, hafi nusiwo le ŋgɔnye la, nyãm mele, mele dzesiɖoƒe yome tim yiɖase Mawu ƒe ameyɔyɔ le dziƒo ƒe dziɖuɖufetu la dzi le Kristo Yesu me." 
Philippians3:15 Eyaŋuti ame alesi nu le blibo le mía dome la, minɛ míasusu esia ke, eye ne miesusua nu bubu le nane me la, Mawu aɖe esia ke hã afia mi." 
Philippians3:16 Gake nusi dzi miesu xoxo la, minɛ míazɔ ɖe mo ma ke nu, eye míaƒe tamesusu nana ɖeka." 
Philippians3:17 Mizu hanyesrɔ̃lawo, nɔviwo, eye milé ŋku ɖe amesiwo zɔna nenema ke la ŋuti, abe alesi míenye kpɔɖeŋu na mi ene:" 
Philippians3:18 Elabena ame geɖewo zɔna, amesiwo ŋutinya megblɔ na mi enuenu; gake azɔ la metsɔ avifafa le egblɔm bena, Kristo ƒe atitsoga ƒe futɔwo wonye." 
Philippians3:19 Amesiwo ƒe nuwuwu enye gbegblẽ, amesiwo ƒe ƒodo nye mawu na wo, eye woƒe kafukafu le woƒe ŋukpenanuwo me, amesiwo susua anyigbadzinuwo ŋuti ɖeɖeko." 
Philippians3:20 Ke miaƒe dumetɔnyenye le dziƒo, afisi hã miele xɔla, si nye Aƒetɔ Yesu Kristo la, lalam tso," 
Philippians3:21 amesi aɖuɖɔ miaƒe bɔbɔɖeanyiŋutilã ƒe nɔnɔme, bene wòaɖi eƒe ŋutikɔkɔeŋutilã le eƒe ŋusesẽ, si ta wòlea ŋu tsɔa nuwo katã dea eɖokui te la nu." 
Philippians4:1 Eyata, nɔvinye lɔlɔ̃tɔ, siwo le dzroyem, nye dzidzɔ kple nye fiakuku la, minɔ tsitre sesĩe nenema le Aƒetɔ la me, nye lɔlɔ̃viwo!" 
Philippians4:2 Mele nu xlɔ̃m Ewodia, eye mele nu xlɔ̃m Sintixe, bena woƒe tamesusu nanɔ ɖeka le Aƒetɔ la me." 
Philippians4:3 Ẽ, mele kuku dem na wò hã, hanyedɔwɔla vevi, bena naxɔ na nyɔnu siawo; elabena wodze agbagba le nyanyuie la la hekpe ɖe mía kple Klemens kpakple hanyedɔwɔla susɔeawo, amesiwo, ŋkɔwo woŋlɔ ɖe agbegbalẽa me la ŋuti." 
Philippians4:4 Dzi nadzɔ mi le Aƒetɔ la me ɖaasi; megale egblɔm bena: Dzi nadzɔ mi! 
Philippians4:5 Amewo katã nanya miaƒe tufafa! Aƒetɔ la gogo. 
Philippians4:6 Migatsi dzimaɖi le naneke ŋuti o, ke boŋ le nusianu me la mitsɔ gbedodoɖa kple kukuɖeɖe na Mawu nanya miaƒe dzimedidiwo, eye mitsɔ akpedada kpe ɖe eŋuti." 
Philippians4:7 Eye Mawu ƒe ŋutifafa, si ƒo gɔmesesewo katã ta la, adzɔ miaƒe dziwo kple miaƒe tamesusuwo ŋu adzra wo ɖo le Kristo Yesu me." 
Philippians4:8 Mlɔeba la, nɔviwo, nusiwo nye nyateƒe, nusiwo dzea bubu, nusiwo le dzɔdzɔe, nusiwo le dzadzɛ, nusiwo dze na lɔlɔ̃, nusiwo dze na gbɔgblɔ, ne nudzeamewɔwɔa ɖe li, eye ne kafukafua ɖe li la, misusu nusiawo ŋuti!" 
Philippians4:9 Nusiwo hã miesrɔ̃, eye miexɔ, eye miese, eye miekpɔ le gbɔnye la, nusiawo ke miwɔ, eye ŋutifafa Mawu la anɔ anyi kpli mi." 
Philippians4:10 Ke mekpɔ dzidzɔ geɖe le Aƒetɔ la me bena, azɔ la miagakpɔ ŋusẽ yeye hesusu nusi nyo nam, nusi ŋuti miesusu hã, ke ɣeyiɣi la sesẽ na mi." 
Philippians4:11 Menye ɖe megblɔ esia le hiahiã ŋuti o; elabena nye la mesrɔ̃e bena, anyinɔnɔ, si ke me mele la, nadze ŋunye." 
Philippians4:12 Menya alesi mabɔbɔ ɖokuinye de anyi, eye meganya alesi makpɔ nu geɖe hã; le nusianu kple nuwo katã me la nasrɔ̃ nu ɣaɣla sia bena, maɖi ƒo, eye dɔ nawum hã, makpɔ nu geɖe, eye hiã natum hã." 
Philippians4:13 Metea ŋu wɔa nuwo katã le Kristo, amesi doa ŋusẽm la me." 
Philippians4:14 Gake la miewɔe nyuie be, miexɔ nam le nye xaxa me." 
Philippians4:15 Ke, mi Filipitɔwo hã, mienyae bena, le nyanyuie la ƒe gɔmedzedzea me, esi medzo le Makedonia la, hamea ɖeke mekpe de ŋunye le nunana kple nuxɔxɔ ƒe akɔnta gome o, negbe miawo ɖeɖekoe," 
Philippians4:16 eye esime menɔ Tesalonika gɔ̃ hã la, miedo nusi wo hiãm la ɖem zi ɖeka kple zi eve." 
Philippians4:17 Menye be, mele nane dim o, ke boŋ mele didim bena, kutsetse nasɔ gbɔ ɖe edzi na miaƒe akɔnta." 
Philippians4:18 Ke nuwo katã le asinye, eye megba go; elabena esi mexɔ miawo tso mia gbɔ to Epafrodito si me, nusiwo nye ʋeʋẽ lilili kple vɔsasa nyui, si dze Mawu ŋu la, meyɔ fũ." 
Philippians4:19 Ke nye Mawu la ana miaƒe hiahiã katã nazu nukpɔkpɔ taŋtaŋ le eƒe kesinɔ la nu le ŋutikɔkɔe me le Kristo Yesu me. 
Philippians4:20 Ke Mawu, mia Fofo la tɔ nanye kafukafu tso mavɔ me yi ɖe mavɔ me! Amen." 
Philippians4:21 Miɖuɖɔ ame kɔkɔewo katã nam ƒã le Kristo Yesu me! Nɔvi, siwo le gbɔnye la, ɖuɖɔ mi ƒã." 
Philippians4:22 Ame kɔkɔewo katã ɖuɖɔ mi ƒã, vevietɔ amesiwo tso kaisaro ƒe me la." 
Philippians4:23 Mía Aƒetɔ Yesu Kristo ƒe amenuveve nanɔ anyi kpli mi! Amen. 
Colossians1:1 Paulo, Yesu Kristo ƒe apostolo to Mawu ƒe lɔlɔ̃nu me, kple nɔvi Timoteo la" 
Colossians1:2 woŋlɔ ɖo ɖe ame kɔkɔe, siwo le Kolose kple nɔvi, siwo nye xɔsetɔwo le Kristo me la: Amenuveve kple ŋutifafa, si tso Mawu, mía Fofo, kple Aƒetɔ Yesu Kristo gbã la, woana mi!" 
Colossians1:3 Míeɖa akpe na Mawu, si nye mía Aƒetɔ Yesu Kristo Fofo la, ɖaasi le míaƒe gbedodoɖa ɖe mia ta la me," 
Colossians1:4 esime miese miaƒe Kristo Yesu dzixɔse kple lɔlɔ̃, si mietso lɔ̃ ame kɔkɔewo katã la," 
Colossians1:5 le mɔkpɔkpɔ, si wodzra ɖo na mi le dziƒowo me, si miese tsã le nyanyuie ƒe nyateƒenya la me la ŋuti," 
Colossians1:6 esi va mia gbɔ, abe alesi wòle xexe blibo la katã hã me ene, eye wòtsea ku, eye wotsina, abe alesi wòle le miawo hã mia dome tso ŋkeke ma, si dzi miese, eye miedze si Mawu ƒe amenuveve le nyateƒe me la ene," 
Colossians1:7 abe alesi miesrɔ̃e hã le Epafra, mia hadɔwɔla lɔlɔ̃tɔ, si nye Kristo ƒe subɔla nyateƒetɔ na mi la gbɔ ene;" 
Colossians1:8 amesia ke gblɔ miaƒe lɔlɔ̃ le gbɔgbɔ me la fia mí. 
Colossians1:9 Eyata míawo hã, tso ŋkeke, si dzi míesee la, míedzudzɔ gbedodoɖa kple kukuɖeɖe ɖe mia ta o, bene eƒe lɔlɔ̃nu ƒe sidzedze nayɔ mi fũ le gbɔgbɔ ƒe nunya kple gɔmesese katã me," 
Colossians1:10 bene miazu alesi dze Aƒetɔ la hena eƒe ŋudzedze katã, miatse ku le dɔ nyui sia do nyui wɔwɔ me," 
Colossians1:11 eye miatsi le sidzedze Mawu me, eye wòado ŋusẽ mi kple ŋusẽ katã lé eƒe ŋutikɔkɔe ƒe ŋutete la nu hena dzidodo kple dzigbɔgbɔ blewu katã;" 
Colossians1:12 eye mitsɔ dzidzɔ da akpe na Fofo, si na miedze ame kɔkɔewo ƒe domenyinyi ƒe gomekpɔkpɔ le kekeli la me," 
Colossians1:13 amesi ɖe mí tso viviti ƒe ŋusẽ la me, eye wòtsɔ mí ɖo eƒe lɔlɔ̃vi ƒe fiaduƒe la me," 
Colossians1:14 amesi me míekpɔ fexexeɖeta, si nye nuvɔ̃keke la le," 
Colossians1:15 amesi nye Mawu makpɔmakpɔ ƒe nɔnɔme kple nuwɔwɔwo katã ƒe ŋgɔgbevi la. 
Colossians1:16 Elabena wowɔ nuwo katã le eya ke me, nusiwo le dziƒowo kple nusiwo le anyigba dzi; nusiwo wokpɔna kple nusiwo womekpɔna o; eɖanye fiazikpuiwo o; alo aƒetɔnyenyewo o; eɖanye dziɖulanyenyewo o alo ŋusẽwo o: Wowɔ nuwo katã to eyama me, eye wowɔ wo hena eyama," 
Colossians1:17 eye eyama tre dzɔdzɔ na nuwo katã, eye nuwo katã nɔa anyi le eyama me," 
Colossians1:18 eye eyamae nye ŋutilã, si nye hame la ƒe ta, amesi nye gɔmedzedze kple ŋgɔgbevi tso ame kukuwo dome, bene wòanye gbãtɔ na nuwo katã;" 
Colossians1:19 elabena edze Mawu ŋu bena, agbɔsɔsɔ blibo la katã nanɔ eyama me," 
Colossians1:20 eye wòto eyama dzi lé avu le nuwo katã kple eɖokui dome, esi wòto eƒe atitsoga ƒe ʋu la me wɔ ŋutifafa kple nusiwo le anyigba dzi kpakple nusiwo le dziƒowo la, to eyama dzi." 
Colossians1:21 Eye mi amesiwo nye ame tutɔwo kple ketɔwo le miaƒe tamesusu me le dɔwɔwɔ vɔ̃wo me tsã la; 
Colossians1:22 ke azɔ la elé avu le mia kplii dome le eƒe anyigba dzi ŋutilã la me to ku me, bene woatsɔ mi aɖo kɔkɔetɔwo kple mokaka manɔŋutɔwo kpakple fɔmabumabutɔwo le eƒe ŋku me," 
Colossians1:23 nenye bena, mienɔ xɔse me, abe amesiwo gɔme wodo anyi, eye wole tsitre sesĩe ene, eye miagana woate mi ɖa tso nyanyuie ƒe mɔkpɔkpɔ, si miese, si woɖe gbe ƒã na nuwɔwɔwo katã le dziƒo te, esi ƒe subɔla nye Paulo mezu la me o." 
Colossians1:24 Azɔ la mekpɔa dzidzɔ le fu, siwo mekpena le mia ta la me, eye mewua nusiwo susɔ le Kristo ƒe fukpekpewo me la nu le nye ŋutilã me, le eƒe ŋutilã, si enye hame la ta," 
Colossians1:25 esi ƒe subɔla mezu le Mawu ƒe xɔnuvinyenye, si wonam le mia ta la nu, bena mawu mawunya ƒe do la nu:" 
Colossians1:26 Nya ɣaɣla, si woɣla ɖi tso ŋɔli mavɔwo kple dzidzimewo me ke; ke azɔ la eɖee fia eƒe ame kɔkɔewo," 
Colossians1:27 amesiwo Mawu ɖi be, yeana woanya nusi nye nya ɣaɣla sia ƒe ŋutikɔkɔe ƒe kesinɔnyenye le trɔ̃subɔlawo dome, si nye Kristo le mia me, amesi nye ŋutikɔkɔe ƒe mɔkpɔkpɔ," 
Colossians1:28 amesi míawo míele gbe ƒã ɖem hele nu xlɔ̃m amesiame, eye míele nu fiam amesiame le nunya sia nunya me, bene miaɖo amesiame anyi blibo le Kristo me:" 
Colossians1:29 nusi ta hã medzea agbagba ɖo, eye metsina le eƒe ŋusesẽ, si sẽa ŋu ŋusẽtɔe le menye la nu." 
Colossians2:1 Elabena mele didim be, mianya alesi meʋlina ŋutɔ le mia kple amesiwo le Laodikea kpakple ame alesi nu mekpɔ ŋkunye me le ŋutilã me o la ta," 
Colossians2:2 bene woafa akɔ na woƒe dziwo, eye woabia wo ɖeka le lɔlɔ̃ me hena gɔmesese ƒe kakaɖedzi blibo ƒe kesinɔnyenye katã, bena woadze si Mawu, Fofo, kple Kristo ƒe nya ɣaɣla la," 
Colossians2:3 amesi me woɣla nunya kple sidzedze ƒe kesinɔnuwo katã ɖo. 
Colossians2:4 Ke esia gblɔm mele bena, amea ɖeke nagable mi kple nyaƒoƒoɖeamenu o." 
Colossians2:5 Elabena ne nyemele mia gbɔ ɖe ŋutilã me o hã la, mele mia gbɔ le gbɔgbɔ me, eye dzi le dzoyem, esi mekpea miaƒe ɖoɖo kple miaƒe Kristo dzixɔse ƒe kelili." 
Colossians2:6 Azɔ abe alesi míexɔ Kristo Yesu, Aƒetɔ la, nenema ke mizɔ le eyama me," 
Colossians2:7 eye mianye amesiwo do ke, eye wotu wo ɖe eyama me, eye woli ke wo ɖe xɔse me, abe alesi wofia mi ene, eye miagba go le akpedada me." 
Colossians2:8 Mikpɔ nyuie, bena amea ɖeke nagakplɔ mi ayi aboyo to xexemenunya kple beble dzodzro me o, le amewo ƒe nuɖoanyi kple xexeme ƒe gɔmedzenuwo la nu, eye menye le Kristo nu o." 
Colossians2:9 Elabena Mawu ƒe agbɔsɔsɔme blibo la katã nɔ eyama me le ŋutilã ƒe nɔnɔme," 
Colossians2:10 eye woyɔ mi taŋ le eyama, si nye ta na dziɖulanyenye kple ŋusẽwo katã la me," 
Colossians2:11 amesi me wotso aʋa na mi le hã kple aʋatsotso, si menye asi wotsɔ tsoe o, to ŋutilã ƒe ame blibo la ƒe ɖeɖeɖa me le Kristo ƒe aʋatsotso me," 
Colossians2:12 eye woɖi mi kpakplii le mawutsidedetaname me, amesi me wofɔ mi ɖe tsitre hã le to Mawu, si fɔe ɖe tsitre tso ame kukuwo dome la ƒe ŋusẽdɔwɔwɔ dzixɔse la me." 
Colossians2:13 Eye mi, amesiwo nye ame kukuwo le dzidadawo kple miaƒe ŋutilã ƒe aʋamatsomatso me la, egbɔ agbe mi kpakplii hã, esi wotsɔ dzidadawo katã ke mi," 
Colossians2:14 esi wòtutu ŋɔŋlɔ, si wotsɔ asi ŋlɔe ɖe mía ŋuti le sededewo me, si tsi tre ɖe mía ŋuti la, eye woɖee ɖa le mía kple Mawu dome, esime woklãe ɖe atitsoga ŋuti la," 
Colossians2:15 eye wòɖe dziɖulanyenye kple ŋusẽwo ɖi, eye wòdo ŋukpe wo le gaglãgbe, eye wòkpɔ dziɖuɖudzidzɔ ɖe wo dzi to me." 
Colossians2:16 Eyata migana amea ɖeke nadrɔ̃ ʋɔnu mi le nuɖuɖu alo nunono ŋuti alo le ŋkekenyuie alo ɣletidzedzi alo Sabat la gome o. 
Colossians2:17 Esiawo nye nusiwo gbɔna la ƒe vɔvɔli; ke nu la ŋutɔ le Kristo me va. 
Colossians2:18 Migana amea ɖeke nate dziɖuɖufetu la mi o, alesi wole didim le ɖokuibɔbɔɖeanyi kple mawudɔlawo ƒe subɔsubɔ me, eye wòge ɖe nusiwo mekpɔ kpɔ o la me, eye eƒe ŋutilãtamesusu ɖoe ɖe dzi glodzoo dzodzro," 
Colossians2:19 eye melé ɖe ta ŋuti o, amesi gbɔ ŋutilã blibo la katã kpɔa kpekpeɖeŋuti tsonɛ, eye wobiae ɖeka to ƒunuɖeƒeewo kple kawo me, eye wotsina le tsitsi, si tsoa Mawu gbɔ la nu." 
Colossians2:20 Ne mia kple Kristo mieku na xexe sia me ƒe gɔmedzenuwo la, ekema nukaŋuti miena wogale se dem na mi abe ɖe miegale agbe le xexeame ene bena:" 
Colossians2:21 „Megalée ɖe asi o! Megaɖɔe kpɔ o! Megaka asi eŋu o! 
Colossians2:22 nusiwo katã le gbegblẽ ge to wo ŋutidɔwɔwɔ me le amewo ƒe sededewo kple nufiafiawo nu la mahã? 
Colossians2:23 Nusiawo tɔgbe xɔ nunya ƒe ŋkɔ le subɔsubɔ, si woa ŋutɔwo tia kple ɖokuibɔbɔɖeanyi kpakple ŋutilã ƒe fuwɔwɔ mè; menye le bubunua ɖeke me o, ke boŋ hena ŋutilã ƒe ƒoɖiɖi." 
Colossians3:1 Azɔ ne wofɔ mia kple Kristo ɖe tsitre la, ekema midi nusiwo le dziƒo, afisi Kristo bɔbɔ nɔ anyi ɖo le Mawu ƒe nuɖusi me." 
Colossians3:2 Mitsɔ miaƒe tamesusuwo ɖo dziƒonuwo ŋu, menye anyigbadzinuwo ŋu o." 
Colossians3:3 Elabena mieku, eye wotsɔ miaƒe agbe kple Kristo ɣla ɖe Mawu me." 
Colossians3:4 Ne Kristo, si nye miaƒe agbe la, ado la, ekema miawo hã miado kpakplii le ŋutikɔkɔe me." 
Colossians3:5 Eyata miwu mia ŋutinu, siwo le anyigba dzi; ahasiwɔwɔ, makɔmakɔnyenye, fiẽŋufiẽŋui, nudzodzro vɔ̃ kple ŋukeklẽ, si nye trɔ̃subɔsubɔ;" 
Colossians3:6 nusiwo ta Mawu ƒe dziku va vi sẽtowo dzi ɖo," 
Colossians3:7 nusiwo me miawo hã miezɔ le tsã, esime mienɔ agbe le nusiawo me." 
Colossians3:8 Ke azɔ miawo hã miɖe nusiawo katã, siwo nye: Dziku, dɔmedzoe, nu tovo wɔwɔ, busunyagbɔgblɔ, ŋukpenanyawo la ɖa tso miaƒe nu me;" 
Colossians3:9 migaka aʋatso na mia nɔewo o; elabena mieɖe ame xoxoa kple eƒe nuwɔnawo ɖa," 
Colossians3:10 eye mido ame yeye, si wowɔ yeye hena sidzedze le amesi wɔe la ƒe nɔnɔme nu," 
Colossians3:11 afisi Helatɔ kple Yudatɔ, aʋatsotso kple aʋamatsomatso, gbegãdzitɔwo kple Skitetɔ, kluvi kple ablɔɖevia ɖeke megali o, ke Kristo enye wo katã, eye wòle wo katã me." 
Colossians3:12 Eyata esi míenye Mawu ƒe ame tiatiawo kple ame kɔkɔewo kpakple lɔlɔ̃viwo ŋuti la, mido dɔmetɔtrɔ kple nublanuikpɔkpɔ, dɔmekɔkɔ, ɖokuibɔbɔɖeanyi, dɔmefafa, dzigbɔgbɔ blewu," 
Colossians3:13 eye mihe adodo kple mia nɔewo, eye mitsɔ ke mia nɔewo, ne nyaa ɖe le amea ɖe si ɖe amea ɖe ŋuti la, alesi Kristo hã tsɔ ke mii la, miawo hã miwɔ nenema ke!" 
Colossians3:14 Ke hekpe ɖe nusiawo katã ŋuti la mido lɔlɔ̃, si nye blibonyenye la ƒe nublanu." 
Colossians3:15 Eye Kristo ƒe ŋutifafa naɖu dzi le miaƒe dziwo me, nusi ŋuti woyɔ mi vɛ hã le ŋutilã ɖeka me, eye mizu ame ɖakpewo!" 
Colossians3:16 Mina Kristo ƒe nya la nanɔ mia me geɖe fũ, eye mitsɔ nunya sia nunya fia nu mia nɔewo, eye mixlɔ̃ nu mia nɔewo kple Psalmowo kple kafukafuhawo kpakple gbɔgbɔ me hawo, eye midzi ha le amenuveve me na Mawu le miaƒe dziwo me." 
Colossians3:17 Eye nusianu, si miewɔna le nuƒoƒo alo dɔwɔwɔ me la, miwɔ ye katã le Kristo Yesu ƒe ŋkɔa dzi, eye mida akpe na Mawu Fofo la le eyama me." 
Colossians3:18 Mi nyɔnuwo la, mibɔbɔ mia ɖokui na mia srɔ̃wo, abe alesi wòdze le Aƒetɔ la me ene." 
Colossians3:19 Mi ŋutsuwo la, milɔ̃ mia srɔ̃wo, eye migawɔ dɔmevevi le wo ŋu o." 
Colossians3:20 Mi ɖeviwo la, miɖo to mia dzilawo le nusianu me; elabena esia dze Aƒetɔ la ŋu nyuie." 
Colossians3:21 Mi fofowo la, migado dziku na mia wo, bene dzika nagatso wo ƒo o." 
Colossians3:22 Mi dɔlawo la, miɖo to miaƒe aƒetɔwo le ŋutilã nu le nusianu me; menye le ame ŋku me nuwɔwɔ me, abe alesi wòdzea amewo ŋu la ene o, ke boŋ le dzimekɔkɔ me le Aƒetɔ la vɔvɔ̃ me;" 
Colossians3:23 eye nusianu, si ke miewɔna la, mi wɔe tso dzi me, abe Aƒetɔ lae miewɔe na ene, eye menye na amewo o," 
Colossians3:24 esi mienya bena, miaxɔ domenyinyi ƒe teƒeɖoɖo tso Aƒetɔ gbɔ la. Miesubɔ Aƒetɔ Kristo!" 
Colossians3:25 Elabena amesi ke wɔa nu madzɔmadzɔ la, axɔ nu madzɔmadzɔ, si wòwɔ la ƒe fetu, eye ŋkumekpɔkpɔa ɖeke mele eme o." 
Colossians4:1 Mi aƒetɔwo la, miwɔ nusi dzɔ, eye wòsɔ la, na miaƒe dɔlawo, esi mienyae bena, Aƒetɔ li na miawo hã le dziƒo la ta." 
Colossians4:2 Minɔ gbedodoɖa dzi ɖaa, eye minɔ ŋudzɔ le eme kple akpedada," 
Colossians4:3 eye mido gbe ɖa ɖe miawo hã mía ta, bene Mawu naʋu nya la ƒe ʋɔtru na mí, ne míagblɔ Kristo ƒe nya ɣaɣla, si ŋuti woblam ɖo hã," 
Colossians4:4 bene maɖe esia ɖe go afia, abe alesi wòdzem be, maƒo nu la ene." 
Colossians4:5 Mizɔ le nunya me le amesiwo le egodo la ŋku me, eye miwo ɣeyiɣi la ŋuti dɔ blibo." 
Colossians4:6 Mina amenuveve kple dze nanɔ miaƒe nya me ɖaasi, bena mianya alesi wòdze be, miaɖo nya ŋuti na amesiame." 
Colossians4:7 Nusiwo katã va dzo ɖe dzinye la, Tixiko, nɔvi lɔlɔ̃tɔ kple subɔla nuteƒewɔla kpakple hadɔwɔla le Aƒetɔ me la, ana mianyae," 
Colossians4:8 amesi meda ɖo ɖe mia gbɔ le esia ta, bene mianya alesi míele, eye wòafa aka na miaƒe dziwo;" 
Colossians4:9 eye metso Onesimo, nɔvi nuteƒewɔla lɔlɔ̃tɔ, si tso mia dome la, hã kpe ɖe eŋuti; eye wòana mianya nusiwo katã le afisia." 
Colossians4:10 Aristarxo, hanyegatɔ, kple Marko, Barnaba srɔ̃nyi, si ŋuti miexɔ ɖu le la — ne eva mia gbɔ la, mixɔe —" 
Colossians4:10 Aristarxo, hanyegatɔ, kple Marko, Barnaba srɔ̃nyi, si ŋuti miexɔ ɖu le la — ne eva mia gbɔ la, mixɔe —"
