Colossians4:11 kple Yesu, si woyɔna be Yusto, amesiwo tso aʋatsotsoa me la, ɖuɖɔ mi ƒã; amesiawo ɖeɖekoe nye hanyedɔwɔlawo na Mawu ƒe fiaɖuƒe la, nenem me siawo zu akɔfafa nam." 
Colossians4:12 Epafra, amesi tso mia dome, si nye Kristo ƒe dɔla la, ɖuɖɔ mi ƒã; eyae nye amesi nɔa mia ta ʋlim le gbedodoɖa me ɖaasi, bene mianɔ tsitre abe amesiwo le blibo, eye wokpɔ kakaɖedzi blibo le Mawu ƒe lɔlɔ̃nu katã ŋuti ene." 
Colossians4:13 Elabena mele ɖase ɖim le eŋuti bena, ekpɔ agbagbadzedze geɖe le mia kple amesiwo le Laodikea kpakple amesiwo le Hierapoli la ta." 
Colossians4:14 Luka, atikewɔla lɔlɔ̃tɔ la, kple Dema woɖuɖɔ mi ƒã." 
Colossians4:15 Míeɖuɖɔ nɔvi, siwo le Laodikea la ƒã hekpe ɖe Nimfa kpakple hame, si le eƒe me la ŋu." 
Colossians4:16 Eye ne miexlẽ agbalẽ la vɔ la, miwɔe be, woaxlẽe le Laodikea hame hã, eye ne miawo hã miaxlẽ Laodikeatɔwo tɔ." 
Colossians4:17 Eye migblɔ na Arxipo bena: Kpɔ subɔsubɔdɔ, si su asiwò le Aƒetɔ me la dzi, be nawu enu!" 
Colossians4:18 Ɖuɖɔ, si nye Paulo metsɔ nye asi ŋlɔe la, enye si. Miɖo ŋu nye kɔsɔkɔsɔwo! Amenuveve nanɔ anyi kpli mi!" 
1Thessalonians1:1 Paulo kple Silvano kple Timoteo woŋlɔ ɖo ɖe Tesalonikatɔwo ƒe hame, si le Mawu, Fofo la, kple Aƒetɔ Yesu Kristo me: Amenuveve kple ŋutifafa, si tso! Mawu, mía Fofo kple Aƒetɔ Yesu Kristo gbɔ la, woana mi!" 
1Thessalonians1:2 Miedaa akpe na Mawu ɖaasi le mi katã mia ta, eye mieɖoa ŋku mia dzi le miaƒe gbedodoɖawo me," 
1Thessalonians1:3 eye ɖaa míeɖoa ŋku miaƒe xɔse ƒe dɔwɔwɔ kple lɔlɔ̃ ƒe agbagbadzedze kpakple mɔkpɔkpɔ na mía Aƒetɔ Yesu Kristo la ƒe dzidodo le Mawu, mía Fofo ƒe ŋku me la dzi." 
1Thessalonians1:4 Elabena, nɔvi, siwo Mawu lɔ̃na la, mienya miaƒe tiatia la;" 
1Thessalonians1:5 elabena míaƒe nyanyuie la meva mia gbɔ le nya me ɖeɖeko o, ke boŋ le ŋusẽ kple Gbɔgbɔ kɔkɔe kpakple kakaɖedzikpɔkpɔ geɖe me hã, abe alesi mienya amesi ƒomeviwo míenye le mia dome le mia ta la ene." 
1Thessalonians1:6 Eye miawo miezu míawo kple Aƒetɔ la srɔ̃lawo, esi miexɔ nya la le xaxa geɖe me kple Gbɔgbɔ kɔkɔe ƒe dzidzɔ," 
1Thessalonians1:7 ale bena mietrɔ zu kpɔɖeŋu na amesiwo katã xɔnɛ sena le Makedonia kple Axaya. 
1Thessalonians1:8 Elabena Aƒetɔ ƒe nya la ɖi hoo tso mia gbɔ, menye le Makedonia kple Axaya ɖeɖeko o, ke boŋ miaƒe Mawu dzixɔse la ɖo afisiafi, ale bena naneke gbɔgblɔ megahiã mí o;" 
1Thessalonians1:9 elabena woa ŋutɔwo gblɔa nya fiana le mía ŋuti, vava, si ƒomevi me mieva mia gbɔ le, kple alesi mietrɔ tso trɔ̃wo gbɔ va Mawu gbɔ, bena miasubɔ Mawu gbagbe vavãtɔ la," 
1Thessalonians1:10 eye míalala Via tso dziƒo, amesi wòfɔ ɖe tsitre tso ame kukuwo dome, Yesu, si ɖe mí tso dziku, si gbɔna la me." 
1Thessalonians2:1 Elabena, nɔviwo, mia ŋutɔwo mienyae bena, míaƒe mia gbɔ vava la menye dzodzro o," 
1Thessalonians2:2 ke boŋ wònye míekpe fu, eye wodo vlo mi le Filipi tsã hafi, abe alesi mienyae ene, gake míekpɔ dzideƒo le mía Mawu me hegblɔ eƒe nyanyuie la fia mi le ʋiʋli geɖe me." 
1Thessalonians2:3 Elabena míaƒe nuxɔxlɔ̃ metso beble alo makɔmakɔnyenye me o, eye mele alakpadada me o," 
1Thessalonians2:4 ke boŋ abe alesi Mawu kpo mí míedze bena, wòtso nyanyuie la de asi na mí ene la, nenema ke míegblɔnɛ; menye abe amesiwo dzea amewo ŋu ene o, ke boŋ abe amesiwo dzea Mawu, si dzroa míaƒe dziwo me kpɔna la ŋu ene." 
1Thessalonians2:5 Elabena womekpɔ mi ɣeaɖekeɣi míele numevivinyawo gblɔm, eye míele alakpa hã dam le ŋukeklẽ ta kpɔ o, abe alesi mienyae ene. Mawue nye ɖaseɖila!" 
1Thessalonians2:6 Eye miedi bubu tso amewo gbɔ hã o, eɖanye miawo alo ame bubuwo gbɔ o, wònye míate ŋu aɖo ame mía ɖokui abe Kristo ƒe apostolowo ene hafi," 
1Thessalonians2:7 ke miefa tu le mia dome, abe alesi vidada kpɔa ye ŋutɔ viawo dzii ene," 
1Thessalonians2:8 nenema ke esi mielɔ̃a nu le mia gbɔ o ŋuti la, edze mía ŋu nyuie bena, menye Mawu ƒe nyanyuie la ɖeɖeko míetsɔ na mi o, ke mía ŋutɔwo míaƒe agbe hãe boŋ; elabena mietrɔ zu míaƒe lɔlɔ̃tɔwo." 
1Thessalonians2:9 Elabena, nɔviwo, mieɖo ŋku míaƒe agbagbadzedze kple kutrikuku dzi: Zã kple keli miewɔ dɔ, bena míagazu agba na mia dome amea ɖeke o, eye ale míegblɔ Mawu ƒe nya la fia mi." 
1Thessalonians2:10 Miawoe nye ɖaseɖilawo kple Mawu hã, alesi mieno anyi kɔkɔe kple dzɔdzɔe kple mokaka manɔŋui le mi amesiwo xɔe se la gbɔ," 
1Thessalonians2:11 eye mienyae hã bena, abe alesi fofo wɔna na viawo ene la, nenema ke míewɔ na mia dome amesiame: Míexlɔ̃ nu mi, eye miefa akɔ na mi," 
1Thessalonians2:12 eye míeɖi ɖase na mi be, miazɔ bena mianye ame dzedzewo na Mawu, amesi yɔ mi va ye ŋutɔ ƒe fiaɖuƒe kple ŋutikɔkɔe gbɔ la." 
1Thessalonians2:13 Eye le esia ta míawo hã miedaa akpe na Mawu ɖaa bena, esime miexɔ mawunya, si miese le mía nu la, miexɔe abe amewo ƒe nya ene o, ke boŋ abe Mawu ƒe nya ene, abe alesi wònye Mawu ƒe nya vavã, si hã sẽa ŋu le mi, amesiwo xɔnɛ sena la me ene." 
1Thessalonians2:14 Elabena miawo, nɔviwo, miezu Mawu hame, siwo le Yudea le Kristo Yesu me la, srɔ̃lawo; elabena miawo hã míekpe fu mawo ke tso mia ŋutɔwo mia dumeviwo gbɔ, abe alesi woawo hã wokpee tso Yudatɔwo gbɔ la ene;" 
1Thessalonians2:15 amesiwo hã wu Aƒetɔ Yesu kple woa ŋutɔwo ƒe nyagblɔɖilawo, eye woti mía yome, eye womedzea Mawu ŋu o, eye wonye amewo katã ƒe adikãtɔwo," 
1Thessalonians2:16 esi wòxea mo na mí, bena míagagblɔ nya na trɔ̃subɔlawo, bene woaxɔ wo ɖe agbe o, bene woayɔ woƒe nuvɔ̃wo taŋtaŋ ɖaasi la ŋuti; ke dziku, si ava wo dzi la, yɔ taŋtaŋ." 
1Thessalonians2:17 Ke míawo la, nɔviwo, esi woɖe mi ɖa tso mia gbɔ ɣeyiɣi kpuia ɖe le ŋku me — menye le dzi me o la — geɖe wu mieɖo vevie, eye wòdzro mí ŋutɔ bena, míakpɔ mia ŋku me." 
1Thessalonians2:18 Eyata míedi be, míava mia gbɔ, nye Paulo la zi ɖeka kple zi eve hã: ke Satana xe mɔ na mí." 
1Thessalonians2:19 Elabena amekae nye míaƒe mɔkpɔkpɔ kple dzidzɔ kple adegbeƒoƒo ƒe fiakuku la, ne menye miawo hãe le mía Aƒetɔ Yesu Kristo ŋku me le eƒe vava la me o mahã?" 
1Thessalonians2:20 Elabena miawoe nye míaƒe kafukafu kple dzidzɔ. 
1Thessalonians3:1 Eyaŋuti esi miegale ŋu do dzi o la, edze mía ŋu nyuie bena, woagblẽ míawo ɖeɖe ɖi ɖe Atene," 
1Thessalonians3:2 eye miedo Timoteo, mía nɔvi kple Mawu ƒe subɔla kple hadɔwɔla le Kristo ƒe nyanyuie me la ɖa, bene wòado ŋusẽ mi, eye wòaxlɔ̃ nu mi le miaƒe xɔse ŋuti," 
1Thessalonians3:3 bene amea ɖeke nagaʋuʋu le xaxa siawo me o; elabena mia ŋutɔwo mienyae bena, esiawo ke ŋuti woɖo mí ɖo;" 
1Thessalonians3:4 elabena esime mienɔ mia gbɔ la, miegblɔe ɖi na mi bena, miaɖo xaxa me tsã, abe alesi wòva ve me, eye mienyae hã la ene." 
1Thessalonians3:5 Eyata nye hã, esi nyemegale ŋu do dzi o la, medɔ ɖo ɖa, bene manya miaƒe xɔse, bena misela tela te mi kpɔ, eye míaƒe agbagbadzedze zu dzodzro mahĩ!" 
1Thessalonians3:6 Ke azɔ la, esi Timoteo tso mia gbɔ va mia gbɔ, eye wòhe dzidzɔnya vɛ na mí le miaƒe xɔse kple miaƒe lɔlɔ̃ ŋuti, eye bena mietsɔa ŋkuɖoɖodzi nyui ɖoa ŋku mía dzi ɖaasi, eye bena edzroa miawo hã be, míakpɔ mí, abe alesi wòdzroa míawo hã be, miakpɔ mi ene la ŋuti;" 
1Thessalonians3:7 eyata, nɔviwo, wofa aka na mí le mia ŋuti le míaƒe hiãkaka kple xaxa katã me to miaƒe xɔse me;" 
1Thessalonians3:8 elabena azɔ la, ne miawo miele tsitre sesĩe le Aƒetɔ me la, míele agbe." 
1Thessalonians3:9 Elabena akpedada ka míate ŋu atso aɖo teƒe na Mawu le mia ta le dzidzo katã, si míekpɔna le mia ta le mía Mawu ŋku me la ŋuti mahã?" 
1Thessalonians3:10 Zã kple keli míeɖea kuku ŋutɔŋutɔ, bena miakpɔ mia ŋku me, eye miaɖo nusi susɔ na miaƒe xɔse la ɖo wòazu blibo." 
1Thessalonians3:11 Ke Mawu, mía Fofo ŋutɔ kple mía Aƒetɔ Yesu Kristo nana míaƒe mo naɖo ta mia gbɔ." 
1Thessalonians3:12 Ke miawo la, Aƒetɔ ana miatsi ɖe dzi ahagba go le lɔlɔ̃ na mia nɔewo kple amewo katã me, abe alesi míawo hã míele na mi la ene," 
1Thessalonians3:13 bene wòado ŋusẽ miaƒe dziwo, be woanɔ anyi mokaka manɔŋui le kɔkɔenyenye me le Mawu, mía Fofo la ŋku me le mia Aƒetɔ Yesu Kristo kple eƒe ame kɔkɔewo katã ƒe vavagbe la! Amen." 
1Thessalonians4:1 Azɔ mlɔeba la, nɔviwo, miele kuku ɖem, eye míele nu xlɔ̃m mi le Aƒetɔ Yesu me, bene abe alesi miexɔe tso mia gbɔ, alesi dze be, miazɔ, eye miadze Mawu ŋu, eye abe alesi miezɔna hã ene la, miayi dzi geɖe wu;" 
1Thessalonians4:2 elabena mienya se, siwo miede na mi to Aƒetɔ Yesu dzi." 
1Thessalonians4:3 Elabena esiae nye Mawu ƒe lɔlɔ̃nu, be miawo mia ɖokui kɔkɔe, eye miade mia ɖokui ɖa atso ahasiwɔwɔ me," 
1Thessalonians4:4 eye mia dome amesiame nanya, alesi woade ye ŋutɔ srɔ̃a le kɔkɔenyenye kple bubu me;" 
1Thessalonians4:5 menye le nudzodzro ƒe fiẽŋufiẽŋui vevie me, abe alesi trɔ̃subɔla, siwo menya Mawu o la wɔna la ene o;" 
1Thessalonians4:6 eye amea ɖeke nagaba nɔvia, eye wòatafae le dɔwɔwɔ me o; elabena Aƒetɔ lae nye nusiawo katã ƒe hlɔ̃biala, abe alesi miegblɔ tsã, eye míeɖi ɖase na mi la ene." 
1Thessalonians4:7 Elabena Mawu meyɔ mí na makɔmakɔnyenye o, ke boŋ na kɔkɔewɔwɔ." 
1Thessalonians4:8 Eyaŋuti amesi ke doa vlo esia la, menye amee wòdoa vloe o, ke boŋ Mawu, amesi na eƒe Gbɔgbɔ kɔkɔe mí lae wòdoa vloe." 
1Thessalonians4:9 Ke le nɔvilɔlɔ̃ ŋuti la mehiã mi bena, míaŋlɔe aɖo ɖe mi o; elabena Mawu fia mia ŋutɔwo be, mialɔ̃ mia nɔewo;" 
1Thessalonians4:10 elabena miewɔ esia ke na nɔvi, siwo katã le Makedonia blibo la katã. Ke míele nu xlɔ̃m mi, nɔviwo, bena miayi dzi geɖe wu," 
1Thessalonians4:11 eye miabui nudzeamee be, miano anyi kpoo, eye miawɔ mia ŋutɔwo miaƒe dɔ, eye miatsɔ miaƒe asiwo awɔ dɔ, abe alesi miede se na mi la ene," 
1Thessalonians4:12 bene miazɔ nyuie de amesiwo le egodo la ŋuti, bene naneke nagahiã mi o." 
1Thessalonians4:13 Ke, nɔviwo, míele didim bena, mianɔ numanyamanya me le amesiwo dɔ alɔ̃ la ŋuti o, bene miagaxa nu, abe ame bubu, siwo mɔkpɔkpɔ meli na o la ene o." 
1Thessalonians4:14 Elabena ne miexɔnɛ sena bena, Kristo ku, eye wògafɔ ɖe tsitre la, nenema ke Mawu ato Yesu Kristo dzi akplɔ amesiwo dɔ alɔ̃ la hã ayi kpakplii." 
1Thessalonians4:15 Elabena míele esia gblɔm na mi le Aƒetɔ la ƒe nyaa de me bena, mí amesiwo susɔ le agbe yiɖase ɖe Aƒetɔ la ƒe vavagbe la, miadze ŋgɔ na amesiwo dɔ alɔ̃ la o." 
1Thessalonians4:16 Elabena Aƒetɔ la ŋutɔ atsɔ aʋafia gã ƒe gbeɖeɖe kple mawudɔla gatɔ ƒe gbe kple Mawu ƒe kpẽɖiɖi aɖi tso dziƒo, eye amesiwo ku le Kristo me la, woatsi tre gbã;" 
1Thessalonians4:17 emegbe la mi amesiwo susɔ le agbe la, woahe mí kpakpli wo siaa le alilikpowo me aɖakpe Aƒetɔ la le ya me, eye ale míanɔ anyi kple Aƒetɔ la ɖaasi." 
1Thessalonians4:18 Eyata mitsɔ nya siawo fa akɔ na mia nɔewo. 
1Thessalonians5:1 Ke le ɣeyiɣiwo kple azãgbewo ŋuti la, nɔviwo, mehiã mi be, míaŋlɔe aɖo ɖe mi o;" 
1Thessalonians5:2 elabena mia ŋutɔwo mienyae kɔte bena, Aƒetɔ ƒe ŋkeke la gbɔna, abe alesi fiafitɔ vana le zã me ene." 
1Thessalonians5:3 Elabena ne wole gbɔgblɔm be, ŋutifafa kple anyinɔnɔ dedie li la, tete gbegblẽ ava lili wo, abe alesi fuɖuame va lilia funɔ ene, eye womate ŋu asi le enu kulẽ o." 
1Thessalonians5:4 Ke miawo, nɔviwo, miele viviti me, bena ŋkeke la naɖi ɖe mi abe fiafitɔ ene o;" 
1Thessalonians5:5 elabena mi katã míenye kekeli viwo kple ŋkeke viwo; míenye zã alo viviti ta o. 
1Thessalonians5:6 Eyata azɔ migana míanɔ alɔ̃ dɔm abe ame bubuwo ene o, ke boŋ mina míanɔ ŋudzɔ, eye míanɔ mo xexi." 
1Thessalonians5:7 Elabena amesiwo dɔa alɔ̃ la, zãe wodɔa alɔ̃, eye amesiwo mua aha la, zãe womua aha;" 
1Thessalonians5:8 ke mí amesiwo nye ŋkeke tɔwo la, mina mianɔ mo xexi, eye míado xɔse kple lɔlɔ̃ ƒe akɔtakpoxɔnu, eye míaɖɔ xaxa ƒe mɔkpɔkpɔ ƒe gakuku la." 
1Thessalonians5:9 Elabena Mawu meɖo mí na dziku o, ke boŋ, bena xɔxɔ nasu mía si to mía Aƒetɔ Yesu Kristo dzi," 
1Thessalonians5:10 amesi ku ɖe mía ta, bena ne míele ŋu alo míele alɔ̃ me la, míanɔ agbe kpakplii," 
1Thessalonians5:11 Eyata mifa akɔ na mia nɔewo, eye mido ŋusẽ mia nɔewo, abe alesi miewɔna hã ene." 
1Thessalonians5:12 Ke míele kuku ɖem na mi, nɔviwo: Midze si amesiwo wɔa dɔ vevi le mia dome, eye wonɔ mia nu le Aƒetɔ la me, eye woglɔ̃a nu mi la," 
1Thessalonians5:13 eye bena míabu wo geɖe ŋutɔ le lɔlɔ̃ me le woƒe dɔwɔwɔ la ta. Minɔ anyi le ŋutifafa me le mia nɔewo dome. 
1Thessalonians5:14 Ke míele nu xlɔ̃m mi, nɔviwo: Migbe nya na nu baɖa wɔlawo, mifa akɔ na dzikatsoƒoetɔwo, mixɔ na gbɔdzɔgbɔdzɔtɔwo, migbɔ dzi ɖi na amewo katã." 
1Thessalonians5:15 Mikpɔ nyuie bena, amea ɖeke nagaɖo vɔ̃ vɔ̃ teƒe o, ke boŋ miti nyuididi na mia nɔewo kple amewo katã yome ɖaasi." 
1Thessalonians5:16 Dzi nadzɔ mi ɖaa! 
1Thessalonians5:17 Minɔ gbedodoɖa dzi madzudzɔmadzudzɔe! 
1Thessalonians5:18 Mida akpe le nusianu ŋuti; elabena esiae nye Mawu ƒe lɔlɔ̃nu le Kristo Yesu me hena mi. 
1Thessalonians5:19 Migatsi Gbɔgbɔ la nu o! 
1Thessalonians5:20 Migado vlo nyagbɔgblɔɖiwo o! 
1Thessalonians5:21 Ke mido nuwo katã kpɔ, eye milé nu nyui la me ɖe asi." 
1Thessalonians5:22 Miɖe mia ɖokui ɖa tso vɔ̃ sia vɔ̃ ƒomevi me! 
1Thessalonians5:23 Ke ŋutifafa Mawu la ŋutɔ nakɔ mia ŋuti keŋkeŋ, eye wòadzra miaƒe gbɔgbɔ kple luʋɔ kpakple ŋutilã blibo la katã ɖo mokaka manɔŋui halase mía Aƒetɔ Yesu Kristo ƒe vavagbe la!" 
1Thessalonians5:24 Nuteƒewɔla enye amesi yɔ mi ve, amesi lawɔe hã." 
1Thessalonians5:25 Nɔviwo, mido gbe ɖa ɖe mía ta!" 
1Thessalonians5:26 Mitsɔ nugbugbɔ kɔkɔe ɖuɖɔ nɔviwo katã nam ƒã. 
1Thessalonians5:27 Metà Aƒetɔ la na mi bena, miaxlẽ agbalẽ sia na nɔvi kɔkɔeawo katã." 
1Thessalonians5:28 Mía Aƒetɔ Yesu Kristo ƒe amenuveve nanɔ anyi kpli mi! Amen. 
2Thessalonians1:1 Paulo kple Silvano kple Timoteo woŋlɔ ɖo ɖe Tesalonikatɔwo ƒe hame, si le Mawu, mía Fofo, kple Aƒetɔ Yesu Kristo me:" 
2Thessalonians1:2 Amenuveve kple ŋutifafa, si tso Mawu, mía Fofo kple Aƒetɔ Yesu Kristo gbɔ la, woana mi!" 
2Thessalonians1:3 Ele na mí bena, míada akpe na Mawu ɖaasi le mia ta, nɔviwo, abe alesi dze ene; elabena miaƒe xɔse tsina ŋutɔ, eye mi katã mia dome amesiame ƒe lɔlɔ̃, si mietsɔna lɔ̃a mia nɔewo la, sɔa gbɔ ɖe edzi," 
2Thessalonians1:4 ale bena mia ŋutɔwo míeƒoa adegbe le mia ta le Mawu ƒe hameawo me le miaƒe dzidodo kple miaƒe xɔse, si le mia si le miaƒe yometitiwo kple xaxa, siwo miekpɔna me la ŋuti;" 
2Thessalonians1:5 nusiwo nye Mawu ƒe ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ dzɔdzɔe la ƒe dzesi bena, wobu mi be, miedze Mawu ƒe fiaɖuƒe, si ŋuti míekpe fu ɖo la," 
2Thessalonians1:6 ne ele ale bena, edzo le Mawu ƒe ŋku me bena, wòatsɔ xaxa aɖo teƒe na amesiwo na xaxa mi;" 
2Thessalonians1:7 eye mi amesiwo kpo xaxa la, ana gbɔɖeme mi kpakple mí katã siaa le Aƒetɔ Yesu Kristo kple eƒe ŋusẽ ƒe dɔlawo ƒe ɖeɖefia tso dziƒo la me" 
2Thessalonians1:8 le dzo ƒe aɖe me, esime woabia hlɔ̃ amesiwo menya Mawu o kple amesiwo meɖoa to mía Aƒetɔ Yesu Kristo ƒe nyanyuie la o," 
2Thessalonians1:9 amesiwo akpɔ fetu vɔ̃, si nye gbegblẽ mavɔmavɔ la, tso Aƒetɔ ƒe ŋku me kple eƒe ŋusẽ ƒe ŋutikɔkɔe la gbɔ," 
2Thessalonians1:10 ne ava, bena wòakpɔ ŋutikɔkɔe le eƒe ame kɔkɔewo me, eye woawo nuku na amewo le dzixɔsetɔwo katã ŋuti le ŋkeke ma dzi; elabena miexɔ míaƒe ɖaseɖiɖi dzi se." 
2Thessalonians1:11 Esiata hã miedoa gbe ɖa ɖaa le mia ta, bena mía Mawu nabu mi be, miedze yɔyɔ la, eye wòawu dɔmenyonyo ƒe ŋudzedze; katã kple xɔse ƒe do la nu le ŋusẽ me," 
2Thessalonians1:12 bene wòakɔ mía Aƒetɔ Yesu Kristo ƒe ŋkɔ la ŋuti le mia me, eye wòakɔ miawo hã mia ŋuti le eyama me le mía Mawu kple Aƒetɔ Yesu Kristo ƒe amenuveve la nu." 
2Thessalonians2:1 Ke míele kuku dem na mi, nɔviwo, le mía Aƒetɔ Yesu Kristo ƒe vava kple mia ƒuƒoƒo de eyama gbã la ŋuti," 
2Thessalonians2:2 bene miagana woate mi ɖa kaba tso miaƒe tamesusu me o, eye miagana woado voɖi na mi hã o, eɖanye to gbɔgbɔ alo to nya me o alo to agbalẽ, si le abe mía gbɔ wòtso ene la me o, abe ɖe Aƒetɔ ƒe ŋkeke la ɖo va ene." 
2Thessalonians2:3 Migana amea ɖeke nable mi le mɔa ɖeke dzi o; elabena Aƒetɔ la mava o, negbe ɖeko megbedede tso Mawu gbɔ lava gbã, eye woaɖe nuvɔ̃me, si nye gbegblẽvi la, ɖe go," 
2Thessalonians2:4 amesi tsia tre, eye wòdoa eɖokui ɖe dzi ɖe nusianu, si woyɔna be Mawu alo nusi wosubɔna la dzi, nenem bena wòbɔbɔ nɔ anyi de mawuƒe la me hele eɖokui fiam be, yenye Mawu." 
2Thessalonians2:5 Alo ɖe mieɖo ŋku edzi bena, esime megale mia gbɔ la, megblɔ nusiawo na mi oa?" 
2Thessalonians2:6 Eye azɔ la mienya nusi xea mo nɛ, bena woaɖee ɖe go le ye ŋutɔ ƒe azãgbe la dzi." 
2Thessalonians2:7 Elabena sedzimawɔmawɔ ƒe nya ɣaɣla la le da wɔm ŋusẽtɔe xoxo; ɖeko wòle be, woaɖe amesi le ma xem vaseɖe fifi la da le mo la dzi hafi;" 
2Thessalonians2:8 eye tete woaɖe sedzimawɔla ɖe go, amesi Aƒetɔ Yesu lawu kple eƒe nu me gbɔgbɔ, eye wòatsrɔ̃e to eƒe vava ƒe ɖeɖefia la me." 
2Thessalonians2:9 Ame ma ƒe vava lanye le Satana ƒe ŋusẽdɔwɔwɔ nu: Le aʋatsokaka ƒe ŋusẽ kple dzesiwo kple nukunuwo katã 
2Thessalonians2:10 kple madzɔmadzɔnyenye ƒe amebeble katã me le amesiwo le tsɔtsrɔm la dome; elabena womexɔ nyateƒe ƒe lolo, bene woaxɔ wo o." 
2Thessalonians2:11 Eye le esia ta Mawu adɔ beble, si nu sẽ la, aɖo ɖe wo gbɔ, bene woaxɔ aʋatsokaka dzi ase," 
2Thessalonians2:12 bene woadrɔ̃ ʋɔnu amesiwo katã mexa nyateƒe dzi se o, ke boŋ madzɔmadzɔnyenye dze wo ŋu." 
2Thessalonians2:13 Ke ele na mí be, míada akpe na Mawu ɖaasi le mia ta, nɔvi, siwo Aƒetɔ la lɔ̃na, bena Mawu Mia mi tso gɔmedzedzea me hena xɔxɔ le Gbɔgbɔ ƒe kɔkɔewɔwɔ kple nyateƒe dzixɔse la me," 
2Thessalonians2:14 nusi gbɔ woyɔ mi ve to míaƒe nyanyuie la me, bene mía Aƒetɔ Yesu Kristo ƒe ŋutikɔkɔe la nasu mia si." 
2Thessalonians2:15 Eyata azɔ, nɔviwo, minɔ tsitre sesĩe, eye milé nuɖoanyi, si wofia mi, eɖanye to nya alo to míaƒe agbalẽ me o la, ɖe asi." 
2Thessalonians2:16 Ke mía Aƒetɔ Yesu Kristo ŋutɔ kple Mawu, mía Fofo, amesi lɔ̃ mi, eye wotsɔ akɔfafa mavɔmavɔ kple mɔkpɔkpɔ nyui na mí to amenuveve me la," 
2Thessalonians2:17 nafa akɔ na miaƒe dziwo, eye wòado ŋusẽ mi le dɔwɔwɔ nyui kple nya nyui katã me." 
2Thessalonians3:1 Mlɔeba la, nɔviwo, mido gbe ɖa ɖe mia la, bena Aƒetɔ ƒe nya la nayi dzi kaba, eye woakɔ eŋuti, abe alesi wòle le miawo hã mia dome la ene," 
2Thessalonians3:2 eye bena woaɖe mí atso votolawo kple ame vɔ̃ɖiwo si me; elabena menye amewo katã si xɔse la le o. 
2Thessalonians3:3 Ke nuteƒewɔla enye Aƒetɔ la, amesi ado ŋusẽ mi, eye wòadzra mi ɖo tso vɔ̃ɖitɔ la si me." 
2Thessalonians3:4 Ke mieɖo dzi ɖe mia ŋu le Aƒetɔ la me bena, miewɔa nusi miede se na mi la, eye miegale ewɔ ge hã." 
2Thessalonians3:5 Ke Aƒetɔ la atrɔ miaƒe dziwo aɖo ta Mawu ƒe lɔlɔ̃ kple Kristo ƒe dzidodo la gbɔ. 
2Thessalonians3:6 Ke miele se dem na mi, nɔviwo, le mía Aƒetɔ Yesu Kristo ƒe ŋkɔ la dzi bena, miahe mia ɖokui ɖa tso nɔvi sia nɔvi, si zɔna sakasaka, eye menye le nuɖoanyi, si wòxɔ le mía si la nu o la gbɔ." 
2Thessalonians3:7 Elabena mia ŋutɔwo mienya alesi wòdze mi be, miasrɔ̃ mi; elabena míewɔ sakasaka le mia dome o," 
2Thessalonians3:8 eye mieɖu abolo dzro le amea ɖeke gbɔ o, ke boŋ mietsɔ agbagbadzedze kple kutrikuku wo ɖo zã kple keli, bena míagazu agba na mia dome amea ɖeke o," 
2Thessalonians3:9 menye ɖe ŋusẽ mele mía si o, ke boŋ bene míawo mia ɖokui kpɔɖeŋu na mi, bena miasrɔ̃ mí." 
2Thessalonians3:10 Elabena esime mienɔ mia gbɔ hã la, míede se na mi bena, ne amea ɖe melɔ̃ be, yeawɔ dɔ o la, negaɖu nu hã a." 
2Thessalonians3:11 Elabena miese bena, amea ɖewo zɔna sakasaka le mia dome, eye womewɔa dɔa ɖeke o, ke boŋ wowɔa yakadɔwo sɔŋ ko." 
2Thessalonians3:12 Ke míele se dem na nenem me siawo, eye míele nu xlɔ̃m wo le mia Aƒetɔ Yesu Kristo me, bene woawɔ dɔ kpoo, eye woaɖu woa ŋutɔwo ƒe abolo." 
2Thessalonians3:13 Ke miawo la, nɔviwo, migana ɖeɖi nate mia ŋu le do nyui wɔwɔ me o." 
2Thessalonians3:14 Ke ne amea ɖe meɖo to miaƒe nya, si le agbalẽ sia me o la, miɖe dzesi eyama, eye migade ha kplii o, bene ŋu nakpee." 
2Thessalonians3:15 Ke miabui abe futɔ ene o, ke mixlɔ̃ nui abe nɔvi ene boŋ." 
2Thessalonians3:16 Ke ŋutifafa ƒe Aƒetɔ la ŋutɔ nana ŋutifafa mi le ɣeawokatãɣi me le nusianu me. Aƒetɔ la nanɔ anyi kpli mi katã! 
2Thessalonians3:17 Ɖuɖɔ, si nye Paulo metsɔ nye asi ŋlɔe, si nye dzesi le nye agbalẽ sia agbalẽ me la, enye si; nenemae meŋlɔnɛ." 
2Thessalonians3:18 Mía Aƒetɔ Yesu Kristo ƒe amenuveve nana anyi kpli mi katã! Amen. 
1Timothy1:1 Paulo, Yesu Kristo ƒe apostolo le Mawu, mía xɔla, kple Kristo Yesu, si nye míaƒe mɔkpɔkpɔ la, ƒe sedede la nu," 
1Timothy1:2 ŋlɔ ɖo ɖe Timoteo, vinye vavã le xɔse me: Amenuveve kple nublanuikpɔkpɔ kple ŋutifafa, si tso Mawu, Fofo la, kple Kristo Yesu, mía Aƒetɔ gbɔ la, woana wò!" 
1Timothy1:3 Alesi mexlɔ̃ nu wò be, nanɔ Efeso, esime meyina ɖe Makedonia, bene naɖe se na amea ɖewo be, womagafia nu bubu o," 
1Timothy1:4 eye bena womagaɖo to gliwo kple dzidzimenya, siwo seƒeɖo meli na o, elabena nusiawo hea anukutsyɔtsyɔ geɖewo vɛ wu nusi Mawu ƒe nuɖoanyi le xɔse me la ɖina la, nenema ke megale nu xlɔ̃m wò fifia hã." 
1Timothy1:5 Ke sedede ƒe nuwuwu enye lɔlɔ̃, si tso dzi dzadzɛ kple dzitsinya nyui kpakple xɔse, si me alakpaa ɖeke mele o la me;" 
1Timothy1:6 nusiwo gbɔ amea ɖewo tre mɔ tso, eye wogbugbɔ yi ɖe nuƒoƒo dzodzrowo gbɔ" 
1Timothy1:7 hele didim be, yewoanye sefialawo, eye womenya nusiwo wogblɔna alo nusiwo dzi woka ɖo la gɔme o." 
1Timothy1:8 Ke mienyae bena, se la nyo, ne amea ɖe wɔ eŋu do le se la nu pɛpɛpɛ;" 
1Timothy1:9 eye míenya esia bena, womena se ame dzɔdzɔe o, ke boŋ sedzidalawo kple tosẽlawo kple ame mavɔ̃mawuwo, kple nuvɔ̃wɔlawo kple ame makɔmakɔwo kple ahɔhlɔ̃bɔlawo kple tɔwulawo kple nɔwulawo kple amewulawo" 
1Timothy1:10 kple ahasiwɔlawo kple amesiwo dɔna kple ŋutsuviwo kple amesiawo kple aʋatsokalawo kple atam dzodzro kalawo, eye ne nu bubua ɖe li, si tsi tre ɖe nufiafia, si le blibo la ŋuti" 
1Timothy1:11 le Mawu yayratɔ ƒe ŋutikɔkɔe nyanyuie, si wotsɔ de asi nam la nu." 
1Timothy1:12 Eye meda akpe na amesi do ŋusẽm, si nye Kristo Yesu, mía Aƒetɔ la be, wòbum nyateƒetɔ, eye wòtsɔm ɖo subɔsubɔ la nu," 
1Timothy1:13 nye amesi nye busunyagblɔla kple yometila kpakple vlodola tsã; ke wokpɔ nublanui nam, elabena mewɔe le numanyamanya me, le dzimaxɔse me." 
1Timothy1:14 Ke mía Aƒetɔ ƒe amenuveve sɔ gbɔ geɖe ŋutɔ le xɔse kple lɔlɔ̃, si le Kristo Yesu me la me." 
1Timothy1:15 Nyateƒenya wònye, eye wòdze be, woaxɔe keŋ bena, Kristo Yesu va xexeame, nuvɔ̃wɔlawo ɖe ge, amesiwo dome menye gãtɔ le." 
1Timothy1:16 Ke esia ŋuti wokpɔ nublanui nam, bena Yesu Kristo naɖe eƒe dzigbɔgbɔɖi blewu katã afia le menye gbã, bene wòanye kpɔɖeŋu na amesiwo katã le edzi xɔ ge ase hena agbe mava la." 
1Timothy1:17 Ke fia mavɔmavɔtɔ, si nye Mawu magblẽmagblẽ, makpɔmakpɔ ɖeka hɔ̃ la, tɔ nanye bubu kple kafukafu tso mavɔ me yi ɖe mave me! Amen." 
1Timothy1:18 Mele sedede sia dem asi na wò, vinye Timoteo, le nyagbɔgblɔɖeanyi, siwo dze ŋgɔ na wò la nu, bene nawɔ aʋa nyui le wo nu," 
1Timothy1:19 eye nalé xɔse kple dzitsinya nyui ɖe asi, nusi amea ɖewo tso ƒu gbe, eye wodze go le xɔse gome abe ʋu dzego ene;" 
1Timothy1:20 amesiwo dome Himenaio kple Aleksandro wole, amesiwo metsɔ de asi na Satana, bene wòahe to na wo, be woadzudzɔ busunyagbɔgblɔ." 
1Timothy2:1 Azo mele nu xlɔ̃m le nuwo katã ŋgɔ be, woawɔ kukuɖeɖewo, gbedodoɖawo, nyaxɔxɔdeametawo, akpedadawo le amewo katã ta," 
1Timothy2:2 le fiawo kple amesiwo katã ɖu amegãwo la ta, bene míanɔ anyi kpoo le ŋutifafa mele mawuvɔvɔ̃ kple nusi dzea bubu katã la me." 
1Timothy2:3 Elabena esia nyo, eye wòdze Mawu, mía xɔla ŋu," 
1Timothy2:4 amesi le didim be, woaxɔ amewo katã, bene woava nyateƒe ƒe sidzedze la me." 
1Timothy2:5 Elabena Mawu ɖeka kple avuléla ɖeka, si le Mawu kple amewo dome, si nye ame Kristo Yesu la koe li," 
1Timothy2:6 amesi tsa eɖokui na abe fexexe ɖe amewo katã ta la ene, si nye ɖaseɖiɖi la le ye ŋutɔ ƒe ɣeyiɣi la me;" 
1Timothy2:7 nusia ŋuti woɖom ɖi menye gbeƒãɖela kple apostolo — nyateƒe gblɔm mele, nyemele aʋatso kam o — kple trɔ̃subɔlawo ƒe nufiala le xɔse kpakple nyateƒe me." 
1Timothy2:8 Eyata mele didim bena, ŋutsuwo nado gbe ɖa le afisiafi, eye woado asi kɔkɔewo ɖe dzi, dɔmedzoe kple ɖikekea ɖeke manɔmee." 
1Timothy2:9 Nenema ke nyɔnuwo nado awu ɖe nɔnɔme nyui me, eye woawɔ leke na wo ɖokui le ŋukpekpe kple ɖokuidziɖuɖu me; menye kple ɖaƒoƒo vivivo kple sika alo adzagbawo alo awu xɔasi dodo o," 
1Timothy2:10 ke nusi dze nyɔnu, siwo nua Mawu ƒe subɔsubɔ me la, enye be, woawo leke na wo ɖokui to dɔwɔwɔ nyuiwo me." 
1Timothy2:11 Nyɔnu la nasrɔ̃ nu le ɖoɖoezizi kple toɖoɖo katã me. 
1Timothy2:12 Ke nyemeɖe mɔ na nyɔnu be, wòafia nu, eye wòaɖu ŋutsu dzi o, ke boŋ wòalé eɖokui kpoo." 
1Timothy2:13 Elabena womè Adam gbã, emegbe la Xawa?" 
1Timothy2:14 Eye womeble Adam o, ke nyɔnu lae woble, eye wòge ɖe vodada me." 
1Timothy2:15 Ke woaɖee to vidzidzi me, ne ena xɔse kple lɔlɔ̃ kple kɔ̃kɔewɔwɔ kpakple ɖokuidziɖuɖu me." 
1Timothy3:1 Nyateƒenya wònye: Ne amea ɖe le dzikpɔladɔ dim la, ele dɔwɔwɔ nyui dim." 
1Timothy3:2 Azɔ la ele na dzikpɔla bena, mokaka naganɔ eŋu o: Wòanye nyɔnu ɖeka srɔ̃, ɖokuidziɖula, ame ɖɔŋuɖo, nudzeamewɔla, amedzrowɔla, amesi nya nufiafia;" 
1Timothy3:3 menye ahatsunola o, menye ameƒola o, ke ame fatu; menye gedila o, menye galɔ̃la o," 
1Timothy3:4 amesi kpɔa ye ŋutɔ ƒe aƒe dzi nyuie, amesi si vi ɖotowo le, eye wòléa eɖokui nyuie; —" 
1Timothy3:5 ke ne amea ɖe menya alesi wòa kpɔ ye ŋutɔ ƒe aƒe dzi o la, aleke wòakpɔ Mawu ƒe hame la dzi mahã? —" 
1Timothy3:6 Menye amesi ƒe dzimetɔtrɔ teƒe medidi o, bene wòagado eɖokui ɖe dzi, eye wòadze Abosam ƒe ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ la me o." 
1Timothy3:7 Ke ele ne be, wòakpɔ ɖaseɖiɖi nyui atso amesiwo le egodo la hã gbɔ, bene wòagadze dzudzu kple Abosam ƒe mɔ̃tetre me o." 
1Timothy3:8 Nenema ke subɔlawo hã nalé wo ɖokui nyuie: Wòaganye aɖeveetɔwo o, wòaganye aha geɖe nolawo o, wòagaɖi viɖe ƒoɖi o," 
1Timothy3:9 woalé xɔse ƒe nya ɣaɣla la ɖe asi le dzitsinya dzadzɛ me. 
1Timothy3:10 Ke woado amesiawo hã akpɔ gbã, eye ne mokaka mele wo ŋu o la, ekema mina woasubɔ." 
1Timothy3:11 Nenema ke nyɔnuwo hã nalé wo ɖokui nyuie: Woaganye ameŋuzɔlawo o, woanye amè ɖɔŋuɖowo, nuteƒewɔlawo le nusianu me." 
1Timothy3:12 Subɔlawo nanye nyɔnu ɖeka srɔ̃, eye woakpɔ wo viwo kple woa ŋutɔwo ƒe aƒewo dzi nyuie." 
1Timothy3:13 Elabena amesiwo subɔna nyuie la, wowɔa nɔƒe nyui na wo ɖokui, eye wokpɔa dzideƒo geɖe le xɔse, si le Kristo Yesu me la me." 
1Timothy3:14 Mele nusiawo ŋlɔm na wò hele mɔ kpɔm be, mava gbɔwò kpuie;" 
1Timothy3:15 ke ne metsi anyi la, ne nanya alesi dze wò be, nazɔ le Mawu ƒe aƒe, si nye Mawu gbagbe ƒe hame kple nyateƒe ƒe sɔti kple gɔmeɖoɖoanyi sesĩ la me." 
1Timothy3:16 Eye edze ƒã bena, gã enye mawusosroɖa ƒe nya ɣaɣla la: Mawu ɖe eɖokui fia le ŋutilã me, wotso afia nɛ le Gbɔgbɔ me, eɖe eɖokui fia mawudɔlawo, woɖe gbe ƒãe le trɔ̃subɔlawo dome, woxɔ edzi se le xexeame, woxɔe yi dzi le ŋutikɔkɔe me." 
1Timothy4:1 Ke Gbɔgbɔ la gblɔe kɔte bena, le ŋkeke mamleawo me la amea ɖewo ade megbe atso xɔse la me, eye woaɖo to beblegbɔgbɔwo kple gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃wo ƒe nufiafia" 
1Timothy4:2 to aʋatsonufialawo ƒe alakpadada me, amesiwo wotsɔ ga xɔdzo ɖe dzesi wo le woa ŋutɔwo ƒe dzitsinya me," 
1Timothy4:3 amesiwo xea mɔ na srɔ̃ɖeɖe, eye wogblɔna be, woatsri nuɖuɖu, siwo Mawu wɔ, bena amesiwo xɔe se, eye wodze si nyateƒe la, naɖu kple akpedada la." 
1Timothy4:4 Elabena Mawu ƒe nuwɔwɔwo katã nyo, eye womatsri naneke o, nenye be, woxɔe kple akpedada;" 
1Timothy4:5 elabena wokɔ eŋuti to Mawu ƒe nya kple gbedodoɖa me. 
1Timothy4:6 Ne ètsɔ nusiawo ɖo nɔviawo ŋku me la, anye Yesu Kristo ƒe subɔla nyui, si wonyi le xɔse ƒe nyawo kple nufiafia nyui, si yome nèdze la me." 
1Timothy4:7 Ke nagbe yakagli makɔmakɔ, siwo nyagãwo tona; boŋ do vevie mawusosroɖa." 
1Timothy4:8 Elabena ŋutilã me veviedodo nyo na nu via ɖe ko; ke mawusosroɖa nyo na nusianu, eye agbe, si li fifi kple esi le vava ge la, ƒe ŋugbedodo la li nɛ." 
1Timothy4:9 Nyateƒenya wònye, eye wòdze be, woaxɔe blibo." 
1Timothy4:10 Elabena esiaŋuti hã míedzea agbagba, eye míenana wodzua mi ɖo; elabena míetsɔ míaƒe mɔkpɔkpɔ ɖo Mawu gbagbe, si nye amewo katã xɔla, vevietɔ xɔsetɔwo tɔ la dzi." 
1Timothy4:11 De nusiawo ƒe se, eye nafia wo." 
1Timothy4:12 Megana amea ɖeke naɖo vlo wò ɖekakpuinyenye o, ke boŋ nanye kpɔɖeŋu na xɔsetɔwo le nya me, le anyinɔnɔ me, le lɔlɔ̃ me, le gbɔgbɔ me, le xɔse me, le dzadzɛnyenye me." 
1Timothy4:13 Nɔ agbalẽxexlẽ kple nuxɔxlɔ̃ kple nufiafia dzi, halase esime mava." 
1Timothy4:14 Megawɔ ƒome le amenuvevenunana, si le mewo, si wona wò to nyagblɔɖi me, esime hamemegãwo da woƒe asiwo ɖe dziwò la ŋuti o." 
1Timothy4:15 Lé be na nusiawo, nɔ nusiawo dzi, bene wò ŋgɔgbedede nadze ƒã le nuwo katã me." 
1Timothy4:16 Kpɔ ɖokuiwò kple wò nufiafia la dzi nyuie, nɔ nusiawo dzi; elabena ne èwɔ esia la, àxɔ ɖokuiwò kple amesiwo ɖoa to wò la, ɖe agbe." 
1Timothy5:1 Megawo ɖe ame tsitsi ta o, keboŋ xlɔ̃ nui abe fofo ene, ɖekakpuiwo abe nɔviŋutsuwo ene," 
1Timothy5:2 nyɔnu tsitsiwo abe dadawo ene, ɖetugbiwo abe nɔvinyɔnuwo ene le dzadzɛnyenye katã me." 
1Timothy5:3 Bu ahosi, siwo nye ahosi vavãwo!" 
1Timothy5:4 Ke ne viwo alo mamayɔviwo le ahosia ɖe si la, woasrɔ̃ alesi woawo nusi adze Mawu ŋu la le woa ŋutɔwo ƒe aƒe me gbã, eye woaɖo teƒe na wo dzia wo: elabena esia nyo le Mawu ŋku me." 
1Timothy5:5 Ke nyɔnu, si nye ahosi vavã, eye amea ɖeke meli nɛ o la, tsɔa eƒe mɔkpɔkpɔ ɖoa Mawu dzi, eye wònɔa kukuɖeɖewo kple gbedodoɖawo dzi zã kple keli." 
1Timothy5:6 Ke ahosi, si tsa eɖokui de asi na agbeɖuɖu la, ele agbe henye ame kuku." 
1Timothy5:7 Eye de nusiawo ƒe se na wo, bene woanɔ anyi mokaka manɔŋui." 
1Timothy5:8 Ke ne amea ɖe melé be na ye ŋutɔ tɔwo o, eye vevietɔ na ye ŋutɔ ƒe aƒemetɔwo o la, egbe xɔse la, eye wòvɔ̃ɖi wu dzimaxɔsetɔ." 
1Timothy5:9 Megatia ahosi, si mexɔ ƒe blaade haɖe o la o: Amesi nye ŋutsu ɖeka srɔ̃," 
1Timothy5:10 amesi kpɔ ɖaseɖiɖi nyui le dɔwɔwɔ nyuiwo ŋuti; ne enyia viwo, ne ewɔa amedzro, ne eklɔa ame kɔkɔewo ƒe afɔ ŋuti, ne ekpena ɖe fukpelawo ŋuti, ne enɔa ɖo nyui sia do nyui wɔwɔ yome." 
1Timothy5:11 Ke gbe ahosi, siwo metsi haɖe o; elabena ne wodze ha ɖe Kristo ŋuti la, wodina be, yewoaɖe srɔ̃," 
1Timothy5:12 eye fɔbubu sia li na wo bena, wotrɔ gbã nyateƒetɔnyenye la." 
1Timothy5:13 Eye wosrɔ̃a kuviawɔwɔ hã henɔa tsatsam tso aƒe me yi aƒe me; eye menye, kuvia ɖeɖeko wowɔna o, ke boŋ wonye nu kpoloe ƒolawo kple yakanuwɔlawo hã henɔa nya madzetowo gblɔm." 
1Timothy5:14 Eyata mele didim bena, ahosi, siwo metsi haɖe o la, naɖe srɔ̃, adzi viwo, akpa woƒe aƒewo dzi, bene woagaɖe mo na adikãtɔ la, ne wòadzu hame la o." 
1Timothy5:15 Elabena amea ɖewo trɔ xoxo dze Abosam yome. 
1Timothy5:16 Ke ne ahosiwo le ŋutsu xɔsetɔa ɖe alo nyanu xɔsetɔa ɖe si la, wòakpe ɖe wo ŋuti, eye woaganye agba na hame la o, bene hame la nate ŋu akpe ɖe amesiwo nye ahosi vavãwo la ŋuti." 
1Timothy5:17 Hamemegã, siwo kpɔa ha la dzi nyuie la, edze be, woatsɔ bubu teƒe eve abu wo, vevietɔ amesiwo dze agbagba le nyagbɔgblɔ kple nufiafia me la." 
1Timothy5:18 Elabena ŋɔŋlɔ la gblɔ be: „Megabla nu na nyitsu, si le mɔli tugum la o,“ eye: „Dɔtsɔla dze eƒe fetu.“" 
1Timothy5:19 Ne wotso hamemegãa de nu la, megaxɔe o, negbe le ɖaseɖila eve alo etɔ̃ nu ko." 
1Timothy5:20 Amesiwo wɔ nuvɔ̃ la, ka mo na wo le amewo katã ŋku me, bene mamleawo hã navɔ̃." 
1Timothy5:21 Mele atam kam na wò le Mawu kple Kristo Yesu kpakple mawudɔla tiatiawo ŋku me bena, nalé nusiawo me de asi, eye amea ɖewo ƒe nu naganyo ŋuwò awu amea ɖewo o, eye megawɔ naneke alé go ɖeka me awu bubu o." 
1Timothy5:22 Megaɖo asi ame dzi kabakaba o, eye megakpɔ gome le ame bubuwo ƒe nuvɔ̃wo me o. Lé ɖokuiwò dzadzɛ." 
1Timothy5:23 Megano tsi ɖeɖe o, ke boŋ no wein via ɖe le wò dɔgbo kple lãmegbegblẽ enuenu la ŋuti." 
1Timothy5:24 Amea ɖewo ƒe nuvɔ̃wo dze ƒã hedze wo ŋgɔ yi ɖe ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ me, ke amea ɖewo hã li, siwo ƒe nuvɔ̃wo dze wo yome." 
1Timothy5:25 Nenema ke dɔwɔwɔ nyuiwo hã li, siwo dze ƒã, eye esiwo to vovo la, womate ŋu aɣla wo o." 
1Timothy6:1 Ame alesi nu le dɔlanyenye ƒe kɔkuti te la, nabu woa ŋutɔwo ƒe aƒetɔwo be, wodze bubu katã, bena woagagblɔ busunya de Mawu ƒe ŋkɔ kple nufiafia la ŋuti o." 
1Timothy6:2 Ke amesiwo si aƒetɔ xɔsetɔwo le la, womagaɖo vlo wo, le esi wonye nɔviwo la ŋuti o, ke boŋ woasubɔ wo vevie wu; elabena amesiwo kpea woƒe dɔ nyui wɔwɔ ƒe viɖe la, wonye xɔsetɔwo kple lɔlɔ̃tɔwo." 
1Timothy6:3 Fia nusiawo, eye nanɔ nuxɔxlɔ̃ dzi! Ne amea de fia nu bubu, eye meléna de Aƒetɔ Yesu Kristo ƒe nya, siwo le blibo, kple nufiafia, si le mawusubɔsubɔ nu la, nu o la," 
1Timothy6:4 edoa eɖokui de dzi glodzo, eye menya naneke o, ke boŋ eléa anukutsyɔtsyɔwo kple nyaʋawɔwɔ ƒe do, eye nusiawo hea ŋuʋaʋã, dzrewɔwɔ, busunyagbɔgblɔ, nya vɔ̃ susu de ame ŋuti" 
1Timothy6:5 kple nyahehe dzodzro vɛ le ame tamegbegblẽtɔ, siwo si woha nyateƒe le amesiwo buna bena, mawusubɔsubɔ enye viɖenu la dome. Te ɖokuiwò ɖa le nenem me siawo gbɔ." 
1Timothy6:6 Ke mawusosroɖa kpakple ŋudzedzekpɔkpɔ enye viɖenu gã. 
1Timothy6:7 Elabena míetsɔ naneke va xexe sia me o, eye edze ƒã bena, míate ŋu atso naneke ayii hã o;" 
1Timothy6:8 ke ne nunyiame kple avɔtata le mía si la, mina nusiawo nasɔ gbɔ na mí." 
1Timothy6:9 Ke amesiwo ɖina be, yewoayi kesinɔtɔwo la, gena ɖe tetekpɔwo kple mɔ̃tetrewo kpakple movidzɔdzɔ kple nuveviwɔame ƒe nudzodzro geɖe, siwo tsoa amewo xlãna ɖe gbegblẽ kple tsɔtsrɔ̃ me la me." 
1Timothy6:10 Elabena nuvɔ̃wo katã ƒe ke enye galɔlɔ̃, si yome mɔ amea ɖewo ɖi, eye wotre mɔ tso xɔse la gbɔ, eye wotsɔ nuxaxa geɖe ŋɔ wo ɖokui flofloflo." 
1Timothy6:11 Ke wò la, oo Mawu ƒe ame, si le nusiawo nu; ke dze dzɔdzɔenyenye, mawusosroɖa, dzixɔse, lɔlɔ̃, dziɖoɖo, dɔmefafa yome." 
1Timothy6:12 Ʋli xɔse ƒe ʋiʋli nyui la; wò asi nasu agbe mavɔ, si ta woyɔ wò ɖo, eye nèʋu emeʋuʋu nyui le ɖaseɖila geɖewo ƒe ŋku me la dzi." 
1Timothy6:13 Mele se ɖem na wò le Mawu, si gbɔa agbe nuwo katã, kple Kristo Yesu, si ɖi emeʋuʋu nyui ƒe ɖase le Pontio Pilato gbɔ la, ƒe ŋku me" 
1Timothy6:14 be, nalé sedede sia ɖe asi kpɔtsotso kple mokaka manɔŋui yiɖase mía Aƒetɔ Yesu Kristo ƒe ɖeɖefia la dzi," 
1Timothy6:15 esi dziɖula yayratɔ ɖeka, fiawo dzi fia, aƒetɔwo dzi Aƒetɔ la aɖe fia le ye ŋutɔ ƒe azãgbe la dzi," 
1Timothy6:16 amesi ko si makumakunyenye le, amesi nɔa anyi le kekeli, si ŋu womate ŋu ate ɖo o la me, amesi amea ɖeke mekpɔ kpɔ o, eye mate ŋu akpɔe hã o, amesi tɔ lanye bubu kple ŋusẽ mavɔmavɔ! Amen." 
1Timothy6:17 De se na xexe sia me kesinɔtɔwo bena, woagado wo ɖokui ɖe dzi glodzo o, eye womagatsɔ woƒe mɔkpɔkpɔ aɖo kesinɔnuwo ƒe dediemanɔmanɔ dzi o; ke boŋ ɖe Mawu gbagbe, si tsɔ nuwo katã na mí fũ be, míawɔ wo ŋuti do la dzi;" 
1Timothy6:18 bene woawɔ dɔmenyo, eye woanye kesinɔtɔwo le nu nyui wɔwɔ me, woalɔ̃ nunana ame, woalɔ̃ hadede," 
1Timothy6:19 eye woaƒo kesinɔnuwo nu ƒu na wo ɖokui, si anye gɔmeɖoɖoanyi nyui hena ɣeyiɣi si gbɔna, bene woƒe asi nasu agbe vavã la dzi." 
1Timothy6:20 Oo, Timoteo! Dzra nusi wode asi na wò la ɖo; gbe dzeɖoɖo ƒuƒlu makɔmakɔwo kple aʋatsosidzedze ƒe nudadafiafia," 
1Timothy6:21 si me amea ɖewo ʋu, eye wogatre mɔ tso xɔse la gbɔ. Amenuveve nanɔ anyi kpli wò!" 
2Timothy1:1 Paulo, Kristo Yesu ƒe apostolo to Mawu ƒe lɔlɔ̃nu me, le agbe ƒe ŋugbedodo, si le Kristo Yesu me la nu," 
2Timothy1:2 ŋlɔ ɖo ɖe Timoteo, vinye lɔlɔ̃tɔ: Amenuveve kple nublanuikpɔkpɔ kple ŋutifafa, si tso Mawu, Fofo la, kple Kristo Yesu, mía Aƒetɔ gbɔ la, woana wò!" 
2Timothy1:3 Meda akpe na Mawu, amesi mesubɔna, abe alesi menyae, tso tɔgbuitɔgbuinyewo gbɔ ene le dzitsinya dzadzɛ me, abe alesi nyemedzudzɔa ŋkuɖoɖo dziwò le nye kukuɖeɖewo me zã kple keli o ene —" 
2Timothy1:4 ne medo ŋku wò aɖatsiwo dzi la, edzroam be, makpɔ wò, bene dzidzo nayɔm fũ —" 
2Timothy1:5 esi medo ŋku xɔse alakpa manɔmee, si le mewò, si na mamãwo Loide kple dawò Eunike me gbã la dzi, eye menyae pete be, ele wò hã mewò." 
2Timothy1:6 Eyata mele ŋku dom edzi na wò be, nade dzo Mawu ƒe amenuvevenunana, si le mewo to nye asiɖoɖo dziwò la me." 
2Timothy1:7 Elabena Mawu mena vɔvɔ̃gbɔgbɔ mi o, ke boŋ ŋusẽ-kple lɔlɔ̃-kpakple ɖokuidziɖuɖugbɔgbɔe wòna mí." 
2Timothy1:8 Eyata ŋu nagakpe wò le mia Aƒetɔ ƒe ɖaseɖiɖi kple nye, amesi nye eƒe gatɔ la ŋuti o; ke boŋ kpe fu kple nyanyuie la le Mawu ƒe ŋusẽ la nu," 
2Timothy1:9 amesi ɖe mí, eye wotsɔ yɔyɔ kɔkɔe yɔ mí; menye le míaƒe dɔwɔwɔwo nu o, ke boŋ le ye ŋutɔ ƒe tameɖoɖoɖi kple amenuveve la nu, si wòtsɔ na mi le Kristo Yesu me, hafi ɣeyiɣi mavɔmavɔwo dze gɔme." 
2Timothy1:10 Ke azɔ la woɖee fia to mía xɔla Kristo Yesu ƒe dodo me, amesi ɖe ku ɖa, eye wòhe agbe kple magblẽmagblẽ ɖe go va kekeli nu to nyanyuie la me," 
2Timothy1:11 esi nu woɖom menye gbeƒãɖela kple apostolo kpakple trɔ̃subɔlawo ƒe nufiala," 
2Timothy1:12 nusi ta mekpe nusiawo ƒe fu hã ɖo, ke ŋu mekpem o: elabena menya amesi dzi mexɔ se, eye menyae pete bena, ŋusẽ le esi wòate ŋu adzra nusi wode asi nam la ɖo hena ŋkeke ma." 
2Timothy1:13 Lé nya, siwo le blibo, siwo nèse le nunye la ƒe kpɔɖeŋu me ɖe asi le xɔse kple lɔlɔ̃, si le Kristo Yesu me la me." 
2Timothy1:14 Dzra nu nyui, si wode asi na wò la ɖo to Gbɔgbɔ kɔkɔe, si nɔa mía me la me." 
2Timothy1:15 Enya esia bena, amesiwo katã le Asia la trɔ dzo le yonyeme, amesiwo dome Figelo kple Hermogene wole." 
2Timothy1:16 Aƒetɔ la nakpɔ nublanui na Onesiforo ƒe aƒe la; elabena ena nye dzi gbɔ ɖe eme enuenu, eye ŋu mekpenɛ le nye kɔsɔkɔsɔwo ŋuti o;" 
2Timothy1:17 ke boŋ, esime wòva Roma la, edim vevie ŋuta, eye wòkpɔm." 
2Timothy1:18 Aƒetɔ la naɖi nɛ, be wòakpɔ nublanuikpɔkpɔ le Aƒetɔ la gbɔ le ŋkeke ma dzi; eye subɔsubɔdɔ geɖe, siwo wòwɔ le Efeso la, wò la ènyae petepete." 
2Timothy2:1 Azɔ wò la, vinye, sẽ ŋu le amenuveve, si le Kristo Yesu me la me," 
2Timothy2:2 eye nusiwo nèse tso gbɔnye le ɖaseɖila geɖewo dome la, nu mawo ke natsɔ ade asi na ame wɔnuteƒewo, amesiwo ate ŋu afia nu ame bubuwo hã." 
2Timothy2:3 Azɔ wò la, do dzi le fukpekpe me abe Yesu Kristo ƒe aʋawɔla nyui ene." 
2Timothy2:4 Amea ɖeke menɔa aʋa wɔm so gatsɔa eɖokui dea nuɖuɖudɔwɔwɔwo me o, bene wòadze amesi tsɔ aʋae la ŋu." 
2Timothy2:5 Ke ne amea ɖe le kame tem hã la, womaɖɔ dziɖuɖukuku nɛ o, negbe ɖeko wòate kame le se la nu hafi." 
2Timothy2:6 Agbledela, si dzea agbagba la, ele nɛ be, wòatre kutsetse la ƒe ɖe ɖuɖu." 
2Timothy2:7 Bu nusi gblɔm mele la me kpɔ; elabena Aƒetɔ la ana gɔmesese wò le nuwo katã me. 
2Timothy2:8 Ɖo ŋku Yesu Kristo, tsi tsi tre tso ame kukuwo dome, amesi tso Dawid ƒe ƒome me le nye nyanyuie nu la dzi," 
2Timothy2:9 nusi ŋuti mekpe fu ɖo yiɖase bablawo me, abe nuvɔ̃wɔla ene; gake womebu mawunya la o." 
2Timothy2:10 Eyata medoa dzi le nuwo katã me ɖe ame tiatiawo ta, bene woawo hã ƒe asi nasu xɔxɔ, si le Kristo Yesu me, kple ŋutikɔkɔe mavɔmavɔ la dzi." 
2Timothy2:11 Nyateƒenya wònye: Ne míeku kpakplii la, míanɔ agbe hã kpakplim," 
2Timothy2:12 ne miedo dzi la, míaɖu fia hã kpakplii; ne miegbe nu le egbɔ la, eyama hã lagbe nu le mia gbɔ;" 
2Timothy2:13 ne míenye nuteƒewɔlawo o la, eyama lanɔ anyi nuteƒewɔla; elabena mate ŋu agbe nu le eɖokui gbɔ o." 
2Timothy2:14 Ɖo ŋu nusiawo na wo, eye naɖi ɖase na wo le Aƒetɔ la ŋku me, bene womagatsɔ nya awɔ dzre, si me viɖea ɖeke mele o la o, ke boŋ woblua nyaselawo ƒe tame." 
2Timothy2:15 Do vevie be, natsɔ ɖokuiwò afia Mawu abe ame like kple dɔwɔla, si mehiã be, ŋu nakpee o, kpakple amesi ma nyateƒenya la me pɛpɛpɛ ene." 
2Timothy2:16 Ke si le dzeɖoɖo ƒuƒlu makɔmakɔwo nu; elabena woayi dzi geɖe wu le mawumavɔ̃mavɔ̃ me," 
2Timothy2:17 eye woƒe nya la keke ɖe dzi abe abi vɔ̃ ene, amesiwo dome Himenaio kple Fileto wole," 
2Timothy2:18 amesiwo tre mɔ tso nyateƒe la gbɔ hele gbɔgblɔm bena, tsitretsitsi va yi xoxo, eye wotrɔa amea ɖewo ƒe xɔse tsyɔa anyi." 
2Timothy2:19 Gake la Mawu ƒe gɔmeɖoɖoanyi sesẽ la lia ke, eye nutrenu sia li nɛ. Aƒetɔ la nya amesiwo nye etɔwo, eye amesiame, si yɔa Aƒetɔ ƒe ŋkɔ la, nate ɖa le madzɔmadzɔnyenye gbɔ." 
2Timothy2:20 Ke le aƒe gã me la menye sikanuwo kple klosalonuwo ɖeɖekoe nane o, ke boŋ atinuwo kple anyinuwo hã nɔnɛ, ɖewo li bubu le wo ŋu, ɖewo li bubu mele wo ŋu o." 
2Timothy2:21 Eyata ne amea ɖe klɔ eɖokui keŋ tso nu mawo me la, anye goe, si ŋu bubu le, si ŋuti kɔ, si nyo na aƒeatɔ ƒe ŋuɖɔwɔwɔ, si wodzra ɖo ɖi hena dɔ nyui sia dɔ nyui wɔwɔ." 
2Timothy2:22 Si le ɖekakpuinyenye ƒe nudzodzrowo nu; ke dze dzɔdzɔenyenye, xɔse, lɔlɔ̃ kple ŋutifafa yome hekpe de amesiwo katã yɔ Aƒetɔ la le dzi dzadzɛ me la ŋu." 
2Timothy2:23 Ke gbe bometsitsi ƒe yakanukutsyɔtsyɔwo, elabena ènyae bena, wòhea dzre ko vɛ." 
2Timothy2:24 Ke ele na Aƒetɔ la ƒe subɔla be, wòagawɔ dzre o, ke boŋ wòanye amesi nyoa dɔme na amewo katã, amesi tea ŋu fiãa nu, amesi doa dzi le vɔ̃ me," 
2Timothy2:25 amesi gbea nya le dzigbɔɖeanyi me na amesiwo tsia tre ɖe mawunya ŋu, ɖewo Mawu ana dzimetɔtrɔ wo, bene woadze si nyateƒe la," 
2Timothy2:26 eye woaganyɔ̃ avo atso Abosam, si lé wo aboyo, bene woawɔ eƒe lɔlɔ̃nu la ƒe mɔ me mahĩ." 
2Timothy3:1 Ke nya esia bena, le ŋkeke mamleawo me la ɣeyiɣi vɔ̃wo lava." 
2Timothy3:2 Elabena ameawo lanye ɖokuilɔ̃lawo, galɔ̃lawo, adegbe ƒuƒlu ƒolawo, dadalawo, busunyagblɔlawo, ame maɖoto dzilawo, ame madakpewo kple ame makɔmakɔwo;" 
2Timothy3:3 amesiwo melɔ̃a ame ƒe nya o, amesiwo gbea avuléle, ameŋuzɔlawo, amesiwo mete ŋu ɖua wo ɖokui dzi o, ame wɔadãwo, amesiwo melɔ̃a nu nyui o," 
2Timothy3:4 yomemɔfialawo, ame mabunuwo, amesiwo doa wo ɖokui ɖe dzi glodzo, amesiwo lɔ̃a hadzedze wu esi woalɔ̃ Mawu," 
2Timothy3:5 amesiwo si mawusosroɖa ƒe nɔnɔme le, gake wogbe eƒe ŋusẽ la. Te ɖokuiwò ɖa tso amesiawo gbɔ!" 
2Timothy3:6 Elabena amesiawo dome amea ɖewo li, siwo gena ɖe aƒewo me dzaa, eye woɖea aboyo nyɔnu abunetɔ, siwo yɔ fũ kple nuvɔ̃wɔwɔ, eye nudzodzro bubu ƒomevi geɖewo kplɔa wo yinɛ," 
2Timothy3:7 amesiwo srɔ̃a nu ɖaa, eye womate ŋu ava nyateƒe ƒe sidzedze la gbɔ akpɔ o." 
2Timothy3:8 Alesi Yane kple Yambre wotsi tre ɖe Mose ŋuti la, nenema ke woawo hã wotsi tre ɖe nyateƒe la ŋuti; Ame tamegbegblẽtɔwo, amesiwo meli ke le xɔse me o." 
2Timothy3:9 Ke womayi dzi geɖe wu o, elabena woƒe aɖaʋadzedze la dze ƒã na amewo katã, abe ame mawo tɔ ke hã ene." 
2Timothy3:10 Ke wò la èdze nye nufiafia, nye agbenɔnɔ, nye tameɖoɖo, nye xɔse, nye dzigbɔgbɔ blewu, nye lɔlɔ̃, nye dzidodo," 
2Timothy3:11 nye yometitiwo kple nye fukpekpe, siwo mekpe le Antioxia kple Ikonio kple Listra la yome; yometiti ma, siwo medo dzi kpe la, Aƒetɔ la ɖem tso wo katã me." 
2Timothy3:12 Ke amesiwo katã ɖina be, yewoanɔ agbe ɖe mawusosroɖa nu le Kristo Yesu me la, woati woawo hã yome tsã." 
2Timothy3:13 Ke ame vɔ̃ɖiwo kple ameblelawo la woayi dzi vɔ̃ɖitɔe wu anɔ amewo blem, eye amewo able wo." 
2Timothy3:14 Ke wò la nɔ nusiwo nesrɔ̃, eye nèkpɔ kakaɖedzi le wo me la me; elabena ènya amesiwo gbɔ nèsrɔ̃e le," 
2Timothy3:15 eye esi tso ɖevime ke nènya ŋɔŋlɔ kɔkɔeawo la, woate ŋu ana nunya wò hena agbexɔxɔ to xɔse, si le Kristo Yesu me la me." 
2Timothy3:16 Ŋɔŋlɔ sia ŋɔŋlɔ, si tso Mawu ƒe Gbɔgbɔ me la, enyo hã na nufiafia, na mokaka, na ɖɔɖɔɖo, na amehehe, si le dzɔdzɔenyenye me," 
2Timothy3:17 bene Mawu ƒe ame la nade blibo, eye wòanɔ dzadzraɖoɖi hena dɔ nyui sia dɔ nyui wɔwɔ." 
2Timothy4:1 Mele atam kam na wò, le Mawu kple Yesu Kristo, amesi le ʋɔnu drɔ̃ ge ame gbagbewo kple ame kukuwo le eƒe ɖeɖefia kple fiaɖuƒe me la, ƒe ŋku me:" 
2Timothy4:2 Ɖe gbe ƒã nya la, nɔ edzi, vovoɣi li alo vovoɣi meli o, ka mo, gbe nya, xlɔ̃ nu le dzigbɔɖeanyi kple nufiafia katã me." 
2Timothy4:3 Elabena ɣeyiɣi le vava ge, esime womaxɔ nufiafia, si le blibo la o; ke boŋ, le alesi tome fiẽ wo nu la, woaƒo nufialawo nu ƒu na wo ɖokui le woa ŋutɔwo ƒe nudzodzrowo la nu." 
2Timothy4:4 Eye woaɖe to ɖa le nyateƒe la ŋuti, eye woatrɔ ayi gliwo gbɔ." 
2Timothy4:5 Ke wò la nɔ mo xexi le nuwo katã me, do dzi le fukpekpewo me, wɔ nyanyuiegblɔla ƒe do, eye nawu wò subɔsubɔdɔ la nu blibo." 
2Timothy4:6 Elabena nye la wotsɔm le memem xoxo, eye nye dzodzoɣi la gogo." 
2Timothy4:7 Ʋiʋli nyui lae meʋli; mewu nye mɔzɔzɔ la nu, melé xɔse la me ɖe asi." 
2Timothy4:8 Tso ekema dzi la wodzra dzɔdzɔenyenye ƒe dziɖuɖukuku la ɖo ɖi nam, si Aƒetɔ, ʋɔnudrɔ̃la dzɔdzɔe la, lanam le ŋkeke ma dzi; ke menye nye ɖeɖekoe o, ke boŋ amesiwo katã lɔ̃ eƒe ɖeɖefia la hãe." 
2Timothy4:9 Do vevie be, nava gbɔnye kaba." 
2Timothy4:10 Elabena Dema gblẽm tii, le esi wògalɔ̃ fifi xexe sia me la ŋuti, eye wòyi ele Tesalonika; Kreske yi de Galatia, Tito yi de Dalmatia." 
2Timothy4:11 Luka ɖeɖekoe li kplim. Xo Marko, eye nakplɔe de asi ve; elabena enye kpedeŋutɔ nyui nam le subɔsubɔ gome" 
2Timothy4:11 Luka ɖeɖekoe li kplim. Xo Marko, eye nakplɔe de asi ve; elabena enye kpedeŋutɔ nyui nam le subɔsubɔ gome" 
2Timothy4:12 Ke Tixiko ta meɖoe ɖe Efeso. 
2Timothy4:13 Ne egbɔna la, tsɔ awu ʋlaya, si megblẽ ɖe Troa ɖe Karpo gbɔ la, kple agbalẽawo ɖe asi vɛ, vevietɔ lãgbalẽ la." 
2Timothy4:14 Aleksandro, akɔblitula, wɔ vɔ̃ geɖe ɖe ŋunye; Aƒetɔ la aɖo eteƒe ne le eƒe nuwɔnawo nu;" 
2Timothy4:15 wò hã kpɔ ɖokuiwò dzi nyuie le eyama ŋuti; elabena etsi tre ɖe míaƒe nyawo ŋuti ŋutɔ. 
2Timothy4:16 Le ɖokuinye nuɖeɖe gbãtɔ me la amea ɖeke mede dzinye o, ke boŋ wo katã wogblẽm ɖi. Womagabu esia na wo o." 
2Timothy4:17 Ke Aƒetɔ la tsi tre ɖe gbɔnye, eye wòdo ŋusẽm, bena mawu gbeƒãɖeɖe la nu, eye trɔ̃subɔlawo katã nasee, eye wòɖem le dzata ƒe nu me." 
2Timothy4:18 Eye Aƒetɔ la aɖem le nuwɔwɔ vɔ̃wo katã me, eye wòaxɔm heyi ɖe eƒe dziƒofiaɖuƒe la me; eya tɔ lanye ŋutikɔkɔe tso mavɔ me yi ɖe mavɔ me! Amen." 
2Timothy4:19 Ɖuɖɔ Priska kple Akwila kpakple Onesiforo ƒe aƒe la nam ƒã. 
2Timothy4:20 Erasto nɔ Korinto, Trofimo la, megblẽe ɖe Mileto wòle dɔ lém." 
2Timothy4:21 Do vevie be, nava, hafi ne vuvɔŋɔli naɖo. Eubulo kple Pude kple Lino kple Klaudia kpakple nɔviwo katã ɖuɖɔ wò ƒã." 
2Timothy4:22 Aƒetɔ Yesu Kristo nanɔ anyi kple wò gbɔgbɔ la! Amenuveve nanɔ anyi kpli mi! 
Titus1:1 Paulo, Mawu ƒe dɔla kple Yesu Kristo ƒe apostolo le Mawu ƒe ame tiatiawo ƒe xɔse kple nyateƒe ƒe sidzedze, si le mawusosroɖa me la nu," 
Titus1:2 ɖe agbe mava ƒe nukpɔkpɔ ŋu, si Mawu, amesi meka aʋatso o la, do ŋugbe, hafi ɣeyiɣi mavɔmavɔwo dze gɔme;" 
Titus1:3 ke eɖe eƒe nya la fia le ye ŋutɔ ƒe azãgbe la dzi le gbeƒãɖeɖe, si wòtsɔ de asi nam la me, le Mawu, mía xɔla ƒe sedede la nu," 
Titus1:4 ŋlɔ ɖo ɖe Tito, vinye vavã le mí ame eve ƒe xɔse la nu: Amenuveve kple nublanuikpɔkpɔ kple ŋutifafa, si tso Mawu, Fofo la, kple Aƒetɔ Yesu Kristo, mía xɔla gbɔ la, woana wò!" 
Titus1:5 Eyata megblẽ wò ɖe Kreta, bena naɖo nusiwo susɔ la teƒeteƒe, eye naɖo hamemegãwo le du sia du me, abe alesi mede se na wò la ene:" 
Titus1:6 Amesi ke nye mokaka manɔŋutɔ, nyɔnu ɖeka srɔ̃, amesi si vi xɔsetɔ, siwo nu wometso be, wòwɔa nu vlo alo womeɖoa to o la le." 
Titus1:7 Elabena ele na dzikpɔla bena, wòanye mokaka manɔŋutɔ, abe Mawu ƒe xɔnuvi ene; Wòaganye ɖokuiŋudzela o, wòaganye dɔmedzoetɔ o, wòaganye aha geɖe nola o, wòaganye ameƒola o, wòagaɖi viɖe ƒoɖi o;" 
Titus1:8 ke boŋ wòanye amedzrowɔla, nunyuilɔ̃la, ame ɖɔŋuɖo, dzɔdzɔetɔ, kɔkɔetɔ kple ɖokuidziɖula," 
Titus1:9 amesi léa nyateƒenya la me ɖe asi le nufiafia la nu, bena wòate ŋu axlɔ̃ nu le nufiafia, si le blibo la me, eye woaka mo na ɖeklemiɖelawo." 
Titus1:10 Elabena tosẽla geɖewo kple nya dzodzro gblɔlawo kple ameblelawo li, vevietɔ le aʋatsotsotɔwo dome," 
Titus1:11 amesiwo nu wòle be, woatsi nya ɖo, amesiwo trɔ ƒome blibo geɖewo ƒe tame hele nu dzodzrowo fiãm le viɖe ƒoɖi ta." 
Titus1:12 Wo dometɔ ɖeka, si nye woa ŋutɔwo ƒe nyagblɔɖila la, gblɔ be: „Kretatɔwo nye aʋatsokalawo ɖaa, lã vɔ̃ɖiwo, ƒodo wɔkuviawo.“" 
Titus1:13 Ɖaseɖiɖi sia nye nyateƒe; le esia ta ka mo na wo vevie, bene woanɔ blibo le xɔse me," 
Titus1:14 bene womagaɖo to Yudatɔwo ƒe gliwo kple amesiwo trɔ tso nyateƒe gbɔ la ƒe sededeawo o. 
Titus1:15 Nuwo katã le dzadzɛ na ame dzadzɛwo; ke ame ƒoɖiwo kple dzimaxɔsetɔwo la, naneke mele dzadzɛ na wo o, ke boŋ woƒe tame kple woƒe dzitsinya siaa ƒo ɖi." 
Titus1:16 Woʋua eme bena, yewonya Mawu, ke wotsɔ woƒe nuwɔnawo gbe nu le egbɔ; wonye ame nyɔŋuwo kple tosẽlawo kple amesiwo medze dɔ nyui wòwɔa ɖeke kura o." 
Titus2:1 Ke wò la gblɔ nusiwo dze nufiafia, si le blibo," 
Titus2:2 bena ame tsitsiwo nanye ɖokuidziɖulawo, ɖokuiléla nyuiwo, ame ɖɔŋuɖowo, eye woanɔ blibo le xɔse, lɔlɔ̃ kple dzidodo me." 
Titus2:3 Nenema ke nyɔnu tsitsiwo hã nanɔ anyi, abe alesi wòdze nyɔnu kɔkɔewo ene: Wòaganye ameŋuzɔlawo o, wòaganye aha geɖe nola wo o; ke boŋ woanye nu nyui fialawo," 
Titus2:4 bene woaxlɔ̃ nu ɖetugbiwo, ne woalɔ̃ wo srɔ̃wo kple wo viwo," 
Titus2:5 woanye ɖokuidziɖulawo, ame dzadzɛwo, aƒe me dɔwɔlawo, dɔmenyotɔwo, eye woabɔbɔ wo ɖokui na woa ŋutɔ wo srɔ̃wo, bena woagagblɔ busunya ɖe mawunya la ŋuti o." 
Titus2:6 Nenema ke xlɔ̃ nu ɖekakpuiwo hã be, woaɖu wo ɖokui dzi nyuie." 
Titus2:7 Le nuwo katã me la tsɔ ɖokuiwò ɖo kpɔɖeŋu le do nyui wɔwɔwo me, megabaɖa nufiafia la o, lé ɖokuiwò nyuie," 
Titus2:8 wò nyagbɔgblɔ nana blibo, si womate ŋu abu fɔ o, bena ŋu nakpe amesi tsi tre ɖe eŋuti, le esi nyaa ɖeke mele esi be, wòagblɔ vɔ̃ ɖe mía ŋuti o la ta." 
Titus2:9 Xlã nu dolawo bena, woabɔbɔ wo ɖokui na woa ŋutɔwo ƒe aƒetɔwo, be wòadze wo ŋu le nusianu me: Wòaganye ɖeklemiɖelawo o," 
Titus2:10 womagafi naneke aɣla o; ke boŋ woaɖe nuteƒewɔwɔ nyui katã afia, bene woaɖo atsyɔ̃ na Mawu, mía xɔla ƒe nufiafia la le nuwo katã me." 
Titus2:11 Elabena Mawu ƒe amenuveve la ɖe eɖokui fia hetso xoxo vɛ na amewo katã," 
Titus2:12 eye wòɖea mí, bena míagbe mawumavɔ̃mavɔ̃ kple xexeame nudzodzrowo, eye míano anyi le ɖokuidziɖuɖu kple nu dzɔdzɔe wɔwɔ kpakple mawusosroɖa me le xexe sia me," 
Titus2:13 eye mianɔ yayramɔkpɔkpɔ kple Mawu gã la kple mía xɔla Yesu Kristo ƒe ŋutikɔkɔe ƒe ɖeɖefia la lalam," 
Titus2:14 amesi tso eɖokui hena ɖe mía ta, bene yeaxe fe ɖe mia ta axɔ mí atso sedzimawɔmawɔ katã me, eye bene yeaklɔ dukɔ, si doa vevie le dɔ nyui wɔwɔ me la ŋuti hena ye ŋutɔ ɖokui!" 
Titus2:15 Gblɔ nusiawo, eye naxlɔ̃ nu, eye naka mo kple ŋusẽ katã! Megana amea ɖeke nado vlo wò o!" 
Titus3:1 Ɖo ŋu nusiawo na wo bena, woabɔbɔ wo ɖokui na dziɖulowo kple ŋusẽwo, eye woaɖo to wo, eye woasu te hena do nyui sia do nyui wɔwɔ:" 
Titus3:2 Woagagblɔ busunya ɖe amea ɖeke ŋuti o, wòaganye dzrehelawo o; woanye ame fetuwo, woatsɔ dɔmefafa katã afia amewo katã." 
Titus3:3 Elabena tsã la miawo hã míenye ame manyanuwo, tosẽlawo, mɔtrelawo, nu dzodzro kple dzidzɔkpɔkpɔ bubu ƒomevi geɖewo ƒe subɔlawo, vɔ̃ɖiwɔwɔ kple ŋuʋaʋã me nɔlawo, ame nyɔŋuwo kple amesiwo léa fu wo nɔewo." 
Titus3:4 Ke esime Mawu, mía xɔla ƒe dɔmenyonyo kple amelɔlɔ̃ do la," 
Titus3:5 exɔ mi ɖe agbe; menye le dzɔdzɔenyenye ƒe dɔ, si miawo miewɔ la ta o, ke boŋ exɔ mí le eƒe nublanuikpɔkpɔ la nu to gbugbɔgadzi ƒe tsilele kple Gbɔgbɔ kɔkɔe ƒe yeye wɔwɔ la me," 
Titus3:6 si wòkɔ ɖe mía dzi fũ ŋutɔ to Yesu Kristo, mía xɔla la dzi," 
Titus3:7 bena mí amesiwo wotso afia na to eƒe amenuveve me la, míazu agbe mavɔ ƒe domenyilawo le nukpɔkpɔ la nu." 
Titus3:8 Nyateƒenya wònye, eye mele ɖiɖim be, wò la naka ɖe nusiawo dzi, bena amesiwo xɔ Mawu dzi se la, nado vevie anɔ dɔ nyui wɔwɔwo dzi. Nusiawo nyo, eye wonye viɖenu na amewo." 
Titus3:9 Ke si le bometsitsi ƒe anukutsyɔtsyɔwo kple dzidzimenyawo kple dzrehehewo kpakple avuwɔwɔwo le sea ŋuti la nu; elabena womenyo na naneke o, eye wonye yakanuwo." 
Titus3:10 Ne èxlɔ̃ nu kɔmamãwɔlaa ɖe zi ɖeka alo zi eve la, nagbee;" 
Titus3:11 elabena anyae be, amesia tɔgbe gblẽ keŋ, eye wòwɔa nuvɔ̃ hebua fɔ eɖokui." 
Titus3:12 Ne medɔ Artema alo Tixiko de gbɔwò la, do vevie be, nava gbɔnye le Nikopoli; elabena meɖoe bena, manɔ afima le vuvɔŋɔli." 
Titus3:13 Do mɔ sefiala Zena kple Apolo nyuie, bena naneke nagahiã wo o." 
Titus3:14 Ke na mia tɔwo hã nasrɔ̃ dɔ nyui wɔwɔwo dzinɔnɔ hena nu vevi, siwo hiã ame la, bene woagatsi ku matsematse o." 
Titus3:15 Amesiwo katã le gbɔnye la, ɖuɖɔ wò ƒã. Ɖuɖɔ amesiwo katã lɔ̃a mí le xɔse me la nam ƒã. Amenuveve nanɔ anyi kpli mi katã!" 
Philemon1:1 Paulo, Kristo Yesu ƒe gatɔ, kple nɔvi Timoteo woŋlɔ ɖo ɖe Filemon, mía lɔlɔ̃tɔ kple hadɔwɔla," 
Philemon1:2 kple Apia, mia nɔvinyɔnu, kple Arxipo, mía hadɔwɔla, kpakple hame, si le aƒewò me:" 
Philemon1:3 Amenuveve kple ŋutifafa, si tso Mawu, mía Fofo, kple Aƒetɔ Yesu Kristo gbɔ la, woana mi!" 
Philemon1:4 Meda akpe na Mawunye ɖaasi, ne meɖoa ŋku dziwò le nye gbedodoɖawo me," 
Philemon1:5 esi mesena le wò lɔlɔ̃ kple nuteƒewɔwɔ, si le asiwò hena Aƒetɔ Yesu kple ame kɔkɔewo katã la ŋuti," 
Philemon1:6 bene wò nuteƒewɔwɔ ƒe hadede nasẽ ŋu hena Kristo Yesu to nu nyui sia nu nyui, si le mía me la sidzedze me?" 
Philemon1:7 Elabena, nɔvi, miekpɔ dzidzɔ geɖe kple akɔfafa le wò lɔlɔ̃ la ŋuti, le esi ame kɔkɔewo ƒe dziwo kpɔ gbɔɖeme to dziwò la ta." 
Philemon1:8 Eyata wònye dzideƒo geɖe le asinye le Kristo me be, made se na wò le nusi dze la ŋuti hafi, gake le lɔlɔ̃ ta la mele nu xlɔ̃m wò boŋ." 
Philemon1:9 Esi menye amesia tɔgbe la, nye Paulo tsitsi, si nye Kristo Yesu ƒe gatɔ hã azɔ la," 
Philemon1:10 mele kuku dem na wò de vinye Onesimo, si medzi le nye bablawo me la ta," 
Philemon1:11 amesi menye viɖea ɖeke na wò tsã o; ke azɔ la enye viɖe nyui na wò kple nye hã; 
Philemon1:12 amesi megbugbɔ le ɖoɖom ɖe wò la. Wò la xɔ eyama, eyae nye nye ŋutɔ nye dzi," 
Philemon1:13 amesi medi be, wòanɔ gbɔnye, bena wòasubɔm de tewòƒe le nyanyuie ƒe bablawo me hafi;" 
Philemon1:14 gake esi nyemenya wò lɔlɔ̃nu o la, nyemedi be, mawɔ naneke o, bena wò nyuiwɔwɔ la nagato dzizizi me o, ke boŋ wòato lɔlɔ̃nu faa me." 
Philemon1:15 Elabena ɖewohĩ esia ŋuti wòdzo le gbɔwò ɣeyiɣi kpuia ɖe, bena wòanɔ gbɔwò tegbetegbe;" 
Philemon1:16 megale abe kluvi ene o, ke boŋ wu kluvi la, ele abe nɔvi lɔlɔ̃ ene, vevietɔ na nye, ke aleke geɖe wu wònyee na wò le ŋutilã me kple Aƒetɔ la me siaa?" 
Philemon1:17 Ke azɔ la, ne èbum wò hadela la, xɔe abe nye ŋutɔ ene." 
Philemon1:18 Ke ne ewo vɔ̃a ɖe ɖe ŋuwò, alo wònyi fea ɖe le asiwò la, bui nam." 
Philemon1:19 Nye Paulo ŋutɔe tsɔ nye asi ŋlɔe, maxe fea; nyemelɔ̃ be, magblɔ na wò bena, wò ŋutɔ ɖokuiwò gɔ̃ hã ƒe fe nènyi le asinye o." 
Philemon1:20 Ẽ, nɔvi, na nye la makpɔ viɖe tso gbɔwò le Aƒetɔ la me; na nye dzi nagbɔ ɖe eme le Kristo me!" 
Philemon1:21 Esi meɖo dzi ɖe wò toɖoɖo ŋu ŋuti la, mèŋlɔe na wò; elabena menyae bena, awɔe woagbã dzi wu alesi megblɔ na wò." 
Philemon1:22 Ke dzra dzeƒe ɖo ɖi na nye hã; elabena mele mɔ kpɔm bena, to miaƒe gbedodoɖawo me la woatsɔm ake mi." 
Philemon1:23 Epafra, hanyegatɔ le Kristo Yesu me," 
Philemon1:24 kple Marko kple Aristarxo kple Dema kpakple Luka, hanyedɔwɔlawo, ɖuɖɔ mi ƒã." 
Philemon1:24 kple Marko kple Aristarxo kple Dema kpakple Luka, hanyedɔwɔlawo, ɖuɖɔ mi ƒã." 
Philemon1:25 Mía Aƒetɔ Yesu Kristo ƒe amenuveve nanɔ anyi kple miaƒe gbɔgbɔ la! 
Hebrews1:1 Esime Mawu ƒo nu na fofoawo le blemaŋɔli to nyagblɔɖilawo dzi zi geɖewo le nya ƒomevi geɖewo me la, eƒo nu kple miawo hã le ŋkeke mamletɔ siawo me le Via me," 
Hebrews1:2 amesi wòɖo nuwo katã ƒe domenyila, amesi hã dzi wòto wɔ xexeame," 
Hebrews1:3 amesi nye teƒe ŋutikɔkɔe ƒe keklẽ kple eƒe mawunyenye ƒe nɔnɔme, eye wòtsɔa eƒe ŋusẽ ƒe nya léa nuwo katã ɖe asi: eye esi wòwu miaƒe nuvɔ̃wo ƒe kɔklɔɖa nu va la, ebɔbɔ nɔ anyi ɖe gãnyenye ƒe nuɖusi me le dziƒo;" 
Hebrews1:4 eye zi geɖe alesi wòƒo mawudɔlawo ta le ŋkɔ gã xɔxɔ me la, zi geɖe ma ke wòzu gã wu wo." 
Hebrews1:5 Elabena mawudɔlawo dome ameka wògblɔ na kpo bena: „Vinye nènye, egbea medzi wò“ mahã? Eye wògagblɔ bena: „Nye la manye Fofo nɛ, eye eya hã lanye Vi nam“ mahã?" 
Hebrews1:6 Ke ne egakplɔ ŋgɔgbevi la va xexeame la, egblɔ bena: „Eye Mawu ƒe dɔlawo katã woade ta agu ne.“" 
Hebrews1:7 Eye wògblɔ le mawudɔlawo ŋuti bena: „Etso eƒe dɔlawo wɔ yawo, eye wòtsɔ eƒe subɔlawo wo dzo ƒe aɖewo;“" 
Hebrews1:8 ke egblɔ le Via ŋuti bena: „Mawu, wò fiazikpui nɔa anyi tso mavɔ me yi ɖe mavɔ me, fiatikplɔ dzɔdzɔe enye wò fiaɖuɖu ƒe fiatikplɔ." 
Hebrews1:9 Elɔ̃a dzɔdzɔenyenye, eye nèlea fu madzɔmadzɔnyenye; eyata Mawu, wò Mawu la, tsɔ dzidzɔmi si na wò wu wò hatiwo." 
Hebrews1:10 Aƒetɔ, wòe ɖo anyigba gɔme anyi le gɔmedzedzea me, eye dziƒowo nye wò asinudɔwɔwɔwo." 
Hebrews1:11 Woamawo nu ayi, ke wò la ànɔ anyi ɖaa: eye wo katã anyunyɔ abe avɔ ene," 
Hebrews1:12 eye aɖo li wo woaɖɔ abe awu ene; gake wò la nenema ko nèle, eye wò ƒewo nu metsona o." 
Hebrews1:13 Ke mawudɔlawo dome ameka wògblɔ na kpɔ bena: „Bɔbɔ nɔ nye nuɖusi me, vaseɖe esime matsɔ wò futɔwo awɔ wò afɔɖodzinui“ mahã?" 
Hebrews1:14 Alo wo katã la, ɖe menye subɔsubɔgbɔgbɔwo wonye woɖo ɖa be, woawɔ subɔsubɔdɔ le amesiwo lanyi agbexɔxɔ ƒe dome la ta o mahã?" 
Hebrews2:1 Eyata ele na mí bena, míalé to ɖe nusiwo miese la ŋuti geɖe wu, bene miagato eŋuti ayi o." 
Hebrews2:2 Elabena ne nya, si wogblɔ ɖi to mawudɔlawo dzi la, li dzi sesĩe, eye vodada sia vodada kple tosesẽ sia tosesẽ kpɔ eŋuti fetu vɔ̃, si dze la," 
Hebrews2:3 aleke gɔ̃ míawo míele sisi gee, ne mielé be na ale xɔxɔ gã sia o mahã? Esia ŋutinya Aƒetɔ la gblɔ gbã, eye amesiwo see la, ka de edzi na mi," 
Hebrews2:4 eye Mawu ŋuta hã tsɔ dzesiwo kple nukunuwo kple ŋusẽnu bubu ƒomevi geɖewo kple Gbɔgbɔ kɔkɔe nana le ye ŋutɔ ƒe lɔlɔ̃nu la, ɖi ɖase hekpe ɖe wo ŋuti." 
Hebrews2:5 Elabena metsɔ xexeme, si le vava ge, si ŋuti míeƒoa nu lena la, de mawudɔlawo ƒe ŋusẽ te o." 
Hebrews2:6 Ke amea ɖe ɖi ɖase kɔte le afia ɖe bena: „Nukae nye amegbetɔ bena, nèɖoa ŋku edzi, kple amegbetɔvi be, nèléa ŋku ɖe eŋu?" 
Hebrews2:7 Ebɔbɔe ɖe anyi ɣeyiɣi kpuia ɖe wu mawudɔlawo; ŋutikɔkɔe kple bubu nètso ɖɔ nɛ, eye nètsɔe ɖo wò asinudɔwɔwɔwo katã nu," 
Hebrews2:8 nuwo katã nètsɔ de eƒe afɔ te.“ Elabena le nuwo katã tsɔtsɔ de eƒe afɔ te me la naneke mesusɔ ɖi, si wometsɔ de ete o; gake azɔ la míekpɔ haɖe ke bena, wotsɔ nuwo katã de ete o." 
Hebrews2:9 Gake miekpɔ Yesu, amesi wòbɔbɔ ɖe anyi ɣeyiɣi kpuia ɖe wu mawudɔlawo la bena, le ku ƒe fukpekpe ta la wotsɔ ŋutikɔkɔe kple bubu ɖɔ nɛ, bene wòaɖɔ ku akpɔ ɖe amesiame nu to Mawu ƒe amenuveve me." 
Hebrews2:10 Elabena amesi ta nuwo katã ti ɖo, amesi me nuwo katã to va, amesi kplɔ vi geɖewo yi ɖe ŋutikɔkɔe me la, edzee bena, woawɔ wo xɔxɔ ƒe fia la blibo to fukpekpewo me." 
Hebrews2:11 Elabena amesi kɔa amewo ŋuti kple amesiwo ŋuti wokɔ la, wo katã dzɔ tso ame ɖeka me, eyata ŋu mekpee be, wòayɔ wo be nɔviwo o:" 
Hebrews2:12 esime wògblɔ bena: „Matsɔ wò ŋkɔ aɖe gbe ƒã na nɔvinyewo, le hame la titina madzi ha akafu wò.“" 
Hebrews2:13 Eye wògagblɔ be: „Matsɔ nye ŋuɖoɖo aɖo edzi.“ Eye wògagblɔ be: „Kpɔ ɖa, mía kple vi, siwo Mawu tso nam la, enye esi.“" 
Hebrews2:14 Azɔ alesi viawo kpɔ ʋu kple ŋutilã ƒe gome la, nenema ke eya hã kpɔ ekemawo ƒe gome, bene wòato ku me aɖi gbɔ amesi si ku ƒe ŋusẽ le, si nye Abosam la," 
Hebrews2:15 eye woade amesiwo katã nɔ kluvinyenye me to vɔvɔ̃ na ku me le woƒe agbenɔɣiwo katã me la. 
Hebrews2:16 Elabena vavã, menye mawudɔlawo wòva xɔxɔ ge na o, ke boŋ Abraham ƒome wòva xɔxɔ ge na." 
Hebrews2:17 Eyata ele nɛ be, wòaɖi nɔviawo le nuwo katã me, bene wòatrɔ zu nunɔlagã nublanuikpɔla kple nuteƒewɔla le Mawu ƒe dɔwo gome, bene wòalé avu le dukɔ la ƒe nuvɔ̃wo ta." 
Hebrews2:18 Elabena esi wòkpe fu, eye wotee kpɔ ŋuti la, ate ŋu axɔ na amesiwo wotena kpɔna." 
Hebrews3:1 Eyaŋuti, nɔvi kɔkɔewo, dziƒoyɔyɔ gomekpɔlawo: Mibu miaƒe xɔsemeʋuʋu ƒe ame dɔdɔ kple nunɔlagã Yesu la ŋuti," 
Hebrews3:2 amesi nye nuteƒewɔla na amesi ɖoe, abe alesi Mose hã nye nuteƒewɔla le eƒe aƒe blibo la katã me ene." 
Hebrews3:3 Elabena zi geɖe alesi amesi dzra aƒe ɖo la kpɔa bubu gã wu aƒea la, zi geɖe ma ke wobu eyama be, edze ŋutikɔkɔe gã xɔxɔ wu Mose." 
Hebrews3:4 Elabena aƒe sia aƒe la amee dzranɛ ɖo; ke amesi dzraa nuwo katã ɖo la, eyae nye Mawu." 
Hebrews3:5 Eye Mose la nye nuteƒewɔla le eƒe aƒe blibo la katã me abe subɔla ene, bene wòaɖi ɖase le nusiwo woava gblɔ la ŋuti;" 
Hebrews3:6 ke Kristo la nye nuteƒewɔla abe Vi ene le eƒe aƒe dzi; amesi ƒe aƒe míawo míenye, nenye be, mielé dzideƒo kple mɔkpɔkpɔ ƒe adegbeƒoƒo ɖe asi sesĩe vaseɖe nuwuwu." 
Hebrews3:7 Eyaŋuti abe alesi Gbɔgbɔ kɔkɔe la gblɔ ene be: „Egbegbe, ne miese eƒe gbe la," 
Hebrews3:8 migasẽ miaƒe dzime, abe alesi wowɔ le dɔmedzoe me le tetekpɔ ƒe ŋkeke la dzi le gbeadzi ene o," 
Hebrews3:9 esime mia fofowo tem kpɔ, eye woɖom kpɔ, eye wokpɔ nye dɔwɔwɔwo ƒe blane sɔŋ." 
Hebrews3:10 Eyata nenem dzidzime sia ƒe nu ku dzi nam, eye megblɔ be: Ɖaasi woƒe dzi tra mɔ; ke womenya nye mɔwo o." 
Hebrews3:11 Eyata meka atam le nye dziku me bena: Ne woahade nye dzudzɔ la me fĩ!“ 
Hebrews3:12 Nɔviwo, mikpɔ nyuie be, dzi vɔ̃ɖi maxɔse naganɔ mia dometɔa ɖeke me o, bene wòagatrɔ atso Mawu gbagbe la gbɔ o," 
Hebrews3:13 ke mixlɔ̃ nu mia nɔewo gbesiagbe boŋ, ŋkeke alesi woyɔ egbegbe, bene nuvɔ̃ ƒe beble nagasẽ mia dometɔa ɖeke ƒe dzime o." 
Hebrews3:14 Elabena míezu Kristo ƒe gomekpɔlawo, nenye be, míalé miaƒe dzideƒo ƒe gɔmedzedze me ɖe asi sesĩe halase nuwuwu la." 
Hebrews3:15 Esime wògblɔ be: „Egbegbe, ne miese eƒe gbe la, migasẽ miaƒe dzime, abe alesi wowɔ le dɔmedzoe me ene o!“" 
Hebrews3:16 Elabena amekawoe see, eye wòve dome na wo mahã? Alo menye wo katãe, amesiwo Mose kplɔ do go tso Egipte la o mahã?" 
Hebrews3:17 Ke amekawo ƒe nue ku dzi ne ƒe blane sɔŋ mahã? Alo menye amesiwo wɔ nuvɔ̃, amesiwo ƒe ƒu kotsoewo tsi gbedzi lae o ɖe?" 
Hebrews3:18 Ke amekawo wòka atam na bena, ne woahade yeƒe dzudzɔ la me fĩ? Ɖe menye na tosẽlawo o mahã?" 
Hebrews3:19 Eye míekpɔ bena, womete ŋu yi ɖe eme o le dzimaxɔse ŋuti!" 
Hebrews4:1 Eyata esi eƒe dzudzɔ me yiyi ŋugbedodo gali na mi ŋutilã, minɛ miavɔ̃, bene woagakpɔ mía dome amea ɖeke be, etsi eŋuti o" 
Hebrews4:2 Elabena wogblɔ nyanyuie la fia míawo hã, abe woamawo ke hã ene; gake nya, si wose la, meɖe via ɖeke na woamawo o; elabena amesiwo see la ƒe xɔse mewɔ ɖeka kple nya la o." 
Hebrews4:3 Eyata mí amesiwo xɔe se la, míayi ɖe dzudzɔ ma me, abe alesi wògblɔ ene bena: „Abe alesi meka atam le nye dziku me ene bena: Ne woahade nye dzudzɔ la me fĩ;“ wònye wowu dɔwɔwɔwo nu tso xexeme ƒe gɔmeɖoɖoanyi me hafi." 
Hebrews4:4 Elabena egblɔ le afia ɖe le ŋkeke adrelia ŋuti bena: „Eye Mawu dzudzɔ le ŋkeke adrelia dzi tso eƒe dɔwɔwɔwo katã me.“ 
Hebrews4:5 Eye wògagblɔ le afisia bena: „Ne woahade nye dzudzɔ la me fi!“ 
Hebrews4:6 Eyata esi wòsusɔ bena, amea ɖewo nayi ɖe eme, eye amesiwo wogblɔ nyanyuie la fia gbã la, meyi ɖe eme o le dzimaxɔse ŋuti la," 
Hebrews4:7 egaɖo ŋkekea ɖe le Dawid nu le ɣeyiɣi sia megbe bena: „Egbegbe,“ abe alesi wogblɔ ɖi ene bena: „Egbegbe, ne miese eƒe gbe la, migasẽ miaƒe dzime o.“" 
Hebrews4:8 Elabena ɖe Yosua kplɔ wo yi ɖe dzudzɔ me la, anye ne megaƒo nu emegbe la le ŋkeke bubua ɖe ŋuti o." 
Hebrews4:9 Eyaŋuti Sabat ƒe dzudzɔ gasusɔ na Mawu ƒe dukɔ la. 
Hebrews4:10 Elabena amesi yi ɖe eƒe dzudzu me la, eya hã dzudzɔ tso eƒe dɔwɔwɔwo me, abe alesi Mawu dzudzɔ tso etowo me la ene." 
Hebrews4:11 Azɔ minɛ miado vevie, bene míayi ɖe dzudzɔ ma me, bene amea ɖeke nagadze tosesẽ ma ke tɔgbea ɖeke me o." 
Hebrews4:12 Elabena Mawu ƒe nya la le agbe, eye wòsẽa ŋu, eye wòɖana wua yi nue-vee sia yi nuevee, eye wòƒona ɖe ame yina ɖe eme, halase esime wòmãa luʋɔ kple gbɔgbɔ kple ƒunukpeƒeewo kpakple ƒutomemi me, eye wònye tamesusuwo kple dzimedidiwo ƒe ʋɔnudrɔ̃la;" 
Hebrews4:13 eye nuwɔwɔa ɖeke mele ɣaɣla le eƒe ŋku me o; ke boŋ woklo nu le nuwo katã dzi, eye wotsi ƒeƒle le amesi gbɔ miaƒe nya le la ŋku me!" 
Hebrews4:14 Azɔ esi nunɔlagã, si to dziƒowo me yi la, le mía si, si nye Yesu, Mawu Vi la, minɛ mialé miaƒe xɔsemeʋuʋu ɖe asi sesĩe." 
Hebrews4:15 Elabena menye nunɔlagã, si mate ŋu anya míaƒe gbɔdzɔgbɔdzɔwo na mi o lae le mía si o, ke boŋ enye amesi wote kpɔ le nuwo katã me, abe míawo ke ene, negbe nuvɔ̃ koe mele eŋu o." 
Hebrews4:16 Eyata minɛ miatsɔ dzideƒo ate va eƒe amenuvevezikpui la gbɔ, bene míaƒe asi nasu nublanuikpɔkpɔ dzi, eye míakpɔ amenuveve hena mía xɔxɔ le hiahiãgbe." 
Hebrews5:1 Elabena nunɔlagã sia nunɔlagã, si wotsɔ tso amewo dome la, woɖoe anyi le amewo ta le Mawu ƒe dɔwo gome, bene wòatsɔ nunanawo kple numemewo ana le nuvɔ̃wo ta," 
Hebrews5:2 amesi ate ŋu ave ame manyanuwo kple mɔtrelawo nu, esi gbɔdzɔgbɔdzɔ le eya ŋutɔ hã ŋuti la ta," 
Hebrews5:3 eye esia ta wòle nɛ bena, abe alesi wòsa vɔ ɖe dukɔ ta ene la, nenema ke wòasa vɔ ɖe ye ŋutɔ ɖokui hã ta le nuvɔ̃wo ŋuti." 
Hebrews5:4 Eye amea ɖeke metsɔ bubu sia na eɖokui o, ke boŋ Mawu yɔnɛ abe Aron ene." 
Hebrews5:5 Nenema ke Kristo hã metsɔ ŋutikɔkɔe na eɖokui, bene wòanye nunɔlagã o: ke boŋ amesi gblɔ ne bena: „Vinye nènye, egbea medzi wò“ lae:" 
Hebrews5:6 abe alesi wogblɔ le afi bubua ɖe hã ene bena: „Wòe nye nunɔla yi ɖe mavɔmavɔ me le Melxizedek ƒe ɖoɖo la nu.“ 
Hebrews5:7 Amesi tso gbedodoɖawo kple kukuɖeɖewo le eƒe ŋutilã me nono ƒe ŋkekewo me hekpe ɖe ɣlidodo sesĩ kple aɖatsiwo ŋu va amesi te ŋu xɔe tso ku me la gbɔ, eye wòɖo toe le esi wòvɔ̃a Mawu la ŋuti;" 
Hebrews5:8 eye wònye Vi wònye hafi, gake wòsrɔ̃ toɖoɖo le fu, siwo wokpe la me;" 
Hebrews5:9 eye esi wowɔe blibo la, ezu agbexɔxɔ mava ƒe gɔmeɖola na amesiwo katã ɖoa toe," 
Hebrews5:10 amesi Mawu yɔ be nunɔlagã le Melxizedek ƒe ɖoɖo la nu. 
Hebrews5:11 Nusiawo ŋutie nya geɖe le mía si be, míagblɔ, eye wo gɔmeɖeɖefia nye do, le esi míenye kuviatɔwo le nyasese me la ŋuti." 
Hebrews5:12 Elabena ele na mi be, mianye nufialawo le ɣeyiɣi la ƒe didi nu; gake egahiã mí be, woagafia nusiwo nye Mawu ƒe nyawo ƒe gɔmedzenuwo mi, eye míezu abe amesiwo gahiã notsi ko, eye menye nuɖuɖu sesẽ o la ene." 
Hebrews5:13 Elabena amesiame, si nɔa notsi nom la, menya naneke le dzɔdzɔenyenye ƒe nya ŋuti o; elabena vidzie ko wònye." 
Hebrews5:14 Ke nuɖuɖu sesẽ li na amesiwo tsi zu blibo to ŋudɔwɔwɔ me kpɔ sidzenu, siwo nu ma wo, be wòabu nyui kple vɔ̃ me kpo la." 
Hebrews6:1 Eyata mina miagblẽ Kristo ƒe nufiafia ƒe gɔmedzedze ɖi, eye míade ŋgɔgbe ate ɖe blibonyenye ŋuti, bene miagaɖo dzimetɔtrɔ tso dɔwɔwɔ kukuwo me kple Mawu dzixɔse" 
Hebrews6:2 kple mawutsidedetaname ŋuti nufiafiawo kple asidada ɖe ame dzi kple ame kukuwo ƒe tsitretsitsi kpakple ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ mavɔ ƒe gɔme anyi o. 
Hebrews6:3 Eye míawo esia, ne Mawu ɖe mo." 
Hebrews6:4 Elabena amesiwo me woklẽ ɖo kpɔ, eye woɖɔ dziƒo ƒe nunana kpɔ, eye wozu Gbɔgbɔ kɔkɔe ƒe gomekpɔlawo," 
Hebrews6:5 eye woɖo Mawu ƒe nyanyuie kple xexeme, si le vava ge ƒe ŋusẽwo kpɔ," 
Hebrews6:6 eye wogade megbe la, esẽ na wo bena, woagawo wo yeye hena dzimetɔtrɔ, le esi wogaklã Mawuvi la ɖe atitsoga ŋu na wo ɖokui, eye wona wodo ŋukpee la ta." 
Hebrews6:7 Elabena anyigba, si noa tsi, si dzana ɖe edzi agbadre, eye wòmiea amagbe, si nyo na amesiwo ŋlɔe la, xea yayra tsoa Mawu gbɔ;" 
Hebrews6:8 ke ne emie ŋuwo kple srẽwo la, ezu vlo, eye wòtso ɖe fiƒode gbɔ, esi ƒe nuwuwu nye fiafiã." 
Hebrews6:9 Ke, lɔlɔ̃tɔwo, miekpɔ kakaɖedzi le mia ŋuti be, miaƒe nya anyo awu, eye wòate ɖe xɔxɔ ŋu, wònye míeƒo nu alea hafi." 
Hebrews6:10 Elabena Mawu menye madzɔmadzɔtɔ be, wòaŋlɔ miaƒe dɔwɔwɔ kple lalã, si mieɖe fia le eƒe ŋkɔ ta, le esime miesubɔ ame kɔkɔewo, eye miegale edzi le wo subɔm lã be o." 
Hebrews6:11 Ke míele didim vevie bena, mia dome amesiame naɖe veviedodo ma ke afia le mɔkpɔkpɔ ƒe kakaɖedzi blibo vaseɖe nuwuwu la ŋuti," 
Hebrews6:12 bene míagazu kuviatɔwo o; ke boŋ mizu amesiwo toa xɔse kple dzigbɔgbɔ blewu me nyia ŋugbedodowo ƒe dome la, srɔ̃lawo." 
Hebrews6:13 Elabena esime Mawu na ŋugbedodo Abraham la, le esi amea ɖeke megalolo de enu, ne wòatà o ŋuti la, età ye ŋutɔ ɖokui" 
Hebrews6:14 hegblɔ be: „Vavã matsɔ yayra ayra wò, eye mana tawò nasɔ gbɔ fũ.“" 
Hebrews6:15 Eye esi wòdo dzi gbɔ dzi ɖi blewu la, eƒe asi su ŋugbedodo la dzi." 
Hebrews6:16 Amewo taa amesiwo lolo gawu, eye nutata enye kpeɖoɖodzi hena woƒe nyaʋiʋli katã ƒe nuwuwu." 
Hebrews6:17 Eyata esi Mawu lɔ̃ be, yeaɖe yeƒe adaŋudede ƒe limaɖɔmaɖɔ afia ŋugbedodo ƒe domenyilawo kɔte wu la, etso nutàta heɖo kpe edzi," 
Hebrews6:18 bena míato nu eve, siwo meɖɔlina o, esiwo me Mawu mate ŋu aka aʋatso le o la me akpɔ dzideƒo sesẽ, mí amesiwo sii tso, bene míalé mɔkpɔkpɔ, si wotsɔ ɖo mía ŋku me la, ɖe asi sesĩe;" 
Hebrews6:19 eye mɔkpɔkpɔ ma le mía si abe luʋɔ ƒe seke, si li dedie, eye wòsesẽ, eye wòyina ɖe xɔmetsovɔ ƒe emelɔƒo la ene," 
Hebrews6:20 afisi Yesu yi ɖo le mía ta abe ŋgɔnɔla ene, amesi va zu nunɔlagã le Melxizedek ƒe ɖoɖo la nu yi ɖe mavɔmavɔ me." 
Hebrews7:1 Elabena Melxizedek sia enye Salem-fia kple Mawu, dziƒoʋĩtɔ, nunɔla, amesi yi ɖakpe Abraham, le esime wògbugbɔ tso fiawo siƒe gbɔna, eye woayrae;" 
Hebrews7:2 amesi hã Abraham tsɔ nuawo katã ƒe ewolia na la; wotso ŋkɔ nɛ gbã be dzɔdzɔenyenye ƒe fia; ke emegbe la wotrɔe be Salem-fia, si gɔme enye ŋutifafa fia:" 
Hebrews7:3 Tɔ kple nɔ kple dzidzimenya mele esi o; ŋkekewo ƒe gɔmedzedze kple agbe ƒe nuwuwu meli nɛ o; ke boŋ Mawuvi la wòɖi, eye wònɔ anyi nye nunɔla yi ɖe mavɔmavɔ me." 
Hebrews7:4 Ke mibu amesia, si Abraham, amegã xoxo la, tsɔ aboyonuawo ƒe ewolia na la, ƒe gãnyenye ŋuti kpɔ." 
Hebrews7:5 Lewi-vi, siwo xɔ nunɔlanyenye la, se le woawo hã si, bena woaxɔ nuwo ƒe ewolia tso dukɔ, si nye wo nɔviwo la si me le se la nu, wònye Abraham ƒe ali me woawo hã wodo tso hafi;" 
Hebrews7:6 ke ame ma, si ƒe dzidzime metso wo gbɔ o la, xɔ nuwo ƒe ewolia tso Abraham si me, eye wòyra amesi si ŋugbedodo le." 
Hebrews7:7 Ke ɖikekea ɖeke mele eme o bena, amesi nye gãtɔ la, yra amesi nye suetɔ." 
Hebrews7:8 Eye le afisia la, amesiwo kuna la, xɔ nuwo ƒe ewolia: ke afime la, amesi ŋuti woɖi ɖase le be, ele agbe la, xɔnɛ." 
Hebrews7:9 Eye woate ŋu agblɔ be: To Abraham dzi woxɔ nuwo ƒe ewolia le Lewi hã, amesi xɔa nuwo ƒe ewolia la si:" 
Hebrews7:10 elabena egale fofoa ƒe ali me ko, esime Melxizedek yi ɖakpee." 
Hebrews7:11 Azɔ la ne blibonyenye vana toa Lewitɔwo ƒe nunɔlanyenye me — elabena dukɔ la xɔ se la le eya te la — nukaŋuti wògahiã bena, nunɔla bubu natsi tre le Melxizedek ƒe ɖoɖo la nu, eye womabui le Aron ƒe ɖoɖo la nu o mahã?" 
Hebrews7:12 Elabena ne woɖuɖɔ nunɔlanyenye la, ele be, woaɖuɖɔ se la hã tsã." 
Hebrews7:13 Elabena amesi ŋuti wogblɔ esia le la, enye to bubu me tɔ, amesiwo dome amea ɖeke mesubɔna le vɔsamlekpui gbɔ o." 
Hebrews7:14 Elabena edze ƒã bena, mia Aƒetɔ la ɖo tso Yuda-to la me, to, si Mose megblɔ nyaa ɖeke na le nunɔlanyenye ŋuti o." 
Hebrews7:15 Eye esia dze ƒã gawu, ne nunɔla bubu, si le abe Melxizedek ene la, va tsi tre," 
Hebrews7:16 amesi womeɖo le se, si nye ŋutilãtɔ la ƒe ɖoɖo nu o, ke boŋ le agbe mavɔ ƒe ŋusẽ la nu." 
Hebrews7:17 Elabena woɖi ɖase le eŋu bena: „Wòe nye nunɔla yi ɖe mavɔmavɔ me le Melxizedek ƒe ɖoɖo la nu.“ 
Hebrews7:18 Elabena woɖe se ŋgɔgbetɔ la ɖa le eƒe gbɔdzɔgbɔdzɔ kple viɖe manyemanye ŋuti," 
Hebrews7:19 — elabena se la mewɔa naneke blibo o, — eye wotsɔa mɔkpɔkpɔ, si nyo wu sã la vɛ, esi me miato ale ɖe Mawu ŋuti." 
Hebrews7:20 Eye alesi woɖoe nunɔla, eye atamkaka megbe eŋutinɔnɔ o la —" 
Hebrews7:21 elabena ame mawo zu nunɔlawo atamkaka manɔŋui; ke ame sia zui atamkaka kpe ɖe eŋu heto Mawu dzi, amesi gblɔ nɛ bena: „Yehowa ka atam, eye mele etrɔ ge o: Wòe nye nunɔla yi ɖe mavɔmavɔ me le Melxizedek ƒe ɖoɖo la nu“ —" 
Hebrews7:22 nenema ke hã Yesu zu nubabla, si nyo wu sã la ƒe asiƒuakɔla" 
Hebrews7:23 Eye ame mawo dome geɖeawo zu nunɔlawo, le esi ku gbe bena, woagatsi agbe o la ta;" 
Hebrews7:24 ke eya la, esi wònɔ anyi yi ɖe mavɔmavɔ me ŋuti la, nunɔlanyenye, si meɖɔlina o la, le esi." 
Hebrews7:25 Eyata ate ŋu axɔ amesiwo to edzi va Mawu gbɔ la, ɖe agbe blibo keŋkeŋ, le esi wònɔa agbe ɖaa, bena wòaxɔ wo ɖe akɔ la ŋuti." 
Hebrews7:26 Elabena nunɔlagã sia tɔgbe hiã míawo hã: Amesi nye kɔkɔetɔ, ame maɖifɔ, ame maƒoɖi, amesi ɖe eɖokui ɖa tso nuvɔ̃wɔlawo dome, eye wokɔe ɖe dzi wu dziƒowo," 
Hebrews7:27 amesi mehiã gbesiagbe vɔsasa abe nunɔlagã mawo, amesiwo wɔ vɔsasa gbã ɖe woa ŋutɔwo ƒe nuvɔ̃wo ta, eye emegbe la ɖe dukɔ la ƒe nuvɔ̃wo ta ene o; elabena ewɔ esia zi ɖeka hɔ̃ ko ɖe ɣeyiɣiawo katã nu, esime wòtso ye ŋutɔ ɖokui hena." 
Hebrews7:28 Elabena se la tsɔa amesiwo gbɔdzɔ la ɖoa nunɔlagãwo; ke atamkaka, si dze se la yome la, ƒe nya ɖo Vi, si wowɔ blibo la, nunɔlagã yi ɖe mavɔmavɔ me." 
Hebrews8:1 Ke nya, siwo miegblɔ la, ƒe emenya gãtɔ enye esi. Nunɔlagã sia tɔgbe le mia si, amesi bɔbɔ nɔ anyi ɖe gãnyenye fiazikpui la ƒe nuɖusi me le dziƒowo," 
Hebrews8:2 amesi nye kɔkɔeƒe kple agbadɔ vavã, si Mawu ŋutɔ tu, eye menye amee tui o la, ƒe subɔla." 
Hebrews8:3 Elabena woɖo nunɔlagã sia nunɔlagã, bena wòatsɔ nunanawo kple numemewo ana; eyata ele vevie bena, nane nanɔ nunɔlagã sia hã si be, wòatsɔ ana." 
Hebrews8:4 Azɔ la ne enɔ anyigba dzi la, mele nunɔla nye ge kura o; elabena nunɔlawo li, amesiwo tsɔa nunanawo vanɛ le se la nu," 
Hebrews8:5 nenem me siawo subɔa nusiwo nye dziƒonuwo ƒe kpɔɖeŋu kple vɔvɔli, abe alesi Mawu ɖee fia Mose, esime wòle agbadɔ la wɔ ge la ene; elabena egblɔ be: „Kpɔ dzi, be nawɔ nuwo katã ɖe nɔnɔme, si wofiã wo le toa dzi la nu.“" 
Hebrews8:6 Ke azɔ la subɔsubɔ, si nyo wu sã la, su esi, abe alesi wònye nubabla, si nyo wu, eye woɖoe anyi ɖe ŋugbedodo, siwo nyo wu la, dzi la ƒe avuléla ene." 
Hebrews8:7 Elabena ɖe vodada mele nubabla gbãtɔ ma ŋu o la, anye ne womedi nɔƒe na evelia o." 
Hebrews8:8 Elabena eka ŋku me na wo gblɔ be: „Kpɔ ɖa, Yehowa gblɔ bena: Ŋkekewo li gbɔna, eye mabia nu yeye kple Israel ƒe aƒe kpakple Yuda ƒe aƒe la," 
Hebrews8:9 menye ɖe nu, si mebia kple wo fofowo le gbesigbe melé woƒe alɔnu hekplɔ wo tso Egipte-nyigba dzi la nu o, elabena woawo menɔ nye nubabla me o, eye nye hã nyemele be na wo o, Yehowa ye gblɔe." 
Hebrews8:10 Elabena esia nye nu, si mabia kple Israel ƒe aƒe la le ŋkeke siawo megbe, Yehowa ye gblɔe: Matsɔ nye seawo ade woƒe ta me, eye maŋlɔ wo ɖe woƒe dziwo me, eye manye Mawu na wo, eye woawo nanye nye dukɔ." 
Hebrews8:11 Eye wo dome amea ɖeke magafia nu xɔlɔ̃via kple nɔvia agble be: „Dzesi Yehowa“ o; elabena wo katã woanyam tso woƒe ɖeviwo dzi vaseɖe tsitsiawo dzi. 
Hebrews8:12 Elabena mave woƒe madzɔmadzɔnyenyewo nu, eye nyemagado ŋu woƒe nuvɔ̃wo kple woƒe vodadawo o.“" 
Hebrews8:13 Le esime wògblɔ be: „Nu yeye“ la, ena gbãtɔ do xoxo; ke nusi ɖo xoxo, eye wòtsi ŋutɔ la, te ɖe gbegblẽ ŋu." 
Hebrews9:1 Azɔ la mawusubɔsubɔ ƒe nuɖoanyiwo kple anyigba dzi kɔkɔeƒe li na nubabla gbãtɔ hã. 
Hebrews9:2 Elabena wotu agbadɔ ŋgɔgbetɔ, si me akaɖiti kple kplɔ̃ kple ŋkumeɖobolo nɔna, si woyɔna be kɔkɔeƒe." 
Hebrews9:3 Ke le xɔmetsovɔ evelia megbe la agbadɔ, si woyɔna be kɔkɔeƒe ƒe kɔkɔeƒe la li," 
Hebrews9:4 esi me sikadzudzɔmlekpui kple nubablaɖaka, si ŋu wofa sika ɖo kpe ɖo la le, eye eya me sikaze, si me mana le kple Aron ƒe atikplɔ, si ƒo se, kple nubabla ƒe nuŋlɔkpeawo le." 
Hebrews9:5 Ke le aɖaka dzi la ŋutikɔkɔe ƒe Kerubiwo li, siwo xe nutsyɔnu la dzi; nusiawo ŋuti nya míate ŋu agblɔ le wo tɔxɛ wo tɔxɛ fifia o." 
Hebrews9:6 Ke esi wodzra nusiawo ɖo alea vɔ la, nunɔlawo nɔa agbadɔ ŋgɔgbetɔ me yim ɖaa ɖawɔa mawusubɔsubɔ." 
Hebrews9:7 Ke agbadɔ evelia la, nunɔlagã la koe dea eme, ƒe ɖeka zi ɖeka, eye meɖena ʋu, si woatsɔ ana ɖe ye ŋutɔ kple dukɔ la ƒe numanyamanya ta la, matsɔmatsɔe o;" 
Hebrews9:8 eye Gbɔgbɔ kɔkɔe la ɖe esia fia bena, womeʋu mɔ yi ɖe kɔkɔeƒe la me haɖe o, ŋkeke alesi agbadɔ ŋgɔgbetɔ la gali ko," 
Hebrews9:9 esi nye lododo na ɣeyiɣi, si gali fifi, esi me wotsoa nunana kple vɔsasa, siwo mate ŋu awɔ amesiwo le Mawu subɔm la blibo le dzitsinya nu o la, nana lena;" 
Hebrews9:10 nusiawo katã hekpe ɖe nuɖuɖuwo kple nunonowo kpakple tsilele bubu ƒomeviwo ŋuti la wonye ŋutilã me nuɖoanyiwo ɖeɖeko, siwo woɖo ɖi vaseɖe ɖɔɖɔɖoɣi la dzi." 
Hebrews9:11 Ke Kristo va nye nu nyui, siwo le vava ge la ƒe nunɔlagã, eye wòto agbadɔ, si nye gãtɔ kple blibotɔ wu, si wometsɔ asi wɔe o, eye metso xexe sia me o la me," 
Hebrews9:12 eye metsɔ gbɔ̃tsu wo kple nyiviwo ƒe ʋu hã o, ke boŋ ye ŋutɔ ƒe ʋu wòtsɔ yi ɖe kɔkɔeƒe la me zi ɖeka hɔ̃ ko ɖe ɣeyiɣiawo kalẽ nu, eye wòtsɔ xɔxɔ mavɔ vɛ." 
Hebrews9:13 Elabena ne gbɔ̃tsuwo kple nyitsuwo ƒe ʋu kple nyinɔ ƒe afi, si wowu ɖe ame makɔmakɔwo ŋu la, kɔ wo ŋuti hena ŋutilã ƒe kɔkɔenyenye la," 
Hebrews9:14 geɖe aleke wu Kristo, amesi to Gbɔgbɔ mavɔ la me tsɔ eɖokui na Mawu abe vɔsasa mokaka manɔŋutɔ ene la, ƒe ʋu maklɔ miaƒe dzitsinya tso dɔwɔwɔ kukuwo me, bena miasubɔ Mawu gbagbe la o mahã?" 
Hebrews9:15 Eye le esia ta wònye nubabla yeye ƒe avuléla, bena le esi wòku le xoxo tso vodada, siwo le nubabla gbãtɔ me ŋuti ta la, amesiwo woyɔ la, naxa domenyinyi mavɔ ƒe ŋugbedodo." 
Hebrews9:16 Elabena afisi megbenyagbɔgblɔɖi le la, ele vevie be, amesi gblɔe ɖi la, naku hafi." 
Hebrews9:17 Elabena amewo ƒe ku ɖoa kpe megbenyagbɔgblɔɖi dzi; elabena ŋkeke alesi amesi gblɔe ɖi la, gale agbe la, ŋusẽa ɖeke menoa eme o." 
Hebrews9:18 Eyata esi wokɔ nubabla gbãtɔ ŋu la, womegbe ʋutsɔtsɔ kpe ɖe eŋu o." 
Hebrews9:19 Elabena esime Mose gblɔ sedede sia sedede na dukɔ blibo la le sea nu la, etso nyiviwo kple gbɔ̃tsuwo ƒe ʋu hekpe ɖe tsi kple alẽfu dzi kple isop ŋu, eye wòwui ɖe agbalẽ la ŋutɔ kple dukɔ la katã ŋu" 
Hebrews9:20 hegblɔ be: „Esiae nye nubabla ƒe ʋu, si ƒe se Mawu de na mi.“" 
Hebrews9:21 Eye nenema ke wòtsɔ ʋu la wu ɖe agbadɔ kple mawusubɔnuawo katã ŋu. 
Hebrews9:22 Eye mate ŋu agblɔ kloe bena, wotso ʋu klo nuwo katã ŋuti le se la nu, eye ne womekɔ ʋu ɖe anyi o la, nuvɔ̃kekea ɖeke manɔ anyi o." 
Hebrews9:23 Eyata ele vevie bena, woatsɔ nusiawo akɔ nusiwo nye dziƒonuwo ƒe kpɔɖeŋu la ŋuti; ke dziƒonuawo ŋutɔ la wotsɔ vɔsasa, siwo nyo wu esiawo la, ko wo ŋuti." 
Hebrews9:24 Elabena Kristo meyi ɖe kɔkɔeƒe, si wotso asi wɔe wònye vavãtɔ ƒe kpɔɖeŋu la me o; ke dziƒo ŋutɔ wòyi, bene wòado ɖe Mawu ŋku me azɔ le mía ta;" 
Hebrews9:25 eye menye bena, wòatsɔ eɖokui ano nanam agbadre, abe alesi nunɔlagã tsɔa lãʋu yina ɖe kɔkɔeƒe la me ƒe sia ƒe ene o;" 
Hebrews9:26 ɖe wònye nenema wòle la, ekem ele nɛ be, wòakpe fu agbadre tso xexeme ƒe gɔmedzedzea me ke; gake azɔ la eɖe eɖokui fia zi ɖeka le xexeame ƒe nuwuwu, bena wòaɖe nuvɔ̃wo ɖa to eɖokuitsɔtsɔ savɔe me." 
Hebrews9:27 Eye alesi woɖoe na ame be, woaku zi ɖeka, eye esia megbe wòakpɔ ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ la," 
Hebrews9:28 nenema ke Kristo hã, esime wòtsɔ eɖokui na zi ɖeka, bena wòaɖe ame geɖewo ƒe nuvɔ̃wo ɖa la, aɖe eɖokui afia zi evelia, manye ɖe nuvɔ̃wo ta o, ke boŋ ɖe amesiwo le elalam la ƒe xɔxɔ ta." 
Hebrews10:1 Elabena esi wònye nu nyui, siwo le vava ge la, ƒe vɔvɔli koe li na se la, eye menye nuawo ƒe nɔnɔme vavã o ŋuti la, eyata ƒe sia ƒe vɔsasa, siwo wotsɔna nana ɖaasi la, mate ŋu awɔ amesiwo tena va egbɔ la, blibo gbeɖegbeɖe o;" 
Hebrews10:2 ɖe mele nenema o la, ne womadzudzɔ vɔsasa, le esi wokɔ amesiwo nɔa Mawu subɔm la ŋuti zi ɖeka, ale bena nuvɔ̃wo nyanyaa ɖeke maganɔ wo ŋu o la ta o mahã?" 
Hebrews10:3 Ke vɔsasa mawo ɖoa ŋku nuvɔ̃wo dzi na ame ƒe sia ƒe; 
Hebrews10:4 elabena nyitsuwo kple gbɔ̃tsuwo ƒe ʋu mate ŋu aɖe nuvɔ̃wo ɖa akpɔ o. 
Hebrews10:5 Eyata esime wòva xexeame la, wògblɔ be: „Vɔsawo kple nunanawo mèdi o, ke boŋ ŋutilã nèdzra ɖo nam;" 
Hebrews10:6 numeme blibowo kple nuvɔ̃vɔsawo medzea ŋuwò o. 
Hebrews10:7 Tete megblɔ be: Kpɔ ɖa, megbɔna, agbalẽ me woŋlɔ nya ɖo le ŋutinye be, oo Mawu, wò lɔlɔ̃nu mawɔ!“" 
Hebrews10:8 Esi wògblɔ be: „Vɔsawo kple nunanawo kple numeme blibowo kple nuvɔ̃vɔsawo“ — siwo wotsɔna vanɛ le sea nu la — „mèdi wo o, eye womenyo ŋuwò hã o,“" 
Hebrews10:9 tete wògblɔ be: „Kpɔ ɖa, megbɔna, be mawɔ wò lɔlɔ̃nu! Eɖe nu gbãtɔ ɖa, be yeaɖo evelia anyi;" 
Hebrews10:10 lɔlɔ̃nu sia me wokɔ mía ŋu le zi ɖeka ɖe ɣeyiɣiawo katã nu to Yesu Kristo ƒe ŋutilãtsɔtsɔna me. 
Hebrews10:11 Eye nunɔla sia nunɔla nɔa tsitre gbesiagbe henɔa Mawu subɔm, eye wònɔa vɔsa mawo ke, siwo mate ŋu aɖe nuvɔ̃wo ɖa akpɔ o la, tsɔm nɔa nanam agbadre;" 
Hebrews10:12 ke eya la, esime wotsɔ vɔsa ɖeka na ɖe nuvɔ̃wo ta megbe la, ebɔbɔ nɔ anyi ɖe Mawu ƒe nuɖusi me tegbetegbe," 
Hebrews10:13 eye tso ekema dzi la ele lalam, halase esime woatsɔ eƒe futɔwo awɔ eƒe afɔɖodzinui." 
Hebrews10:14 Elabena vɔsa ɖeka wòtsɔ wɔ amesiwo ŋuti wokɔ la blibo halase tegbe. 
Hebrews10:15 Ke Gbɔgbɔ kɔkɔe hã ɖi ɖase le eŋuti na mí; 
Hebrews10:16 elabena esime wògblɔ be: „Esiae nye nu, si mabia kpli wo le ŋkeke siawo megbe la, Yehowa ye gblɔe: Matsɔ nye seawo ade woƒe dziwo me, eye woƒe tame hã maŋlɔ wo ɖo," 
Hebrews10:17 eye nyemagaɖo ŋu woƒe nuvɔ̃wo kple woƒe vodadawo o.“ 
Hebrews10:18 Ke afisi nuvɔ̃wo ƒe keke le la, vɔsa ɖe nuvɔ̃wo ta meganɔnɛ o." 
Hebrews10:19 Azɔ, nɔviwo, esi dzideƒo le mía si, be míayi ɖe kɔkɔeƒe la me to Yesu ƒe ʋu la me," 
Hebrews10:20 eyae nye mɔ, si ŋuti wokɔ na mí, be wòanye mɔ yeye gbagbe, si to xɔmetsovɔ me, eyae nye eƒe ŋutilã;" 
Hebrews10:21 eye esi nunɔlagã, si le Mawu ƒe aƒe nu la, le mia si ŋuti la," 
Hebrews10:22 mina miatsɔ dzi nyateƒetɔ ate va le xɔse ƒe kakaɖedzi blibo me, abe amesiwo wòklɔ dzitsinya vɔ̃ ɖa tso woƒe dziwo me, eye wotsɔ tsi zɔzrɔ̃e le na woƒe ŋutilã ene;" 
Hebrews10:23 mina míalé mɔkpɔkpɔ me ʋuʋu ɖe asi sesĩe, bene magaʋã o; elabena amesi na ŋugbedodo la, enye nuteƒewɔla;" 
Hebrews10:24 eye míalé ŋku ɖe mia nɔewo ŋu, bena míade dzi ƒo na mía nɔewo le lɔlɔ̃ kple dɔ nyui wɔwɔ me," 
Hebrews10:25 eye míagagblẽ mía ŋutɔwo miaƒe ƒuƒoƒewo ɖi, abe alesi amea ɖewo wɔna ene o, ke boŋ míaxlɔ̃ nu mía nɔewo, eye míawɔ esia geɖe wu, zi alesi miekpɔ bena, ŋkeke la le ɖoɖom la." 
Hebrews10:26 Elabena ne miexɔ nyateƒe ƒe sidzedze la, hafi bua wɔ nuvɔ̃ la, vɔsasa ɖe nuvɔ̃wo ta megali o," 
Hebrews10:27 ke boŋ vɔvɔ̃mɔkpɔkpɔ na ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ kple dzo ƒe ŋuʋaʋã, si afiã adikãtɔwo ɖa keŋ la, koe li." 
Hebrews10:28 Ne amea ɖe do vlo Mose ƒe sea la, ekuna nublanui makpɔmakpɔe le ɖaseɖila eve alo etɔ̃ ƒe nya nu;"
