3John1:14 ke mele mɔ kpɔm bena, mava akpɔ wò ɖa kaba, eye ne mieɖo go ŋku me kple ŋku me la, míaƒo nu." 
3John1:14 ke mele mɔ kpɔm bena, mava akpɔ wò ɖa kaba, eye ne mieɖo go ŋku me kple ŋku me la, míaƒo nu." 
3John1:15 Ŋutifafa nanɔ anyi kpli wò! Xɔlɔ̃wo ɖuɖɔ wò ƒã. Ɖuɖɔ xɔlɔ̃awo ɖekaɖeka nam ƒã! 
3John1:15 Ŋutifafa nanɔ anyi kpli wò! Xɔlɔ̃wo ɖuɖɔ wò ƒã. Ɖuɖɔ xɔlɔ̃awo ɖekaɖeka nam ƒã! 
Jude1:1 Yuda, Yesu Kristo ƒe dɔla kple Yakobo nɔvi la, ŋlɔ ɖo ɖe amesiwo woyɔ, eye wowɔ wo kɔkɔe le Mawu Fofo la me, eye wodzra wo ɖo le Yesu Kristo me la;" 
Jude1:2 Nublanuikpɔkpɔ kple ŋutifafa kple lɔlɔ̃ nasɔ gbɔ ɖe dzi na mi! 
Jude1:3 Lɔlɔ̃tɔwo, esi medo vevie ŋutɔ, bena maŋlɔ nya le mi katã miaƒe xɔxɔ la ŋuti aɖo ɖe mi la, ezu dzizizi nam be, maŋlɔe atsɔ axlɔ̃ nu mi, bene miaʋli xɔse, si wode asi na ame kɔkɔewo zi ɖeka ɖe ɣeyiɣiawo katã nu la ta." 
Jude1:4 Elabena amea ɖewo va tra ɖe eme dzaa, amesiwo woŋlɔ ɖi tso blema ke hena ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ sia: Ame mavɔ̃mawuwo, amesiwo trɔa mía Mawu ƒe amenuveve yina ɖe agbe baɖa nɔnɔ me, eye wogbe nu le mia dziɖula kple Aƒetɔ ɖeka, Yesu Kristo la gbɔ." 
Jude1:5 Ke mele didim bena, maɖo ŋku dzi na mi amesiwo nya nuwo katã xoxo zi ɖeka ɖe ɣeyiɣiawo katã nu bena, esime Aƒetɔ la ɖe dukɔ la tso Egipte-nyigba dzi la, emegbe la etsrɔ̃ amesiwo mexɔ se o la." 
Jude1:6 Eye mawudɔla, siwo medzra woƒe amegãnyenye ɖo o, ke wogblẽ woa ŋutɔwo ƒe nɔƒe ɖi la, wotsɔ kɔsɔkɔsɔ mavɔwo bla wo hedzra wo ɖo ɖe viviti tsiɖitsiɖi me hena ŋkeke gã la ƒe ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃." 
Jude1:7 Abe alesi wotsɔ Sodom kple Gomora kple du, siwo ƒo xlã wo, siwo wo ahasi akpa abe woawo ene, eye wodze ŋutilã bubu yome la, wo kpɔɖeŋu, esi wokpe dzo mavɔ ƒe fu la:" 
Jude1:8 Nenema ke drɔ̃ekula siawo hã ƒoa ɖi ŋutilã, eye woɖoa vlo aƒetɔnyenyewo, eye wogblɔa busunya ɖe ŋutikɔewo ŋuti." 
Jude1:9 Ke Mixael, mawudɔla gã la, esime wòle anuku tsyɔm hele nu ƒom kple Abosam le Mose ƒe kukua ŋuti la, medo dzi gblɔ busufɔbubu ɖe eŋuti o, ke boŋ egblɔ bena: Aƒetɔ la laka mo na wò!" 
Jude1:10 Ke ame mawo la wogblɔa busunya ɖe nusiwo womenya o la ŋuti; ke nusiwo gɔme wose tso dzɔdzɔme abe lã nyasã manɔsitɔwo ene la, wogblẽ wo ɖokui le nusiawo me." 
Jude1:11 Baba na wo! Elabena wodze Kain ƒe mo dzi yina, eye wohe wo ɖokui ɖe Bileam ƒe beblefetu la me, eye wotsrɔ̃ le Kora ƒe agudzedze la me." 
Jude1:12 Amesiawo nye ɖiƒoƒo le miaƒe lɔlɔ̃nuɖuɖuwo me, esi woɖua nutsu nyia wo ɖokui le mia gbɔ vɔvɔ̃ manɔmee; alilikpo tsi manɔme, siwo ya ƒona yina gbɔna la, wonye; ati, siwo dzi kutsetse menɔa le nuŋeɣi o, siwo ku zi eve, eye woho wo," 
Jude1:13 ƒutsotsoe dzeagbo, siwo kplɔa woa ŋutɔwo ƒe ŋukpenanuwo va kɔna ɖe go, ɣletivi tramɔ, siwo wodzra ɖo hena viviti tsiɖitsiɖi yi ɖe mavɔmavɔ me la, wonye." 
Jude1:14 Ke Henox hã, amesi nye adrelia tso Adam dzi la, gblɔ nya ɖi ɖe ame mawo ŋuti bena: „Kpɔ ɖa, Aƒetɔ la kple eƒe ame kɔkɔe akpe nanewo gbɔna," 
Jude1:15 bene wòaɖrɔ ʋɔnu wo katã, eye woaka mo na wo dome amesiwo katã mevɔ̃a Mawu o la, le woƒe dɔwɔwɔ vlo, siwo katã wowɔ mawumavɔ̃mavɔ̃e kple nya sesẽ, siwo katã nuvɔ̃wɔla mavɔ̃mawuwo gblɔ ɖe eŋuti la ta." 
Jude1:16 Amesiawo nye liʋiliʋililawo, amesiwo ŋu naneke medzena o, evɔ wozɔna le woƒe nudzodzrowo nu hafi, woƒe nu gblɔa dadalawo, eye wokafua ame le eƒe ŋku me le viɖe ta." 
Jude1:17 Ke, mi hiãtɔwo, miɖo ŋku nya, siwo mía Aƒetɔ Yesu Kristo ƒe apostolowo gblɔ tsã la dzi," 
Jude1:18 alesi wogblɔ na mi bena: Le nuwuwu ɣeyiɣiawo me la fewuɖula, siwo zɔna le woa ŋutɔwo ƒe nudzodzro vlowo nu la le vava ge." 
Jude1:19 Amesiawo nye amesiwo wɔa mamãwo, dzɔdzɔmeme, siwo me gbɔgbɔ mele o." 
Jude1:20 Ke, mi hiãtɔwo la, mitu mia ɖokui ɖe miaƒe xɔse kɔkɔe, si ƒo wo katã ta la dzi, eye mido gbe ɖa le Gbɔgbɔ kɔkɔe la me," 
Jude1:21 eye midzra mia ɖokui ɖo le Mawu ƒe lɔlɔ̃ la me, anɔ lalam na mía Aƒetɔ Yesu Kristo ƒe nublanuikpɔkpɔ la bena agbe mavɔ." 
Jude1:22 Eye mikpɔ nublanui na amea ɖewo, amesiwo le ɖi kem," 
Jude1:23 miɖe ame bubua ɖewo, eye mihe wo do go tso dzo la me, mitsɔ vɔvɔ̃ kpɔ nublanui na amea ɖewo, eye milé fu awu, si ŋutilã ƒo ɖi la gɔ̃ hã." 
Jude1:24 Ke amesi ate ŋu alé mi ɖe asi, bena miagakli nu o, eye wòate ŋu atsɔ mi atu tsitre ɖe eƒe ŋutikɔkɔe ƒe ŋku me mokaka manɔŋui le dzidzɔ gã me;" 
Jude1:25 Mawu ɖeka hɔ̃ ko kple mía xɔla, to Yesu Kristo, mía Aƒetɔ la dzi la, etɔ nanye kafukafu kple gãnyenye kple dziɖuɖu kple ŋusẽ azɔ kple ɖaasi tso mavɔ me yi ɖe mavɔ me! Amen!" 
Revelation1:1 Yesu Kristo ƒe nyaɖeɖefia, si Mawu tsɔ nɛ, be wòafia nusiwo lava ve me kaba la, eƒe dɔlawo la, enye esi; eye wòto eƒe mawudɔla, si wòdɔ ɖa la, dzi heɖe wo me fia eƒe dɔla Yohanes," 
Revelation1:2 amesi ɖi ɖase le Mawu ƒe nya kple Yesu Kristo ƒe ɖaseɖiɖi ŋuti, abe alesi wòkpɔ nuawo katãe ene." 
Revelation1:3 Woayra amesi le nyagblɔɖi sia ƒe nyawo xlẽm kple amesiwo le wo sem, eye wole nusiwo woŋlɔ ɖe eme la, dzram ɖo; elabena ɣeyiɣi la tu aƒe." 
Revelation1:4 Yohanes ŋlɔ ɖo ɖe hame adre, siwo le Asia la bena: Amenuveve kple ŋutifafa nana anyi kpli mi tso amesi li, eye wònɔ anyi, eye wòle vavagela gbɔ, eye tso gbɔgbɔ adre, siwo le eƒe fiazikpui ŋgɔ la gbɔ," 
Revelation1:5 eye tso Yesu Kristo, amesi nye ɖaseɖila nyateƒetɔ kple ame kukuwo ƒe ŋgɔgbetɔ kple anyigba dzi fiawo ƒe dziɖula la gbɔ! Amesi lɔ̃a mí, eye wòtso eƒe ʋu klo míaƒe nuvɔ̃wo ɖa le mía ŋuti," 
Revelation1:6 eye wòwɔ mí hawo kple nunɔlawo hena eƒe Mawu Fofo la, eya to lanye ŋutikɔkɔe kple ŋusẽ tso mava me yi ɖe mavɔ me! Amen." 
Revelation1:7 Kpɔ ɖa, egbɔna kple alilikpowo, eye ŋku sia ŋku lakpɔe, eye amesiwo ƒo mi ɖee hã, lakpɔe, eye anyigba dzi ƒomeawo katã lawu avi hoo le eŋuti! Ẽ, amen." 
Revelation1:8 Nyee nye Alfa kple Omega, gɔmedzedze kple nuwuwu; ale Aƒetɔ Mawu, amesi li, eye wònɔ anyi, eye wòle vava ge, amesi nye ŋusẽkatãtɔ la, gblɔ esi!" 
Revelation1:9 Nye Yohanes, mia nɔvi kple miaƒe hagomekpɔla le Yesu Kristo ƒe fukpekpe kple fiaɖuƒe kple dzidodo me la, menɔ ƒukpo, si woyɔna be Patmo la dzi le Mawu ƒe nya kple Yesu Kristo ƒe ɖaseɖiɖi ta." 
Revelation1:10 Menɔ gbɔgbɔ me le Aƒetɔ ƒe ŋkeke la azi, eye mese gbe gãa ɖe le ɖiɖim le megbenye, abe kpẽ ƒe gbeɖiɖi ene, gblɔ bena:" 
Revelation1:11 Nusi nèkpɔ la, ŋlɔe ɖe agbalẽ me, eye natsɔe aɖo ɖe hame adre, siwo le Efeso kple Smirna kple Pergamo kple Tiatira kple Sardes kple Filadelfia kple Laodikea." 
Revelation1:12 Eye metrɔ be, makpɔ gbe, si ƒo nu kplim la. Eye esi metrɔ la, mekpɔ sikakaɖiti adre," 
Revelation1:13 eye le sikakaɖiti adreawo titina la amea ɖe li, si ɖi amegbetɔvi, edo awu ʋlaya, eye wotsɔ sikalidziblanu bla akɔta." 
Revelation1:14 Eye teƒe ta kple eƒe taɖa fu tititi abe alẽfu ɣi ene, eye abe sno ene, eye eƒe ŋkuwo le abe dzo ƒe aɖe ene," 
Revelation1:15 eye eƒe afɔwo ɖi gadzẽ, si wode kpodzo me wòbiã hẽ, eye eƒe gbe le abe tsi sisi geɖewo ƒe gbeɖiɖi ene." 
Revelation1:16 Eye ɣletivi adre le eƒe nuɖusi me, eye yi ɖaɖi: nuevee do tso eƒe nu me, eye eƒe mo le keklẽm, abe alesi ɣe klẽna sesĩe ene." 
Revelation1:17 Eye esi mekpɔe la, medze anyi ɖe eƒe afɔ nu abe ame kuku ene. Eye wòda eƒe nuɖusi ɖe dzinye gblɔ bena: Megavɔ̃ o, nyee nye gbãtɔ kple mlɔetɔ" 
Revelation1:18 kple amesi le agbe, meku, eye kpɔ ɖa, mele agbe tso mavɔ me yi ɖe mavɔ me, eye ku kple tsiẽƒe safuiwo le asinye." 
Revelation1:19 Azɔ ŋlɔ nusiwo nèkpɔ kple nusiwo li kpakple nusiwo le vava ge le nusiawo megbe la. 
Revelation1:20 Ɣletivi adre, siwo nèkpɔ le nye nuɖusi me kple sikakaɖiti adre la ƒe nya ɣaɣla enye si: Ɣletivi adreawoe nye hame adreawo ƒe dɔlawo, eye akaɖiti adreawoe nye hame adreawo." 
Revelation2:1 Ŋlɔ ɖo ɖe hame, si le Efeso la, ƒe dɔla bena: Amesi lé ɣletivi adre ɖe eƒe nuɖusi, amesi le sikakaɖiti adreawo titina zɔm la, eyae gblɔ esiawo bena:" 
Revelation2:2 Menya wò dɔwɔwɔwo kple wò agbagbadzedze kple wò dzidodo, eye bena mètea ŋu lɔ̃a ame vɔ̃ɖiwo ƒe nya o, eye nèɖo amesiwo gblɔna be, yewonye apostolowo, eye womenyee o la kpɔ, eye nèkpɔ be, aʋatsokalawo wonye," 
Revelation2:3 eye nèɖo dzi, eye nèdze agbagba le nye ŋkɔa ŋuti, eye ɖeɖi metea ŋuwò o." 
Revelation2:4 Gake la mekpɔ nusia le ŋutiwò bena, nègblẽ wò gbã lɔlɔ̃ la ɖi." 
Revelation2:5 Eyata ɖo ŋku afisi nège tso la dzi, ne natrɔ le dzi me, eye nawɔ gbã dɔwɔwɔawo; ne menye nenem o la, mava gbɔwò kaba, eye maɖe wò akaɖiti la ɖa tso enɔƒe, ne mètrɔ le wò dzi me o." 
Revelation2:6 Gake esia le asiwò bena, nèléa fu nikolaitɔwo ƒe nuwɔwɔ, siwo nye hã meléa fui la." 
Revelation2:7 Amesi ke to li nɛ la, nese nusi Gbɔgbɔ la gblɔna hameawo bena: Amesi ke ɖu dzi la, mana agbeti, si le Mawu ƒe Paradiso me la, ƒe kutsetsee, ne wòaɖu." 
Revelation2:8 Eye ŋlɔ ɖo ɖe hame, si le Smirna la, ƒe dɔla bena: Amesi nye gbãtɔ kple mlɔetɔ, amesi ku, eye wògbɔ agbe la, eyae gblɔ esiawo bena:" 
Revelation2:9 Menya wò dɔwɔwɔwo kple wò xaxa kpakple wò ahedada — ke kesinɔtɔ nenye hafi — kple amesiwo gblɔna be, Yudatɔwo yewonye, eye womenyee o, ke boŋ Satana ƒe ƒuƒoƒe wonye la ƒe busubɔbɔ." 
Revelation2:10 Megavɔ̃ fu, siwo nava kpe la, ƒe ɖeke o. Kpɔ ɖa, Abosam latsɔ mia dome amea ɖewo ade gaxɔ me, bene woate mi akpɔ, eye míakpɔ xaxa ŋkeke ewo. Nanye nuteƒewɔla yiɖase ɖe ku me, eye mana agbefiakuku wò!" 
Revelation2:11 Amesi ke to li nɛ la, nese nusi Gbɔgbɔ la gblɔ na hameawo bena: Amesi ke ɖu dzi la, ku evelia mawɔ vɔ̃a ɖekee o." 
Revelation2:12 Ŋlɔ ɖo ɖe hame, si le Pergamo la ƒe ɖɔla bena: Amesi yi ɖaɖɛ nuevee le esi la, eyae gblɔ esiawo bena:" 
Revelation2:13 Menya wò dɔwɔwɔwo kple afisi nenɔna, afisi Abosam ƒe zikpui le, eye nèlé nye ŋkɔ me ɖe asi sesĩe, eye mèsẽ nu le dzinye xɔxɔse ŋuti le ŋkeke, siwo me ke wowu Antipa, si nye nye ɖaseɖila nuteƒewɔla le mia dome, afisi Abosam nana la o." 
Revelation2:14 Gake la mekpɔ nu via ɖewo le ŋutiwò; elabena amesiwo lé Bileam ƒe nufiafia me ɖe asi la, le gbɔwò le afima, amesi fia Balak bena, wòatsɔ nuɖianu aɖo Israel-viwo ŋku me, ne woaɖu nusiwo wosa vɔe na trɔ̃wo, eye woawɔ ahasi." 
Revelation2:15 Nenema ke amesiwo lé nikolaitɔwo ƒe nufiafia me ɖe asi la, le gbɔwò." 
Revelation2:16 Azɔ trɔ le wò dzi me: ne menye nenem o la, mava gbɔwò kaba, eye matsɔ nye nu me yi awɔ aʋa kpli wò." 
Revelation2:17 Amesi ke to li nɛ la, nese nusi Gbɔgbɔ la gblɔ na hameawo bena: Amesi ke ɖu dzi la, mana mana ɣaɣla la ƒe ɖee, eye mana kpe ɣie, eye le kpea dzi la woŋlɔ ŋkɔ yeye ɖi, si amea ɖeke menya o, negbe amesi xɔe la koe." 
Revelation2:18 Eye ŋlɔ ɖo ɖe hame, si le Tiatira la, ƒe ɖɔla bena: Mawuvi, amesi ƒe ŋkuwo le abe dzo ƒe aɖe ene, eye eƒe afɔwo le abe gadzẽ biabia ene la, eyae gblɔ esiawo bena:" 
Revelation2:19 Menya wò dɔwɔwɔwo kple wò lɔlɔ̃ kple wò xɔse kple wo subɔsubɔdɔ kpakple wò dzidodo, eye bena wò dɔwɔwɔ mlɔetɔwo wu gbãtɔwo." 
Revelation2:20 Gake la mekpɔ nusia le ŋutiwò bena, neɖe mɔ na nyɔnu Isabel, si yɔ eɖokui bena nyagblɔɖila, eye wòfiã nu nye dɔlawo heble wo, bene woawɔ ahasi, eye woaɖu nusiwo wosa vɔ na trɔ̃wo." 
Revelation2:21 Eye mena ɣeyiɣie, be wòatrɔ le eƒe dzi me, gake melɔ̃ be, yeatrɔ tso eƒe ahasiwɔwɔ me o." 
Revelation2:22 Kpɔ ɖa, matsɔe aƒu aba dzi, eye amesiwo wɔ ahasi kpakplii la, ne wometrɔ tso woƒe dɔwɔwɔwo me o la, matsɔ wo aƒu xaxa gãa ɖe me?" 
Revelation2:23 eye matsɔ dɔvɔ̃ awu viawo. Eye hameawo kalẽ woanyae bena, nyee nye amesi dzroa ayikuwo kple dziwo me kpɔna, eye maɖo teƒe na mia dome amesiame le eƒe dɔwɔwɔwo nu." 
Revelation2:24 Ke mele gbɔgblɔm na mi ame mamletɔwo le Tiatira, amesiwo katã melé nufiafia sia me ɖe asi o, amesiwo menya Satana ƒe globoƒewo (abe alesi woyɔnɛ ene) o la: Nyemele agba bubua ɖeke da ge ɖe mia dzi o;" 
Revelation2:25 negbe nusi le mia si la, milé eme ɖe asi sesĩe, vaseɖe esime mava." 
Revelation2:26 Eye amesi ke ɖu dzi, eye wòlé nye dɔwɔwɔwo me ɖe asi yiɖase ɖe nuwuwu la, mana ŋusẽe ɖe trɔ̃subɔlawo dzi," 
Revelation2:27 eye wòakplɔ wo kple gatikplɔ, eye woagbã wo gudugudu abe zemela ƒe zewo ene, abe alesi nye hã mekpɔ ŋusẽ tso Fofonye gbɔ ene," 
Revelation2:28 eye matso ŋukeɣletivi anɛ. 
Revelation2:29 Amesi ke to li nɛ la, nese nusi Gbɔgbɔ la gblɔ na hameawo." 
Revelation3:1 Eye ŋlo ɖo ɖe hame, si le Sardes la, ƒe dɔla bena: Amesi si Mawu ƒe gbɔgbɔ adreawo kple ɣletivi adreawo le la, eyae gblɔ esiawo bena: Menya wò dɔwɔwɔwo bena, ŋkɔ le asiwò be, èle agbe, eye nèku." 
Revelation3:2 Nɔ ŋudzɔ, eye nado ŋusẽ nusiwo susɔ le kuku ge la; elabena nyemekpɔ wò dɔwɔwɔwo le blibo le nye Mawu ƒe ŋku me o." 
Revelation3:3 Eyata ɖo ŋku nusi nèxɔ, eye nèse la dzi, eye nèlé eme ɖe asi, eye natrɔ le wò dzi me. Ne mènɔ ŋudzɔ azɔ o la, ekema mava ado ɖe dziwò abe fiafitɔ ene, eye manya gaƒoƒo, si dzi mava ado ɖe dziwò o." 
Revelation3:4 Gake la èkpɔ ŋkɔ ʋeea ɖewo le Sardes, esiwo meƒo ɖi woƒe awuwo o, eye woazɔ kpakplim le awu ɣiwo me; elabena wodze." 
Revelation3:5 Amesi ke ɖu dzi la, woado awu ɣiwo na eyama, eye nyemele eƒe ŋkɔ tutu ge da le agbegbalẽa me o, eye maʋu eƒe ŋkɔ la me le Fofonye kple eƒe dɔlawo ŋku me." 
Revelation3:6 Amesi ke to li nɛ la, nese nusi Gbɔgbɔ la gblɔ na hameawo." 
Revelation3:7 Eye ŋlɔ ɖo ɖe hame, si le Filadelfia la, ƒe dɔla bena: Amesi enye kɔkɔetɔ kple nyateƒea, amesi si Dawid ƒe safui le, amesi ʋuna amea ɖeke metuna o, eye wòtuna amea ɖeke meʋuna o la, eyae gblɔ esiawo bena:" 
Revelation3:8 Menya wò dɔwɔwɔwo! Kpɔ ɖa, metsɔ ʋɔtru, si le nuvo la, ɖo ŋkuwò me, eye amea ɖeke mate ŋu atui o; elabena ŋusẽ ʋeea ɖe koe le asiwò, eye nèlé nye nya la me ɖe asi, eye megbe nu le nye ŋkɔ gbɔ o?" 
Revelation3:9 Kpɔ ɖa, maɖe Satana ƒe ƒuƒoƒemetɔa ɖewo, amesiwo gblɔna bena, Yudatɔwo yewonye, eye womenyee o, ke boŋ aʋatso wokana la; kpɔ ɖa, mawɔ wo be, woava ade ta agu ɖe wò afɔ nu, eye woadze sii be, nye la melɔ̃ wò." 
Revelation3:10 Le esi nèlé nye dzidonya me ɖe asi ŋuti la, eyata nye hã malé wò ɖe asi le tetekpɔ ƒe gaƒoƒo, si le xexeame katã dzi va ge, be woate amesiwo nɔa anyigba dzi akpɔ la me." 
Revelation3:11 Kpɔ da, megbɔna kaba; lé nusi le asiwò me la, ɖe asi sesĩe, bena amea ɖeke nagaxɔ wò fiakuku la o." 
Revelation3:12 Amesi ke ɖu dzi la, mawɔe wòanye sɔti le nye mawukɔa me, eye magaɖo go akpɔ o, eye maŋlɔ nye Mawu ŋkɔ kple nye Mawu ƒe ɖu, si nye Yerusalem yeye, si ɖi tso dziƒo tso nye Mawu gbɔ va la, ƒe ŋkɔ kple nye ŋkɔ yeye la ɖe eyama ŋu." 
Revelation3:13 Amesi ke to li nɛ la, nese nusi Gbɔgbɔ la gblɔ na hameawo." 
Revelation3:14 Eye ŋlɔ ɖo ɖe hame, si le Laodikea la, ƒe dɔla bena: Amesi nye Amen, ɖaseɖila nuteƒewɔla kple nyateƒetɔ, amesi nye Mawu ƒe nuwɔwɔwo ƒe gɔmedzedze la, gblɔ esiawo bena:" 
Revelation3:15 Menya wò dɔwɔwɔwo bena, mefa hã o, mèdze dzo hã o. Ɖe medi be, ɖewo nafa alo nadze dzo." 
Revelation3:16 Ke le esi nèle yɔyrɔe, mèdze dzo o, eye mèfa hã o ŋuti la, matu wò aƒu gbe atso nye nu me." 
Revelation3:17 Elabena, ègblɔna be, yenye kesinɔtɔ, eye kesinɔnuwo le ye si, eye naneke mehiãa ye o, eye mènyae be, hiãtɔ kple nublanuitɔ kple ketɔ kple ŋkuagbãtɔ kpakple amamanɔla nènye o." 
Revelation3:18 Mele aɖaŋu ɖom na wòbe, naƒle sika, si wòlólo le dzo me la, le asinye, be nazu kesinɔtɔ, kple avɔ ɣi, be natsyɔ, ne wò ŋukpeƒe nagadze o, kpakple ŋkutike, be nasi ɖe wò ŋkuwo, be nakpɔ nu." 
Revelation3:19 Nye la, ame geɖe alesi nu melɔ̃na la, mekaa ŋku me na, eye mehea to na; eyata ɖo vevie, be natrɔ le wò dzi me?" 
Revelation3:20 Kpɔ ɖa, mele tsitre le ʋɔa nu le eƒom; ne amea ɖe se nye gbe, eye woʋu ʋɔa la, míage ɖe eme le egbɔ, eye maɖu nu kplii, eye eya hã aɖu nu kplim." 
Revelation3:21 Amesi ke ɖu dzi la, mana woabɔbɔ nɔ anyi kplim ɖe nye fiazikpui la dzi, abe alesi nye hã meɖu dzi, eye mebɔbɔ nɔ anyi kple Fofonye ɖe eƒe fiazikpui dzii la ene." 
Revelation3:22 Amesi ke to li nɛ la, nèse nusi Gbɔgbɔ la gblɔ na hameawo." 
Revelation4:1 Nusia wo megbe la mekpɔ, eye kpɔ ɖa, ʋɔtrua ɖe le ʋuʋu le dziƒo, eye gbe gbãtɔ, si mese la, ƒo nu kplim abe kpẽ ƒe gbeɖiɖi ene, gblɔ bena; Va dziƒo afii, eye mafia nusiwo lava ve me le esiawo megbe la wò." 
Revelation4:2 Eye enumake menɔ gbɔgbɔ la me, eye kpɔ ɖa, wodo fiazikpui anyi de dziƒo, eye amea ɖe bɔbɔ nɔ fiazikpui la dzi," 
Revelation4:3 eye amesi bɔbɔ nɔ edzi la ŋuti le abe yaspis-kpe kple sardis-kpe ene, eye anyieʋɔ, si ŋuti le abe smaragd-kpe ene la, ƒo xlã fiazikpui la." 
Revelation4:4 Eye zikpui blave vɔ ene ƒo xlã fiazikpui la, eye amegã xoxo blave vɔ ene bɔbɔ nɔ zikpuiwo dzi, eye wodo awu ʋlaya ɣiwo, eye sikafiakukuwo le wo ta." 
Revelation4:5 Eye dzikedzowo kple dziɖegbewo kple gbeɖiɖiwo do tso fiazikpui la me. Eye dzokakati adre le bibim le fiazikpui la ŋgɔ, woawoe nye Mawu ƒe gbɔgbɔ adreawo;" 
Revelation4:6 eye atsiaƒu, si me ka abe kristalo lãlɛ ene la, le fiazikpui la ŋgɔ, eye nu gbagbe ene, siwo ŋgɔgbe kple megbe yɔ fũ kple ŋkuwo la, le fiazikpui la titina, eye woƒo xlã fiazikpui la hã." 
Revelation4:7 Eye nu gbagbe gbãtɔ le abe dzata ene, eye nu gbagbe evelia le abe nyitsu ene, eye nu gbagbe etɔ̃lia ƒe mo le abe ame ƒe mo ene, eye nu gbagbe enelia le abe hɔ̃, si le dzodzom ene." 
Revelation4:8 Eye aʋala ade li na nu gbagbe eneawo dome ɖesiaɖe, eye ŋkuwo yɔ wo ŋuti kple wo me fũ, eye womekpɔ dzudzɔ zã kple keli o hele gbɔgblɔm bena: Kɔkɔe, kɔkɔe, kɔkɔe nye Aƒetɔ, Mawu ŋusẽkatãtɔ, amesi nɔ anyi, eye woli, eye wòle vava ge la!" 
Revelation4:9 Eye ne nu gbagbeawo le ŋutikɔkɔe kple bubu kple akpedada tsɔm na amesi bɔbɔ nɔ fiazikpui la dzi, amesi le agbe tso mavɔ me yi ɖe mavɔ me la," 
Revelation4:10 ekema amegã xoxo blave vɔ eneawo tsyɔa mo anyi ɖe amesi bɔbɔ nɔ fiazikpui dzi la ƒe ŋku me, eye woɖea ta agu na amesi le agbe tso mavɔ me yi ɖe mavɔ me, eye wotsɔa woƒe fiakukuawo dana de fiazikpui la ŋgɔ henɔa gbɔgblɔm bena:" 
Revelation4:11 Mía Aƒetɔ kple mía Mawu, wòe dze be, naxɔ ŋutikɔkɔe kple bubu kple ŋusẽ; elabena wòe wɔ nuwo katã, eye wò lɔlɔ̃nu ta woli, eye wowɔ wo ɖo." 
Revelation5:1 Eye mekpɔ agbalẽ, si woŋlɔ nu ɖe eme kple ekɔgo katã, eye wotre enu kple nutrenu adre la, le amesi bɔbɔ nɔ fiazikpui dzi la, ƒe nuɖusi me." 
Revelation5:2 Eye mekpɔ mawudɔla sesẽa ɖe le gbe ƒã ɖem kple gbe gã bena: Amekae dze be, wòaʋu agbalẽ la, eye wòaɖe eƒe nutrenuawo ɖa?" 
Revelation5:3 Eye amea ɖeke menɔ dziƒo alo anyigba dzi alo anyigba te, si te ŋu ʋu agbalẽ la alo te ŋu kpɔ eme hã o." 
Revelation5:4 Eye mefa avi ʋuu, elabena womekpɔ amea ɖeke, si dze be, wòaʋu agbalẽ la alo wòakpɔ eme hã o." 
Revelation5:5 Tete amegã xoxoawo dometɔ ɖeka gblɔ nam bena: Megafa avi o; kpɔ ɖa, dzata, si tso Yuda ƒe to la me, si nye Dawid ƒe ke la, eɖu dzi, be wòaʋu agbalẽ la, eye wòaɖe eƒe nutrenu adreawo ɖa." 
Revelation5:6 Eye le fiazikpui la kple nu gbagbe eneawo titina kple amegã xoxoawo titina la mekpɔ alẽvia ɖe le tsitre ɖi, abe ɖe wowui ene; eye dzo adre kple ŋku adre, siwo nye Mawu ƒe gbɔgbɔ adre, siwo wodɔ ɖo ɖe anyigba katã dzi la, li ne." 
Revelation5:7 Eye wòva, eye wòxɔ agbalẽ la le amesi bɔbɔ nɔ fiazikpui dzi la ƒe nuɖusi me." 
Revelation5:8 Eye esime wòxɔ agbalẽa la, nu gbagbe eneawo kple amegã xoxo blave vɔ eneawo tsyɔ mo anyi ɖe alẽvi la ƒe ŋku me, eye saŋkuwo kple sikagba, siwo me yɔ taŋ kple atike ʋeʋẽe, si nye ame kɔkɔewo ƒe gbedodoɖawo la, le wo dome amesiame si." 
Revelation5:9 Eye wodzi ha yeye le gbɔgblɔm bena: Wòe wòdze be, naxɔ agbalẽ la, eye naɖe eƒe nutrenuawo ɖa; elabena wowu wò, eye nètsɔ wò ʋu ƒle mí tso to sia to kple gbegbɔgblɔ sia gbegbɔgblɔ kple du sia du kple dukɔ sia dukɔ me hena Mawu," 
Revelation5:10 eye nèwɔ wo fiawo kple nunɔlawo na míaƒe Mawu, eye woaɖu fia le anyigba la dzi." 
Revelation5:11 Eye mekpɔ, eye mese mawudɔla geɖe, siwo ƒo xlã fiazikpui la kple nu gbagbeawo kple amegã xoxoawo ƒe gbeɖiɖi, eye woƒe xexlẽme nu anɔ akpe ewo teƒe akpe ewo kple akpeakpewo," 
Revelation5:12 wole gbɔgblɔm kple gbe gã bena: Alẽvi, si wowu la, eyae dze be, wòaxɔ ŋutete kple kesinɔnyenye kple nunya kple ŋusẽ kple bubu kple ŋutikɔkɔe kpakple kafukafu!" 
Revelation5:13 Eye nuwɔwɔ sia nuwɔwɔ, siwo le dziƒo kple anyigba dzi kple anyigba te kple atsiaƒu me kpakple nusiwo katã le wo me la, mese wole gbɔgblɔm bena: Amesi bɔbɔ nɔ fiazikpui dzi kple alẽvi la, etoe lanye kafukafu kple bubu kple ŋutikɔkɔe kpakple ŋusẽ tso mavɔ me yi ɖe mavɔ me!" 
Revelation5:14 Eye nu gbagbe eneawo gblɔ be: Amen! Eye amegã xoxo blave vɔ eneawo tsyo mo anyi hedo gbe ɖa. 
Revelation6:1 Eye esime alẽvi la ɖe nutrenuawo ƒe ɖeka ɖa la, mekpe, eye mese nu gbagbe eneawo dometɔ ɖeka le gbɔgblɔm abe dziɖegbe ƒe gbeɖiɖi ene bena: Va!" 
Revelation6:2 Eye kpo ɖa, mekpɔ sɔ ɣia ɖe, eye amesi ɖoe la, lé dati ɖe asi, eye wotsɔ fiakuku nɛ, eye wòdo go yi ɖale dzi ɖum, bene yeakpɔ dziɖuɖu." 
Revelation6:3 Eye esime wòɖe nutrenu evelia ɖa la, mese nu gbagbe evelia le gbɔgblɔm bena: Va!" 
Revelation6:4 Eye so bubua ɖe, si le dzie la, do go, eye amesi doe la, wona ŋusẽe, be wòaɖe ŋutifafa ɖa le anyigba dzi, bena woawu wo nɔewo, eye wotso yi gã ɖe asi nɛ." 
Revelation6:5 Eye esime wòɖe nutrenu etɔ̃lia ɖa la, mese nu gbagbe etɔ̃lia le gbɔgblɔm bena: Va! Eye kpo ɖa, mekpɔ sɔ yibɔa ɖe, eye amesi ɖoe la, lé nudanu ɖe asi." 
Revelation6:6 Eye mese gbea ɖe, abe nu gbagbe eneawo dome wòɖi le ene hele gbɔgblɔm bena: Lu dzidzenu ɖeka naxa denario ɖeka, eye ƒo dzidzenu etɔ̃ naxɔ denario ɖeka, eye megawɔ vɔ̃a ɖeke ami kple wein o." 
Revelation6:7 Eye esime wòɖe nutrenu enelia ɖa la, mese nu gbagbe enelia ƒe gbe wòle gbɔgblɔm bena: Va!" 
Revelation6:8 Eye kpo ɖa, mekpɔ sɔ hẽa ɖe, eye amesi ɖoe la, ƒe ŋkɔe nye Ku, eye tsiẽƒe le eyome. Eye wona ŋusẽ wo ɖe anyigba ƒe akpa enelia dzi, be woatsɔ yi kple dɔwuame kple ku kpakple anyigba dzi lãwo awu amewoe." 
Revelation6:9 Eye esime wòɖe nutrenu atɔ̃lia ɖa la, mekpɔ amesiwo wowu le Mawu ƒe nya kple ɖaseɖiɖi, si wolé ɖe asi ŋuti la, ƒe luʋɔwo le vɔsamlekpui la te;" 
Revelation6:10 eye wodo ɣli kple gbe gã le gbɔgblɔm bena: Aƒetɔ kɔkɔetɔ kple nyateƒetɔ, ŋkeke nenie nye si mèdrɔ̃ ʋɔnu, eye mèbia hlɔ̃ ɖe míaƒe ʋu ta le amesiwo le anyigba dzi la si o mahã?" 
Revelation6:11 Eye wona lawu ʋlaya ɣi wo dome amesiame, eye wogblɔ na wo bena, woadzudzɔ ɣeyiɣi kpuia ɖe, yiɖase esime woƒe hadɔlawo kple wo nuvi, siwo wole wuwu ge abe woawo ke ene la, hã ƒe xexlẽme nu nade." 
Revelation6:12 Eye esime wòɖe nutrenu adelia ɖa la, mekpɔ, eye anyigbaʋuʋu gãa ɖe va dzo, eye ɣe tro zu yibɔ abe lãfukotoku ene, eye ɣleti tra zu abe ʋu ene." 
Revelation6:13 Eye dziƒoɣletiviwo ge ɖe anyigba abe alesi gboti dudua eƒe tsetse gbogbowo ɖe anyigba, ne ya sesẽa ɖe le ʋuʋum la ene." 
Revelation6:14 Eye woŋlɔ dziƒo ɖa abe agbalẽ ŋɔŋlɔ ene, eye woɖe to sia to kple ƒukpo sia ƒukpo ɖa le wo teƒe." 
Revelation6:15 Eye anyigba dzi fiawo kple amegãwo kple aʋafia gãwo kple kesinɔtɔwo kple ŋusẽtɔwo kple kluviwo katã kpakple ablɔɖeviwo katã ɣla wo ɖokui ɖe dowo kple towo ƒe agawo me; 
Revelation6:16 eye wogblɔ na towo kple agawo bena: Mimu dze mia dzi, eye miɣla mi tso amesi bɔbɔ nɔ fiazikpui dzi la ƒe ŋku me, eye tso alẽvi la ƒe dziku la nu; elabena eƒe dzikuŋkeke gã la ɖo, eye ameka ate ŋu anɔ tsitre ɖe enu mahã?" 
Revelation7:1 Nusiawo megbe la mekpɔ mawudɔla ene wole tsitre ɖe anyigba ƒe dzogoe eneawo dzi, eye wolé anyigba ƒe yaƒoƒo eneawo me ɖe asi, bena ya nagaƒo ɖe anyigba dzi alo ɖe ƒu dzi alo de atia ɖeke dzi o." 
Revelation7:2 Eye mekpɔ mawudɔla bubu le dodom tso ɣedzeƒe, eye Mawu gbagbe la ƒe nutrenu le esi, eye wòdo ɣli kple gbe gã ɖo ɖe mawudɔla ene, siwo wona ŋusẽe be, woawɔ vɔ̃ anyigba kple atsiaƒu la, wòle gbɔgblɔm bena:" 
Revelation7:3 Migawɔ vɔ̃ anyigba alo atsiaƒu alo atiawo o, vaseɖe esime míatre mía Mawu ƒe dɔtsɔlawo ƒe ŋgowo nu." 
Revelation7:4 Eye mese amesiwo nu wotre la ƒe xexlẽme — wotre ame akpe alafa ɖeka blane vɔ ene nu le Israel-viwo ƒe toawo katã me: 
Revelation7:5 Le Yuda ƒe toa me la wotre ame akpe wuieve nu; le Ruben ƒe toa me la wotre ame akpe wuieve nu; le Gad ƒe toa me la wotre ame akpe wuieve nu; 
Revelation7:6 le Aser ƒe toa me la wotre ame akpe wuieve nu; le Naftali ƒe toa me la wotre ame akpe wuieve nu; le Manase ƒe toa me la wotre ame akpe wuieve nu; 
Revelation7:7 le Simeon ƒe toa me la wotre ame akpe wuieve nu: le Lewi ƒe toa me la wotre ame akpe wuieve nu; le Isaxar ƒe toa me la wotre ame akpe wuieve nu; 
Revelation7:8 le Zebulon ƒe toa me la wotre ame akpe wuieve nu; le Yosef ƒe toa me la wotre ame akpe wuieve nu; le Benyamin ƒe toa me la wotre ame akpe wuieve nu. 
Revelation7:9 Nusiawo megbe la mekpɔ, eye kpɔ ɖa, ameha gã, si amea ɖeke mete ŋu xlẽ o la, tso dukɔ sia dukɔ kple to sia to kple du sia du kple gbegbɔgblɔ sia gbegbɔgblɔ me, le tsitre de fiazikpui la ŋgɔ kple alẽvi la ƒe ŋku me, wodo awu ʋlaya ɣiwo, eye wolé deʋayawo ɖe asi," 
Revelation7:10 eye woɖo ɣli kple gbe gã le gbɔgblɔm bena: Xɔname nanye mía Mawu, si bɔbɔ nɔ fiazikpui la dzi, kple alẽvi la tɔ!" 
Revelation7:11 Eye mawudɔlawo katã le tsitre ƒo xlã fiazikpui la kple amegã xoxoawo kple nu gbagbe eneawo, eye wotsyɔ woƒe mo anyi ɖe fiazikpui la ŋgɔ, eye wodo gbe ɖa na Mawu nɔ gbɔgblɔm bena:" 
Revelation7:12 Amen, kafukafu kple ŋutikɔkɔe kple nunya kple akpedada kple bubu kple ŋutete kple ŋusẽ woana mía Mawu la tso mavɔ me yi ɖe mavɔ me! Amen." 
Revelation7:13 Eye amegã xoxoawo dometɔ ɖeka ɖo ŋu gblɔ nam bena: Amekawoe nye esiawo do awu ʋlaya ɣiwo, eye afika wotso mahã?" 
Revelation7:14 Eye megblɔ nɛ bena: Nye aƒetɔ, wòe nyae! Eye wògblɔ nam bena: Amesiawo nye amesiwo ɖo go tso xaxa gã la me, eye wonyã woƒe awuwo, eye wowɔ wo ɣie le alẽvi la ƒe ʋu la me." 
Revelation7:15 Eyata wole Mawu ƒe fiazikpui la ŋgɔ, eye wosubɔnɛ zã kple keli le eƒe xɔ la me, eye amesi bɔbɔ nɔ fiazikpui la dzi la, anɔ wo dome." 
Revelation7:16 Dɔ megale wo wu ge akpɔ o, eye tsikɔ hã megale wo wu ge akpɔ o, eye ɣe kple ŋdɔkutsu megale wo du ge o;" 
Revelation7:17 elabena alẽvi, si le fiazikpui la titina la, anyi wo, eye wòakplɔ wo ayi agbetsi dzidziwo gbɔ, eye Mawu atutu aɖatsiwo katã ɖa le woƒe ŋkuwo me." 
Revelation8:1 Eye esime wòɖe nutrenu adrelia ɖa la, ɖoɖoe zi le dziƒo anɔ gaƒoƒo afã." 
Revelation8:2 Eye mekpɔ mawudɔla adre, siwo le tsitre ɖe Mawu ƒe ŋku me la, eye wotsɔ kpẽ adre na wo." 
Revelation8:3 Eye mawudɔla bubu va, eye wòtsi tre ɖe vɔsamlekpui la gbɔ, eye sikadzudzɔdosonu le esi, eye wotsɔ atike ʋeʋẽe geɖe nɛ, bene wòatsɔe akpe ɖe ame kɔkɔewo katã ƒe gbedodoɖawo ŋuti ada ɖe sikavɔsamlekpui, si le fiazikpui la ŋgɔ la dzi." 
Revelation8:4 Eye atike ʋeʋẽe la ƒe dzudzɔ kple ame kɔkɔewo ƒe gbedodoɖawo tu tso mawudɔla ƒe asi me yi dziƒo le Mawu ƒe ŋku me. 
Revelation8:5 Eye mawudɔla la tsɔ dzudzɔdosonu la, eye wòɖe dzo le vɔsamlekpui la me hede eme tu, eye wòtsɔe ƒu gbe de anyigba, eye dziɖegbewo kple gbeɖiɖiwo kple dzikedzowo kple anyigbaʋuʋu va dzɔ." 
Revelation8:6 Eye mawudɔla adre, siwo lé kpẽ adre ɖe asi la, dzra wo ɖokui ɖo hena kpẽkuku." 
Revelation8:7 Eye mawudɔla gbãtɔa ku kpẽ la, eye tsikpewo dza, eye dzo kple ʋu tɔtɔ, eye wotsɔ wo ƒu gbe ɖe anyigba, eye anyigba ƒe akpa etɔ̃lia fiã, eye atiwo ƒe akpa etɔ̃lia fiã, eve gbe mumuwo katã fiã." 
Revelation8:8 Eye mawudɔla evelia ku kpẽ la, eye wotsɔ nane, si le abe to gãa ɖe ene hele bibim kple dzo la ƒu gbe ɖe atsiaƒu me, eye ƒu ƒe akpa etɔ̃lia trɔ zu ʋu;" 
Revelation8:9 eye nu gbagbe, siwo le atsiaƒu me la, ƒe akpa etɔ̃lia ku, eye nuwo ƒe akpa etɔ̃lia gbã." 
Revelation8:10 Eye mawudɔla etɔ̃lia ku kpẽ la, eye ɣletivi gãa ɖe, si le bibim abe kakati ene la, ge tso dziƒo, eye wòdze tɔsisiwo ƒe akpa etɔ̃lia kple tsi dzidziwo dzi." 
Revelation8:11 Eye ɣletivi ma ƒe ŋkɔe nye Apsinto (enye gbe, si vena abe atsa ene), eye tɔwo ƒe akpa etɔ̃lia trɔ zu tsi veve, eye amewo dome geɖeawo ku le tsiawo ta, le esi wole vevem akpa la ŋuti." 
Revelation8:12 Eye mawudɔla enelia ku kpẽ la, eye woƒo ɣe ƒe akpa etɔ̃lia kple ɣleti ƒe akpa etɔ̃lia kpakple ɣletiviwo ƒe akpa etɔ̃lia, bena woƒe akpa etɔ̃lia nado viviti, eye ŋkeke ƒe akpa etɔ̃lia nagaklẽ o, eye zã hã nenema ke." 
Revelation8:13 Eye mekpɔ, eye mese hɔ̃a ɖe, si le dzodzom lé dziƒo titina la, le gbɔgblɔm kple gbe gãa ɖe bena: Baba, baba, baba na anyigbadzinuwo le mawudɔla etɔ̃, siwo susɔ le kpẽ ku ge la, ƒe kpẽkukuwo ƒe ɖiɖi la ŋuti." 
Revelation9:1 Eye mawudɔla atɔ̃lia ku kpẽ la, eye mekpe ɣletivi, si ge tso dziƒo la dze anyigba, eye wotso aʋli me vudo ƒe safui nɛ." 
Revelation9:2 Eye woʋu aʋli me vudo la nu, eye dzudzɔ lu tso vudo la me abe kpodzo gãa ɖe ƒe dzudzɔ ene, eye ɣe kple yame do viviti le vudo la ƒe dzudzɔ la ŋuti." 
Revelation9:3 Eye ʋetsuviwo do go tso dzudzɔ la me ɖe anyigba la dzi, eye wona ŋusẽ wo, abe alesi ŋusẽ le anyigba dzi dziɖegbewo ŋu ene." 
Revelation9:4 Eye wogblɔ na wo bena, woagawɔ vɔ̃ anyigba dzi gbe mumu alo aŋgba alo atia ɖeke o, negbe amesiwo Mawu ƒe nutrenu mele ŋgonu na o la ɖeɖeko." 
Revelation9:5 Eye wona ŋusẽ wo be, woagawu wo o, ke boŋ bene woawo fu wo ɣleti atɔ̃ sɔŋ; eye woƒe fuwɔwɔ la le abe dziɖegbe ƒe ametete ƒe fuwɔame ene." 
Revelation9:6 Eye le ŋkeke mawo me la amewo aɖi ku, eye womele ekpɔ ge o, eye woadi vevie be, yewoaku, eye ku asi le wo gbɔ." 
Revelation9:7 Eye ʋetsuviawo ƒe nɔnɔme le abe sɔ, siwo wodzra ɖo hena aʋawɔwɔ ene, eye nane le woƒe ta abe fiakuku, siwo ɖi sika ene, eye woƒe mo le abe amewo ƒe mo ene." 
Revelation9:8 Eye taɖa li na wo abe nyɔnuwo ƒe taɖa ene, eye woƒe aɖuwo le abe dzatawo ƒe aɖuwo ene." 
Revelation9:9 Eye akɔtakpoxɔnu le wo si abe gakɔtakpoxɔnu ene, eye woƒe aʋalawo me ƒe ɖiɖi le abe tasiaɖam kple so geɖe, siwo le du sim yina aʋa la ƒe ɖiɖi ene." 
Revelation9:10 Eye asike le wo gɔme abe dziɖegbewo ene, eye ti le wo nu, eye woƒe ŋusẽ le woƒe asikewo me, be woawɔ vɔ̃ amewo ɣleti atɔ̃ sɔŋ." 
Revelation9:11 Eye fiãa ɖe, si nye aʋli me dɔla la, ɖu wo dzi, eye woyɔ eŋkɔ le Hebri-gbe me be Abadon, eye woyɔnɛ le Hela-gbe me be Apolion (gblẽla)." 
Revelation9:12 Vɔ̃ ɖeka nu va yi; kpo ɖa, vɔ̃ eve gale megbe gbɔna." 
Revelation9:13 Eye mawudɔla adelia ku kpẽ la, eye mese gbea ɖe ɖi tso sikavɔsamlekpui, si le Mawu ŋku me la, ƒe dzo eneawo gbɔ," 
Revelation9:14 le gbɔgblɔm na mawudɔla adelia, si lé kpẽ la ɖe asi la bena: Tu dɔla ene, siwo wobla ɖe Frat-tɔsisi gã la to." 
Revelation9:15 Eye wotu dɔla ene, siwo dzra wo ɖokui ɖo hena gaƒoƒo kple ŋkeke kple ɣleti kpakple ƒe la, bena woawu amewo ƒe akpa etɔ̃lia." 
Revelation9:16 Eye sɔdolawo ƒe aʋakɔ ƒe xexlẽme le akpe ewo teƒe akpe ewo teƒe eve; mese woƒe xexlẽme. 
Revelation9:17 Eye ale mekpɔ sɔwo kple amesiwo do wo la, le ŋutega me: Wodo akɔtakpoxɔnu, siwo ɖi dzo, kple akɔtakpoxɔnu yibɔwo kpakple akɔtakpoxɔnu dzewo, eye sɔawo ƒe ta le abe dzatawo ƒe ta ene, eye dzo kple dzudzɔ kpakple dzokpe do go tso woƒe nu me." 
Revelation9:18 Eye wowu amewo ƒe akpa etɔ̃lia le fuwɔame etɔ̃ siawo me, le dzo kple dzudzɔ kpakple dzokpe, si do go tso woƒe nu me la ŋuti." 
Revelation9:19 Elabena sɔawo ƒe ŋusẽ le woƒe nu kple woƒe asikewo me; elabena woƒe asikewo le abe dawo ene, eye ta le wo nu wotsɔna wɔa vɔ̃e." 
Revelation9:20 Eye ame susɔe, siwo fuwɔame siawo mewu o la, wometrɔ le dzi me tso woƒe asinudɔwɔwɔawo me o, bena woagasubɔ gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃wo kple sika- kple klosalo-kple gadzẽ- kple kpe- kpakple ati-legba, siwo metea ŋu kpɔa nu alo sea nu alo zɔa azɔli hã o la o." 
Revelation9:21 Eye wometrɔ tso woƒe hlɔ̃dodowo kple woƒe afakakawo kple woƒe ahasiwɔwɔwo kpakple woƒe fififiwo me o. 
Revelation10:1 Eye mekpɔ mawudɔla sesẽ bubua ɖe le ɖiɖim tso dziƒo le alilikpo me, eye anyieʋɔ le eƒe ta me, eye eƒe ŋku me le abe ɣe ene, eye eƒe afɔwo le abe dzosɔtiwo ene," 
Revelation10:2 eye agbalẽvi, si woʋu la, de esi, eye wotsɔ eƒe nuɖusifɔ da ɖe atsiaƒu dzi, eye wotsɔ eƒe miãfɔ da ɖe anyigba dzi," 
Revelation10:3 eye wòdo ɣli kple gbe gãa ɖe, abe alesi dzata ɖea gbe ene, eye esime wòdo ɣli la, dziɖegbe adreawo ɖe woƒe gbe ɖe go." 
Revelation10:4 Eye esime dziɖegbe adreawo ɖe woƒe gbe ɖe go la, medi be, maŋlɔe; eye mese gbea ɖe tso dziƒo le gbɔgblɔm bena: Tre nusiwo dziɖegbe adreawo gblɔ la nu, eye megaŋlɔ wo o." 
Revelation10:5 Eye mawudɔla, si mekpɔ wòle tsitre ɖe atsiaƒu kple anyigba dzi la, do eƒe nuɖusi ɖe dziƒo," 
Revelation10:6 eye wòta amesi le agbe tso mavɔ me yi ɖe mavɔ me, amesi wɔ dziƒo kple nusiwo le eme kple anyigba kple nusiwo le edzi kpakple atsiaƒu kple nusiwo le eme la, bena ɣeyiɣia ɖeke naganɔ anyi o," 
Revelation10:7 ke boŋ le mawudɔla adrelia ƒe gbeɖeɖeŋkekewo me, esime woaku kpẽ la, woawu Mawu ƒe nya ɣaɣla la nu le nyanyuie, si wogblɔ fia eƒe dɔla, siwo nye nyagblɔɖilawo la nu." 
Revelation10:8 Eye gbe, si mese tso dziƒo la, gaƒo nu kplim, eye wògblɔ bena: Yi naɖaxɔ agbalẽvi, si le ʋuʋu le mawudɔla, si le tsitre ɖe atsiaƒu kple anyigba dzi la si." 
Revelation10:9 Eye meyi mawudɔla la gbɔ yi ɖagblɔ nɛ be, wòatsɔ agbalẽvi la nam. Eye wògblɔ nam bena: Xɔe, eye namii, eye wòaɖu dɔme na wò, ke wòavivi le wò nu me abe anyitsi ene." 
Revelation10:10 Eye mexɔ agbalẽvi fa le mawudɔla la si, eye memii, eye wòvivi le nye nu me abe anyitsi ene, eye enumake esi meɖui la, eɖu dɔme nam." 
Revelation10:11 Eye wogblɔ nam bena: Ele na wò be, nagagblɔ nya ɖi le dukɔwo kple trɔ̃subɔlawo kple gbegbɔgblɔwo kple fiawo ŋuti." 
Revelation11:1 Eye wotsɔ ayeti, si le abe atitɔɖeŋu ene la, de asi nam hegblɔ bena: Tsi tre, eye nadzidze mawuxɔ la kple mlekpui la kpakple amesiwo doa gbe ɖa le eme la." 
Revelation11:2 Eye naɖe xɔxɔnu, si le gbedoxɔa ŋu la, le eme, eye megadzidzee o; elabena wotsɔe na trɔ̃subɔlawo, eye woanya avuzi le du kɔkɔe la dzi ɣleti blane vo eve sɔŋ." 
Revelation11:3 Eye mana ŋusẽ nye ɖaseɖila eve, bena woagblɔ nya ɖi ŋkeke akpe ɖeka kple alafa eve kple blaade, eye woanɔ akpanya me." 
Revelation11:4 Amesiawo nye amiti eve kple akaɖiti eve, siwo le tsitre ɖe anyigba ƒe Aƒetɔ la ŋku me la." 
Revelation11:5 Eye ne amea ɖe ɖi be, yeawɔ vɔ̃ ɖe wo ŋu la, dzo dona tsoa woƒe nu me, eye wòfiãa woƒe ketɔwo; eye ne amea ɖe di be, yeawɔ vɔ̃ ɖe wo ŋu la, ele be, woawui nenema ke." 
Revelation11:6 Ŋusẽ le amesiawo si be, woatu dziƒo nu, bena tsi magadza le woƒe nyagblɔdiŋkekeawo me o, eye ŋusẽ le wo si ɖe tɔwo dzi, be woatrɔ wo woazu ʋu, eye be woatsɔ fuwɔame tsyo ƒomevi aƒo anyigba la zi geɖe, alesi wolɔ̃." 
Revelation11:7 Eye ne wowu woƒe ɖaseɖiɖi nu vɔ la, ekema lã, si ɖo tso aʋli me la, awɔ aʋa kpli wo, eye wòaɖu wo dzi, eye wòawu wo." 
Revelation11:8 Eye woƒe ŋutilã kukuwo anɔ du gã la ƒe ablɔ me; woyɔ ɖu sia le lododo me bena: Sodom kple Egipte, afisi hã woklã woƒe Aƒetɔ ɖe ati ŋu le." 
Revelation11:9 Eye dukɔwo ƒe ƒomeawo kple gbegbɔgblɔwo kpakple trɔ̃subɔlawo dometɔa ɖewo lakpɔ woƒe ŋutilã kukuawo ŋkeke etɔ̃ kple afã, eye womaɖe mɔ be, woaɖi woƒe ŋutilã kukuawo o." 
Revelation11:10 Eye anyigbadzinɔlawo lakpɔ dzidzɔ le wo ŋuti, eye woagli kple dzidzɔ, eye woaɖo nunanawo ɖe wo nɔewo; elabena nenem nyagblɔɖila eve siawo wɔ fu amesiwo nɔ anyigba la dzi." 
Revelation11:11 Eye ŋkeke etɔ̃ kple afã megbe la agbegbɔgbɔ tso Mawu gbɔ ge ɖe wo me, eye wotsi tre ɖe woƒe afɔwo dzi, eye vɔvɔ̃ gãa ɖe va dze amesiwo kpɔ wo la dzi." 
Revelation11:12 Eye wose gbe gãa ɖe tso dziƒo le gbɔgblɔm na wo bena: Miva dziƒo afii! Eye woyi dziƒo le alilikpo me, eye woƒe futɔwo kpɔ wo ɖa." 
Revelation11:13 Eye le gaƒoƒo kema ke me la anyigba ʋuʋu ŋutɔ, eye du la ƒe akpa ewolia mũ dze anyi, eye wowu ame akpe adre le anyigbaʋuʋu la me, eye susɔeawo vɔ̃ ŋutɔ, eye wotsɔ ŋutikɔkɔe na dziƒo Mawu la." 
Revelation11:14 Vɔ̃ evelia nu va yi, kpɔ ɖa, vɔ̃ etɔ̃lia gbɔna kaba." 
Revelation11:15 Eye mawudɔla adrelia ku kpẽ la, eye gbe gãwo ɖi le dziƒo le gbɔgblɔm bena: Xexemefiaɖuƒe la trɔ zu mía Aƒetɔ kple eƒe Kristo la tɔ, eye wòaɖu fia tso mavɔ me yi ɖe mavɔ me." 
Revelation11:16 Eye amegã xoxo blave vɔ ene, siwo bɔbɔ nɔ woƒe zikpuiwo dzi le Mawu ƒe ŋku me la, tsyɔ woƒe mo anyi, eye wodo gbe ɖa na Mawu" 
Revelation11:17 le gbɔgblɔm bena: Míeda akpe na wò, Aƒetɔ, Mawu ŋusẽkatãtɔ, wò amesi li, eye nenɔ anyi; elabena exɔ wò ŋusẽ gã, eye neɖu fia." 
Revelation11:18 Eye dzi ku dukɔwo, eye wò dziku va, eye ame kukuwo ƒe ɣeyiɣi la ɖo, bene woadrɔ̃ ʋɔnu wo, eye be nana fetu wò dɔla, siwo nye nyagblɔɖilawo, kple ame kɔkɔewo kple amesiwo vɔ̃a wò ŋkɔ la, ɖeviwo kple ame tsitsiwo, eye be natsrɔ̃ amesiwo gblẽa anyigba la." 
Revelation11:19 Eye wotu mawuxɔ, si le dziƒo, eye wokpɔ eƒe nubablaɖaka le eƒe xɔ la me, eye dzikedzowo kple gbeɖiɖiwo kple dziɖegbewo kple anyigbaʋuʋu kple tsikpe gãwo va dzɔ." 
Revelation12:1 Eye wokpɔ dzesi gãa ɖe le dziƒo: Nyɔnua ele do ɣe, eye ɣleti le eƒe afɔ te, eye ɣleti wuieve ƒe fiakuku le eta," 
Revelation12:2 eye fu le eƒo, eye wòle ɣli dom le fuɖuame ŋuti, eye vidzidzi nye do nɛ." 
Revelation12:3 Eye wokpɔ dzesi bubua ɖe le dziƒo, eye kpɔ ɖa, ʋɔ driba dzi gãa ɖe, si ta adre kple dzo ewo li na, eye fiakuku adre le eƒe tawo." 
Revelation12:4 Eye eƒe asike he dziƒoɣletiviwo ƒe akpa etɔ̃lia, eye wotsɔ wo ƒu gbe ɖe anyigba. Eye ʋɔ driba la tsi tre ɖe nyɔnu, si le vi dzi ge la, ƒe ŋku me, bena ne edzi via ko la, ne yeatsɔe ami." 
Revelation12:5 Eye wòdzi ŋutsuvi, si latsɔ gatikplɔ akplɔ dukɔwo katã; eye wotsɔ via yi Mawu kple eƒe fiazikpui la gbɔ." 
Revelation12:6 Eye nyɔnu la si yi gbedzi, afisi Mawu dzra teƒea ɖe ɖo ɖi nɛ le, bena woanyii le afima ŋkeke akpe ɖeka alafa eve kple blaade." 
Revelation12:7 Eye aʋa dzo le dziƒo: Mixael kple eƒe dɔlawo yi aʋa wɔ ge kple ʋɔ driba la. Eye ʋɔ driba kple eƒe dɔlawo wɔ aʋa la," 
Revelation12:8 eye womeɖu dzi o, eye womegakpɔ woƒe teƒe hã le dziƒo o." 
Revelation12:9 Eye wotsɔ ʋɔ driba gã, si nye da xoxo la, esi woyɔna be: Abosam kple Satana, amesi nye xexeame kalẽ blela la, ƒu gbe, eye wotsɔe ƒu gbe ɖe anyigba, eye wotsɔ eƒe dɔlawo hã ƒu gbe ɖe anyi hekpe ɖe eŋuti." 
Revelation12:10 Eye mese gbe gãa ɖe le dziƒo le gbɔgblɔm bena: Azɔ xɔname kple ŋusẽ kpakple fiaɖuƒe la zu mía Mawu la tɔ, eye ŋusẽ la zu eƒe Kristo la tɔ; elabena wotsɔ mia nɔviwo nutsola, si nɔa wo nu tsom le Mawu ƒe ŋku me zã kple keli la, ƒu gbe." 
Revelation12:11 Eye woɖu edzi to alẽvi la ƒe ʋu kple woƒe ɖaseɖiɖi ƒe nya la me, eye womelɔ̃ woƒe agbe o vaseɖe ku me." 
Revelation12:12 Eyata dzi nedzɔ mi, mi dziƒowo kple amesiwo nɔ wo me la! Baba na anyigba kple atsiaƒu; elabena Abosam ɖi va mia gbɔ, eye dzi le ekum ŋutɔ, elabena ènyae be, vovoɣi via ɖe ko yekpɔ." 
Revelation12:13 Eye esime ʋɔ driba la kpɔ bena, wotsɔ ye ƒu gbe ɖe anyigba la, eti nyɔnu, si dzi ŋutsuvi la yome." 
Revelation12:14 Eye wotsɔ hɔ̃ gãa ɖe ƒe aʋala eve na nyɔnu la, bena wòadzo ayi gbedzi ayi ɖe teƒe, afisi woanyii le ɣeyiɣia ɖe kple ɣeyiɣiwo kpakple ɣeyiɣi afã tso da la ƒe ŋku me." 
Revelation12:15 Eye da la tu tsi tso eƒe nu me ɖe nyɔnua yome abe tɔsisi ene, bene tɔsisi la nalée ayii." 
Revelation12:16 Ke anyigba xɔ na nyɔnua, eye anyigba ke nu, eye wono tɔsisi, si ʋɔ driba la tu tso eƒe nu me la." 
Revelation12:17 Eye dzi ku ŋɔ driba la ɖe nyɔnua ŋuti, eye wòdzo yi aʋa wɔ ge kple nyɔnua ƒe ƒome, siwo susɔ, amesiwo ɖea Mawu ƒe seawo me ɖe asi, eye Yesu ƒe ɖaseɖiɖi le wo si la." 
Revelation13:1 Eye metsi tre ɖe ƒutake la dzi, eye mekpɔ lãa ɖe le ɖoɖom tso atsiaƒu me, eye dzo ewo kple ta adre li nɛ, eye fiakuku ewo le eƒe dzoawo dzi, eye busuŋkɔwo le eƒe tawo ŋu." 
Revelation13:2 Eye lã, si mekpɔ la, le abe lãkle ene, eye eƒe afɔwo le abe sisiblisi ƒe afɔwo ene, eye eƒe nu le abe dzata ƒe nu ene; eye ʋɔ driba la tsɔ eƒe ŋutete kple eƒe fiazikpui kpakple eƒe ŋusẽ gã nɛ." 
Revelation13:3 Eye eƒe tawo dometɔ ɖeka le abe kubi wode eŋu ene, eye wowɔ eƒe kubi la ne wòku; eye xexeame katã ƒe mo wɔ yaa le lã la yome." 
Revelation13:4 Eye wode ta agu na nɔ driba la; elabena etsɔ eƒe ŋusẽ na lã la, eye wode ta agu na lã la le gbɔgblɔm bena: Amekae le abe lã la ene, eye amekae ate ŋu awɔ aʋa kplii mahã?" 
Revelation13:5 Eye wotsɔ nu, si gblɔa nya gãwo kple busunyawo la nɛ, eye wotsɔ ŋusẽ nɛ, be wòanɔ dɔ dzi ɣleti blane vɔ eve" 
Revelation13:6 Eye wòke nu de asi busunyagbɔgblɔ me de Mawu ŋuti, be yeado busu eƒe ŋkɔ kple eƒe agbadɔ kpakple amesiwo nɔa dziƒo." 
Revelation13:7 Eye wona ŋusẽe, be wòawɔ aʋa kple ame kɔkɔewo, eye ne wòaɖu wo dzi, eye wona ŋusẽe ɖe to sia to kple dukɔ sia dukɔ kple gbegbɔgblɔ sia gbegbɔgblɔ kpakple trɔ̃subɔlawo katã dzi." 
Revelation13:8 Eye anyigbadzinɔla, siwo katã ƒe ŋkɔwo womeŋlɔ ɖe alẽvi, si wowu la, ƒe agbegbalẽa me tso xexeame ƒe gɔmeɖoɖoanyi me o la, woasubɔe." 
Revelation13:9 Amesi to li na la, nesee!" 
Revelation13:10 Ne amea ɖe de ame gaxɔ me la, woaɖe eya hã gaxɔ me: ne amea ɖe wu ame kple yi la, ele be, woawu eya hã kple yi. Afii ame kɔkɔewo ƒe dzidodo kple woƒe xɔse le." 
Revelation13:11 Eye mekpɔ lã bubua ɖe le ɖoɖom tso anyigba me, eye dzo eve li nɛ abe alẽvi tɔ ene, eye wòƒo nu abe ʋɔ driba la ene." 
Revelation13:12 Eye wòwɔ lã gbãtɔ ƒe ŋusẽdɔwo katã le eƒe ŋku me. Eye wòwɔ anyigba la kple amesiwo nɔ edzi la bena, woadze klo asubɔ lã gbãtɔ, si ƒe kubi wowɔ wòku la." 
Revelation13:13 Eye wòwɔ dzesi gãwo bena, wòna dzo gɔ̃ hã ge tso dziƒo dze anyigba le amewo ƒe ŋku me." 
Revelation13:14 Eye woble anyigbadzinɔlawo de dzesi, si wotsɔ nɛ, be wòawɔ le lã la ƒe ŋku me la ŋuti hele gbɔgblɔm na anyigbadzinɔlawo bena, woawɔ legba de lã, si ŋu wode abii kple yi, eye wòle agbe la ƒe nɔnɔme me nɛ." 
Revelation13:15 Eye wona ŋusẽe, be wòatsɔ gbɔgbɔ na lã la ƒe legba, bena lã la ƒe legba naƒo nu hã, eye wòawɔ bena, woawu ame geɖe, alesi nu medze klo subɔ lã la ƒe legba o." 
Revelation13:16 Eye wòwɔ bena, woade dzesi amewo katã, ɖeviwo kple ame tsitsiwo kple kesinɔtɔwo kple ame dahewo kple ablɔɖeviwo kple kluviwo ƒe nuɖusi alo woƒe ŋgonu," 
Revelation13:17 bena amea ɖeke magate ŋu aƒle nu alo adzra nu o, negbe amesi ŋu lã la ƒe ŋkɔ alo eƒe ŋkɔ ƒe xexlẽme ƒe dzesi le la ko." 
Revelation13:18 Afii nunya le! Amesi ke si gɔmesese le la, nèbu lã la ƒe xexlẽme kpɔ; elabena ame ƒe xexlẽme wònye, eye eƒe xexlẽme enye alafa ade kple blaade vɔ ade." 
Revelation14:1 Eye mekpɔ, eye kpɔ ɖa, alẽvi la le tsitre de Zion-to la dzi, eye ame akpe alafa ɖeka blane vɔ ene, siwo ƒe ŋgonu woŋlɔ eƒe ŋkɔ kple Fofoa ƒe ŋkɔ ɖo la, le eŋu." 
Revelation14:2 Eye mese gbea ɖe tso dziƒo abe tsi geɖewo ƒe gbeɖiɖi ene, eye abe dziɖegbe sesẽa ɖe ƒe gbeɖiɖi ene, eye gbe, si mese la, le abe saŋkuƒola, siwo le woƒe saŋkuwo ƒom la, ƒe gbeɖiɖi ene." 
Revelation14:3 Eye wodzi ha yeyea ɖe le fiazikpui la kple nu gbagbe eneawo kpakple amegã xoxoawo ƒe ŋku me; eye amea ɖeke mete ŋu srɔ̃ hadzidzi la o, negbe ame akpe alafa ɖeka blane vɔ ene, siwo woƒle tso anyigba dzi la koe." 
Revelation14:4 Nenem me siawo nye amesiwo meƒo ɖi wo ɖokui kple nyɔnuwo o; elabena ɖetugbiwo wonye. Amesiawo dzea Alẽvi la yome yia afisiafi, si wòyina. Amesiawo la woƒle wo tso amewo dome, be woanye ŋgɔgbetɔwo na Mawu kple alẽvi la." 
Revelation14:5 Eye womekpɔ aʋatsokakaa ɖeke le woƒe nu me o; elabena wonye mokaka manɔŋutɔwo. 
Revelation14:6 Eye mekpɔ mawudɔla bubua de le dzodzom le dziƒo titina, eye wòlé nyanyuie mavɔ ɖe asi, be yeagblɔ afia anyigbadzinuwo kple trɔ̃subɔlawo katã kple to sia to kple gbegbɔgblɔ sia gbegbɔgblɔ kpakple dukɔ sia dukɔ," 
Revelation14:7 eye wòle gbɔgblɔm kple gbe gã bena: Mivɔ̃ Mawu, eye mitsɔ ŋutikɔkɔe nɛ; elabena eƒe ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃gaƒoƒo la ɖo, eye miɖe ta agu na amesi wo dziƒo kple anyigba kple atsiaƒu kple tsi dzidziwo." 
Revelation14:8 Eye mawudɔla bubu, si nye evelia la, dze eyome le gbɔgblɔm bena: Emu, Babilon gã la mu! Du, si na dukɔwo katã no eƒe ahasiwɔwɔ ƒe dɔmedzoe ƒe aha la." 
Revelation14:9 Eye mawudɔla bubu, si nye etɔ̃lia la, dze wo yome le gbɔgblɔm kple gbe gã bena; Ne amea ɖe de ta agu na lã la kple eƒe legba, eye wòxɔ eƒe dzesi ɖo eƒe ŋgonu alo eƒe asi ŋu la," 
Revelation14:10 eya lano Mawu ƒe dɔmedzoe ƒe aha, si wometɔtɔ kɔ ɖe eƒe dɔmedzoekplu la me o, eye woatsɔ dzo kple dzokpe ewɔ fui le mawudɔla kɔkɔeawo kple alẽvi la ŋku me." 
Revelation14:11 Eye woƒe fu wowɔ ƒe dzudzu la tu le dziƒo yim tso mava me yi ɖe mavɔ me, eye amesiwo de ta agu na lã la kple amesi ke xɔ eƒe ŋkɔ ƒe dzesi la, womakpɔ dzudzɔ zã kple keli o." 
Revelation14:12 Afii ame kɔkɔe, siwo léa Mawu ƒe seawo kple Yesu ƒe dzixɔse me ɖe asi la, ƒe dzidodo le." 
Revelation14:13 Eye mese gbea ɖe tso dziƒo le gbɔgblɔm bena: Ŋlɔ bena: Woayra ame kuku, siwo ku le Aƒetɔ la me tso esia dzi heyina: ẽ, Gbɔgbɔ la gblɔ bena, woadzudzɔ wo dokui tso woƒe agbagbadzedzewo me, elabena woƒe dɔwɔwɔwo dze wo yome." 
Revelation14:14 Eye kpo da, mekpɔ alilikpo yia ɖe, eye amea ɖe bɔbɔ nɔ alilikpo la dzi abe amegbetɔvi ene, eye sikafiakuku le eta, eye hɛ gobɛ ɖaɖɛa ɖe le esi." 
Revelation14:15 Eye mawudɔla bubua ɖe do tso gbedoxɔ me le ɣli dom kple gbe gã do de amesi bɔbɔ nɔ alilikpo la dzi la bena: Do wò hɛ gobɛ la ɖa, ne naya nu; elabena nuŋeɣi ɖo, eye anyigba dzi nuwo ɖi!" 
Revelation14:16 Eye amesi bɔbɔ nɔ alilikpo la dzi la, do eƒe hɛ gobɛ ɖe anyigba dzi, eye wòya anyigba dzi nuwo." 
Revelation14:17 Eye mawudɔla bubua ɖe do tso gbedoxɔ, si le dziƒo la me, eye eya hã lé hɛ gobɛ ɖaɖɛa de de asi." 
Revelation14:18 Eye mawudɔla bubua ɖe, si kpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe dzo dzi la, do tso vɔsamlekpui la me, eye wòdo ɣli kple gbe gãa de do de amesi lé hɛ gobɛ ɖaɖɛ ɖe asi la bena: Do wò hɛ gobɛ ɖaɖɛ la da, ne nala anyigba dzi weinka ƒe kpowo; elabena eƒe kutsetseawo di!" 
Revelation14:19 Eye mawudɔla la do eƒe hɛ gobɛ ɖe anyigba dzi, eye wòtso anyigba dzi weinka ƒe kutsetseawo, eye wòtsɔ wo da ɖe Mawu ƒe dɔmedzoe ƒe weinfiãnu gã la me." 
Revelation14:20 Eye wofanya weintsetseawo kple afɔ le dua godo, eye ʋu do le weinfiãnu la me le ɖɔɖɔm vaseɖe keke sɔwo ƒe numega ŋuti ke, eye wòde stadio akpe ɖeka kple alafa ade." 
Revelation15:1 Eye mekpɔ dzesi bubu le lu dziƒo, si lolo, eye wòwɔ nuku; mawudɔla adre lé fuwɔame mamletɔ adreawo de asi; elabena woawo me wowu Mawu ƒe dɔmedzoe la nu le." 
Revelation15:2 Eye mekpɔ atsiaƒu wòle abe ahũhɔ̃e, si me bia hẽ abe dzo ene la ene; eye amesiwo ɖu lã la kple eƒe legba kpakple eƒe ŋkɔ ƒe xexlẽme dzi la, le tsitre de atsiaƒu ɖiahũhɔ̃e la nu, eye Mawu ƒe saŋkuwo le wo si." 
Revelation15:3 Eye wole Mose, Mawu ƒe dɔla, aƒe ha kple alẽvi la ƒe ha dzim hele gbɔgblɔm bena: Aƒetɔ, Mawu ŋusẽkatãtɔ, gã kple nuku nye wò dɔwɔwɔwo; wò dukɔwo dzi fia la, dzɔdzɔe kple nyateƒe enye wò mɔwo!" 
Revelation15:4 Aƒetɔ, amekae mavɔ̃ wò o, eye makafu wò ŋku la o mahã? Elabena wò ɖeka bɔ koe le kɔkɔe; elabena dukɔwo katã woava ade ta agu le ŋkuwò me; elabena woɖe wò nu dzɔdzɔe wɔwɔwo ɖe go fia." 
Revelation15:5 Eye esia megbe la mekpe, eye ɖaseɖiɖi ƒe agbadɔ la ƒe gbedoxɔ le ʋuʋu le dziƒo;" 
Revelation15:6 eye mawudɔla adre, siwo lé fuwɔame adreawo ɖe asi la, do go tso gbedoxɔ la me, eye wodo aklalabiɖibiɖiwu dzadzɛ, si le dzo sim kaŋkaŋ la, eye wotso sikalidziblanu bla woƒe akɔtawo." 
Revelation15:7 Eye nu gbagbe eneawo dometɔ ɖeka tsɔ sikakplu adre, siwo Mawu, si le agbe tso mavɔ me yi ɖe mavɔ me la, ƒe dɔmedzoe yɔ taŋtaŋ la, na mawudɔla adreawo." 
Revelation15:8 Eye dzudzɔ, si tso Mawu ƒe ŋutikɔkɔe kple eƒe ŋusẽ gbɔ la, yɔ gbedoxɔ la me taŋ, eye amea ɖeke mete ŋu ge ɖe gbedoxɔ la me o, vaseɖe esime wowu mawudɔla adreawo ƒe fu wɔa me adreawo nu." 
Revelation16:1 Eye mese gbe gãa ɖe tso gbedoxɔa me le gbɔgblɔm na mawudɔla adreawo bena: Miheyi, ne miatrɔ Mawu ƒe dɔmedzoekpluawo akɔ ɖe anyigba dzi." 
Revelation16:2 Eye gbãtɔa yi, eye wòtrɔ eƒe kplu la kɔ ɖe anyigba dzi, eye ƒoƒoe vɔ̃, si vena ŋutɔ la, ƒo amesiwo ŋu lã la ƒe dzesi le kple amesiwo de ta agu na eƒe legba la." 
Revelation16:3 Eye mawudɔla evelia trɔ eƒe kplu la kɔ ɖe atsiaƒu me, eye wòtrɔ zu abe ame kukua de ƒe ʋu ene, eye nu gbagbe sia nu gbagbe, si le ƒua me la ku." 
Revelation16:4 Eye mawudɔla etɔ̃lia trɔ eƒe kplu la kɔ ɖe tɔsisiwo kple tsi dzidziwo me, eye wotrɔ zu ʋu." 
Revelation16:5 Eye mese tsiawo ƒe mawudɔla le gbɔgblɔm bena: Wò amesi li, eye nènɔ anyi, wò kɔkɔetɔ la, wòe nye dzɔdzɔetɔ, le esi nèdrɔ̃a ʋɔnu ale la ŋuti;" 
Revelation16:6 elabena wòtrɔ ame kɔkɔewo kple nyagblɔɖilawo ƒe nu kɔ ɖe anyi, eye nètsɔ ʋu na wo, bena woano, eye wòdze wo nenema." 
Revelation16:7 Eye mese vɔsamlekpui la le gbɔgblɔm bena: Ẽ, Aƒetɔ, Mawu ŋusẽkatãtɔ la, nyateƒe kple dzɔdzɔe nye wò ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃wo." 
Revelation16:8 Eye mawudɔla enelia tra eƒe kplu la ka ɖe ɣe dzi, eye wona ŋusẽe be, woatso dzo afiã amewo." 
Revelation16:9 Eye dzoxɔxɔ gã ŋuta ɖu amewo, eye wode busu Mawuƒe ŋkɔ, si kpo ŋusẽ ɖe fuwɔame siawo dzi, eye wometrɔ le woƒe dzi me, bene woatsɔ kafukafu nɛ o." 
Revelation16:10 Eye mawudɔla atɔ̃lia trɔ eƒe kplu la kɔ ɖe lã la ƒe zikpui dzi, eye eƒe fiaduƒe do viviti, eye woɖu ade le fukpekpe la ta," 
Revelation16:11 eye wodo busu dziƒo Mawu la le woƒe fukpekpe kple woƒe ƒoƒoeawo ta, eye wometrɔ tso woƒe nuwɔnawo me o." 
Revelation16:12 Eye mawudɔla adelia trɔ eƒe kplu la kɔ ɖe Frat-tɔsisi gã la dzi, eye eme tsi la mie, bene woadzra mɔ ɖo na ɣedzeƒefiawo." 
Revelation16:13 Eye mekpɔ gbɔgbɔ makɔmakɔ etɔ̃, siwo le abe akpɔkplɔwo ene la, do go tso ʋɔ driba la kple lã la kpakple aʋatsonyagblɔɖila ƒe nu me:" 
Revelation16:14 elabena wonye gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃wo ƒe gbɔgbɔ, siwo nɔa dzesiwo wɔm, eye wonɔa xexeame katã ƒe fiawo gbɔ yim, bena woaƒo wo nu ƒu hena Mawu, ŋusẽkatãtɔ la, ƒe ŋkeke gã la ƒe aʋawɔwɔ." 
Revelation16:15 Kpɔ ɖa, megbɔna abe fiafitɔ ene; woayra amesi nɔa ŋudzɔ, eye wòdzra eƒe awuwo ɖo, bene wòagazɔ amama, eye woakpɔ eƒe ŋukpe ƒe o." 
Revelation16:16 Eye woƒo wo nu ƒu ɖe teƒe, si woyɔna le Hebri-gbe me bena Harmagedon." 
Revelation16:17 Eye mawudɔla adrelia trɔ eƒe kplu la kɔ ɖe ya me, eye gbe gãa ɖe ɖi tso gbeɖoxɔa me tso fiazikpui la gbɔ le gbɔgblɔm bena: Wowɔe vɔ!" 
Revelation16:18 Eye dzikedzowo kple gbeɖidiwo kple dziɖegbewo kple anyigbaʋuʋu gãa ɖe, si tɔgbe meva kpɔ, tso esime amewo le anyigba dzi o la, va dzɔ, ale anyigbaʋuʋu gã ŋutɔ sia tɔgbe va dzɔ." 
Revelation16:19 Eye du gã la ma ɖe akpa etɔ me, eye dukɔwo ƒe duwo mũ; eye woɖo ŋku Babilon gã la dzi le Mawu ƒe ŋku me, bene woana eƒe dɔmedzoedziku ƒe ahakplui, ne wòano." 
Revelation16:20 Eye ƒukpowo katã si, eye womegakpɔ towo o." 
Revelation16:21 Eye tsikpe gã, siwo ƒe kpekpeme anɔ talento ɖeka la, dza tso dziƒo hlẽ ɖe amewo dzi, eye amewo do busu Mawu le tsikpeawo ƒe fuwɔame la ŋuti; elabena woƒe fuwɔame la nu sẽ ŋuta." 
Revelation17:1 Eye mawudɔla adre, siwo si kplu adreawo nɔ la, dometɔ ɖeka ƒo nu kplim gblɔ bena: Va afii, ne mafia gbolo gã, si bɔbɔ na tsi geɖewo dzi la, ƒe ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ wò;" 
Revelation17:2 amesia kple anyigba dzi fiawo wo ahasi, eye wòna anyigbadzinɔlawo mũ eƒe ahasiwɔwɔ ƒe aha la," 
Revelation17:3 Eye wòkplɔm heyi gbedzi le gbɔgbɔ me, eye mekpe nyɔnua ɖe bɔbɔ nɔ lã dzẽa de, si ta adre kple dzo ewo li na, eye busuŋkɔwo le eŋuti fũ la dzi." 
Revelation17:4 Eye nyɔnu la do aɖabɛwu kple awu dzi, eye wòwɔ leke kple sika kple kpe xɔasi kple adzagbawo, eye sikakplu, si me yɔ fũ kple ŋunyɔnuwo kple eƒe ahasiwɔwɔ ƒe makɔmakɔnyenye la, le esi." 
Revelation17:5 Eye woŋlɔ ŋkɔ, si nye nya ɣaɣla lã, ɖe eƒe ŋgonu bena: Babilon gã la, gbolowo kple anyigba dzi ŋunyɔnuwo ƒe dada." 
Revelation17:6 Eye mekpɔ nyɔnu la mu ame kɔkɔewo ƒe ʋu kple Yesu ƒe ɖaseɖilawo ƒe ʋu. Eye esime mekpɔe la, nye mo wɔ yaa geɖe ŋutɔ." 
Revelation17:7 Eye mawudɔla la gblɔ nam bena: Nukaŋuti wò mo wɔ yaa ɖo mahã? Magblɔ nyɔnu la kple lã, si le etsɔm, eye ta adre kple dzo ewo li nɛ la, ŋu nya ɣaɣla afia wò." 
Revelation17:8 Lã, si nekpɔ la, enɔ anyi, eye megali o, eye wòle dodo ge atso aʋli me, eye wòayi ɖe gbegblẽ me. Eye ne anyigbadzinɔla, siwo ƒe ŋkɔwo womeŋlɔ ɖe agbegbalẽa me tso xexeame ƒe gɔmeɖoɖoanyi me o la, akpɔ lã la ɖa, alesi wònɔ anyi, eye megali o, eye wòagava la, woƒe mo awɔ yaa." 
Revelation17:9 Afii gɔmesese, si me nunya le la, hiã le: Ta adreawo nye to adre, siwo dzi nyɔnu la bɔbɔ nɔ," 
Revelation17:10 eye wonye fia adre: Wo ame atɔ dze anyi, eye ɖeka ti, mamletɔ la meva haɖe o, eye ne eva la, ele ne be, wòanɔ anyi ʋee ko." 
Revelation17:11 Eye lã, si nɔ anyi, eye megali o la, eya ŋutɔ hã enye enyilia, eye wònye adreawo dometɔ ɖeka, eye wòyina ɖe gbegblẽ me." 
Revelation17:12 Eye dzo ewo, si nekpɔ la, woawoe nye fia ewo, siwo mexɔ fiaɖuƒe haɖe o; gake woawo kple lã la woaxɔ ŋusẽ abe fiawo ene gaƒoƒo ɖeka." 
Revelation17:13 Nenem me siawo la tameɖoɖo ɖeka li na wo, eye wotsɔ woƒe ŋutete kple ŋusẽ na lã la." 
Revelation17:14 Amesiawo awɔ aʋa kple Alẽvi la, eye Alẽvi la laɖu wo dzi; elabena aƒetɔwo dzi aƒetɔ kple fiawo dzi fia wònye, eye amesiwo li kplii la, wonye ame yɔyɔwo kple ame tiatiawo kpakple nuteƒewɔlawo." 
Revelation17:15 Eye wògblɔ nam bena: Tsi, siwo nèkpɔ, siwo dzi gbolo la bɔbɔ nɔ la, wonye dukɔwo kple amehawo kple xexemedukɔwo kpakple gbegbɔgblɔwo." 
Revelation17:16 Eye dzo ewo, siwo nèkpɔ kple lã la, woawo alé fu gbolo la, eye woawɔe aƒedo, eye woaɖe amamae, eye woaɖu eƒe ŋutilã, eye woatɔ dzoe wòafiã keŋkeŋ." 
Revelation17:17 Elabena Mawu tsɔe de woƒe dzi me, bene woawɔ eƒe tameɖoɖo dzi, eye woawɔ tameɖoɖo ɖeka dzi, eye woatsɔ woƒe fiaɖuƒe ana lã la, halase esime woawu Mawu ƒe nyawo nu." 
Revelation17:18 Eye nyɔnu, si nèkpɔ la, enye du gã, si le fia ɖum ɖe anyigba dzi fiawo dzi." 
Revelation18:1 Eye nusiawo megbe la mekpɔ mawudɔla bubua de le didim tso dziƒo, eye ŋusẽ gã le esi, eye eƒe ŋutikɔkɔe klẽ de anyigba dzi." 
Revelation18:2 Eye wòdo ɣli kple gbe sesẽ le gbɔgblɔm bena: Emu, Babilon gã la mu! Eye wòtrɔ zu gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃wo ƒe nɔƒe kple gbɔgbɔ makɔmakɔwo katã ƒe gaxɔ kple xevi makɔmakɔ, siwo katã wotsri la, ƒe xadza." 
Revelation18:3 Elabena dukɔwo katã no eƒe ahasiwɔwɔ ƒe dɔmedzoe ƒe aha la, eye anyigba dzi fiawo wɔ ahasi kplii, eye anyigba dzi sitsalawo trɔ zu kesinɔtɔwo le eƒe hadzedze vivivo ƒe ŋusẽ ŋuti." 
Revelation18:4 Eye mese gbe bubua ɖe tso dziƒo le gbɔgblɔm bena: Mi amesiwo nye nye dukɔ la, mido go tso me, bene miagade ha kplii le eƒe nuvɔ̃wo me o, eye bena miagaxa eƒe fuwɔame ƒe ɖeke o," 
Revelation18:5 elabena eƒe nuvɔ̃wo ko yi ɖatɔ dziƒo, eye Mawu ɖo ŋku eƒe nu madzɔmadzɔ wɔwɔwo dzi." 
Revelation18:6 Miɖo teƒe ne, abe alesi eya hã ɖo eteƒe na mi ene, miɖo teƒe ne teƒe eve le eƒe dɔwɔwɔwo nu, kplu, si me wòtɔtɔ nu le la, mitɔtɔ nu teƒe eve nu ɖe eme nɛ." 
Revelation18:7 Zi geɖe alesi wòdo eɖokui ɖe dzi, eye wòdze ha la, zi geɖe ma ke miwo fui, eye mina wòafa konyi; elabena egblɔ le eƒe dzi me bena: Mebɔbɔ nɔ anyi abe fianyɔnu ene, eye nyemenye ahosi o, eye nyemegale konyi fa ge akpɔ o." 
Revelation18:8 Eyata le ŋkeke ɖeka dzi la eƒe fukpekpewo ava edzi: Ku kple konyifafa kpakple dɔwuame, eye woatɔ dzoe wòafiã keŋkeŋ, elabena Aƒetɔ Mawu, amesi drɔ̃ ʋɔnui la, enye ŋusẽtɔ." 
Revelation18:9 Eye ne anyigba dzi tia, siwo wɔ amatre kplii, eye wonɔ hadzegbe kplii la, akpɔ eƒe bibi ƒe dzudzɔtutu la, woafa avi, eye woafa konyi nɛ." 
Revelation18:10 Eye woanɔ tsitre le adzɔge ke le eƒe fukpekpe ƒe ŋɔdzi la ŋuti agblɔ bena: Baba na wò, baba na wò, Babilon, wò, si nye du gã kple du sesẽ! Elabena gaƒoƒo ɖeka dzi wò ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ la va." 
Revelation18:11 Eye anyigba dzi sitsalawo le avi fam, eye wole konyi fam le tawò; elabena amea ɖeke megale woƒe adzɔnuawo ƒle ge akpɔ o." 
Revelation18:12 Adzɔnu siawo nye: Sika kple klosalo kple kpe xɔasiwo kple adzagbawo kple aklala biɖibiɖi kple aɖabɛ kple seda kple awu dzi kple ati ʋeʋẽe ƒomeviwo katã kple nyiɖu ƒe aɖaŋunu bubu ƒomeviwo katã kple ati xɔasi kple gadzẽ kple ga kple kpe xɔasi ƒe aɖaŋunu bubu ƒomeviwo katã 
Revelation18:13 kple botsyo kple ami ʋeʋẽe kple atike ʋeʋẽe kple ami sisi kple lifi kple aha kple ami kple wɔ nyuitɔ kple lu kple aƒemelãwo kple alẽwo kple sɔwo kple tasiaɖamwo kple ame ƒeƒlewo kpakple amewo ƒe luʋɔwo. 
Revelation18:14 Eye atikutsetse, siwo dzroa wò luʋɔ la, dzo le gbɔwò, eye nu viviwo kple atsyɔ̃ɖonuwo katã bu ɖe wò, eye megale wo kpɔ ge gbeɖegbeɖe akpɔ o." 
Revelation18:15 Eye nusiawo ƒe adzɔdola, siwo to edzi zu kesinɔtɔwo la, woanɔ tsitre le adzɔge ke le eƒe fukpekpe ƒe ŋɔdzi la ŋuti, anɔ avi fam, eye woanɔ konyi fam anɔ gbɔgblɔm bena:" 
Revelation18:16 Baba, baba na du gã la! Eya, si do aklalabiɖibiɖiwu kple aɖabɛwu kple awu dzi, eye wòwu leke kple sika kple kpe xɔasi kple adzagbawo! Elabena le gaƒoƒo ɖeka me kesinɔnu geɖe siawo golẽ petepete." 
Revelation18:17 Eye ʋumefia sia ʋumefia kple ʋuɖola sia ʋuɖola kple kahela sia kahela kpakple ƒu dzi dɔwɔlawo katã wole tsitre le adzɔge ke. 
Revelation18:18 Eye esi wokpe eƒe bibi ƒe dzudzɔtutu la, wodo ɣli gblɔ bena: Du kae sa kple du gã ma mahã?" 
Revelation18:19 Eye wolɔ kewɔ kɔ ɖe la me, eye wodo ɣli le avi fam hele konyi fam le gbɔgblɔm bena: Baba na wò, baba na wo du gã, si me amesiwo katã si ʋu le le ƒu dzɔ la, tro zu kesinɔtɔwo le eƒe kesinɔnyenye ŋuti! Elabena wotsrɔ̃e le gaƒoƒo ɖeka me." 
Revelation18:20 Dzi nedzo mi le eta, wò dziƒo kple mi ame kɔkɔewo kple mi apostolowo kple mi nyagblɔɖilawo; elabena Mawu dra mia nya na mi hebia hlɔ̃e." 
Revelation18:21 Eye mawudɔla sesẽa ɖe tsɔ kpea ɖe, si le abe te gãa ɖe ene, eye wòtsɔe ƒu gbe ɖe ƒu me le gbɔgblɔm bena: Ale woatsɔ Babilon, du gã la, axlã ɖe anyi sesĩe enye si, eye womegale ekpɔ ge gbeɖegbeɖe akpɔ o," 
Revelation18:22 eye womegale saŋkuƒolawo kple hadzilawo kple dzekulawo kple kpẽkulawo ƒe gbe se ge le mewò gbeɖegbeɖe akpɔ o; eye womegale aɖaŋuwɔla bubu ƒomevia ɖeke kpɔ ge le mewò o, eye womegale tetutu se ge le mewò gbeɖegbeɖe akpɔ o;" 
Revelation18:23 eye akaɖi ƒe keklẽ megale keklẽ ge le mewò gbeɖegbeɖe akpɔ o; eye womegale ŋugbetɔ kple ŋugbetɔsrɔ̃ ƒe gbe se ge le mewò gbeɖegbeɖe akpɔ o: elabena wò asitsalawo nye anyigba dzi megãwo; elabena woble dukɔwo katã to wò afakaka me. 
Revelation18:24 Eye wokpɔ nyagblɔɖilawo kple ame kɔkɔewo kpakple amesiwo katã wowu le anyigba dzi la, ƒe ʋu le eme." 
Revelation19:1 Nusiawo megbe la mese gbe gãa ɖe le abe ameha gãa ɖe ƒe gbeɖiɖi ene, le dziƒo le gbɔgblɔm bena: Mikafu Yehowa! Xɔname kple ŋutikɔkɔe kple ŋusẽ nanye mía Mawu la tɔ;" 
Revelation19:2 elabena eƒe ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ nye nyateƒetɔ kple dzɔdzɔetɔ; elabena edrɔ̃ ʋɔnu gbolo gã, si tsɔ eƒe gbolowɔwɔ gblẽ anyigba dzi la, eye wòbia eƒe dɔlawo ƒe ʋu ƒe hlɔ̃ le esi." 
Revelation19:3 Eye wogagblɔ zi evelia bena: Mikafu Yehowa! Eye eƒe dzudzɔ le tutum le dziƒo yim tso mavɔ me yi ɖe mavɔ me. 
Revelation19:4 Eye amegã xoxo blave vɔ eneawo kple nu gbagbe eneawo tsyɔ mo anyi, eye woɖo gbe ɖa na Mawu, amesi bɔbɔ nɔ anyi ɖe fiazikpui dzi la, gblɔ bena: Amen, mikafu Yehowa!" 
Revelation19:5 Eye gbe ɖi tso fiazikpui la me le gbɔgblɔm bena: Mikafu mía Mawu, mi eƒe dɔlawo katã kple mi amesiwo vɔ̃nɛ, mí ɖeviwo kple ame tsitsiwo!" 
Revelation19:6 Eye mese gbea ɖe le abe ameha gãa ɖe ƒe gbeɖiɖi ene, eye wòle abe tsi geɖewo ƒe gbeɖiɖi ene, eye wòle abe dziɖegbe sesẽwo ƒe gbeɖiɖi ene le gbɔgblɔm bena: Mikafu Yehowa! Elabena Aƒetɔ, mía Mawu, ŋusẽkatãtɔ la, le fia ɖum!" 
Revelation19:7 Mina dzi nadzɔ mí, eye míatso aseye, eye mina miatsɔ ŋutikɔkɔe nɛ; elabena Alẽvi la ƒe srɔ̃ɖeŋkekenyuie la ɖo, eye srɔ̃a dzra eɖokui ɖo xoxo." 
Revelation19:8 Eye wona ŋusẽe be, wòado aklalabiɖibiɖiwu dzadzɛ, si le dzo sim; elabena aklala biɖibiɖi la enye ame kɔkɔewo ƒe nu dzɔdzɔe wɔwɔwo." 
Revelation19:9 Eye wògblɔ nam bena: Ŋlɔ bena: Woayra amesiwo wokpe va Alẽvi la ƒe srɔ̃ɖenuɖuɖu la gbɔ! Eye wògagblɔ nam bena: Esiawo nye Mawu ƒe nya vavãwo. 
Revelation19:10 Eye medze klo ɖe eƒe afɔ nu, be made ta agu ne. Eye wògblɔ nam be: Kpɔ ɖa, megawɔe o, wò hadɔla kple nɔviwò, siwo lé Yesu ƒe ɖaseɖiɖi ɖe asi la, ƒe hadɔla menye; de ta agu na Mawu ko! Elabena Yesu ƒe ɖaseɖiɖi la enye nyagblɔɖigbɔgbɔ." 
Revelation19:11 Eye mekpɔ dziƒo le nuvo; eye kpɔ ɖa, mekpɔ sɔ ɣia ɖe, eye woyɔ amesi doe la be nuteƒewɔla kple nyateƒea, eye wòdrɔ̃a ʋɔnu, eye wòwɔa aʋa le dzɔdzɔenyenye me;" 
Revelation19:12 eye eƒe ŋkuwo le abe dzo ƒe aɖe ene, eye fiakuku geɖewo le eta, eye ŋkɔŋɔŋlɔ, si amea leke menya o, negbe eya ŋutɔ koe la, le eŋu;" 
Revelation19:13 eye wòdo awua de, si ŋu wohlẽ ʋu do, eye woyɔ eƒe ŋkɔ be Mawu ƒe nya." 
Revelation19:14 Eye aʋakɔ, siwo le dziƒo la, do sɔ ɣiwo dze eyome, eye wodo aklalabiɖibiɖiwu ɣi dzadzɛ, siwo le dzo sim." 
Revelation19:15 Eye yi ɖaɖɛ do tso eƒe nu me, bena wòatsrɔ̃e adza dukɔwo, eye woatso gatikplɔ akplɔ wo, eye wòafanya weintsetsewo le Mawu, ŋusẽkatãtɔ la, ƒe dɔmedzoedziku ƒe weinfiãnu la me." 
Revelation19:16 Eye ŋkɔŋɔŋlɔ le eƒe awu kple eƒe aligo dzi bena: Fiawo dzi Fia kple aƒetɔwo dzi Aƒetɔ! 
Revelation19:17 Eye mekpɔ mawudɔla ɖekaa ɖe le tsitre le ɣe me, eye wòdo ɣli kple gbe sesẽa ɖe le gbɔgblɔm na xevi, siwo katã dzona le dziƒo titina la bena: Miva ƒo mia ɖokui nu ƒu ɖe Mawu ƒe nuɖuɖu gã la gbɔ," 
Revelation19:18 bena miaɖu fiawo ƒe lã kple aʋafiawo ƒe lã kple ame sesẽwo ƒe lã kple sɔwo kple wo dzinɔlawo ƒe lã kple ablɔɖeviwo kple kluviwo kple ɖeviwo kpakple ame tsitsiwo katã ƒe lã. 
Revelation19:19 Eye mekpɔ lã la kple anyigba dzi fiawo kple woƒe aʋakɔwo ƒo wo ɖokui nu ƒu, be yewoawɔ aʋa kple amesi le sɔ dzi la kple eƒe aʋakɔ la." 
Revelation19:20 Eye wolé lã la kple aʋatsonyagblɔɖila, si wɔ dzesiwo le eƒe ŋku me, esiwo wotsɔ ble amesiwo xɔ lã la ƒe dzesi kple amesiwo de ta agu na eƒe legba; wotsɔ wo ame eve la siaa ƒu gbe ɖe dzota, si le bibim kple dzokpe la me agbagbe." 
Revelation19:21 Eye wotsɔ yi, si do tso amesi le sɔ dzi la ƒe nu me la, wu ame susɔeawo." 
Revelation20:1 Eye mekpɔ mawudɔla ɖe le ɖiɖim tso dziƒo, eye aʋli me safui kple kɔsɔkɔsɔ gãa ɖe le esi." 
Revelation20:2 Eye wòlé ʋɔ driba, ɖa xoxo, si nye Abosam kple Satana la, eye wòblae ƒe akpe ɖeka." 
Revelation20:3 Eye wotsɔe ƒu gbe ɖe aʋli me, eye wotu nu ɖe enu, eye wotre enu, bena ne wòagable dukɔwo o, halase esime ƒe akpe ɖeka la nu nava yi; esia megbe la ele be, woagatui ɣeyiɣi via ɖe." 
Revelation20:4 Eye mekpɔ fiazikpuiwo, eye wobɔbɔ no wo dzi, eye wotsɔ ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ de asi na wo; eye amesiwo nu wotso ta le le Yesu ƒe ɖaseɖiɖi kple Mawu ƒe nya la la la, ƒe luʋɔwo kple amesiwo mede ta agu na lã la alo eƒe legba o, eye womexɔ dzesi ɖe woƒe ŋgowonu alo ɖe woƒe asiwo ŋu o la, gbɔ agbe, eye woɖu fia kple Kristo ƒe akpe ɖeka." 
Revelation20:5 Ame kuku mamleawo la womegbɔ agbe o, vaseɖe esime ƒe akpe ɖeka la nu va yi. Esiae nye tsitretsitsi gbãtɔ." 
Revelation20:6 Yayratɔ kple kɔkɔetɔ enye amesi kpɔ gome le tsitretsitsi gbãtɔ la me; amesiawo dzi ku evelia mekpɔ ŋusẽa ɖeke ɖo o, ke woanye Mawu kple Kristo ƒe nunɔlawo, eye woaɖu fia kplii ƒe akpe ɖeka." 
Revelation20:7 Eye ne ƒe akpe ɖeka la nu va yi la, woatu Satana le gaxɔa me," 
Revelation20:8 eye wòado go, be wòable dukɔ, siwo le anyigba ƒe dzogoe eneawo dzi, esiwo nye Gog kple Magog, be wòaƒo amesiwo ƒe xexlẽme nu le abe ƒutake ene la, nu ƒu hena aʋawɔwɔ." 
Revelation20:9 Eye woyi anyigba la ƒe gbadzaƒe, eye woɖe to ɖe ame kɔkɔewo ƒe asaɖa kple du lolo la ŋu, eye dzo hlẽ tso dziƒo va fiã wo." 
Revelation20:10 Eye wotsɔ Abosam, si ble wo la, ƒu gbe ɖe dzo- kple dzokpeta la me, afisi hã lã la kple aʋatsonyagblɔɖila la le, eye woawɔ fu wo zã kple keli tso mavɔ me yi ɖe mavɔ me." 
Revelation20:11 Eye mekpɔ fiazikpui ɣi gãa ɖe kple amesi bɔbɔ nɔ edzi, amesi ƒe ŋku me anyigba kple dziƒo si tso, eye womegakpɔ teƒea ɖeke na wo o." 
Revelation20:12 Eye mekpɔ ame kukuwo, ame tsitsiwo kple ɖeviwo, le tsitre ɖe fiazikpui la ŋgɔ, eye woʋu agbalẽwo; eye woʋu agbalẽ bubua ɖe, si nye agbegbalẽ; eye wodrɔ̃ ʋɔnu ame kukuawo ɖe nusiwo woŋlɔ ɖe agbalẽawo me le woƒe dɔwɔwɔwo ŋuti la nu." 
Revelation20:13 Eye atsiaƒu ɖe ame kuku, siwo le eme la, hena, eye ku kple tsieƒe woɖe ame kuku, siwo le wo si la, hena, eye wodrɔ̃ ʋɔnu amesiame ɖe eƒe dɔwɔwɔwo nu." 
Revelation20:14 Eye wotsɔ ku kple tsiẽƒe ƒu gbe ɖe dzota la me. Dzota sia enye ku evelia. 
Revelation20:15 Eye ne womekpɔ amea ɖe ƒe ŋkɔŋɔŋlɔ le agbegbalẽa me o la, wotsɔnɛ ƒua gbe ɖe dzota la me." 
Revelation21:1 Eye mekpɔ dziƒo yeye kple anyigba yeye; elabena gbã dziƒo kple gbã nyigba la nu va yi, eye atsiaƒu megali o." 
Revelation21:2 Eye mekpe du kɔkɔe, tsi nye Yerusalem yeye la, le ɖiɖim tso dziƒo tso Mawu gbɔ, eye wodzrae ɖo abe ŋugbetɔ, si wɔwɔ leke na hena srɔ̃a ene." 
Revelation21:3 Eye mese gbe gãa ɖe tso fiazikpui la gbɔ le gbɔgblɔm bena: Kpɔ ɖa, Mawu ƒe agbadɔ la le amewo gbɔ, eye wòanɔ anyi kpli wo, eye woawo hã woanye eƒe dukɔ, eye Mawu ŋutɔ anɔ anyi kpli wo, eye wòanye woƒe Mawu." 
Revelation21:4 Eye Mawu latutu aɖatsi sia aɖatsi ɖa le woƒe ŋku mè, eye ku maganɔ anyi akpɔ o, eye konyifafa kple ɣlidodo kple vevea ɖeke maganɔ anyi o; elabena nu gbãtɔwo nu va yi." 
Revelation21:5 Eye amesi bɔbɔ nɔ fiazikpui dzi la, gblɔ bena: Kpɔ ɖa, mewɔ nuwo katã yeye! Eye wògblɔ be: Ŋlɔe, elabena nya siawo nye nya vavãwo kple nyateƒenyawo." 
Revelation21:6 Eye wògblɔ nam bena: Eva ve me! Nyee nye Alfa kple Omega, gɔmedzedze kple nuwuwu. Amesi ke tsikɔ le ewum la, mana agbetsidzidzi la ƒe ɖee faa." 
Revelation21:7 Amesi ke ɖu dzi la, anyi nusiawo ƒe dome, eye manye eƒe Mawu, eye eya hã anye vinye." 
Revelation21:8 Ke vɔvɔ̃nɔtɔwo kple dzimaxɔsetɔwo kple fewɔlawo kple hlɔ̃dolawo kple matrewɔlawo kple afakalawo kple trɔ̃subɔlawo kple aʋatsokalawo katã la woakpɔ wo tɔ gome le ta, si le bibim kple dzo kpakple dzokpe la me Esia enye ku evelia." 
Revelation21:9 Eye mawudɔla adre, siwo si kplu adre, siwo yɔ fũ kple fuwɔame mamletɔ adreawo nɔ la, dometɔ ɖeka va, eye wòƒo nu kplim gblɔ bena: Va abi, ne mafia ŋugbetɔ, si nye Alẽvi la srɔ̃ la wò!" 
Revelation21:10 Eye wòkplɔm yi to kɔkɔ gãa ɖe dzi le gbɔgbɔ me, eye woɖe du kɔkɔe, Yerusalem, si le ɖiɖim tso dziƒo tso Mawu gbɔ la liam," 
Revelation21:11 esi ŋu Mawu ƒe ŋutikɔkɔe le; eƒe keklẽ le abe kpe xɔasi ŋutɔa ɖe ene, hele abe yaspis-kpe, si me kɔ abe kristalo ene;" 
Revelation21:12 gli kɔkɔ gãa ɖe le eŋu; agbo wuieve le eŋu, eye mawudɔla wuieve le agboawo tame, eye woŋlɔ ŋkɔ, siwo nye Israel-viwo ƒe to wuieveawo ƒe ŋkɔwo la, ɖe wo ŋuti." 
Revelation21:13 Ɣedzeƒe gome la agbo etɔ̃ li, eye anyiehe gome la agbo etɔ̃ li, dziehe gome la agbo etɔ̃ li, eye ɣetoɖoƒe gome la agbo etɔ̃ li." 
Revelation21:14 Gɔmeɖoɖo wuieve li na dua ƒe gli la, eye Alẽvi la ƒe apostolo wuieveawo ƒe ŋkɔwo le wo ŋu." 
Revelation21:15 Eye amesi le nu ƒom kplim la, lé sikadzidzeti ɖe asi, be yeadzidze du le kple eƒe agboawo kpakple eƒe gli la." 
Revelation21:16 Eye du la le dzogoe ene me, eye eƒe didime le abe eƒe kekeme ene; eye wòdzidze du la kple dzidzeti la, wòle stadio akpe wuieve: eƒe didime kple kekeme kple kɔkɔme wosɔ." 
Revelation21:17 Eye wodzidze du la wòle abɔklugui alafa ɖeka kple blane vɔ ene le amewo ƒe dzidzenu, si le mawudɔla si la nu." 
Revelation21:18 Eye nusi wotsɔ ɖo glia la, enye yaspis-kpe, eye du la nye sika dzadzɛ hele abe ahũhɔ̃e dzadzɛ ene." 
Revelation21:19 Eye wotsɔ kpe xɔasi bubu ƒomeviwo katã wɔ leke na dua ƒe gli la ƒe gɔmeɖoɖoawo. Gɔmeɖokpe gbãtɔ nye yaspis, evelia nye safir, etɔ̃lia nye xalkedon, enelia nye smaragd," 
Revelation21:20 atɔ̃lia nye sardonik, adelia nye sardis, adrelia nye krisolit, enyilia nye beril, asiekelia nye topas, ewolia nye krisopras, wuiɖekɛlia nye hiakint, wuievelia nye ametist." 
Revelation21:21 Eye agbo wuieveawo nye adzagba wuieve, agboawo dome ɖesiaɖe nye adzagba ɖeka; eye dua ƒe ablɔ nye sika dzadzɛ abe ahũhɔ̃e, si me wokpɔa nu tonɛ la ene." 
Revelation21:22 Eye nyemekpo gbedoxɔa ɖeke le eme o; elabena Aƒetɔ, Mawu ŋusẽkatãtɔ, kple Alẽvi la wonye eƒe gbedoxɔ." 
Revelation21:23 Eye dua mehiã ɣe alo ɣleti, bene woaklẽ nɛ o; elabena Mawu ƒe ŋutikɔkɔe klẽna nɛ, eye Alẽvi la enye eƒe akaɖi." 
Revelation21:24 Eye dukɔwo azɔ eƒe kekeli me, eye anyigba dzi fiawo atsɔ woƒe atsyɔ̃ ava emee." 
Revelation21:25 Eye womatu eƒe agbowo le ŋkeke me o; elabena zã mado le afima o," 
Revelation21:26 eye woatsɔ dukɔwo ƒe atsyɔ̃ kple bubu ava emee. 
Revelation21:27 Eye nusianu, si nye nu makɔmakɔ kple amesiwo wɔa ŋunyɔnuwo, eye wokaa aʋatso la, womele yiyi ge ɖe eme o, negbe amesiwo woŋlɔ ɖe Alẽvi la ƒe agbegbalẽa me la koe." 
Revelation22:1 Eye wòfia agbetsitɔsisia ɖe, si le dzo sim abe kristalo ene, hele dodom tso Mawu kple Alẽvi la ƒe fiazikpui me le eƒe ablɔ la titina lam." 
Revelation22:2 Eye ɖe tɔsisi la ƒe goawo kple eve dzi la agbeti ti, si tsea ku wuieve, eye wotsena le ɣleti sia ɣleti, eye atiawo ƒe aŋgbawo nye dɔyɔgbe na dukɔwo." 
Revelation22:3 Eye busunua ɖeke megale anyi nɔ ge o, eye Mawu kple Alẽvi la ƒe fiazikpui la anɔ me, eye woƒe dɔlawo asubɔe," 
Revelation22:4 eye woakpɔ eƒe ŋku me, eye eƒe ŋkɔ anɔ woƒe ŋgowonu." 
Revelation22:5 Eye zã megale dodo ge o; eye womele akaɖi alo ɣe ƒe keklẽ hiã ge o; elabena Aƒetɔ Mawu ana keklẽ wo, eye woaɖu fia tso mavɔ me yi ɖe mavɔ me." 
Revelation22:6 Eye wògblɔ nam bena: Nya siawo nye nya vavãwo kple nyateƒenyawo, eye nyagblɔɖilawo ƒe gbɔgbɔwo ƒe Aƒetɔ, Mawu la, dɔ eƒe dɔla, bene wòaɖe nusiwo le eme va ge kpuie la, afia eƒe dɔlawo." 
Revelation22:7 Eye kpɔ ɖa, megbɔna kpuie: Woayra amesiwo lé agbalẽ sia me nyagblɔɖinyawo me ɖe asi la." 
Revelation22:8 Eye nye Yohanes ye nye amesi se nusiawo, eye mekpɔ wo. Eye esi mese wo, eye mekpɔ wo la, medze klo, be made ta agu ɖe mawudɔla, si ɖe nusiawo fiam la, ƒe afɔ nu." 
Revelation22:9 Eye wògblɔ nam bena: Kpɔ ɖa, megawɔe o, wò hadɔla kple nɔviwò, siwo nye nyagblɔɖilawo kple amesiwo lé agbalẽ sia me nyawo me ɖe asi la, ƒe hadɔla menye; de ta agu na Mawu ko!" 
Revelation22:10 Eye wògblɔ nam bena Megade agbalẽ sia me nyagblɔɖinyawo nu o; elabena ɣeyiɣi la tu aƒe. 
Revelation22:11 Amesi ke wɔa vɔ̃ la, neno vɔ̃wɔwɔ dzi ko, eye amesi ke nye ɖime la, nenɔ ɖinuwɔwɔ la dzi ko; eye amesi ke nye ame dzɔdzɔe la, nena nu dzɔdzɔe wɔwɔ la dzi ko, eye amesi ke le kɔkɔe la, nenɔ kɔkɔenyenye la dzi ko." 
Revelation22:12 Kpɔ ɖa, megbɔna kpuie, eye nye fetu kpe ɖe ŋutinye gbɔna, bene maɖo teƒe na amesiame ɖe alesi eƒe dɔwɔwɔ le la nu." 
Revelation22:13 Nyee nye Alfa kple Omega, gbãtɔ kple mlɔetɔ, gɔmedzedze kple nuwuwu:" 
Revelation22:14 Woayra amesiwo nyẽ woƒe awuwo, bene woana ŋusẽ wo woava agbeti la gbɔ, eye ne woato agboawo nu ayi ɖe du la me." 
Revelation22:15 Ke avũwo kple afakalawo kple matrewɔlawo kple hlɔ̃dolawo kple trɔ̃subɔlawo kpakple amesiame, si lɔ̃a aʋatsokaka, eye wòkanɛ la, woatsi agbo la godo." 
Revelation22:16 Nye Yesu ye nye amesi dɔ nye mawudɔla lã, bene wòaɖi ɖase le nusiawo ŋuti na mi hena hameawo. Nyee nye Dawid ƒe ke kple eƒe ƒome, ŋukeɣletivi keklẽ la." 
Revelation22:17 Eye Gbɔgbɔ la kple ŋugbetɔ la le gbɔgblɔm bena: Va! Eye amesi le esem la, negblɔ be: Va! Eye amesi tsikɔ le ewum la, neva; amesi lɔ̃ la, nèxɔ agbetsi la no faa." 
Revelation22:18 Mele ɖase ɖim na amesiame, si le agbalẽ sia me nyagblɔɖilawo sem la bena, ne amea ɖe tso nane kpe ɖe nya siawo ŋuti la, ekema Mawu atsɔ fuwɔame, siwo woŋlɔ ɖe agbalẽ sia me la akpe ɖe eŋuti nɛ," 
Revelation22:19 eye ne amea ɖe aɖe nane le agbalẽ sia me nyagblɔɖinyawo me la, ekema Mawu aɖe eƒe gome atso agbeti la kple du kɔkɔe, siwo woŋlɔ ɖe agbalẽ sia me la me." 
Revelation22:20 Amesi le nusiawo ƒe ɖase ɖim la gblɔ be: Ẽ, megbɔna kpuie! Amen, Aƒetɔ Yesu va!"
